name: AVIRIS-Classic L1B Calibrated Radiance Facility Instrument Collection V1
provider: NASA ORNL DAAC / JPL AVIRIS
theme_canonical: Airborne imaging spectroscopy
theme_raw: AVIRIS-Classic facility archive
coverage: selected airborne campaigns, primarily United States
formats: ENVI binary + header, browse imagery, metadata
access: direct-download / Earthdata
doi_or_citation: ORNL DAAC AVIRIS-Classic L1B Radiance collection; 10.3334/ORNLDAAC/2155
notes: L1B radiance product from NASA's AVIRIS-Classic facility instrument archive. Use alongside AVIRIS JPL portal for campaign context. Phase377 quality resample lychee 2026-06-12: URL reachable.
desc_zh: AVIRIS-Classic L1B 是 NASA 经典机载成像光谱仪的辐射定标数据集合，记录可见光到短波红外范围的高光谱影像。该集合由 ORNL DAAC 发布，适合用于地表材料识别、植被/土壤/矿物光谱分析以及星载高光谱任务校验。数据以 ENVI 类格式和元数据形式提供，覆盖多个历史飞行任务。
desc_en: AVIRIS-Classic L1B is the calibrated radiance archive for NASA's long-running airborne imaging spectrometer. It provides visible-to-shortwave-infrared hyperspectral image cubes from facility campaigns, distributed by ORNL DAAC with metadata and browse products. The archive is useful for surface material mapping, vegetation and soil studies, mineral spectroscopy, and calibration or validation of newer orbital imaging spectroscopy missions.
openness: open NASA data; Earthdata login may be needed for file access
source_type: observed image archive
evidence: ORNL DAAC guide describes L1B radiance imagery and geolocation from AVIRIS-Classic facility archive. v61 recheck added DOI 10.3334/ORNLDAAC/2155 and expanded WDTS/AVIRIS-Classic evidence; duplicate catalog row was avoided. Phase248 CMR recheck: short_name AVIRIS-Classic_L1B_Radiance_2155, concept_id C2714723060-ORNL_CLOUD.

name: AVIRIS-Classic L2 Calibrated Reflectance Facility Instrument Collection V1
provider: NASA ORNL DAAC / JPL AVIRIS
theme_canonical: Airborne imaging spectroscopy
theme_raw: AVIRIS-Classic facility archive

notes: Canonical ORNL DAAC guide verified in v74; replaces earlier NASA Open Data landing URL. Earthdata/ORNL catalog states the AVIRIS-Classic L2 archive currently includes data from 2008-2025 and provides surface reflectance plus water vapor and absorption-path layers in ENVI format.
desc_zh: AVIRIS-Classic L2 是 NASA/JPL AVIRIS-Classic facility archive 的正射校正地表反射率集合，ORNL DAAC DOI 为 10.3334/ORNLDAAC/2154。Earthdata/ORNL 元数据说明该 L2 数据提供地表反射率以及水汽、液态水和冰吸收路径相关层，采用 ENVI 二进制与 .hdr 元数据发布，当前 archive 覆盖 2008-2025。它是长期 AVIRIS-Classic 机载高光谱反射率研究的核心开放数据源。
desc_en: AVIRIS-Classic L2 is the orthocorrected surface-reflectance facility archive for NASA/JPL AVIRIS-Classic, with DOI 10.3334/ORNLDAAC/2154. Earthdata/ORNL metadata describe surface reflectance plus water vapor and liquid-water/ice absorption-path layers distributed in ENVI binary and .hdr metadata format, with the current archive spanning 2008-2025. It is a core open source for long-term AVIRIS-Classic airborne imaging-spectroscopy reflectance studies.
openness: open NASA data; Earthdata login may be needed for file access
source_type: observed image archive
evidence: ORNL DAAC guide and Earthdata catalog cite AVIRIS-Classic L2 Calibrated Reflectance, Facility Instrument Collection V1 with DOI 10.3334/ORNLDAAC/2154; the catalog describes L2 surface reflectance and water-vapor/absorption-path products in ENVI format, currently including data from 2008-2025. Phase248 CMR recheck: short_name AVIRIS-Classic_L2_Reflectance_2154, concept_id C2711871294-ORNL_CLOUD.

notes: JPL portal provides map/table access to AVIRIS-NG flight lines and notes AVIRIS-3 portal linkage. Phase377 quality resample lychee 2026-06-12: URL reachable.
desc_zh: AVIRIS-NG 是 NASA/JPL 的下一代机载成像光谱仪，数据门户按飞行线提供地图、表格和下载入口。该数据常用于甲烷点源、植被功能、地质矿物和水体等高光谱应用研究。门户还提供 KML 图层和解包说明，便于按年份和区域筛选。
desc_en: The AVIRIS-NG Data Portal exposes flight-line-level access to NASA/JPL's next-generation airborne imaging spectrometer data. It supports map and table browsing, KML layers by year, and packaged downloads with unpacking guidance. The archive is widely used for methane plume mapping, vegetation function, mineral and geologic mapping, and other VSWIR imaging spectroscopy applications.
openness: open NASA/JPL portal; some files may require support contact if unavailable
source_type: observed image archive
evidence: The NASA/JPL AVIRIS-NG portal presents map and table access to flight-line records, annual KML layers, packaged data-download utilities and unpacking guidance for AVIRIS-NG airborne imaging spectroscopy campaigns. The row is retained as a portal-level archive rather than a single scene DOI.

name: EMIT L1B At-Sensor Radiance and Geolocation Data
provider: NASA JPL / LP DAAC
theme_canonical: Spaceborne imaging spectroscopy
theme_raw: EMIT Level 1B radiance
coverage: arid and selected global land regions observed from the ISS
formats: NetCDF-4
access: NASA Earthdata / LP DAAC Earthdata Cloud
notes: Canonical CMR/Earthdata Search product URL and DOI refreshed in v77. The broader JPL EMIT data-products page remains a contextual portal rather than the product row URL.
desc_zh: EMIT L1B 是 NASA 地表矿物尘源调查任务的星载高光谱辐射和几何定位产品。EMIT 从国际空间站观测地表，覆盖 381-2493 nm 的可见光至短波红外范围，适合用于矿物、地表材料和温室气体相关应用的基础处理。数据通过 LP DAAC、Earthdata Search、CMR 和 VISIONS 门户访问。
desc_en: EMIT L1B contains at-sensor radiance and geolocation data from NASA's Earth Surface Mineral Dust Source Investigation imaging spectrometer on the ISS. The products are distributed by LP DAAC and expose VSWIR imaging spectroscopy over 381-2493 nm with hundreds of bands. They are foundational inputs for mineral mapping, surface material analysis, and downstream greenhouse-gas or environmental applications.
openness: open NASA data; Earthdata login may be needed for file access
source_type: observed image archive and derived products
evidence: CMR collection EMITL1BRAD concept C2408009906-LPCLOUD links DOI 10.5067/EMIT/EMITL1BRAD.001, LP DAAC ATBD/user guide, and Earthdata Search granules; summary describes EMIT L1B at-sensor calibrated radiance and geolocation from ISS imaging spectroscopy over sunlit regions between 52 N and 52 S.

name: EMIT L2A Estimated Surface Reflectance and Uncertainty and Masks
provider: NASA JPL / LP DAAC
theme_canonical: Spaceborne imaging spectroscopy
theme_raw: EMIT Level 2A reflectance
coverage: arid and selected global land regions observed from the ISS
formats: NetCDF-4
access: NASA Earthdata / LP DAAC Earthdata Cloud
notes: Canonical CMR/Earthdata Search product URL and DOI refreshed in v77, replacing the Earthdata Forum release URL. The separate EMIT L2A Masks V002 product is now represented as its own row.
desc_zh: EMIT L2A 是经过云筛选和大气校正的地表反射率产品，并包含不确定性和掩膜信息。相比 L1B 辐射数据，L2A 更适合直接用于地表矿物、植被、土壤和污染相关的光谱分析。NASA/LP DAAC 提供 DOI、Earthdata Search 和 API 访问方式。
desc_en: EMIT L2A provides estimated surface reflectance, uncertainty, and masks derived from EMIT VSWIR observations. It is more analysis-ready than L1B radiance for surface mineralogy, vegetation, soil, and environmental applications. LP DAAC documents the product DOI and provides access through Earthdata Search, CMR APIs, CMR-STAC, and the VISIONS open data portal.
access_status: Earthdata Search / CMR API / CMR-STAC / VISIONS portal
source_type: observed satellite reflectance product
evidence: CMR collection EMITL2ARFL concept C2408750690-LPCLOUD links DOI 10.5067/EMIT/EMITL2ARFL.001, LP DAAC ATBD/user guide, Earthdata Search granules and preview imagery; summary describes EMIT L2A estimated surface reflectance, uncertainty and masks at 60 m.

provider: NASA JPL / LP DAAC

theme_raw: EMIT mineral abundance and aggregate products
coverage: arid and selected global land regions observed from the ISS

notes: VISIONS mission-products page lists L2B fractional cover, mineral identification/band depth, and L3 aggregated mineral abundance products. Phase417 quality batch: URL verified reachable by lychee on 2026-06-12.
desc_zh: EMIT L2B/L3 产品将高光谱反射率进一步转化为矿物识别、波段深度、丰度和聚合网格信息。它们服务于矿物尘源、地表组成和气候辐射强迫研究，也为生态、污染和地质应用提供分析层。该类产品通过 EMIT/VISIONS 与 NASA Earthdata 体系访问。
desc_en: EMIT L2B and L3 products transform VSWIR reflectance into mineral identification, band-depth, fractional-cover, abundance, and aggregated mineral information. They support mineral dust source studies, surface composition analysis, climate forcing research, and broader geologic or environmental applications. The products are exposed through EMIT/VISIONS and NASA Earthdata access routes.
access_status: Earthdata Search / CMR API / CMR-STAC / VISIONS portal
source_type: derived satellite mineral product portal
evidence: VISIONS mission-products page lists EMIT data products including L2B fractional cover, mineral identification/band depth, and L3 aggregated mineral abundance products derived from imaging spectroscopy observations; treated as an EMIT hyperspectral product-family access page rather than a single DOI record.
scale: 60 m and aggregated grids

name: EnMAP Mission Archive and L2A Analysis Ready Data
provider: DLR / German Space Agency
theme_canonical: Spaceborne imaging spectroscopy
theme_raw: EnMAP archive, L1B/L1C/L2A
coverage: global tasking and archive
formats: L1B/L1C/L2A products; L2A ARD as GeoTIFF+metadata and cloud-optimized GeoTIFF via EOC Geoservice/STAC
access: EOWEB complete archive and EOC Geoservice/EO-Lab L2A ARD access; registered users with valid EOWEB account have EOC Geoservice access
doi_or_citation: No DOI found in checked source; cite dataset/provider page: EnMAP Mission Archive and L2A Analysis Ready Data (DLR / German Space Agency).
notes: Official EnMAP Data & Access page states EOWEB provides the complete EnMAP mission archive and EOC Geoservice provides immediate access to L2A ARD. The EOC Geoservice STAC collection ENMAP_HSI_L2A describes cloud-native CEOS-ARD L2A products with 224 bands, 420-2450 nm wavelength range, atmospheric correction over land (CARD4L) and overall quality flags. A 2025 EnMAP news item states that since 2025-07-04 registered Instrument Planning Portal users with valid EOWEB account can access L2A ARD in EOC Geoservice without a separate account. Phase417 quality batch: URL verified reachable by lychee on 2026-06-12.
desc_zh: EnMAP Mission Archive and L2A ARD 是德国 EnMAP 星载高光谱任务的核心数据入口。官方 Data & Access 页面说明完整任务档案可通过 EOWEB 检索，L2A Analysis Ready Data 可通过 EOC Geoservice 和 EO-Lab 访问；EOC Geoservice 的 STAC 集合 ENMAP_HSI_L2A 将其描述为云原生 CEOS-ARD L2A 高光谱产品，包含 224 个波段、420-2450 nm 光谱范围，并采用陆地大气校正 CARD4L。2025 年 7 月起，已注册 EnMAP Instrument Planning Portal 且拥有有效 EOWEB 账号的用户可访问 EOC Geoservice 中的 L2A ARD。
desc_en: The EnMAP Mission Archive and L2A ARD entry is the core access point for Germany’s EnMAP spaceborne hyperspectral mission. The official Data & Access page states that the complete mission archive is available through EOWEB, while L2A Analysis Ready Data can be accessed through EOC Geoservice and EO-Lab. The EOC Geoservice STAC collection ENMAP_HSI_L2A describes cloud-native CEOS-ARD L2A hyperspectral products with 224 bands from 420 to 2450 nm and atmospheric correction over land (CARD4L). Since July 2025, registered EnMAP Instrument Planning Portal users with a valid EOWEB account can access L2A ARD in EOC Geoservice.
openness: research/open access under EnMAP Data License; portal registration for full archive
source_type: observed image archive
evidence: EnMAP Data & Access page states EOWEB provides the complete archive and EOC Geoservice/EO-Lab provide L2A ARD access. The EOC Geoservice STAC collection ENMAP_HSI_L2A states 224 bands, 420-2450 nm, CEOS-ARD, CARD4L atmospheric correction over land and quality classes. EnMAP 2025-07-11 news states valid EOWEB accounts now access L2A ARD in EOC Geoservice. Phase472 DLR EOC recheck confirmed dedicated EOC Geoservice collection https://geoservice.dlr.de/web/datasets/enmap_l2_hsi is reachable and describes EnMAP HSI Level 2A Hyperspectral Images Global as a standardized, consistent, systematically processed, cloud-native L2A collection for the entire mission, processed with atmospheric correction over land and provided in cloud-optimized GeoTIFF format for direct access/download, with CEOS-ARD metadata.
scale: 30 m class hyperspectral imagery

name: DESIS DLR Earth Sensing Imaging Spectrometer Open Data
provider: DLR / Teledyne Brown Engineering
theme_canonical: Spaceborne imaging spectroscopy
theme_raw: DESIS ISS hyperspectral archive
coverage: selected global acquisitions from the ISS
formats: Cloud-optimized GeoTIFF
access: DLR EOC Geoservice page, EOWEB GeoPortal ordering, STAC collection for DESIS_HSI_L2A, and HTTP L2A download directory
doi_or_citation: 10.15489/hxom21uqeo90; German Aerospace Center (DLR) (2019): DESIS - Hyperspectral Images - Global
notes: DLR Geoservice asset page states DESIS operates on the ISS since 2018, has worldwide acquisitions, about 30 m spatial resolution, 400-1000 nm sensitivity, about 3.3 nm spectral resolution, and 30 x 30 km tiles. The page gives DOI 10.15489/hxom21uqeo90, STAC collection DESIS_HSI_L2A, and HTTP download for DESIS_HSI_L2A 4x-binned CEOS ARD data; it also notes restricted/order workflows for broader product access.
desc_zh: DESIS 是部署在国际空间站平台上的 DLR Earth Sensing Imaging Spectrometer。DLR EOC Geoservice 提供可直接访问和下载的 DESIS 开放数据，并采用云优化 GeoTIFF 格式。该档案对 CHIME 等后续高光谱任务的算法准备、生态监测和城市/环境应用具有参考价值。
desc_en: DESIS is the DLR Earth Sensing Imaging Spectrometer hosted on the ISS. DLR's EOC Geoservice provides open DESIS data in cloud-optimized GeoTIFF format for direct access and download. The archive is valuable for algorithm development ahead of future missions such as CHIME, and for vegetation, urban, and environmental imaging spectroscopy studies.
openness: DLR Geoservice provides DESIS L2A CEOS ARD data via STAC/HTTP download; other DESIS products/order workflows may be restricted or proposal-based for scientific use
source_type: observed image archive
evidence: Updated in phase228 from DLR Geoservice data-asset page hxom21uqeo90: DOI, STAC, HTTP download, coverage, sensor specifications, and access restrictions; lychee phase228 verified the data-asset URL. FEDEO DESIS global collection uid 0f4324af-fa0a-4aaf-9b97-89a4f3325ce1; CMR concept C2207458058-FEDEO. Phase251 FEDEO XML recheck verified collection uid 0f4324af-fa0a-4aaf-9b97-89a4f3325ce1, ISO metadata title DESIS - Hyperspectral Images - Global, product/order text for L1B/L1C/L2A, and access/use constraints restricted/otherRestrictions pointing to the DESIS scientific-use license agreement; lychee v242 verified FEDEO client and ISO XML URLs.

name: PRISMA Hyperspectral Mission Data Archive
provider: Italian Space Agency (ASI)
theme_canonical: Spaceborne imaging spectroscopy
theme_raw: PRISMA archive
coverage: global archive and new acquisitions
license: ASI PRISMA data policy / quasi-open, registration required
formats: PRISMA L1, L2B, L2C and L2D products in HDF5/HE5-style mission products; PRISMA Toolbox supports import/view/convert
access: ASI PRISMA portal request/registration workflow for archived and new acquisitions
doi_or_citation: No DOI found in checked source; cite dataset/provider page: PRISMA Hyperspectral Mission Data Archive (Italian Space Agency (ASI)).
notes: ASI official PRISMA page describes a hyperspectral sensor acquiring VNIR and SWIR products at 30 m spatial resolution plus a 5 m panchromatic camera, and states users can request data through the PRISMA portal. The page also says PRISMA Toolbox supports L1, L2B, L2C and L2D products for import, viewing and conversion. JPL SBG additionally notes 400-2500 nm hyperspectral imagery, 30 km swath and portal search/download after registration. Phase417 quality batch: URL verified reachable by lychee on 2026-06-12.
desc_zh: PRISMA 是意大利航天局 ASI 的星载高光谱任务，将 30 m 空间分辨率的 VNIR/SWIR 高光谱成像仪与 5 m 全色相机结合。ASI 官方页面说明用户可通过 PRISMA portal 请求数据，并提供 PRISMA Toolbox 来导入、查看和转换 L1、L2B、L2C、L2D 产品。JPL SBG 说明 PRISMA 的高光谱影像覆盖约 400-2500 nm、30 km 幅宽，历史档案和新采集数据可在注册后通过 ASI 门户搜索和下载。该任务是 EMIT、EnMAP 之外重要的准开放星载高光谱源。
desc_en: PRISMA is the Italian Space Agency’s spaceborne hyperspectral mission, combining a VNIR/SWIR hyperspectral instrument at 30 m spatial resolution with a 5 m panchromatic camera. The ASI PRISMA page states that users can request data through the PRISMA portal and that PRISMA Toolbox supports import, viewing and conversion of L1, L2B, L2C and L2D products. JPL SBG notes PRISMA hyperspectral imagery from about 400 to 2500 nm, a 30 km swath and search/download access through the ASI portal after registration. It remains a key quasi-open orbital hyperspectral source alongside EMIT and EnMAP.
openness: free/quasi-open after ASI portal registration
source_type: observed image archive
evidence: ASI official PRISMA page states PRISMA integrates a hyperspectral sensor and panchromatic camera, acquires VNIR/SWIR products at 30 m and panchromatic at 5 m, and users can request data through the PRISMA portal; the same page states PRISMA Toolbox supports L1, L2B, L2C and L2D products. JPL SBG states PRISMA archive/new data are accessible after registration and describes 400-2500 nm, 30 m, 30 km swath imagery.
scale: 30 m hyperspectral, 5 m panchromatic

name: EO-1 Hyperion Archive
provider: USGS EROS / NASA EO-1
theme_canonical: Historical hyperspectral archive
theme_raw: Earth Observing-1 Hyperion
coverage: global targeted archive
formats: USGS EarthExplorer products, HDF/GeoTIFF depending product
access: EarthExplorer / USGS data portal
doi_or_citation: No DOI found in checked source; cite dataset/provider page: EO-1 Hyperion Archive (USGS EROS / NASA EO-1).
notes: USGS page describes EO-1 Hyperion hyperspectral products and data access. Historical anchor archive for many benchmark and derived spectral-library datasets. Phase400 quality resample: URL verified alive by lychee in 40-URL high-value unknown/pending batch.
desc_zh: EO-1 Hyperion 是早期民用星载高光谱任务的核心档案，长期支撑全球高光谱算法、矿物识别、农业和生态研究。USGS EROS 页面提供任务说明和数据访问入口，许多后续 benchmark、GHISA 光谱库和文献数据均基于 Hyperion。虽然任务已结束，它仍是历史覆盖最重要的星载高光谱档案之一。
desc_en: The EO-1 Hyperion archive is a foundational historical spaceborne hyperspectral dataset. Distributed through USGS/NASA access routes, it has supported global research in mineral mapping, agriculture, ecology, and hyperspectral algorithm development. Although the mission has ended, Hyperion remains a key source for benchmark scenes, derived spectral libraries, and long-term orbital imaging spectroscopy studies.
openness: open US government data; account/search portal normally required
source_type: historical observed image archive
evidence: The USGS EROS EO-1 page identifies Hyperion as the mission hyperspectral instrument and describes EO-1 data access context through USGS/NASA systems. This row is retained as a historical archive-level entry for EO-1 Hyperion scenes rather than a single scene DOI.

desc_en: HICO, the Hyperspectral Imager for the Coastal Ocean, collected ISS-based hyperspectral observations for coastal and ocean-color studies. NASA Ocean Color provides the access page and notes that the HDF5 data are freely available to the public with an EOSDIS account. The archive is useful for aquatic spectroscopy, coastal ecosystem studies, and algorithm validation.

desc_zh: PACE/OCI 是 NASA 新一代全球水色与大气观测任务的高光谱光学仪器。OCI 产品通过 NASA Ocean Color/OB.DAAC 发布，覆盖海洋生态、气溶胶、云和部分陆地表面反射率等方向。它不是传统窄幅陆地成像光谱仪，但在全球连续高光谱水色数据中具有旗舰地位。
desc_en: PACE's Ocean Color Instrument provides global hyperspectral ocean-color observations distributed by NASA Ocean Color and OB.DAAC. Public science-quality data became available in 2024, with Level 1 and Level 2 products in standard OBPG formats. Although OCI is not a narrow-swath land imaging spectrometer, it is a flagship source for global hyperspectral ocean, atmosphere, and related surface products.

source_type: global ocean-color hyperspectral products
evidence: NASA and Ocean Color pages state public distribution of PACE OCI science data and describe Level 1/2 products.

notes: NEON DP3.30006.002 is the Level 3 AOP surface bidirectional reflectance mosaic: orthorectified UTM hyperspectral raster reflectance from the NEON Imaging Spectrometer, scaled 0-10000, mosaicked into 1 km by 1 km tiles. NEON documentation states this product includes calibration, atmospheric correction, topographic correction, BRDF correction and orthorectification, with all 426 NIS bands. Starting in March 2024, topographic/BRDF corrected products are initially for 2022+ data, with 2013-2021 back-processing expected to roll out from late 2025. desc_zh: NEON AOP DP3.30006.002 是美国国家生态观测网络的三级机载成像光谱仪双向反射率镶嵌产品，覆盖多个生态站点。官方页面说明该产品由 NEON Imaging Spectrometer 生成，经过辐射校准、大气校正、地形校正、BRDF 校正和正射校正，并以 1 km × 1 km HDF5 瓦片发布，包含 426 个反射率波段及 QA/辅助栅格。该产品从 2022 年采集数据开始持续发布，2013-2021 年早期数据的地形/BRDF 修正版本预计滚动回处理。它适合生态遥感、植被功能、生物多样性和长期样地监测研究。
desc_en: NEON AOP DP3.30006.002 is the Level 3 airborne imaging-spectrometer bidirectional reflectance mosaic for National Ecological Observatory Network sites. The NEON product page describes orthorectified UTM hyperspectral raster reflectance derived from the NEON Imaging Spectrometer, with calibration, atmospheric correction, topographic correction, BRDF correction and orthorectification. It is distributed as 1 km by 1 km HDF5 tiles with all 426 reflectance bands plus QA and ancillary rasters. The product is available from 2022 onward, with 2013-2021 data expected to be back-processed on a rolling basis. It supports ecological remote sensing, vegetation function, biodiversity and long-term site monitoring.

desc_zh: 2018 IEEE GRSS Data Fusion Contest Houston 数据集是 University of Houston、NCALM 与 IEEE GRSS IADF 发布的城市多源遥感融合基准。UH 页面说明数据于 2017 年 2 月 16 日在休斯敦大学校园及周边采集，包含 ITRES CASI 1500 高光谱数据、Optech Titan MW 多光谱 LiDAR、DiMAC 高分辨率 RGB 影像和 20 类地物真值。高光谱部分覆盖 380-1050 nm、48 个波段、1 m GSD，可用于城市地物分类、高光谱单传感器分类和多源数据融合研究。数据受竞赛/研究使用条款约束，下载入口公开列出但需邮件确认与引用承诺，原始下载域名当前本地 DNS 解析失败。

The UH page states that NCALM acquired the data over the University of Houston campus and nearby areas on 16 February 2017, using an ITRES CASI 1500 hyperspectral imager, an Optech Titan MW multispectral LiDAR system and a DiMAC high-resolution RGB camera. The hyperspectral component covers 380-1050 nm with 48 bands at 1 m GSD, accompanied by 0.5 m LiDAR products, 5 cm RGB imagery and 20-class ground truth. Access is governed by contest/research terms and an email acknowledgement requirement; the original hyperspectral.ee.uh.edu download host did not resolve during the v175/v176 local check.

desc_en: CHRIS on ESA's PROBA-1 is an important historical spaceborne hyperspectral and multi-angular imaging archive. ESA describes PROBA-1 as an Earth Observation Third Party Mission, with CHRIS providing high-resolution hyperspectral observations in multiple modes. The Proba-1 CHRIS acquisitions are exposed through ESA Third Party Mission and EO-CAT access routes, with registration or ESA access workflow potentially required.
openness: ESA TPM data; generally free, may require ESA registration/request workflow
source_type: historical observed image archive
evidence: ESA TPM online access list includes Proba-1 CHRIS ESA acquisitions; ESA access page says many ESA EO datasets are free after registration and restrained datasets require approval but are provided free upon approval.
scale: about 17-18 m, up to 62 spectral bands depending mode

desc_zh: MUMUCD 是一个多模态、多类别变化检测 benchmark，包含 PRISMA 高光谱、Sentinel-2 多光谱、Sentinel-1 SAR、Dynamic World 土地覆盖和 DEM 等数据层。数据以 Zenodo 大体量压缩包发布，并按地点组织双时相样本。它是目前少见的把开放 PRISMA 高光谱产品纳入变化检测任务的数据集。
desc_en: MUMUCD is a multi-modal, multi-class change detection benchmark that combines PRISMA hyperspectral data with Sentinel-2 multispectral imagery, Sentinel-1 SAR, Dynamic World land-cover layers, DEM data, and derived change maps. It is distributed on Zenodo as large per-site archives. The dataset is a notable example of a PRISMA-based open benchmark for bitemporal change detection research.

source_type: multi-modal change detection benchmark with PRISMA hyperspectral data
evidence: Zenodo record 10674011 cites DOI 10.5281/zenodo.10674011 and states MUMUCD includes bitemporal PRISMA visible/SWIR hyperspectral data, Sentinel-2 multispectral, Sentinel-1 SAR magnitude, Dynamic World land cover, DEM, and derived binary change maps. The record also cites related paper DOI 10.1109/LGRS.2025.3585797 and includes PRISMA ASI license notice.

The latest Zenodo record contains millions of labeled spectra from hundreds of EMIT scenes, distributed as HDF5 files with train/test scene lists and validation material, supporting EMIT quality control, cloud-mask improvement, spectrum-level supervised learning and imaging-spectroscopy cloud detection benchmarks.

desc_zh: HySpecNet-11k 是基于 EnMAP L2A 星载高光谱影像构建的大规模 benchmark，包含 11,483 个非重叠 128×128 patch、224 个光谱波段、30 m GSD。v168 复核发现 TorchGeo 在 Hugging Face 发布了公开 mirror，许可证标为 CC0 1.0，文件以 10 个 `hyspecnet-11k-*.tar.gz` WebDataset 分片和 splits 压缩包提供。该数据适合学习型高光谱压缩、自监督表征学习、基础模型预训练和 EnMAP 场景级遥感高光谱算法评测；原项目页和 Dryad DOI 仍作为 provenance/论文引用保留。
desc_en: HySpecNet-11k is a large-scale benchmark derived from EnMAP L2A spaceborne hyperspectral imagery, containing 11,483 nonoverlapping 128 x 128 patches with 224 spectral bands at 30 m GSD. The v168 recheck found that TorchGeo now provides a public Hugging Face mirror under CC0 1.0, distributed as ten `hyspecnet-11k-*.tar.gz` WebDataset shards plus a splits archive. It is useful for learning-based hyperspectral compression, self-supervised representation learning, foundation-model pretraining and EnMAP hyperspectral remote-sensing benchmarking; the original project page and Dryad DOI remain as provenance and citation context.
openness: Hugging Face mirror public; cardData license cc0-1.0; original project/Dryad access history documented in registry
source_type: spaceborne EnMAP hyperspectral benchmark WebDataset mirror
evidence: Hugging Face API for torchgeo/hyspecnet returned status via public dataset metadata: private false, downloads 71, tags including license:cc0-1.0, format:webdataset, modality:image, library:datasets, library:webdataset and region:us. API siblings list README.md, hyspecnet-11k-01.tar.gz through hyspecnet-11k-10.tar.gz and hyspecnet-11k-splits.tar.gz. Existing project evidence states HySpecNet-11k contains 11,483 nonoverlapping EnMAP patches, each 128 x 128 pixels with 224 spectral bands at 30 m GSD, built from 250 L2A EnMAP tiles.
scale: 128 x 128 pixels, 224 bands, 30 m
feature_count: 11,483 EnMAP hyperspectral patches; 10 WebDataset shards plus split archive on Hugging Face

desc_en: The EMIT Greenhouse Gases portal shows high-confidence, research-grade methane plume complexes derived from EMIT hyperspectral observations of point-source emitters. It is not a raw image-cube archive, but a derived product based on shortwave-infrared absorption signatures and updated as plume complexes are identified. It is useful for greenhouse-gas monitoring, super-emitter screening, and methane retrieval validation.

evidence: VISIONS greenhouse-gases page provides EMIT imaging-spectroscopy methane plume complex data products, describing high-confidence research-grade methane plume complexes from point-source emitters and updates as plumes are identified.

desc_en: Methane Plumes from Airborne Surveys compiles methane plume imagery, source lists, and quantified emission-rate estimates from Global Airborne Observatory and AVIRIS-NG airborne surveys. It is a derived greenhouse-gas dataset rather than a general-purpose hyperspectral image archive. The dataset is useful for training and validating hyperspectral methane detection, plume segmentation, and emission estimation workflows.

desc_zh: STARCOP 是面向甲烷羽流语义分割的机器学习高光谱数据集，公开发布了人工精修标注的 AVIRIS-NG 高光谱样本，并提供训练/测试划分。数据集还包含模拟的 WorldView-3 多光谱视图，用于跨传感器比较和降低遥感甲烷检测误报。该数据是高光谱甲烷检测领域的重要开放 benchmark，DOI 为 10.5281/zenodo.7863343；许可为 CC BY-NC 4.0，复用时需注意非商业限制。
desc_en: STARCOP is a machine-learning-ready methane plume semantic-segmentation dataset with manually refined labels over AVIRIS-NG hyperspectral imagery. The Zenodo release provides train/test archives and simulated WorldView-3 multispectral views for cross-sensor benchmarking and false-positive reduction. It is a key open benchmark for hyperspectral methane detection, DOI 10.5281/zenodo.7863343, licensed CC BY-NC 4.0 for non-commercial reuse.
source_type: derived_benchmark_dataset
evidence: Zenodo record for STARCOP releases AVIRIS-NG methane plume segmentation data and related products; v4 lychee check successful. DataCite DOI 10.5281/zenodo.7863343 also reports CC BY-NC 4.0 rights, hyperspectral/AVIRIS/methane subjects, manually refined AVIRIS-NG labels, and simulated WorldView-3 views.

desc_zh: AVIRIS-NG CH4/CO2 Benchmark 是 JPL 为温室气体羽流反演算法比较整理的 10 景机载高光谱数据。样本覆盖美国和印度的多种点源，包括垃圾填埋场、油气基础设施、污水处理、奶牛场、矿山和电厂等。页面提供甲烷/二氧化碳反演结果、正射/非正射辐射和反射率下载，是温室气体高光谱算法的权威小型 benchmark。
desc_en: The AVIRIS-NG Methane and Carbon Dioxide Plume Benchmark is a curated set of ten airborne imaging spectroscopy scenes for comparing greenhouse-gas retrieval algorithms. The scenes cover point sources in the United States and India, including landfills, oil and gas infrastructure, wastewater treatment, dairy operations, mines, and power plants. JPL provides downloads for retrieval products, orthorectified and non-orthorectified radiance, reflectance, and metadata.
source_type: benchmark_dataset

The data were acquired during NASA's Synergistic TEMPO Air Quality Science campaign between June and August 2023. It complements EMIT, STARCOP, and the JPL AVIRIS-NG plume benchmark for greenhouse-gas imaging spectroscopy research.

desc_en: HISUI is Japan's spaceborne hyperspectral imager on the ISS/Kibo module, covering the visible, near-infrared, and shortwave-infrared range with 185 bands. Tellus provides catalog access, browser viewing through Traveler, and an API path; sample scenes can be viewed after account registration, while broader access uses an application workflow. It is relevant for mineral, vegetation, soil, coastal, and methane-oriented hyperspectral studies, with product-specific terms that must be checked before redistribution.

source_type: observed satellite image archive

Phase472 Tellus recheck confirmed the English HISUI page is reachable and states HISUI is a spaceborne hyperspectral sensor on ISS/Kibo, with 185 bands from VNIR to SWIR at 10 nm or 12.5 nm spectral resolution, free price in the Tellus catalog but browser/API operations require login. Tellus news states HISUI data became available free of charge in 2022 and the Japanese promotion page describes global-scale observation capability.

desc_en: The Carbon Mapper data portal publishes global methane and carbon dioxide point-source emission observations, including plume locations, imagery, emission rates, uncertainties, source records, and atmospheric retrievals. Its sources include hyperspectral systems such as Tanager-1, EMIT, AVIRIS/AVIRIS-NG, and ASU's Global Airborne Observatory. The portal is public-interest and non-commercial oriented, while API/STAC access requires account registration and commercial or redistribution use needs terms review.

Planet documentation describes Tanager as acquiring about 426 bands at roughly 5 nm spacing from about 380 to 2500 nm at around 30 m resolution, with TanagerScene products delivered as native HDF5 radiance or surface-reflectance assets.

source_type: observed satellite open STAC imagery
evidence: Planet STAC browser describes Tanager Core Imagery sample products as Basic and orthorectified core imagery from Tanager-1 under CC BY 4.0 and lists 9 child collections: Agriculture, Coastal and Water Bodies, Energy and Mining, Fire, GHG Plumes, Natural Lands, ROCX 2025, Snow and Ice and Urban. Planet Tanager documentation states approximately 426 bands, about 5 nm spacing, approximately 380-2500 nm, 30 m pixel resolution, TanagerScene item type, and native HDF5 radiance/surface-reflectance products. Example STAC item 20250806_164239_82_4001 shows raster metadata and average spatial resolution about 33.81 m.

It also provides labeled subsets for land cover, crop type, and tree species tasks, with access governed by the EnMAP data license.

desc_en: UNEP-IMEO MARS-Hyperspectral is a hyperspectral methane point-source detection dataset used in the Methane Alert and Response System workflow. The Hugging Face README states that it provides GeoTIFF datasets built from EMIT, EnMAP and PRISMA hyperspectral sensors for training and evaluating AI models that have supported MARS QA/QC since April 2025. Samples are organized by sensor and train/validation/test CSV splits, with 256x256 tiles or full-tile/full-granule scenes. Each sample typically includes `plumemask.tif`, `rgb.tif`, wide matched-filter products, MAG1C/basic matched-filter products where available, and `info.json`, making the dataset useful for methane plume segmentation, candidate screening and cross-sensor evaluation.

desc_en: CORAL PRISM Reflectance Data is the airborne imaging-spectroscopy reflectance product from NASA's COral Reef Airborne Laboratory mission, acquired by the PRISM sensor aboard a G-IV aircraft. The campaign surveyed coral reef regions around the Mariana Islands, Palau, the Great Barrier Reef, the main Hawaiian Islands, and the Florida Keys to provide consistent observations of reef composition. NASA CMR exposes the collection through Earthdata Search granule access for coral-reef remote sensing, water-column correction, and coastal imaging-spectroscopy studies.

It contains 7,572 curated Rrs spectra at 1 nm intervals from 350-900 nm across 450 water bodies, with co-located variables such as chlorophyll a, total suspended solids, CDOM absorption, and Secchi depth. It is a major open benchmark for aquatic remote sensing, water-quality retrieval, and hyperspectral algorithm validation.

AVIRIS-3 is closely related in design to EMIT and supports surface composition, ecology, geology, wetlands and aquatic ecosystems, agriculture, and orbital-mission calibration studies.

Phase400 quality resample: URL verified alive by lychee in 40-URL high-value unknown/pending batch.
desc_zh: SISTER AVIRIS-NG L2A RSRFL V002 是基于 AVIRIS-NG 多任务观测生成的 SBG 预研重采样地表反射率产品。数据将 AVIRIS-NG 高光谱观测整理为 30 m 空间分辨率、10 nm 光谱间隔的反射率和不确定性产品。它是连接航空高光谱观测和未来 NASA SBG 星载产品的重要桥梁数据。
desc_en: SISTER AVIRIS-NG L2A RSRFL V002 is a NASA SISTER experimental resampled surface-reflectance product derived from selected AVIRIS-NG scenes. It converts airborne AVIRIS-NG observations into 30 m, 10 nm SBG-like reflectance and uncertainty products. The dataset is an important bridge between airborne imaging spectroscopy and future NASA SBG orbital product workflows.
openness: open NASA EOSDIS collection; Earthdata login may be needed
source_type: SBG pathfinder resampled reflectance product
evidence: ORNL DAAC guide states the dataset contains experimental AVIRIS-NG L2A resampled surface reflectances and uncertainties at 30 m for 2014-2022 selected scenes and cites DOI 10.3334/ORNLDAAC/2191.

The ORNL DAAC guide reports 15 selected scenes, 135 total files, and EMIT coverage from 381-2493 nm. It supports testing of future SBG-style algorithms and workflows on selected global spaceborne scenes.

Enhanced L2B includes topographic, glint, and BRDF corrections over South Africa's Greater Cape Floristic Region. v68 canonical URL moved from data.gov catalog record to ORNL DAAC guide; data.gov retained as discovery evidence in registry.
desc_zh: BioSCape AVIRIS-NG L2B Enhanced Surface Reflectance 是 NASA BioSCape 项目的航空高光谱增强地表反射率产品，覆盖南非大开普植物区。AVIRIS-NG 于 2023 年 10-11 月搭载 NASA Gulfstream III 获取影像，L2B 产品包含地形、耀斑和 BRDF 校正。该数据适合生物多样性制图、植被功能性状、沿海生态系统和航空光谱-激光雷达联合研究。
desc_en: BioSCape AVIRIS-NG L2B Enhanced Surface Reflectance is the airborne hyperspectral enhanced reflectance product from NASA's BioSCape project over South Africa's Greater Cape Floristic Region. AVIRIS-NG was flown on a NASA Gulfstream III in October-November 2023, and the L2B product includes topographic, glint, and BRDF corrections. It supports biodiversity mapping, vegetation functional traits, coastal ecosystems, and airborne spectroscopy-lidar integration.
openness: open NASA/ORNL DAAC record; Earthdata login may be needed
source_type: biodiversity campaign enhanced reflectance product
evidence: ORNL DAAC BioSCape guide gives DOI 10.3334/ORNLDAAC/2385 and states this dataset holds AVIRIS-NG L2B enhanced corrected surface reflectance acquired over South Africa GCFR in October-November 2023, derived from 425-band L1B radiance with topographic, glint and BRDF corrections, distributed as 3,647 netCDF files. Phase246 CMR recheck: short_name BioSCape_AVNG_L2B_BRDF_GCFR_2385, concept_id C3567037541-ORNL_CLOUD.
scale: 425-band AVIRIS-NG product
feature_count: 3,647 files

desc_en: BioSCape AVIRIS-NG L3 Resampled Reflectance Mosaics V2 resamples and mosaics BioSCape AVIRIS-NG L2B surface reflectance into a regular tile system. ORNL DAAC describes 5 m spatial resolution, 807 tiles, reflectance and uncertainty in netCDF, and RGB quicklook imagery. It is more convenient than flight-line products for regional biodiversity modeling and mapping workflows.
openness: open NASA EOSDIS collection; Earthdata login may be needed
source_type: biodiversity campaign reflectance mosaic product
evidence: ORNL DAAC and search metadata state BioSCape L3 resampled reflectance mosaics use AVIRIS-NG L2B data resampled to 5 m and mosaiced into 807 tiles, DOI 10.3334/ORNLDAAC/2427. Phase246 CMR recheck: short_name BioSCape_ANG_V02_L3_RFL_Mosaic_2427, concept_id C3523930138-ORNL_CLOUD.

feature_count: 807 tiles

notes: SHIFT weekly AVIRIS-NG VSWIR time series designed to support NASA SBG traceability analyses and seasonal algorithm testing. Phase400 quality resample: URL verified alive by lychee in 40-URL high-value unknown/pending batch.
desc_zh: SHIFT AVIRIS-NG L2A V2 是 NASA Surface Biology and Geology High Frequency Time Series 活动的航空高光谱时间序列产品。AVIRIS-NG 在 2022 年 2-5 月及 9 月以近似周尺度重复获取 Santa Barbara 区域 VSWIR 影像，数据提供 425 波段正射校正反射率和不确定性。它非常适合研究高光谱重复观测、物候变化、算法稳定性和 SBG 任务价值评估。
desc_en: SHIFT AVIRIS-NG L2A V2 is an airborne hyperspectral time-series product from NASA's Surface Biology and Geology High Frequency Time Series activity. AVIRIS-NG repeatedly acquired VSWIR imagery over the Santa Barbara region at an approximately weekly cadence in February-May and September 2022, providing 425-band orthorectified reflectance and uncertainty. It is valuable for hyperspectral revisit studies, phenology, algorithm stability, and SBG mission traceability analysis.
openness: open NASA EOSDIS collection; Earthdata login may be needed
source_type: high-frequency airborne hyperspectral time-series product
evidence: ORNL DAAC guide states SHIFT AVIRIS-NG L2A V2 contains weekly 2022 orthorectified surface reflectance from AVIRIS-NG, 425 bands from 380-2500 nm, and DOI 10.3334/ORNLDAAC/2431. Phase246 CMR recheck: short_name SHIFT_AVNG_L2A_RFL_V2_2431, concept_id C3834287411-ORNL_CLOUD.
scale: 425 bands; weekly 2022 campaign

desc_zh: Delta-X AVIRIS-NG L2B BRDF-Adjusted Surface Reflectance V2 覆盖密西西比河三角洲的 Atchafalaya 和 Terrebonne 盆地，提供经 BRDF 和太阳耀斑校正的航空高光谱地表反射率。数据由 AVIRIS-NG 在 2021 年春季和秋季 Delta-X 部署期间获取。它对湿地植被、三角洲沉积、沿海生态和水陆交错区高光谱分析尤其有价值。
desc_en: Delta-X AVIRIS-NG L2B BRDF-Adjusted Surface Reflectance V2 covers the Atchafalaya and Terrebonne basins of the Mississippi River Delta with BRDF- and sunglint-corrected airborne hyperspectral surface reflectance. The imagery was acquired by AVIRIS-NG during spring and fall 2021 Delta-X deployments. It is especially useful for wetland vegetation, deltaic sediment, coastal ecology, and land-water interface hyperspectral analysis.
openness: open NASA EOSDIS collection; Earthdata login may be needed
source_type: coastal delta campaign corrected reflectance product
evidence: ORNL DAAC guide states the dataset provides AVIRIS-NG BRDF- and sunglint-corrected surface spectral reflectance over Atchafalaya and Terrebonne basins during 2021 Delta-X deployments and cites DOI 10.3334/ORNLDAAC/2139.

AVIRIS-5 measures 380-2500 nm at 5-nm intervals and is similar in design to EMIT. Phase400 quality resample: URL verified alive by lychee in 40-URL high-value unknown/pending batch.
desc_zh: AVIRIS-5 L2B Greenhouse Gas Enhancements 是 NASA AVIRIS-5 新一代机载高光谱仪的温室气体增强量产品集合。数据包含甲烷和二氧化碳增强量、逐像元不确定性和敏感度，以云优化 GeoTIFF 等形式发布。AVIRIS-5 覆盖 380-2500 nm、约 5 nm 间隔，适合甲烷/CO2 点源探测、温室气体遥感和 EMIT 类星载算法验证。
desc_en: AVIRIS-5 L2B Greenhouse Gas Enhancements is the facility product collection for methane and carbon dioxide enhancement retrievals from NASA's AVIRIS-5 airborne imaging spectrometer. It provides GHG enhancement layers with per-pixel uncertainty and sensitivity in cloud-optimized GeoTIFF and related ancillary formats. AVIRIS-5 covers 380-2500 nm at about 5 nm intervals and is useful for methane/CO2 point-source detection, greenhouse-gas remote sensing, and EMIT-like algorithm validation.
openness: open NASA EOSDIS collection; Earthdata login may be needed
source_type: airborne greenhouse gas hyperspectral product
evidence: ORNL DAAC guide states AVIRIS-5 L2B GHG contains methane and carbon dioxide enhancements, uncertainty and sensitivity products, measures 380-2500 nm at 5-nm intervals, uses COG format, and cites DOI 10.3334/ORNLDAAC/2485.
scale: 380-2500 nm; 5 nm intervals; altitude-dependent spatial resolution

desc_en: WDTS AVIRIS-Classic L2B provides corrected and georectified AVIRIS-Classic surface reflectance imagery for NASA's Western Diversity Time Series project over California and Nevada from 2013-2018. It organizes classic AVIRIS airborne hyperspectral observations into a thematic biodiversity and time-series product. The dataset complements the general AVIRIS facility archive for regional ecology and long-term change studies.

desc_zh: EnMAP Campaign Archive 2008-2016 是德国 EnMAP 预研阶段形成的机载高光谱活动档案。门户列出多地区、多传感器的 L1/L2 航空高光谱数据及相关野外/实验室测量，覆盖农业、森林、城市、土壤、地质和环境梯度等主题。它适合用作 EnMAP 方法开发、传感器交叉验证和应用算法训练的开放机构数据源。
desc_en: The EnMAP Campaign Archive 2008-2016 is an airborne hyperspectral campaign archive from the German EnMAP preparatory science program. It lists multi-sensor L1/L2 campaign products and associated field or laboratory measurements across agriculture, forest, urban, soil, geology, and environmental-gradient applications. The archive is useful for EnMAP method development, sensor cross-calibration, and application-oriented algorithm testing.
openness: free of charge under a Creative Commons License
source_type: institutional airborne campaign archive
evidence: The EnMAP portal states that hyperspectral aerial campaigns were carried out for application development and that all data are provided free of charge under a Creative Commons License.

desc_zh: APEX Open Science Data Set 是 ESA 相关 APEX 机载成像光谱仪公开样例数据。数据在瑞士 Baden 附近采集，提供高光谱影像立方体、处理说明和地面真值材料，可直接下载。它适合用于航空高光谱预处理、分类、地物光谱分析和 Sentinel/EnMAP 等任务模拟研究。
desc_en: The APEX Open Science Data Set is a public sample data cube from the ESA-related APEX airborne imaging spectrometer. It was acquired near Baden, Switzerland and provides the hyperspectral image cube, processing information, and ground-truth files for direct download. It is useful for airborne hyperspectral preprocessing, classification, spectral analysis, and satellite-mission simulation studies.
openness: freely usable with requested citation
source_type: open airborne sample data cube

file_size: about 815 MB for the image cube according to the flyer

desc_en: BELAIR is a Belgian EO test-site network that combines in-situ, drone, airborne, and satellite observations. VITO states that APEX captured multiple hyperspectral images over the BELAIR sites and that the extended campaign data are made available through the BELAIR Geoportal. The resource is relevant for mission validation, agriculture, forestry, coastal studies, and multi-platform EO research.
openness: open access / available through BELAIR Geoportal after campaigns
source_type: institutional EO test-site campaign archive
evidence: The VITO BELAIR page states that APEX captured multiple hyperspectral images of all BELAIR sites and that data are openly available after campaigns through the BELAIR website and Geoportal.

provider: CSIRO Earth Observation Centre

notes: CSIRO metadata are public; the portal says files are not approved for general release and users should contact the collection contact person. Phase417 quality batch: URL verified reachable by lychee on 2026-06-12.
desc_zh: CSIRO HyMap Surveys 是澳大利亚 CSIRO Earth Observation Centre 在 1998-2003 年科学活动期间获取的航空高光谱档案。数据包含 HyMap 传感器辐射和反射率产品，覆盖澳大利亚及部分海外活动区。它不是直接开放下载，元数据公开、文件需联系申请，因此适合作为“可从开放机构获取/需审批”的高光谱资源记录。
desc_en: CSIRO HyMap Surveys is an airborne hyperspectral archive acquired by the CSIRO Earth Observation Centre during science campaigns from 1998 to 2003. The collection includes HyMap radiance and reflectance products over Australia and some overseas areas. The metadata are public, while file access requires contacting CSIRO, so it is best treated as an institutional request-access hyperspectral resource.
openness: public metadata; restricted/request file access
source_type: institutional airborne archive
evidence: CSIRO describes the collection as HyMap surveys from EOC science campaigns and says metadata are public while files require contacting the collection owner.
scale: multi-campaign archive

name: TERN Hyperspectral Ground Calibration Data - Australian Field Sites

notes: This is hyperspectral ground calibration data rather than imagery, but it directly supports validation of at-surface reflectance for airborne hyperspectral image data. Phase417 quality batch: URL verified reachable by lychee on 2026-06-12.
desc_zh: TERN Hyperspectral Ground Calibration Data 是澳大利亚多个野外站点的地面光谱辐射计定标数据。数据用于连接地面测量与航空高光谱影像的地表反射率验证，也服务于 Landsat、MODIS 等中分辨率产品校准验证。它不是影像立方体，但对遥感高光谱数据处理链很关键，应作为辅助定标/验证开放数据单独标注。
desc_en: TERN Hyperspectral Ground Calibration Data provides field spectroradiometer measurements from Australian field sites. The data support calibration and validation of at-surface reflectance for airborne hyperspectral imagery and medium-resolution satellite products. It is not an image cube, but it is an important open calibration and validation companion dataset for hyperspectral remote sensing.
openness: open TERN metadata and access links
source_type: field spectroscopy calibration dataset
evidence: TERN states that the hyperspectral ground-based data are used for calibration and validation of at-surface reflectance of airborne hyperspectral image data and provides access links.
scale: multi-site field dataset

desc_en: The University of Toronto HSI-301 Dataset is a 301-band hyperspectral benchmark from southern Ontario, Canada. It contains suburban, urban, and forest scenes together with reference polygons for classification and segmentation. The dataset is useful for land-cover classification, region segmentation, and high-spatial-resolution hyperspectral algorithm testing.

evidence: The project page states that UT-HSI-301 consists of three 301-channel hyperspectral images and provides ZIP downloads plus polygon ground-truth shapefiles under CC BY 4.0.

The portal describes CASI as a VNIR pushbroom spectrographic imager and supplies time-stamped GeoTIFF 5 km tiles plus coverage metadata. doi_or_citation: Thoreau et al. 2024, ISPRS Journal of Photogrammetry and Remote Sensing, DOI:10.1016/j.isprsjprs.2024.05.003; Roupioz et al. 2023, Data in Brief, DOI:10.1016/j.dib.2023.109109

Phase417 quality batch: URL verified reachable by lychee on 2026-06-12. v426 Hugging Face API recheck confirmed public mirror Romain3Ch216/TlseHypDataSet with BSQ/HDR reflectance tiles.
desc_zh: Toulouse Hyperspectral Data Set 是法国 Toulouse 城市区域的航空高光谱 benchmark。数据由 CAMCATT-AI4GEO 活动中的 AisaFENIX 传感器获取，提供 1 m 空间分辨率、0.4-2.5 微米范围内 310 个可用波段，并配套稀疏地表覆盖标签和标准训练/测试划分。它适合城市地物分类、半监督学习、自监督表征学习和像素级语义分割研究。
desc_en: The Toulouse Hyperspectral Data Set is an airborne urban hyperspectral benchmark over Toulouse, France. It uses AisaFENIX imagery from the CAMCATT-AI4GEO campaign, providing 1 m ground-level reflectance data with 310 usable channels from 0.4 to 2.5 micrometers, along with sparse land-cover labels and standard train/test splits. It is useful for urban land-cover classification, semi-supervised learning, self-supervised representation learning, and pixel-level semantic segmentation.
openness: freely downloadable tiles and derived benchmark assets; non-commercial project-site license noted
source_type: academic airborne hyperspectral benchmark
evidence: The project page states that the hyperspectral image tiles can be freely downloaded, that 1D data are on Hugging Face, and that ground truth is available via the Python library/GitHub. HF API phase470 recheck of mirror Romain3Ch216/TlseHypDataSet: public dataset with 24 siblings including reflectance_rect .bsq/.hdr files for TLS 2021 flight lines; primary canonical website row retained.
scale: 90 km2 urban area, 1 m GSD, 310 channels
feature_count: more than 380,000 sparsely labeled pixels

The page states that the program uses a Creative Commons CC BY-SA 4.0 license. It serves as a country-focused access point alongside the broader Tanager open STAC catalog and is useful for testing fusion between hyperspectral imagery, PlanetScope time series, forest carbon, soil-water, and other Planet products.

desc_zh: Tinto 是面向地学三维露头解释的多传感器高光谱点云 benchmark。数据包含西班牙 Corta Atalaya 的真实数字露头模型、光谱属性、地质标签，以及基于真实数据重建的合成孪生数据。它不是传统航空/星载影像，但对高光谱地质制图、hypercloud 分割和 3D 深度学习评测很有价值，应作为边界型地学高光谱数据保留。
desc_en: Tinto is a multisensor hyperspectral point-cloud benchmark for 3D geoscience interpretation. It includes a real digital outcrop model from Corta Atalaya, Spain, spectral attributes, geological labels, and a synthetic twin reconstructed from the original data. It is not conventional airborne or satellite imagery, but it is valuable for hyperspectral geological mapping, hypercloud segmentation, and 3D deep-learning benchmarks.
openness: open access, CC BY 4.0
source_type: open geoscience hyperspectral point-cloud benchmark
evidence: RODARE lists the dataset as open access, provides an 8.6 GB Tinto.zip download, states it contains 3,242,964 labeled points, and assigns CC BY 4.0 to the files.

feature_count: 3,242,964 labeled points

desc_en: Hyper-Drive is a VIS-SWIR hyperspectral dataset for robotic perception in unstructured terrain. The system collects and registers datacubes from 660 to 1700 nm, with RGB imagery, solar spectra, segmentation labels, instance labels, and calibration files. It is close-range/mobile-platform hyperspectral data rather than conventional remote-sensing imagery, but it is useful for terrain classification, material recognition, and multimodal hyperspectral methods.

desc_zh: MASTER WH2yMSIE 2024 是 NASA ER-2 平台在 Westcoast & Heartland Hyperspectral Microwave Sensor Intensive Experiment 期间获取的航空光谱数据。活动目标包括首次演示 hyperspectral microwave 机载观测，并由 MASTER 等可见光、红外和主动传感器配合观测。该记录属于边界型遥感高光谱/多光谱航空数据，适合研究大气边界层、地表类型和多传感器协同。
desc_en: MASTER WH2yMSIE 2024 is an airborne spectral dataset collected from NASA's ER-2 during the Westcoast & Heartland Hyperspectral Microwave Sensor Intensive Experiment. The campaign explicitly targeted hyperspectral microwave airborne measurements and included complementary visible, infrared, and active sensors such as MASTER. It is a boundary hyperspectral-adjacent remote-sensing record useful for planetary boundary-layer, surface-type, and multi-sensor studies.

source_type: airborne multispectral support/boundary dataset

desc_zh: 该数据集是明尼苏达大学发布的小麦产量表型 UAV 高光谱数据。PIKA II 高光谱相机安装在 DJI Matrice 600 Pro 无人机上，采集 400-900 nm 的 240 个光谱通道，并裁剪为 1021 个小麦小区的高光谱立方体。它同时提供小区粒产量真值，适合高通量作物表型、产量预测和农业遥感深度学习研究。
desc_en: This University of Minnesota dataset provides UAV-based hyperspectral wheat yield phenotyping data. A Resonon PIKA II camera mounted on a DJI Matrice 600 Pro acquired 240 spectral channels from 400 to 900 nm, and the imagery was cropped into 1021 wheat-plot hyperspectral cubes. Plot-level grain yield ground truth is included, making the dataset useful for high-throughput phenotyping, yield prediction, and agricultural remote-sensing deep learning.

source_type: agricultural UAV hyperspectral dataset
evidence: Experts@Minnesota describes 1021 wheat plot hyperspectral cubes, 240 VNIR channels, MAT/NPY formats, and yield ground truth, with DOI 10.13020/0ch0-vb18.

feature_count: 1021 plot cubes

Phase419 quality batch: URL verified reachable by lychee on 2026-06-12. v457 evidence refresh replaced older Ag Data Commons alias/datacube URL with the canonical DOI page and added file-size/species/API evidence.
desc_zh: WeedCube 是面向作物和杂草识别的近景高光谱数据集，包含 canola、soybean、sugarbeet 三种作物和 kochia、waterhemp、redroot pigweed、ragweed 四种入侵杂草。数据由 400-1000 nm VNIR 推扫高光谱传感器采集，提供 160 幅定标影像及配套处理脚本。它不是航空/星载数据，但对精细农业、杂草识别和高光谱机器学习有直接价值。
desc_en: WeedCube is a proximal hyperspectral dataset for crop and weed identification, covering canola, soybean, sugarbeet, and four invasive weed species. It was collected with a 400-1000 nm VNIR pushbroom hyperspectral sensor and includes 160 calibrated images plus scripts for preprocessing, augmentation, ROI selection, and visualization. It is not airborne or satellite imagery, but it is directly useful for precision agriculture, weed identification, and hyperspectral ML.
openness: open access article and Ag Data Commons data link
source_type: open proximal agricultural hyperspectral benchmark
evidence: Ag Data Commons page DOI 10.15482/USDA.ADC/25306255.v1 states the data consist of proximal hyperspectral images of canola, soybean, sugarbeet, kochia, ragweed, redroot pigweed and waterhemp, collected from 400-1000 nm using a Specim FX10 sensor under controlled halogen light with SPECIM LabScanner/Lumo Scanner, saved as calibrated .npy files; it lists 20 images per class except redroot pigweed with 40 and CC BY 4.0 license. Figshare API lists seven species ZIP archives plus codes.zip, totaling about 80.07 GB.

desc_en: PlantStress is a spatio-temporal-spectral phenotyping dataset following sugar beet growth under optimal, drought, low-nitrogen, surplus-nitrogen, and weed-stress conditions. The OPIA page lists 1984 images, a 2.4 GB dataset package, image-level annotations and bounding boxes, and acquisition with a Ximea MQ022HG-IM-SM5X5-NIR snapshot hyperspectral camera. It is useful for plant-stress classification, crop phenotyping, and close-range hyperspectral algorithm validation.

The paper states that the data are available through Kaggle and include targets such as cultivar, fertilizer content, yield, stomatal conductance and chlorophyll fluorescence. name: MASTER GEMx Spring 2024 Airborne Spectral Dataset
provider: NASA ORNL DAAC / NASA Ames Airborne Sensor Facility / USGS GEMx
theme_canonical: Critical minerals airborne spectral campaign
theme_raw: MASTER Geological Earth Mapping Experiment Spring 2024
coverage: California, Oregon, Nevada, Arizona and New Mexico, USA
formats: MASTER L1B HDF-4, L2 ENVI/KMZ, flight paths, spectral band information, browse imagery, documentation
access: ORNL DAAC / Earthdata
notes: Boundary record: MASTER is a 50-channel visible-to-thermal airborne scanning spectrometer rather than a classic hundreds-band VSWIR imaging spectrometer, but the GEMx campaign explicitly combines AVIRIS, HyTES and MASTER for critical-minerals mapping. v70 audit: MASTER is explicitly 50-channel multispectral; retained as GEMx support/boundary evidence linked to AVIRIS/HyTES campaign context.
desc_zh: MASTER GEMx Spring 2024 是 Geological Earth Mapping Experiment 关键矿产航空活动中的 MASTER 光谱数据集。该活动使用 AVIRIS、HyTES 和 MASTER 等机载光谱仪覆盖美国西南干旱/半干旱地区，用于识别岩石和矿物风化/蚀变特征。MASTER 本身是 50 通道可见光到热红外航空光谱仪，因此该记录标为高光谱相邻的地质航空光谱数据。
desc_en: MASTER GEMx Spring 2024 is a MASTER airborne spectral dataset from the Geological Earth Mapping Experiment for critical-minerals mapping. GEMx combines AVIRIS, HyTES and MASTER observations over arid and semi-arid regions of the southwestern United States to map rock-forming minerals and alteration features. MASTER is a 50-channel visible-to-thermal airborne scanner, so this record is marked as a hyperspectral-adjacent geological airborne spectral dataset.

source_type: airborne multispectral support/boundary dataset
evidence: ORNL DAAC guide gives DOI 10.3334/ORNLDAAC/2370 and states GEMx used AVIRIS, HyTES and MASTER for critical-minerals mapping; this MASTER product contains L1B calibrated radiance in 50 bands from 0.460 to 12.879 micrometers plus L2 emissivity and land-surface-temperature products, so it is a multispectral support record rather than a core hyperspectral product. CMR short_name MASTER_GEMx_Spring_2024_2370; concept C3255928163-ORNL_CLOUD.
scale: 26 flights, 2036 files
feature_count: 235 L1B HDF-4 files plus L2 ENVI/KMZ products

desc_en: SHIFT HyTES L1 Brightness Temperature is a thermal hyperspectral dataset from NASA's SBG High-Frequency Time Series campaign. HyTES provides 256 TIR bands from 7.5 to 12 micrometers over Santa Barbara County and nearby coastal waters, supporting joint VSWIR/TIR analysis, land-surface temperature, emissivity and ecosystem water-flux research. The dataset is distributed as HDF5, ENVI, KML/KMZ, PNG quicklooks and spectral-response CSV files.

source_type: NASA airborne thermal hyperspectral campaign

feature_count: 91 HDF5 data files plus supporting geolocation/quicklook files

desc_en: BioSCape PRISM L1B Calibrated Radiance provides airborne PRISM imaging spectroscopy over South Africa's Greater Cape Floristic Region. PRISM covers 350-1050 nm at about 3.5 nm spectral resolution and includes co-aligned SWIR spot radiometers for ocean-color atmospheric correction. The dataset is useful for aquatic and coastal ecosystems, biodiversity studies and BioSCape multi-sensor analyses.

source_type: NASA airborne imaging spectroscopy campaign
evidence: ORNL DAAC guide states the dataset holds PRISM L1B calibrated radiance from BioSCape, acquired in October-November 2023, with PRISM operating from 350 to 1050 nm at 3.5 nm spectral resolution; BioSCape states its airborne and field data are open access. Phase248 CMR recheck: short_name BioSCape_PRISM_L1B_RDN_2493, concept_id C4114062211-ORNL_CLOUD.

desc_en: S-MODE PRISM Level 1 Radiance provides airborne PRISM data from the Sub-Mesoscale Ocean Dynamics Experiment about 300 km offshore of San Francisco. PRISM is a G-III-mounted pushbroom imaging spectrometer operating from 350 to 1050 nm, with 1240/1640 nm SWIR spot radiometers for ocean-color atmospheric correction. The netCDF-4 dataset is useful for submesoscale ocean dynamics, ocean optics and high-resolution aquatic spectral analyses.

source_type: NASA airborne ocean imaging spectroscopy campaign

The data were acquired with HySpex VNIR-1800 and SWIR-384 sensors during several 2019 flights over the Chequamegon region of Wisconsin for ecosystem energy-balance and vegetation remote-sensing studies. The dataset page describes georectified and atmospherically corrected reflectance products at about 1 m spatial resolution across 400-2500 nm.

The Zenodo page describes a Pawnee, Oklahoma test field with 150 buried explosive remnants of war and 34 datasets collected by multiple institutions during 2023-2024. This catalog record tracks the hyperspectral subset as an open lead for security, humanitarian demining and multi-sensor fusion research.

desc_zh: HM-Bench 是面向多模态大模型的高光谱遥感理解 benchmark。GitHub 页面说明其覆盖 20 个公开高保真高光谱数据集，场景包括精准农业、复杂城市和火星/行星探测，包含 2,178 个独立高光谱数据块、19,337 条专家整理问答对和 13 类任务，并提供原始高光谱块、PCA 合成图、结构化报告与评测代码。它适合用于评估 MLLM 对高光谱遥感数据的空间-光谱感知与推理能力。
desc_en: HM-Bench is a hyperspectral remote-sensing understanding benchmark for multimodal large language models. The GitHub page states that it spans 20 public high-fidelity HSI datasets across precision agriculture, complex urban landscapes and Mars/planetary exploration, with 2,178 independent hyperspectral cubes, 19,337 expert-curated QA pairs and 13 task categories. It provides raw HSI blocks, PCA composites, structured reports and evaluation code for testing spatial-spectral perception and reasoning by MLLMs.

README exposes a Hugging Face Dataset link plus Baidu Drive and Google Drive downloads for raw hyperspectral blocks, PCA composite images, structured text reports and evaluation assets, with a CC BY-NC 4.0 license badge.

desc_en: EarthView is a large-scale remote-sensing dataset for self-supervised learning whose NEON subset explicitly includes 1 m hyperspectral data with 369 bands, alongside 0.1 m RGB imagery and 1 m LiDAR canopy-height models. The Hugging Face page describes four subsets, Satellogic, Sentinel-1, Sentinel-2 and NEON, with the NEON subset containing about one million samples and about 0.3 million unique locations, each with three revisits. This record is cataloged for the NEON hyperspectral component and is useful for hyperspectral pretraining, multimodal EO representation learning and ecological-scene modeling.

desc_en: NEON DP3.30006.001 is the Level 3 orthorectified surface directional reflectance mosaic from the NEON AOP imaging spectrometer. NEON describes it as directional reflectance without BRDF and topographic corrections, distributed as 1 km by 1 km HDF5 tiles and mirrored conceptually by the Google Earth Engine HSI_REFL/001 collection. It is useful for ecological hyperspectral studies that need legacy directional reflectance, pre-2022 continuity, or custom BRDF/topographic correction workflows.

desc_en: The AVIRIS-5 L2A Facility Instrument Collection is the core surface-reflectance archive for NASA/JPL's AVIRIS-5 airborne imaging spectrometer. ORNL DAAC states that AVIRIS-5 measures VSWIR reflected radiance from 380 to 2500 nm at 5 nm intervals with 1,239 cross-track pixels, and that L2A files include orthocorrected surface reflectance, reflectance uncertainty, GeoTIFF quicklooks and YAML processing metadata. It supports studies of plant composition and function, geology and soils, wetlands and aquatic ecosystems, greenhouse-gas mapping and orbital platform calibration.

The ORNL DAAC guide URL is reachable and currently resolves to a PDF titled MASTER: FireSense, California and Southern US, Spring 2025. Because MASTER is a 50-channel visible-to-thermal airborne spectral scanner rather than a classic hundreds-band VSWIR imaging spectrometer, this entry is cataloged as a hyperspectral-adjacent fire-science airborne spectral record that helps document NASA's open fire remote-sensing data ecosystem alongside AVIRIS and HyTES.

desc_zh: HYPERVIEW “Seeing Beyond the Visible” 是 ESA Phi-lab/AI4EO 相关的农业土壤参数估计 benchmark。数据页面说明任务是从波兰农业区航空高光谱图像中估计 K、P2O5、Mg 和 pH，数据包含 2,886 个 2 m GSD 的地块 patch，其中 1,732 个用于训练、1,154 个用于测试，每个 patch 含 150 个连续高光谱波段，范围 462-942 nm、谱分辨率 3.2 nm。它适合评估高光谱农业土壤养分反演、多输出回归和可部署星上 AI 算法。
desc_en: HYPERVIEW, Seeing Beyond the Visible, is an ESA Phi-lab/AI4EO-related benchmark for agricultural soil-parameter estimation. The data page states that the task is to estimate K, P2O5, Mg and pH from airborne hyperspectral images over agricultural areas in Poland, with 2,886 field patches at 2 m GSD, 1,732 for training and 1,154 for testing, each containing 150 contiguous bands from 462 to 942 nm at 3.2 nm spectral resolution. It supports hyperspectral soil nutrient retrieval, multi-output regression and deployable onboard-AI algorithm research.
openness: permanently open challenge platform for non-commercial research with required citation
source_type: airborne hyperspectral agricultural soil regression benchmark
evidence: AI4EO data page states the HYPERVIEW dataset has 2,886 patches over Polish agricultural areas, 150 contiguous bands from 462-942 nm, 2 m GSD, and training labels for K, P2O5, Mg and pH.
scale: 2,886 patches, 1,732 train and 1,154 test

desc_zh: HYPERVIEW2 是 HYPERVIEW 系列的第二代土壤元素估计 benchmark。数据页面说明目标是利用影像估计表层土壤中 B、Cu、Zn、Fe、S 和 Mn 六种元素浓度，共 3,764 个农田地块；影像包括 HySpex VS-725 航空高光谱 430 波段、414-2357 nm，PRISMA 星载高光谱 230 波段、400-2500 nm，以及 Sentinel-2 13 波段多光谱数据。它适合做航空-星载高光谱联合建模、土壤污染/微量元素反演和跨传感器鲁棒性研究。
desc_en: HYPERVIEW2 is the second-generation soil-element estimation benchmark in the Hyperview series. The data page states that the objective is to estimate six top-soil trace elements, B, Cu, Zn, Fe, S and Mn, over 3,764 agricultural fields of interest. The imagery includes airborne HySpex VS-725 hyperspectral data with 430 bands from 414 to 2357 nm, PRISMA satellite hyperspectral data with 230 bands from 400 to 2500 nm, and 13-band Sentinel-2 multispectral imagery. It supports airborne-satellite hyperspectral fusion, soil contamination/trace-element retrieval and cross-sensor robustness studies.

source_type: airborne and satellite hyperspectral soil trace-element benchmark
evidence: HYPERVIEW2 Phi-Lab challenge page states the dataset consists of hyperspectral and multispectral images of parcels with ground-truth measurements for six soil trace elements (B, Cu, Zn, Fe, S, Mn). It describes airborne HySpex VS-725 imagery with 430 bands from 414-2357 nm, PRISMA imagery with 230 bands from 400-2500 nm, Sentinel-2 data, and notes airborne hyperspectral images are released for the training set only.
scale: 3,764 fields of interest
feature_count: HySpex 430 bands, PRISMA 230 bands, six trace-element labels

desc_zh: DroneNet4Beetles Level 2 Crown Reflectance 是面向欧洲云杉小蠹早期检测的跨国 UAV 遥感 benchmark。Zenodo 页面说明数据来自 Sweden、Finland、Italy 和 Czech Republic 的 12 个研究区和 6 条时间序列，包含 26 套多光谱和 16 套高光谱 UAV 影像派生的冠层平均反射率，传感器包括 SPECIM AFX10 和 Headwall Nano-Hyperspec 等，并配套健康/受害树级标签。它适合森林健康、虫害早期检测、冠层光谱分析和多传感器迁移研究。
desc_en: DroneNet4Beetles Level 2 Crown Reflectance is a cross-European UAV remote-sensing benchmark for early detection of spruce bark beetle infestation. The Zenodo page states that the data cover Sweden, Finland, Italy and the Czech Republic across 12 study areas and six time series, with crown-level reflectance derived from 26 multispectral and 16 hyperspectral UAV image sets using sensors including SPECIM AFX10 and Headwall Nano-Hyperspec, together with healthy/infested tree labels. It supports forest health monitoring, early insect-stress detection, crown spectral analysis and multisensor transfer studies.
openness: open Zenodo dataset under CC BY 4.0
source_type: UAV hyperspectral and multispectral forest-health crown-reflectance benchmark
evidence: Zenodo record states the archive includes crown-averaged reflectance from multispectral and hyperspectral UAV images, 16 hyperspectral image sets, 1,798 infested and 13,020 healthy trees, DOI 10.5281/zenodo.19736597, and CC BY 4.0.
scale: 12 study areas, six time series, 14,818 labeled trees

desc_en: This Zenodo archive supports the study Continental-scale hyperspectral tree species classification in the National Ecological Observatory Network. It packages individual-tree hyperspectral signatures, canopy height, NEON field survey traits and model inputs/outputs across 30 NEON sites. The record states that the archive can reproduce the generalized species-classification approach, is about 1.1 GB, and is released under CC BY 4.0. It is useful for NEON hyperspectral tree species recognition, cross-site generalization, canopy spectral libraries and ecological trait modeling.

desc_en: SZU Multimodal Tree Species Dataset 2.0 is an urban tree species remote-sensing dataset released by the SZU-HSI Lab at Shenzhen University. The dataset page identifies it as SZU Multimodal Tree Species Dataset 2.0, asks users to submit name, organization, intended use and email, and then provides direct, Google Drive or OneDrive download options; it states that the data are for scientific research only, not commercial use or third-party redistribution. Literature evidence describes SZUTreeData as containing hyperspectral imagery, LiDAR and high-resolution optical data for urban tree species classification, individual-tree segmentation and multimodal remote-sensing evaluation.

desc_en: HyRANK is a classic satellite hyperspectral benchmark for cross-scene classification, mainly using the Dioni and Loukia EO-1 Hyperion scenes in Greece. Literature describes the scenes as roughly 250 by 1376 and 249 by 945 pixels with 176 spectral reflectance bands, often used for train-on-one-scene, test-on-another-scene generalization experiments. Because the original HyRANK platform is difficult to locate reliably, this record uses a reachable Baidu AIStudio dataset page together with literature evidence as the public research data entry.

Existing literature describes HyRANK as EO-1 Hyperion cross-scene classification benchmark.

The GFZ page states that it contains two airborne HyMap scenes at 3.6 m and 9 m resolution, a simulated 30 m EnMAP scene, an image endmember spectral library and detailed land-cover reference information over the same Berlin urban-rural gradient subset. It supports urban land-cover classification, spectral unmixing, multi-scale algorithm transfer and EnMAP method preparation.

desc_en: Pavia Centre is a classic airborne urban hyperspectral dataset acquired by the ROSIS sensor over the city centre of Pavia, Italy. Literature commonly describes the original image as about 1096 by 1096 pixels, often used as a 1096 by 715 valid subset after removing empty regions, with 102 valid bands at about 1.3 m spatial resolution and land-cover labels. Although the broader EHU scene collection is already cataloged, this scene-level record makes Pavia Centre discoverable and distinct from Pavia University.

desc_zh: AeroRIT 是 Rochester Institute of Technology 校园上空获取的大尺度航空高光谱语义分割数据集。论文和项目页说明数据由 Headwall 传感器采集，原始影像约 1973×3975 像素、0.4 m 空间分辨率、372 个 397-1003 nm 波段，并包含近 700 万像元级语义标注，类别包括道路、建筑、植被和车辆等。它适合航空高光谱场景理解、语义分割、车辆/建筑识别和深度学习 benchmark。
desc_en: AeroRIT is a large airborne hyperspectral semantic-segmentation dataset collected over the Rochester Institute of Technology campus. The paper and project material describe a Headwall sensor scene of about 1973 by 3975 pixels, 0.4 m spatial resolution, 372 bands spanning 397-1003 nm, and nearly seven million pixel-level annotations for classes such as roads, buildings, vegetation and cars. It supports airborne hyperspectral scene understanding, semantic segmentation, vehicle/building recognition and deep-learning benchmarks.

desc_en: WHU-H2SR-MT is listed as a downloadable resource on the Wuhan University IRSIP resources page and is described in the literature as a high-spatial-resolution hyperspectral and multi-temporal remote-sensing fusion dataset. It covers about 227.79 km2 in southern Shenyang, Liaoning, with airborne HSI at about 1 m spatial resolution, 249 bands from 391 to 984 nm, and 31 cloud-filtered Sentinel-2 observations from 2020, labeled into eight land-cover categories. It supports hyperspectral semantic segmentation, cross-resolution multimodal fusion, spatio-temporal-spectral interpretation and large-scale land-cover classification.

desc_en: Qingpu HSI is a large-scale high-resolution airborne hyperspectral dataset for fine-grained land-cover classification and hyperspectral semantic segmentation. The 3SOBS page states that the imagery was acquired over Qingpu District, Shanghai on 2022-06-16 using the AMMIS sensor, with 20,480 by 2,944 pixels, 0.75 m spatial resolution, an original 256-band VNIR module over 400-1000 nm, 251 usable bands after bad-band removal, and 20 land-cover classes. desc_zh: Dist_Uncertainty 是用于深度学习植物性状反演不确定性评估的高光谱遥感案例数据集。Hugging Face API 显示其标签包含 hyperspectral、plant-traits、remote-sensing、vegetation 和 Uncertainty，授权 CC BY-NC 4.0，并包含 EnMAP south Leipzig 场景、NEON Liro Wisconsin 场景的谱段元数据和地物标签掩膜，以及 1,522 条训练光谱。它适合评估高光谱植物性状模型在城市、裸地、水体、云和异域植被等 OOD 条件下的不确定性。
desc_en: Dist_Uncertainty is a hyperspectral remote-sensing case-study dataset for evaluating uncertainty in deep-learning plant trait retrieval. The Hugging Face API lists tags including hyperspectral, plant-traits, remote-sensing, vegetation and Uncertainty, a CC BY-NC 4.0 license, and configurations for an EnMAP south Leipzig scene, a NEON Liro Wisconsin scene with spectral band metadata and land-cover label masks, plus 1,522 labeled training spectra. It supports evaluation of plant trait models under out-of-domain conditions such as urban surfaces, bare ground, water, clouds and unseen vegetation contexts.

The associated paper is Cherif et al., Biogeosciences 2026, DOI 10.5194/bg-23-2235-2026. HF API phase470 recheck: public dataset Avatarr05/Dist_Uncertainty, DOI 10.57967/hf/7838, CC-BY-NC-4.0 tag, EnMAP and NEON case-study TIFF/CSV files plus TrainingSpectra_1522.csv.

The project page states that, after free registration, anyone can access the data and evaluation services; it provides two datasets, one with a hyperspectral image, high-resolution imagery, target spectral libraries and target locations, and a second blind-test scene with private truth for scoring submitted algorithms. It is useful for hyperspectral target detection, blind evaluation and algorithm comparison.

It supports UAV hyperspectral classification, shadow robustness testing, multi-scale target recognition and fine land-cover mapping.
