name: GST-D Multi-Platform Optical Remote Sensing Target Detection Dataset
provider: Indian Institute of Space Science and Technology / Mendeley Data
theme_canonical: Multi-platform hyperspectral target detection benchmark
theme_raw: terrestrial hyperspectral imager, AVIRIS-NG airborne hyperspectral imagery, Sentinel-2 multispectral imagery, in-situ spectra and ROI labels
coverage: Gudalur, Tamil Nadu, India
formats: Mendeley Data downloadable files; processed imagery, target spectra, ROI, SHP and text files described by article
access: Mendeley Data DOI record with Download All option
doi_or_citation: 10.17632/5ph8ms8p5n.2; Data in Brief DOI 10.1016/j.dib.2020.106362; Remote Sensing DOI 10.3390/rs12132145
notes: Earlier GST-D leads were held because a stable download was not confirmed. This phase confirmed the Mendeley DOI directly from the Data in Brief data-availability table and Mendeley page.
desc_zh: GST-D 是面向工程材料目标检测的多平台开放遥感 benchmark。Mendeley 记录和 Data in Brief 文章说明其包含地面 THI 高光谱影像、NASA AVIRIS-NG 机载高光谱影像、Sentinel-2 多光谱影像、原位光谱以及目标 ROI/位置文件，五个 10 m 级工程材料目标被布设在不同自然背景上。数据适合多尺度目标检测、亚像元材料识别和机载-星载联合验证。
desc_en: GST-D is an open multi-platform remote-sensing benchmark for engineered-material target detection. The Mendeley record and Data in Brief article describe terrestrial hyperspectral imagery, AVIRIS-NG airborne hyperspectral imagery, Sentinel-2 multispectral imagery, in-situ spectra, and ROI/location files for five targets placed on different natural backgrounds.
openness: downloadable Mendeley Data record under CC BY 4.0
source_type: multi-platform airborne hyperspectral target-detection benchmark
evidence: The Mendeley page lists DOI 10.17632/5ph8ms8p5n.2, CC BY 4.0, and describes THI, AVIRIS-NG and Sentinel-2 imagery with in-situ spectra and ROI labels; the Data in Brief article provides the same direct Mendeley URL and details the target coordinates and formats.
scale: multi-platform target-detection scene
feature_count: five engineered targets

desc_en: MADLib is an open hyperspectral reflectance reference library for marine-debris remote-sensing algorithm development. The ESSD article reports 24,889 reflectance spectra from 3,032 samples harmonized from 13 datasets, with metadata describing material, color, size, weathering and aquatic state; it is a spectral library rather than an image archive.
openness: open 4TU.ResearchData DOI dataset
source_type: hyperspectral remote-sensing reference spectral library
evidence: The ESSD article and assets page state that MADLib is available through DOI 10.4121/059551d3-2383-4e20-af2d-011c9a59d3ac; the article reports 24,889 reflectance spectra from 3,032 samples, two CSV files in the download, and open-access availability.
scale: spectral library for marine debris remote sensing
feature_count: 24,889 spectra; 3,032 samples

name: PANGAEA MOSAiC Stickle Sea-Ice Melt Pond Hyperspectral Raw Data
provider: PANGAEA / MOSAiC / CAU Stickle platform
theme_canonical: in-situ hyperspectral radiometry for sea-ice melt pond remote-sensing reflectance
theme_raw: OceanOptics STS-VIS hyperspectral spectra, depth, GPS and co-deployed camera data over MOSAiC melt ponds
coverage: MOSAiC expedition legs 4 and 5, Arctic Ocean sea-ice melt ponds
formats: zip/tar deployment folders with plain text spectra, GPS/depth data and image-based raw data
access: PANGAEA DOI landing page
notes: Cataloged as hyperspectral remote-sensing reflectance support data rather than as a scene imagery product.
desc_zh: 该 PANGAEA 数据集提供 MOSAiC 第 4 和第 5 航段海冰融池的 Stickle 原始高光谱观测。DataCite 摘要说明平台由三个 OceanOptics STS-VIS 光谱辐射计组成，可记录下行/上行辐照度和上行辐亮度，并结合 GPS、融池水深、相机和野外记录，用于计算遥感反射率和光谱反照率。它不是航空或卫星影像，而是极地水色/海冰高光谱遥感校验的重要开放数据。
desc_en: This PANGAEA dataset provides raw MOSAiC Stickle hyperspectral observations over sea-ice melt ponds. The metadata describe three OceanOptics STS-VIS spectroradiometers measuring downwelling/upwelling irradiance and upwelling radiance, with GPS, water depth, camera data and field notes for remote-sensing reflectance and spectral-albedo workflows.
openness: PANGAEA DOI record with CC BY 4.0 rights
source_type: in-situ hyperspectral remote-sensing reflectance repository dataset
evidence: DataCite metadata for DOI 10.1594/PANGAEA.955779 states that the raw MOSAiC Stickle dataset contains in-situ hyperspectral data from melt ponds and allows calculation of R_rs and spectral albedo.
scale: deployment-level melt pond hyperspectral radiometry during MOSAiC legs 4 and 5
feature_count: spectra, depth, GPS, co-deployed camera data and field notes

name: PANGAEA MOSAiC Booetle Pack-Ice Water Colour Hyperspectral Platform Raw Data
provider: PANGAEA / MOSAiC / CAU Böötle platform
theme_canonical: remote-controlled water-colour hyperspectral radiometry for sea-ice melt ponds
theme_raw: hyperspectral, bathymetric and temperature data from a remote-controlled water-colour platform
coverage: MOSAiC expedition legs 4 and 5, Arctic Ocean pack-ice melt ponds
formats: zip/tar deployment folders with spectra, depth, temperature, GPS and camera raw data
access: PANGAEA DOI landing page
notes: Distinct from the Stickle handheld/gimbal record: this DOI covers the remote-controlled Böötle water-colour platform with bathymetry and temperature.
desc_zh: 该 PANGAEA 数据集来自 MOSAiC 第 4 和第 5 航段的 Böötle 遥控水色光谱辐射平台，覆盖北冰洋浮冰融池。DataCite 摘要说明平台可在浅至 15 cm 的水体中同步采集高光谱、测深和温度数据，包含三个 OceanOptics STS-VIS 光谱辐射计、声呐、温度探头、GPS 和相机系统。数据可用于融池遥感反射率计算，并与融池水深等物理量配套分析。
desc_en: This PANGAEA dataset contains raw data from the remote-controlled Böötle water-colour spectroradiometry platform during MOSAiC legs 4 and 5. It combines hyperspectral radiometry, bathymetry, temperature, GPS and camera data over pack-ice melt ponds and supports remote-sensing reflectance calculations in very shallow water.
openness: PANGAEA DOI record with CC BY 4.0 rights
source_type: remote-controlled hyperspectral water-colour radiometry repository dataset
evidence: DataCite metadata for DOI 10.1594/PANGAEA.955777 states that the Böötle platform dataset contains in-situ hyperspectral and co-located water-depth measurements for MOSAiC melt ponds, allowing R_rs calculation.
scale: deployment-level pack-ice melt pond hyperspectral/bathymetric observations
feature_count: spectra, depth, temperature, GPS and camera raw data

name: PANGAEA Central Lena Delta Arctic Vegetation Hyperspectral Field Spectrometry
provider: PANGAEA / Arctic vegetation field spectrometry campaign
theme_canonical: Arctic vegetation hyperspectral reflectance library for remote-sensing validation
theme_raw: Spectral Evolution SR-2500 field spectrometry over 30 m x 30 m homogeneous vegetation plots
coverage: Samoylov and Kurungnakh Island, central Lena Delta, Arctic Siberia
formats: PANGAEA dataset publication series with field spectrometry tables and metadata
access: PANGAEA DOI landing page
notes: Cataloged as field spectral reference data for hyperspectral remote sensing rather than raster imagery. It fills a polar vegetation spectral-library gap complementary to hyDRaCAT.
desc_zh: 该 PANGAEA 数据集发布了中部 Lena Delta 北极植被单元的野外高光谱测量。DataCite 摘要说明研究在 Samoylov 和 Kurungnakh Island 的 30 m x 30 m 均一植被样地采集了 28 次高光谱场测，使用 Spectral Evolution SR-2500，光谱范围 350-2500 nm。它是面向冻土地貌和北极植被遥感反演的光谱参考库，而非航空影像产品。
desc_en: This PANGAEA dataset publication series provides Arctic vegetation field spectrometry from the central Lena Delta. The metadata describe 28 measurements over 30 m by 30 m homogeneous vegetation plots on Samoylov and Kurungnakh Island using a Spectral Evolution SR-2500 over 350-2500 nm, serving as a hyperspectral reference library for remote-sensing applications.
openness: PANGAEA DOI record with CC BY 4.0 rights
source_type: field hyperspectral reflectance repository dataset for remote-sensing validation
evidence: DataCite metadata for DOI 10.1594/PANGAEA.945982 describes hyperspectral field measurements in the central Lena Delta, 28 measurements over homogeneous 30 m x 30 m plots using a Spectral Evolution SR-2500 from 350 to 2500 nm.
scale: 28 field spectrometry measurements over 30 m by 30 m Arctic vegetation plots
feature_count: field hyperspectral reflectance spectra and plot metadata

name: PANGAEA RV METEOR M187 Hyperspectral Above-Water Radiometric Quantities
provider: PANGAEA / RV METEOR M187 ocean-colour radiometry campaign
theme_canonical: shipborne hyperspectral ocean-colour radiometry for remote-sensing validation
theme_raw: TriOS RAMSES Ed, Lsfc and Lsky hyperspectral radiometric quantities sampled every 5 minutes
coverage: South Atlantic Gyre and Benguela Upwelling System, RV METEOR cruise M187
formats: PANGAEA bundled publication with processed radiometric quantity datasets
access: PANGAEA DOI landing page
notes: Cataloged as shipborne hyperspectral ocean-colour validation data. Sub-DOIs for Lsfc and Lsky were inspected but the bundled DOI is used to avoid over-fragmenting the catalog.
desc_zh: 该 PANGAEA bundled publication 汇总了 RV METEOR M187 航次在南大西洋环流和 Benguela 上升流系统中的高光谱水色辐射量观测。DataCite 摘要说明船首架设了一个 TriOS RAMSES-ACC 下行辐照度仪和两个 RAMSES-ARC 辐亮度仪，以 5 分钟间隔记录 Ed、45 度向下海表离水辐亮度 Lsfc 和 45 度向上天空辐亮度 Lsky。它是海洋水色遥感反射率与大气校正验证的重要开放高光谱辐射数据。
desc_en: This PANGAEA bundled publication provides hyperspectral above-water radiometric quantities from RV METEOR cruise M187 across the South Atlantic Gyre and Benguela Upwelling System. The setup used one TriOS RAMSES-ACC irradiance meter and two RAMSES-ARC radiance meters to sample Ed, Lsfc and Lsky every five minutes for ocean-colour remote-sensing validation.
openness: PANGAEA DOI record with CC BY 4.0 rights
source_type: shipborne hyperspectral ocean-colour radiometry repository dataset
evidence: DataCite metadata for DOI 10.1594/PANGAEA.973430 identifies a bundled PANGAEA publication of hyperspectral above-water radiometric quantities from RV METEOR M187, with TriOS RAMSES instruments sampling every 5 minutes.
scale: 5-minute shipborne radiometry along South Atlantic and Benguela cruise track
feature_count: Ed, Lsfc and Lsky hyperspectral radiometric quantities

name: Dryad Blackhawk Island Seasonal Hyperspectral Surface Reflectance Mosaics
provider: Dryad / University of Wisconsin-Madison
theme_canonical: seasonal airborne imaging spectroscopy mosaics for forest biochemistry
theme_raw: HySpex VNIR-SWIR 1 m surface reflectance mosaics collected over eight dates
coverage: Blackhawk Island, Wisconsin, USA
formats: ENVI binary surface reflectance mosaics in compressed tar.gz packages
access: Dryad DOI landing page and downloadable files
notes: Found by following a Dryad remote-sensing image-data search result to the Dryad DOI and DataCite metadata. Complements airborne forest biochemistry datasets already cataloged from NEON and AVIRIS sources.
desc_zh: 该 Dryad 数据集提供美国威斯康星 Blackhawk Island 在 2018 年生长季 8 个日期的高分辨率高光谱地表反射率镶嵌。DataCite 元数据说明影像由 VNIR-SWIR HySpex 机载成像系统采集，光谱范围 400-2400 nm，空间分辨率 1 m。Dryad 页面列出多个 ENVI 格式压缩包，可用于森林叶片生化季节变化、冠层反射率和成像光谱算法验证。
desc_en: This Dryad dataset provides seasonal hyperspectral surface reflectance mosaics over Blackhawk Island, Wisconsin. The DataCite record describes eight dates in the 2018 growing season collected with a VNIR-SWIR HySpex airborne imaging system from 400-2400 nm at 1 m resolution, distributed as ENVI-compatible compressed packages.
openness: Dryad CC0 repository dataset with downloadable files
source_type: airborne hyperspectral surface reflectance repository dataset
evidence: DataCite metadata for DOI 10.5061/dryad.37pvmcvpw states that the dataset contains high-resolution hyperspectral surface reflectance mosaics over Blackhawk Island collected at eight 2018 dates using a VNIR-SWIR HySpex airborne imaging system at 1 m spatial resolution.
scale: eight 1 m airborne VNIR-SWIR seasonal mosaics
feature_count: 8 seasonal surface reflectance mosaic packages plus README

name: Deep Potato UAV Hyperspectral Orthophoto and Agronomic Measurements Dataset
provider: Mendeley Data / Ruszczak and Boguszewska-Mankowska
theme_canonical: UAV hyperspectral potato orthophoto maps with physiological ground measurements
theme_raw: 8 ENVI hyperspectral orthophoto maps, 84 extracted hyperspectral images and geolocated agronomic measurements
coverage: Jadwisin, Legionowo County, Masovian Voivodeship, Poland
formats: ENVI HDR+BSQ orthophoto maps compressed as ZIP; NPY extracted hyperspectral images; GeoJSON/measurement tables; HTML dataset presentation
access: Mendeley Data DOI landing page
doi_or_citation: 10.17632/xn2wy75f8m.2; Ruszczak and Boguszewska-Mańkowska (2022), Deep Potato, Mendeley Data; Data in Brief DOI 10.1016/j.dib.2022.108087
notes: Deep Potato provides UAV hyperspectral imagery of potato fields with agronomic measurements. Mendeley v2 states the dataset contains 8 high-resolution hyperspectral orthophoto maps stored in ENVI format under orthophoto_maps, with HDR files and BSQ imagery compressed as ZIP; 84 extracted hyperspectral images in binary/NumPy-compatible format; and 60 lab plus 74 physiological measurements with precise geolocation. The Data in Brief/PMC article states imagery was collected using a UAV-mounted push-broom line imaging spectrometer with 150 spectral bands from 460-902 nm, processed into 8 georeferenced orthophotomaps from an 80 m flight level, over potato fields in Jadwisin, Poland.
desc_zh: Deep Potato 是波兰 Jadwisin 马铃薯试验田的 UAV 高光谱影像与农艺实测数据集。最新复核确认 Mendeley v2 包含 8 幅高分辨率高光谱正射图，使用 ENVI HDR+BSQ 格式并压缩为 ZIP，同时包含 84 个从正射图中提取的高光谱子图，以及 60 项实验室测量和 74 项带精确地理位置的生理测量。论文说明影像由 UAV 搭载的推扫式线阵成像光谱仪获取，150 个波段，约 460-902 nm，适合马铃薯生理参数建模、深度学习和植被指数验证。
desc_en: Deep Potato is a UAV hyperspectral potato-field imagery dataset from Jadwisin, Poland, paired with agronomic and physiological measurements. The current Mendeley v2 record contains 8 high-resolution hyperspectral orthophoto maps in ENVI HDR+BSQ format, 84 extracted hyperspectral image chips in binary/NumPy-compatible form, and 60 laboratory plus 74 physiological measurements with precise geolocation. The associated Data in Brief/PMC article reports acquisition with a UAV-mounted push-broom line imaging spectrometer covering 150 bands from about 460 to 902 nm, processed into georeferenced orthophotomaps from an 80 m flight level.
openness: Mendeley Data CC BY 4.0 repository dataset
source_type: article-linked UAV hyperspectral crop imagery repository dataset
evidence: Mendeley Deep Potato v2 states 8 high-resolution hyperspectral orthophoto maps in ENVI format, HDR plus BSQ files compressed as ZIP, 84 extracted hyperspectral images, measurements folder with 60 lab and 74 physiological measurements, DOI 10.17632/xn2wy75f8m.2 and CC BY 4.0. PMC/Data in Brief article states UAV-mounted push-broom line imaging spectrometer with 150 spectral bands from 460-902 nm, 8 georeferenced orthophotomaps, 80 m flight level, and Jadwisin, Poland source location.
scale: 8 ENVI hyperspectral orthophoto maps; 84 extracted hyperspectral images; 150 bands, 460-902 nm
feature_count: 8 orthophoto maps; 84 extracted image chips; 134 associated measurements
file_size: not fully listed in checked page summary; HTML presentation 3.08 MB plus imagery folders

name: Figshare Tea Plantation UAV Hyperspectral Spectra Dataset
provider: figshare / Fei Teng tea cultivar study
theme_canonical: UAV hyperspectral imagery for tea cultivar classification and biochemical estimation
theme_raw: Cubert UHD185 UAV hyperspectral imager data over tea plantation
coverage: Tea plantation study site in China
formats: RawDataTea.zip downloadable from figshare
access: figshare DOI landing page and file download
notes: The paper data-availability statement points to figshare article 5844801; a nearby article id 5840697 exists but exposes a zero-byte external file, so 5844801 is used as the stable downloadable record.
desc_zh: 该 figshare 数据集发布茶园 UAV 高光谱原始数据，论文数据可用性声明将其列为茶树品种分类和生化参数估计研究的原始数据。figshare API 显示数据由 Cubert UHD185 高光谱成像仪挂载在飞行 UAV 上采集，文件为约 1.17 GB 的 RawDataTea.zip，许可为 CC BY 4.0。与二级站点列出的 5840697 相比，5844801 具有有效文件下载。
desc_en: This figshare dataset provides UAV hyperspectral data for a tea plantation study on cultivar classification and biochemical parameter estimation. The record states that data were collected with a Cubert UHD185 hyperspectral imager mounted on a UAV and exposes a downloadable RawDataTea.zip file under CC BY 4.0.
openness: figshare CC BY 4.0 dataset with downloadable RawDataTea.zip
source_type: article-linked UAV hyperspectral crop repository dataset
evidence: DataCite and figshare API metadata for DOI 10.6084/m9.figshare.5844801.v1 state that the tea plantation spectra data were collected with a Cubert UHD185 hyperspectral imager mounted on a UAV; figshare lists RawDataTea.zip as a 1,173,680,473 byte downloadable file.
scale: UAV hyperspectral tea plantation raw data package
feature_count: one RawDataTea.zip package

name: Seed Orchard Spectra and Needle Functional Traits Dataset
provider: Mendeley Data / Czech University of Life Sciences Prague
theme_canonical: needle and canopy hyperspectral spectra with forest functional traits
theme_raw: needle functional traits, needle-level spectra and UAV-based canopy reflectance data
coverage: forest seed orchard study sites in Czechia
formats: Mendeley Data downloadable tabular spectra and trait files
access: Mendeley Data DOI landing page
notes: Cataloged as canopy/needle spectra and trait validation data; it is not a raster imagery product. The Mendeley page notes that UAV-based reflectance data are included in the last columns.
desc_zh: 该 Mendeley Data 数据集汇总了林木种子园针叶功能性状、针叶尺度光谱和冠层/无人机反射率数据。DataCite 元数据将其归入 Forestry、Hyperspectral Imaging、Tree Physiology 和 Tree Improvement，描述了色素、水分、叶面积质量等针叶性状测量；仓储页面说明表格末列包含 UAV-based reflectance data。它适合作为森林高光谱遥感性状反演和冠层-叶片尺度连接的开放验证数据。
desc_en: This Mendeley Data record combines needle functional traits, needle-level spectra and canopy/UAV-based reflectance data from seed orchards. It is best treated as a spectral-trait validation dataset for forestry hyperspectral remote sensing rather than as a raster image product.
openness: Mendeley Data openAccess record with CC BY 4.0 license
source_type: forest hyperspectral spectra and trait validation repository dataset
evidence: DataCite metadata for DOI 10.17632/nwwb55596w.1 identifies a Mendeley Data dataset with needle functional traits and spectra measured at needle and canopy levels, categorized under Hyperspectral Imaging; the landing page notes UAV-based reflectance data in the final columns.
scale: tree/clone-level needle and canopy reflectance plus functional traits
feature_count: needle spectra, canopy/UAV reflectance columns and needle functional trait measurements

name: Multi-Resolution Terrestrial Hyperspectral Dataset for Spectral Unmixing
provider: Mendeley Data / Data in Brief spectral unmixing benchmark
theme_canonical: controlled terrestrial hyperspectral imagery benchmark for spectral unmixing
theme_raw: THI hyperspectral image data and spectral library acquired at multiple distances/resolutions
coverage: controlled terrestrial target-scene experiment
formats: ENVI HDR hyperspectral image files, reflectance products and spectral library tables
access: Mendeley Data DOI landing page
notes: Boundary item: this is a controlled terrestrial hyperspectral imaging benchmark for unmixing, not a natural Earth-observation scene. It is kept because spectral unmixing is a core remote-sensing HSI task and the data are distributed in ENVI image form.
desc_zh: 该 Mendeley Data 数据集是面向高光谱解混算法的多分辨率地面高光谱成像基准。DataCite 摘要说明其由 terrestrial hyperspectral imager 以水平视角采集，空间分辨率从 1 mm 到 2 cm，包含标准 ENVI HDR 格式的原始/处理高光谱影像和现场光谱库。它不是自然地表航空或卫星影像，但可作为遥感高光谱解混问题的受控开放测试数据。
desc_en: This Mendeley Data benchmark provides controlled terrestrial hyperspectral imagery for spectral unmixing studies. The DataCite abstract describes THI acquisitions at resolutions from 1 mm to 2 cm, with ENVI HDR image files and accompanying spectral library measurements, making it useful as an algorithm benchmark rather than a natural Earth-observation scene.
openness: Mendeley Data CC BY 4.0 repository dataset
source_type: controlled hyperspectral image benchmark for remote-sensing unmixing algorithms
evidence: DataCite metadata for DOI 10.17632/pts6cw4xbt.1 describes an ultra-high-resolution hyperspectral imagery dataset acquired with a terrestrial hyperspectral imager at several spatial resolutions, with hyperspectral image data and in-situ spectral signatures for spectral unmixing.
scale: controlled target-scene images at 1 mm to 2 cm spatial resolutions
feature_count: raw radiance images, processed reflectance images and spectral library files

name: Zenodo 2D Mineral Hyperspectral Library Raw Data
provider: Zenodo / University of Neuchatel Scientific Data mineral library
theme_canonical: 2D SWIR mineral hyperspectral reference library for geologic remote sensing
theme_raw: SPECIM SWIR raw scan HDF5 files with sample descriptions, RGB images and 3D reconstructions
coverage: laboratory mineral samples, 76 mineral classes
formats: ZIP packages containing HDF5 raw scans, description text, JPEG images and PLY reconstructions
access: Zenodo DOI landing page
notes: Boundary/reference-library item. The Scientific Data article splits the mineral library into raw, HDR and masked HDR Zenodo records; this row is the raw-data record.
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 记录是 Scientific Data 二维矿物高光谱反射率库的原始数据部分。论文说明数据覆盖 130 个样品、76 类矿物，使用 SPECIM SWIR 相机采集 900-2500 nm 范围的二维高光谱图像；DataCite 元数据说明每个样品 ZIP 包含 raw scan HDF5、样品说明、RGB/JPEG 图像和三维重建文件。它不是遥感场景影像，而是地质高光谱遥感和矿物识别模型训练/验证的开放参考库。
desc_en: This Zenodo record provides the raw-data part of the Scientific Data 2D mineral hyperspectral reflectance library. The associated article describes 130 samples from 76 mineral classes scanned with a SPECIM SWIR camera from 900-2500 nm, while the repository metadata lists raw HDF5 scans with descriptions, RGB images and 3D reconstructions.
openness: Zenodo CC BY 4.0 open-access dataset
source_type: laboratory mineral hyperspectral reference library for geologic remote-sensing validation
evidence: DataCite metadata for DOI 10.5281/zenodo.1446397 identifies the raw-data record of a 2D hyperspectral mineral reflectance library and describes sample ZIP packages containing description.txt, JPEG views, PLY reconstructions and raw scan HDF5 files; the Scientific Data article states 130 samples, 76 minerals and SPECIM SWIR 900-2500 nm acquisition.
scale: 130 mineral samples, 76 mineral classes, raw SWIR scan files
feature_count: sample-level raw HDF5 hyperspectral scans plus RGB and 3D context files

name: Zenodo 2D Mineral Hyperspectral Library HDR Data
provider: Zenodo / University of Neuchatel Scientific Data mineral library
theme_canonical: 2D SWIR mineral hyperspectral HDR reference library
theme_raw: SPECIM SWIR high dynamic range HDF5 hyperspectral mineral scans
coverage: laboratory mineral samples, 76 mineral classes
formats: ZIP packages containing HDR HDF5 scans, description text, JPEG images and PLY reconstructions
access: Zenodo DOI landing page
notes: Boundary/reference-library item. This is the high dynamic range processing-level record for the 2D mineral hyperspectral library.
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 记录是二维矿物高光谱库的 HDR 数据部分，提供经高动态范围处理的矿物 HDF5 高光谱扫描。Scientific Data 文章说明每个样品至少包含一幅 256 个波长的高光谱图像，覆盖 900-2500 nm；DataCite 元数据说明 ZIP 包含 HDR HDF5、样品说明、JPEG 多角度图像和 PLY 三维重建。它适合作为地质遥感矿物分类和高光谱算法验证的中间处理级参考数据。
desc_en: This Zenodo record provides the high dynamic range processing level of the 2D mineral hyperspectral library. It contains HDR HDF5 scans plus sample descriptions, JPEG views and PLY reconstructions, supporting geologic remote-sensing mineral classification and hyperspectral algorithm validation.
openness: Zenodo CC BY 4.0 open-access dataset
source_type: laboratory mineral hyperspectral HDR reference library for geologic remote-sensing validation
evidence: DataCite metadata for DOI 10.5281/zenodo.1476495 identifies the HDR record of the 2D mineral hyperspectral library and describes ZIP packages with HDR scan HDF5 files; the Scientific Data article states that the library provides 256-wavelength 900-2500 nm mineral hyperspectral images.
scale: 130 mineral samples, 76 mineral classes, HDR SWIR scan files
feature_count: sample-level HDR HDF5 hyperspectral scans plus RGB and 3D context files

name: Zenodo 2D Mineral Hyperspectral Library Masked HDR Data
provider: Zenodo / University of Neuchatel Scientific Data mineral library
theme_canonical: masked 2D SWIR mineral hyperspectral reference library
theme_raw: masked high dynamic range HDF5 hyperspectral mineral scans with NaN masked values
coverage: laboratory mineral samples, 76 mineral classes
formats: ZIP packages containing masked HDR HDF5 scans, description text, JPEG images and PLY reconstructions
access: Zenodo DOI landing page
notes: Boundary/reference-library item. This is the masked HDR record for the same mineral library; kept separate because Zenodo publishes it as a distinct DOI and processing level.
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 记录是二维矿物高光谱库的 masked HDR 数据部分，DataCite 元数据说明 HDF5 文件中的 masked 值以 NaN 表示。它与 raw 和 HDR 记录属于同一 Scientific Data 矿物库，但作为独立 DOI 发布，便于直接使用已经掩膜的高光谱样品数据。该记录更适合机器学习训练、验证集构建和地质遥感矿物识别算法评估。
desc_en: This Zenodo record provides the masked HDR processing level of the 2D mineral hyperspectral library. The repository metadata states that masked values are represented by NaN in the HDF5 files, making this version convenient for machine-learning and validation workflows.
openness: Zenodo CC BY 4.0 open-access dataset
source_type: laboratory mineral masked hyperspectral reference library for geologic remote-sensing validation
evidence: DataCite metadata for DOI 10.5281/zenodo.1476503 identifies the masked HDR record of the 2D mineral hyperspectral library and states that masked values are represented by NaN in HDF5 files; the Scientific Data article links this DOI as the masked HDR record.
scale: 130 mineral samples, 76 mineral classes, masked HDR SWIR scan files
feature_count: sample-level masked HDR HDF5 hyperspectral scans plus RGB and 3D context files

name: Zenodo River Plastic Debris Hyperspectral Reflectance Database
provider: Zenodo / University of Minnesota Scientific Data plastic debris study
theme_canonical: freshwater plastic debris hyperspectral reflectance library for remote sensing
theme_raw: 350-2500 nm reflectance spectra, RGB images and segmentation labels for floating plastics in river-like conditions
coverage: controlled laboratory flume experiments using river-water background conditions
formats: NetCDF and CSV archives
access: Zenodo DOI landing page and downloadable archives
notes: Boundary/reference-library item. The Scientific Data article frames the database as open hyperspectral reflectance data for floating plastic debris in river systems.
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 数据库发布河流系统中不同丰度比例塑料碎片的高光谱反射率数据。Scientific Data 文章说明每个 NetCDF 文件包含 350-2500 nm 高光谱反射率、同期 RGB 图像、塑料/泡沫背景分割标签以及聚合物类型、颜色、水体背景、塑料覆盖比例和质量标记等信息。Zenodo 页面列出 NetCDF 和 CSV 压缩包，总量约 9.3 GB，适合淡水塑料污染遥感识别和光谱库建模。
desc_en: This Zenodo database provides hyperspectral reflectance observations of floating plastic debris under river-like laboratory conditions. The Scientific Data article describes NetCDF files containing 350-2500 nm reflectance spectra, coincident RGB images, segmentation labels and metadata on polymer type, water background, debris fraction and quality flags.
openness: Zenodo CC BY 4.0 open-access dataset
source_type: freshwater plastic debris hyperspectral reflectance reference library for remote-sensing validation
evidence: DataCite metadata for DOI 10.5281/zenodo.13377060 identifies a hyperspectral reflectance database of weathered and virgin floating plastic debris with NetCDF and CSV files; the Scientific Data article states the files include 350-2500 nm spectra, RGB images, segmentation labels and plastic-fraction metadata.
scale: controlled river-flume plastic debris observations
feature_count: NetCDF spectra/image/label files plus CSV spectral dictionaries

feature_count: spectral reflectance measurements and SPECIM IQ hypercubes

name: Dryad NEON LTER Grass Species Hyperspectral Leaf Reflectance Dataset
provider: Dryad / NEON and LTER grassland leaf spectroscopy study

formats: CSV spectra, CSV traits and README
access: Dryad DOI landing page and downloadable files

desc_zh: 该 Dryad 数据集发布了北美五个草地 NEON 和/或 LTER 站点草本物种的叶片高光谱反射率和结构、生化、生理性状。DataCite 摘要说明该数据用于研究 C3/C4 光合途径、草本谱系和站点环境差异对光谱-性状关系的影响，从而服务大尺度植被响应遥感预测。它不是影像产品，而是生态遥感和植物性状反演的开放光谱验证库。
desc_en: This Dryad dataset provides leaf-level hyperspectral reflectance spectra and structural, biochemical and physiological traits for grass species from five grass-dominated NEON and/or LTER sites in North America. It supports ecological remote-sensing studies of spectra-trait relationships across photosynthetic pathways, lineages and site environments.
openness: Dryad CC0 repository dataset with downloadable CSV files
source_type: leaf hyperspectral reflectance and trait validation repository dataset
evidence: DataCite metadata for DOI 10.5061/dryad.gf1vhhn0n identifies a Dryad dataset of leaf-level reflectance spectra from grass species at five NEON/LTER sites with structural, biochemical and physiological traits; the Dryad landing page lists GrassSpecies-Spectra.csv, GrassSpecies-Traits.csv and README.md.
scale: five North American NEON/LTER grassland sites
feature_count: leaf reflectance spectra and trait tables

desc_en: This EDI/McMurdo LTER package provides hyperspectral reflectance of biocrust, soil, granite and soil-biocrust mixtures from the Lake Fryxell Basin, with biological, physical and chemical properties. It supports Antarctic biocrust mapping and remote-sensing interpretation of polar dry-valley surfaces.

source_type: field/laboratory hyperspectral reflectance and ecological-property validation dataset

feature_count: hyperspectral reflectance CSV files plus biological, physical and chemical property tables

name: McMurdo Fryxell Basin Microbial Mats and Mosses Hyperspectral VNIR Dataset
provider: Environmental Data Initiative / McMurdo Dry Valleys LTER
theme_canonical: Antarctic microbial mat and moss hyperspectral VNIR reflectance for satellite downscaling
theme_raw: ASD FieldSpec4 hyperspectral VNIR spectra, WorldView-2 downsampled spectra and biological characteristics
coverage: nine ephemeral glacial meltwater streams, Fryxell Basin, Taylor Valley, Antarctica
license: Environmental Data Initiative open data record; rights not explicit in DataCite
formats: CSV data tables, associated images and EDI metadata
access: EDI/LTER DOI landing page
notes: Boundary/reference item. Includes hyperspectral VNIR spectra and multispectral downsampled spectra for Antarctic microbial-mat and moss communities.
desc_zh: 该 EDI/McMurdo LTER 数据包发布 Taylor Valley Fryxell Basin 九条季节性融水溪流中微生物垫、苔藓和土壤类型的光谱与生物特征。DataCite 摘要说明研究使用 ASD FieldSpec4 采集高光谱 VNIR 反射率，并将结果校正、平均后下采样到 WorldView-2 多光谱分辨率，同时提供 AFDM、叶绿素 a、色素浓度、样品档案和关联影像。它适合极地微生物群落遥感分类和卫星尺度验证。
desc_en: This EDI/McMurdo LTER package provides hyperspectral VNIR reflectance spectra and biological characteristics for microbial mats, mosses and soils across nine ephemeral streams in the Fryxell Basin. The data were collected with an ASD FieldSpec4, corrected and averaged by community type, and downsampled to WorldView-2 spectral resolution.
openness: Environmental Data Initiative DOI record with public data tables
source_type: field hyperspectral VNIR reflectance and biological validation dataset
evidence: DataCite metadata for DOI 10.6073/pasta/4f8a2a5f2f4105ddbac3355b125f8815 states that hyperspectral VNIR measurements were collected with an ASD FieldSpec4 across Fryxell Basin microbial mats, mosses and soils, with associated images, AFDM, chlorophyll-a, pigment concentrations and multispectral downsampled spectra.
scale: nine Antarctic ephemeral stream sites and community types
feature_count: hyperspectral and multispectral reflectance spectra, biological characteristics and sample archive

name: Pre-Delta-X Atchafalaya Basin In Situ Water Surface Spectral Reflectance 2016
provider: NASA ORNL DAAC / Pre-Delta-X
theme_canonical: in situ hyperspectral water-surface remote-sensing reflectance for AVIRIS-NG validation
theme_raw: ASD FieldSpec 3 above-water Rrs measurements across Atchafalaya Basin water sites
coverage: Atchafalaya Basin, Mississippi River Delta floodplain, Louisiana, USA
license: NASA ORNL DAAC open data; cite dataset DOI
formats: CSV file with remote-sensing reflectance values and site metadata
access: ORNL DAAC dataset guide with Get Data link
notes: Found by following ORNL Delta-X water reflectance guides. DataCite search initially hit an unrelated ORNL DOI when the DOI was mistyped; the ORNL guide citation confirms the correct DOI 10.3334/ORNLDAAC/1804.
desc_zh: 该 ORNL DAAC 数据集提供 Pre-Delta-X 期间 Atchafalaya Basin 水面的原位遥感反射率 Rrs 测量。ORNL guide 说明研究用 ASD FieldSpec 3 从船上在 35 个观测点采集水面光谱，覆盖 24 个与总悬浮固体 TSS 同位点的站点，数据用于地面验证 AVIRIS-NG 反演的水体遥感反射率并校准/验证 TSS 反演算法。CSV 中反射率列约为 446.56-1002.52 nm，采样间隔与 AVIRIS-NG 验证需求相关。
desc_en: This ORNL DAAC dataset provides in situ remote-sensing reflectance measurements over water surfaces in the Atchafalaya Basin during Pre-Delta-X. The guide describes ASD FieldSpec 3 above-water spectra at 35 observations across 24 sites, used to ground-truth AVIRIS-NG Rrs and calibrate/validate total suspended solids retrievals.
openness: ORNL DAAC dataset guide and public DOI
source_type: in situ hyperspectral aquatic remote-sensing reflectance validation dataset
evidence: The ORNL DAAC guide cites DOI 10.3334/ORNLDAAC/1804 and states that the dataset provides in situ Rrs of water surfaces across Atchafalaya Basin, collected with an ASD FieldSpec 3 at 35 observations, with reflectance values at wavelengths from about 446.56 to 1002.52 nm for AVIRIS-NG validation and TSS algorithm development. CMR short_name PreDeltaX_Insitu_Reflectance_1804; concept C2025123576-ORNL_CLOUD.
scale: 35 observations at 24 water sites
feature_count: one CSV with Rrs wavelengths, site metadata and TSS co-location information

name: Delta-X MRD In Situ Water Surface Remote-Sensing Reflectance 2021 V2
provider: NASA ORNL DAAC / Delta-X
theme_canonical: spring and fall in situ hyperspectral water-surface Rrs for Delta-X AVIRIS-NG validation
theme_raw: PSR-1100f above-water Rrs measurements and uncertainty at 1 nm intervals
coverage: Atchafalaya and Terrebonne Basins, Mississippi River Delta, Louisiana, USA
license: NASA ORNL DAAC open data; cite dataset DOI
formats: CSV files for spring and fall 2021 water reflectance
access: ORNL DAAC dataset guide with Get Data link
notes: Version 2 supersedes the spring-only DOI 10.3334/ORNLDAAC/1994 for catalog purposes because it includes spring and fall campaign files.
desc_zh: 该 ORNL DAAC Delta-X V2 数据集包含 2021 年春季和秋季 Mississippi River Delta Atchafalaya 与 Terrebonne Basins 的原位水面遥感反射率。ORNL guide 和 DataCite 说明数据由 PSR-1100f 手持光谱辐射计采集，Rrs 以 1 nm 间隔报告在 360-900 nm 范围，并为每个波长提供不确定性。数据与 TSS、浊度、叶绿素荧光和粒径等水质/泥沙观测配套，用于 AVIRIS-NG 反射率和水质算法验证。
desc_en: This ORNL DAAC Delta-X Version 2 dataset provides spring and fall 2021 in situ water-surface remote-sensing reflectance across the Atchafalaya and Terrebonne basins. Reflectance is reported at 1 nm intervals from 360-900 nm with per-wavelength uncertainty, paired with water-quality and sediment measurements for AVIRIS-NG validation.
openness: ORNL DAAC dataset guide and public DOI
source_type: in situ hyperspectral aquatic remote-sensing reflectance validation dataset
evidence: DataCite metadata for DOI 10.3334/ORNLDAAC/2076 and the ORNL guide state that Delta-X 2021 V2 includes above-water Rrs measured in situ at field stations during spring and fall campaigns, reported at 1 nm intervals from 360 to 900 nm with uncertainty and paired water-quality/sediment measurements.
scale: spring and fall 2021 field stations across Atchafalaya and Terrebonne basins
feature_count: spring and fall CSV water reflectance files with uncertainty and water-quality co-measurements

name: PANGAEA CoastColour Round Robin Coastal Water Match-Up Dataset
provider: PANGAEA / CoastColour Round Robin
theme_canonical: coastal water field and MERIS match-up dataset for water-quality algorithm validation
theme_raw: field AOP/IOP/biogeochemical data and MERIS L2 match-up products
coverage: global/coastal CoastColour match-up sites
formats: PANGAEA archived CSV and related match-up files
access: PANGAEA DOI landing page
notes: Boundary/validation dataset. It contains multispectral and hyperspectral field reflectance components and MERIS match-ups, so it is cataloged as aquatic optical remote-sensing validation data rather than imaging-scene data.
desc_zh: CoastColour Round Robin 是用于评估沿岸水质参数反演算法的开放 match-up 数据集。PANGAEA 元数据说明其包含 field match-up 数据和 MERIS Level 2 match-up 产品，现场数据按 metadata、biogeochem、IOPs 和 AOPs 等 CSV 组织；ESSD 论文说明该数据库包含 6484 条海洋反射率及相关叶绿素、悬浮物和吸收等水质参数，其中反射率既有多光谱也有高光谱。它适合水色遥感算法验证和跨区域水质产品评估。
desc_en: The CoastColour Round Robin dataset provides field and MERIS match-up data for evaluating coastal water-quality retrieval algorithms. PANGAEA metadata describe field metadata, biogeochemical, IOP and AOP CSV files plus MERIS Level 2 match-up products; the associated ESSD paper describes thousands of marine reflectance records, including multispectral and hyperspectral measurements.
openness: PANGAEA DOI record with CC BY 3.0 rights
source_type: aquatic optical remote-sensing match-up and validation dataset
evidence: DataCite metadata for DOI 10.1594/PANGAEA.841950 identifies CoastColour Round Robin datasets with field metadata, biogeochemical, IOP and AOP files plus MERIS match-up products; the ESSD description states that the datasets mainly consist of thousands of marine reflectance records, either multispectral or hyperspectral, with water-quality parameters.
scale: coastal match-up field sites and MERIS products
feature_count: field AOP/IOP/biogeochemical CSV files and MERIS Level 2 match-up products

name: SISTER PRISMA L2B Vegetative Biochemical Traits 30 m V002
provider: NASA ORNL DAAC / SISTER
theme_canonical: PRISMA-derived vegetation biochemical traits at 30 m resolution
theme_raw: SISTER PRISMA L2B chlorophyll content, nitrogen concentration and leaf mass per area COG GeoTIFFs
coverage: selected PRISMA scenes, global coverage across PRISMA lines from about -122.1890 to 19.6244 longitude and -38.8589 to 66.1514 latitude
license: NASA ORNL DAAC open data; cite dataset DOI
formats: Cloud Optimized GeoTIFF products plus quicklook, PGE and log files
access: ORNL DAAC dataset guide with Get Data link
notes: Added as a SISTER product-matrix gap fill after checking existing SISTER PRISMA, DESIS, AVIRIS Classic, AVIRIS-NG and SHIFT holdings. PRISMA aquatic pigments, snow grain size and fractional cover were already cataloged; this vegetative biochemical product was not. The ORNL guide URL uses the product-code spelling VEGBIOCHM.
desc_zh: 该 ORNL DAAC SISTER 数据集提供由 PRISMA 卫星高光谱观测反演的 Level 2B 植被生化性状产品，空间分辨率为 30 m。ORNL guide 说明产品包含叶绿素含量、氮浓度和单位叶面积质量三个 COG GeoTIFF 图层，基于 PRISMA 在 400-2500 nm 范围、优于 12 nm 光谱间隔的反射辐射观测生成。数据覆盖 2020-02-16 至 2022-05-08 的 18 条 PRISMA 影像线，共 180 个文件，适合植被生化参数反演、跨传感器验证和 SISTER 产品链对比。
desc_en: This ORNL DAAC SISTER dataset provides experimental Level 2B vegetation biochemical traits derived from PRISMA satellite hyperspectral observations at 30 m resolution. The guide describes chlorophyll content, nitrogen concentration and leaf-mass-per-area layers as COG GeoTIFFs, generated from PRISMA reflected radiance measured from 400-2500 nm at better than 12 nm spectral intervals. It covers 18 PRISMA lines from 2020-02-16 to 2022-05-08, with 180 files for vegetation-trait retrieval and cross-sensor validation work.
openness: ORNL DAAC dataset guide and public DOI
source_type: satellite hyperspectral vegetation biochemical trait product
evidence: The ORNL DAAC guide and DOI 10.3334/ORNLDAAC/2205 identify SISTER PRISMA L2B Vegetative Biochemical Traits 30 m V002. The guide states that the dataset contains experimental Level 2B vegetation biochemical traits, including nitrogen concentration, leaf mass area and chlorophyll content, derived from PRISMA satellite data; PRISMA measures reflected radiance from 400 to 2500 nm at better than 12 nm intervals. The file description lists 180 files with COG GeoTIFF layers for chlorophyll content, nitrogen concentration and leaf mass per area across 18 PRISMA lines.
scale: 18 PRISMA image lines at 30 m resolution
feature_count: 180 files; three COG GeoTIFF trait layers plus quicklook, PGE and log files per image line

name: BJTU-UVA Automatic Spectral Calibration Hyperspectral Image Dataset
provider: University of Amsterdam / Amsterdam University of Applied Sciences / BJTU-UVA authors
theme_canonical: paired outdoor hyperspectral image dataset for automatic spectral calibration
theme_raw: Specim IQ HSI pairs captured with and without white reference board across urban and natural scenes
coverage: urban and natural outdoor scenes under diverse illumination and weather conditions
formats: Figshare downloadable dataset archive
access: Figshare institutional repository DOI landing page
notes: Boundary dataset: primarily a computer-vision/calibration benchmark, but it consists of outdoor hyperspectral image scenes and is relevant to remote-sensing HSI radiometric/spectral calibration workflows. Found from Figshare, then followed to DOI metadata and the associated arXiv/CVPR paper.
desc_zh: BJTU-UVA 是一个用于高光谱图像自动光谱校准的开放数据集，Figshare 页面给出 DOI、CC BY 4.0 许可和 89.61 GB 下载入口。数据用 Specim IQ 采集，公开说明其光谱分辨率约 3 nm、覆盖 400-1000 nm；每个场景以无参考板和有白参考板两种方式成对记录，并包含暗电流校正流程。关联 arXiv/CVPR 论文说明数据包含 765 对高质量 HSI，覆盖多样自然场景和光照条件，并可扩展到 7650 对用于校准基准测试。
desc_en: BJTU-UVA is an open hyperspectral-image dataset for automatic spectral calibration, distributed through an institutional Figshare DOI page with CC BY 4.0 licensing and an 89.61 GB download. The public metadata describe Specim IQ imagery with about 3 nm spectral resolution over 400-1000 nm, acquired as paired captures with and without a white reference board plus dark-current correction. The associated arXiv/CVPR paper reports 765 high-quality HSI pairs over diverse natural scenes and illuminations, expandable to 7650 pairs for benchmarking.
openness: Figshare institutional repository DOI with CC BY 4.0 license
source_type: outdoor hyperspectral image calibration benchmark dataset
evidence: The Figshare record identifies BJTU-UVA as a dataset with DOI 10.21942/uva.28228163, CC BY 4.0 license and an 89.61 GB download. Its description states that the camera is Specim IQ with 3 nm spectral resolution across 400-1000 nm, each scene is captured with and without a white reference board, and scenes span urban and natural environments under varied illumination. The associated arXiv paper arXiv:2412.14925 states that the dataset has 765 high-quality HSI pairs and can be expanded to 7650 pairs using measured illuminations.
scale: 765 HSI pairs; benchmark expansion to 7650 pairs reported by associated paper
feature_count: paired uncalibrated/calibrated outdoor HSI scenes

access: Zenodo DOI landing page with S3 download links

desc_zh: FlexiGroBots Blueberry UAV Hyperspectral Dataset 是一个面向蓝莓精准农业的无人机高光谱数据集，Zenodo 页面给出 DOI 和 CC BY 4.0 许可。数据在立陶宛 Vilnius District Municipality 的 Maišiagala 采集，使用 BaySpec OCI-F 高光谱成像仪，包含三天、六次飞行的原始和处理后高光谱影像。公开元数据说明空间分辨率约 0.023 m/pixel，共 204 个波段，光谱范围 426-958 nm，光谱分辨率 2.8 nm；文件组织包括白板/暗背景校准图像、raw images、BSQ 数据立方体、HDR 元数据和飞行路径信息。
desc_en: The FlexiGroBots Blueberry UAV Hyperspectral Dataset provides UAV hyperspectral imagery for blueberry precision-agriculture research, with a Zenodo DOI and CC BY 4.0 license. It was acquired near Maišiagala in Lithuania using a BaySpec OCI-F hyperspectral imager, covering six flights on three dates. Public metadata report 0.023 m/pixel spatial resolution, 204 spectral bands from 426-958 nm at 2.8 nm resolution, with raw and processed cubes, calibration images, BSQ/HDR files and flight-path information.
openness: Zenodo DOI record with CC BY 4.0 rights and public download links
source_type: UAV hyperspectral agricultural imagery dataset
evidence: The Zenodo record for DOI 10.5281/zenodo.6457533 states that the dataset consists of blueberry hyperspectral imaging data acquired with a UAV and BaySpec OCI-F Hyperspectral Imager on several dates. It lists 204 bands, 426-958 nm spectral range, 2.8 nm spectral resolution, 0.023 m/pixel spatial resolution, six flights, raw and processed hyperspectral imaging data, calibration images, flight path information, BSQ cubes and HDR metadata. DataCite identifies the record as a Zenodo dataset.
scale: six UAV flights on three acquisition dates
feature_count: three large date-based ZIP archives plus Zenodo descriptor file
file_size: about 318.82 GB across linked S3 archives

desc_en: This Mendeley Data dataset provides outdoor hyperspectral imagery and classification results for studying illumination, shadow and moisture effects, with Version 2 DOI 10.17632/rnnszmrn63.2 under CC BY 4.0. The public metadata describe four hyperspectral images measured during one afternoon at 13:37, 14:36, 15:31 and 17:20, plus classification_results.zip. A University of Twente institutional page indexes the same dataset, and the associated SSRN abstract frames the experiment around shadow, moisture and illumination-angle effects on rock-sample spectral classification.
openness: Mendeley Data DOI record with CC BY 4.0 license, mirrored in University of Twente research information
source_type: outdoor hyperspectral imaging validation dataset
evidence: Mendeley Data DOI 10.17632/rnnszmrn63.2 identifies the dataset as spectral data for Effects of Illumination and Moisture Variation on Outdoor Hyperspectral Measurements and Subsequent Spectral Classification, including four outdoor hyperspectral images measured at 13:37, 14:36, 15:31 and 17:20 and classification_results.zip. The University of Twente research-information page repeats the DOI, contributors and description. The SSRN abstract for DOI 10.2139/ssrn.5011436 states that the study uses hyperspectral imaging to capture illumination, shadow and moisture effects across continuous wavelength bands for rock samples.
scale: four outdoor hyperspectral image acquisitions across one afternoon
feature_count: four spectral-data folders plus classification_results.zip
file_size: classification_results.zip 6.54 MB; image folder sizes not specified in public snippet

license: NASA PDS open planetary science archive; cite PDS data set DOI where available
formats: PDS3/PDS4 labeled image cubes and derived products; ODE search/display/download access
access: PDS Geosciences Node CRISM landing page and Mars Orbital Data Explorer
time_span: MRO CRISM observations from 2006 onward; CRISM L data stopped 2018-02-15; archive volumes through 2022/2023 depending on product family
notes: Boundary planetary remote-sensing dataset. Added because the goal is a broad open hyperspectral remote-sensing atlas, and CRISM is a major open orbital imaging-spectrometer archive. Kept separate in notes from Earth-observation datasets.
desc_zh: NASA PDS 的 MRO CRISM 档案收录 Mars Reconnaissance Orbiter 上 Compact Reconnaissance Imaging Spectrometer for Mars 的开放成像光谱数据。PDS Geosciences Node 页面说明 CRISM 是可见光-红外高光谱制图仪，用于制图火星表面地质、成分和层理；档案包含原始 EDR、校准到 radiance 或 I/F 的 TRDR、经验校正 TER、地图投影 MTRDR，以及 VNIR hyperspectral reduced records 等多级产品。PDS 数据集页还说明 CRISM EDR 是来自 CRISM 的 image cubes，观测模式可包含 545 个 hyperspectral 通道，并可通过 Mars Orbital Data Explorer 搜索、显示和下载。
desc_en: The NASA PDS MRO CRISM archive provides open imaging-spectrometer data from the Compact Reconnaissance Imaging Spectrometer for Mars on Mars Reconnaissance Orbiter. The PDS Geosciences Node describes CRISM as a visible-infrared hyperspectral mapper for Martian geology, composition and layering, with EDR, TRDR, TER, MTRDR and VNIR hyperspectral reduced products. PDS dataset metadata describe CRISM EDRs as image cubes and note hyperspectral observing modes with 545 channels, accessible through the Mars Orbital Data Explorer.
openness: NASA Planetary Data System public archive and PDS/ODE download tools
source_type: planetary orbital hyperspectral imaging spectrometer archive
evidence: The PDS Geosciences Node states that CRISM is the Compact Reconnaissance Imaging Spectrometer for Mars, a visible-infrared hyperspectral mapper that maps Martian geology, composition and surface layering. The same page lists EDR/CDR raw products, TRDR calibrated radiance or I/F products, TER/MTRDR derived products and VNIR Hyperspectral Reduced Data Records, with Mars Orbital Data Explorer search/display/download tools. The PDS EDR dataset page describes CRISM Experiment Data Records as image cubes and states that CRISM has hyperspectral channel selection with 545 total channels.
scale: mission-scale Mars orbital archive with multiple CRISM product volumes
feature_count: multiple EDR, TRDR, DDR, TER, MTRDR, MRDR and VRDR volume families

desc_en: The Moon Mineralogy Mapper (M3) PDS bundle is an open archive of lunar orbital imaging-spectrometer observations from Chandrayaan-1. The PDS4 bundle DOI 10.17189/f8xf-6a29 includes observational products, documentation and ancillary data acquired from 2008-11-18 to 2009-08-16, modernizing the earlier PDS3 L0 raw, L1B radiance and L2 reflectance datasets into PDS4. It supports lunar mineralogy, reflectance mapping and planetary hyperspectral remote-sensing research.
openness: NASA PDS DOI bundle with public online access link
source_type: planetary orbital hyperspectral imaging spectrometer archive
evidence: The PDS bundle page identifies urn:nasa:pds:ch1_m3 as Chandrayaan-1 Orbiter Moon Mineralogy Mapper Collected Data Sets with DOI 10.17189/f8xf-6a29. It states that the bundle contains observational products, documentation and ancillary data related to the Moon Mineralogy Mapper, acquired during the Chandrayaan-1 primary mission from November 2008 to August 2009, and that it translates PDS3 L0 raw, L1B radiance and L2 reflectance M3 data sets into PDS4 products.
scale: mission-scale lunar orbital M3 archive
feature_count: PDS4 observational, document and browse collections

desc_zh: OMEGA 是 ESA Mars Express 上的可见光-红外制图光谱仪，用于分析火星表面反射太阳光和热辐射，反演表面矿物、气溶胶和大气分子组成。PDS Geosciences Node 页面说明 OMEGA 数据的主来源是 ESA Planetary Science Archive，NASA PDS 也根据 ESA-NASA 合作托管 OMEGA 数据档案副本，并按名义任务和多个扩展任务提供数据入口。页面还提供 Mars Orbital Data Explorer，用于对该数据集进行搜索、显示和下载。
desc_en: OMEGA is the visible and infrared mapping spectrometer on ESA Mars Express, used to analyze reflected sunlight and emitted thermal radiation for Martian surface mineralogy, aerosols and atmospheric composition. The PDS Geosciences Node states that ESA's Planetary Science Archive is the primary source for OMEGA data, while NASA PDS hosts a copy under an ESA-NASA agreement. The page provides nominal and extended-mission archive links plus Mars Orbital Data Explorer search, display and download tools.
openness: ESA PSA primary archive and NASA PDS hosted copy with public download/search tools
source_type: planetary orbital imaging spectrometer archive
evidence: The PDS Geosciences Node describes OMEGA as the Observatoire pour la Mineralogie, l'Eau, les Glaces et l'Activite visible to infrared mapping spectrometer, used to determine mineral content of the Martian surface and aerosol/molecular composition by analyzing reflected sunlight and emitted heat radiation. The same page states that the ESA Planetary Science Archive is the primary source, PDS hosts a copy of the OMEGA archive, and Mars Orbital Data Explorer provides search, display and download tools for the data set.
scale: Mars Express nominal and extended mission OMEGA archive
feature_count: nominal mission, extended mission volumes and derived global maps

The Ring-Moon Systems Node states that the multi-volume archive contains VIMS data products, instrument documentation, calibration files, calibration algorithms and documentation needed to produce higher-level calibrated products. It also notes that VIMS QUBES are compatible with ISIS and provides OPUS search, volume browsing and quick-download paths for Saturn-system spectral cube studies.

source_type: planetary orbital visible-infrared mapping spectrometer archive

It says the volumes contain VIMS data products, instrument documentation, calibration files, calibration algorithms and documentation needed for higher-level calibrated products. The page also notes that VIMS QUBES are compatible with ISIS and provides OPUS search, data-volume browsing and quick download links.
scale: Cassini mission-spanning multi-volume VIMS archive
feature_count: VIMS QUBE data products plus calibration, documentation and browse resources

desc_zh: 该 Harvard Dataverse 数据集提供 Prospect Hill Tract Megaplot 的无人机高光谱表面方向反射率飞行线马赛克。Dataverse API 元数据说明数据为正射校正并重切片发布的高光谱 cube，使用 Headwall Photonics Nano VNIR line scanning imager 采集，共 273 个波段，覆盖 400-1000 nm；传感器搭载 DJI M600，在森林冠层上方约 80 m 飞行，地面采样距离约 6 cm。公开文件列表包含 313 个 GeoTIFF tile，适合森林冠层反射率、物种/结构建模和高分辨率 UAS 高光谱算法验证。

Dataverse metadata describe orthorectified, retiled hyperspectral cubes acquired with a Headwall Photonics Nano VNIR line-scanning imager, with 273 bands from 400-1000 nm. The sensor flew on a DJI M600 about 80 m above the forest canopy, yielding about 6 cm GSD, and the public file list contains 313 GeoTIFF tiles for high-resolution forest reflectance and algorithm studies.

The API file list reports 313 image/tiff files. Phase218 Dataverse API recheck: 313 unrestricted image/tiff files totaling 206,910,472,354 bytes; description states Headwall Nano VNIR, 273 bands, 400-1000 nm, DJI M600 at ~80 m above canopy and ~6 cm GSD.

theme_raw: agronomic, weather, canopy temperature and plot-average VNIR/SWIR hyperspectral reflectance tables from aircraft imagery
coverage: Aranjuez, Central Spain
formats: XLSX files with crop agronomic data, corrected reflectance/temperature and weather data

The Mendeley page explicitly states that original airborne images are available under reasonable request to the authors. It overlaps thematically with an existing figshare winter-wheat trait dataset but has a distinct DOI, title, file set and focus on simultaneous nitrogen/water status assessment.
desc_zh: 该 Mendeley Data 数据集提供西班牙 Aranjuez 冬小麦氮素和水分状态研究中的农艺、气象、热红外和高光谱派生数据，版本 2 DOI 为 10.17632/b7xg8d8m9k.2，许可为 CC BY 4.0。公开文件包括作物农艺数据、飞机平台提取的平均冠层温度和平均光谱反射率、以及 2018-2020 年气象数据；原始高光谱和热红外影像需向作者合理申请。页面说明 VNIR Headwall Hyperspec 覆盖 400-850 nm，SWIR Headwall NIR-100 覆盖 950-1750 nm，飞机约 300 m 高度飞行，实验包含两年、每年 32 个不同水氮处理小区。
desc_en: This Mendeley Data record provides agronomic, weather, thermal and derived hyperspectral remote-sensing data for winter wheat nitrogen and water status experiments in Aranjuez, Spain. Version 2 DOI 10.17632/b7xg8d8m9k.2 is CC BY 4.0 and includes downloadable XLSX files for crop measurements, plot-average canopy temperature and spectral reflectance extracted from aircraft imagery, plus weather data; the original airborne images are available from the authors by request. The page describes VNIR Headwall Hyperspec imagery from 400-850 nm, SWIR Headwall NIR-100 reflectance from 950-1750 nm, and aircraft flights about 300 m above the experiment.
openness: Mendeley Data DOI record with CC BY 4.0 downloadable files; raw images by author request
source_type: article-linked derived airborne hyperspectral and thermal remote-sensing dataset
evidence: Mendeley Data DOI 10.17632/b7xg8d8m9k.2 identifies a dataset with agronomic, climatic, thermal and spectral information from winter wheat experiments in Aranjuez, Spain. The page states that Crop_Reflectance_temp_from_Plane contains average canopy temperature and average spectral reflectance from each plot, obtained from airborne images acquired with thermal and hyperspectral cameras mounted on a plane; it describes VNIR Hyperspec data from 400-850 nm and SWIR NIR-100 data from 950-1750 nm, and notes that original images are available under reasonable request to the authors.
scale: two field experiments, each with 32 plots under water and nitrogen treatments
feature_count: three XLSX files: crop agronomic data, corrected reflectance/temperature, and weather data
file_size: about 2.13 MB across listed XLSX files

desc_zh: MOBY（Marine Optical BuoY）是 NOAA 维护的长期海色定标验证浮标，部署在夏威夷 Lanai 附近海域，自 1997 年起持续提供海色卫星 vicarious calibration 所需的水体光学观测。data.gov/NCEI 元数据说明该数据集包含 hyperspectral Es、Lu、KL、Lw、Lwn 和 Rsr 等 raw filtered spectral radiance 文件，MOBY 是美国海色传感器（SeaWiFS、MODIS、VIIRS 等）的主要 in-water oceanic observatory。NOAA STAR 页面还提供 MOBY deployment、gold、spectral、filtered spectral 和 platinum 数据目录，并列出大量 .mby 光谱产品文件。
desc_en: MOBY is NOAA's long-term Marine Optical Buoy reference dataset for ocean-color satellite vicarious calibration, deployed off Lanai, Hawaii since 1997. data.gov/NCEI metadata state that the raw filtered spectral radiance dataset contains hyperspectral Es, Lu, KL, Lw, Lwn and Rsr files, and that MOBY has been the primary in-water oceanic observatory for calibrating U.S. ocean-color sensors such as SeaWiFS, MODIS and VIIRS. NOAA STAR provides deployment, gold, spectral, filtered spectral and platinum data directories with downloadable .mby spectral products.
openness: NOAA/data.gov public metadata and NOAA STAR directory access; NCEI access terms should be checked for bulk archive orders
source_type: in situ hyperspectral ocean-color radiometry validation dataset
evidence: data.gov/NCEI metadata for Marine Optical Buoy (MOBY) Raw Filtered Spectral Radiance Files states that the dataset contains hyperspectral Es, Lu, KL, Lw, Lwn and Rsr files, begins on 1997-07-29, and supports ocean-color satellite vicarious calibration. The NOAA STAR MOBY page states that MOBY is an autonomous optical buoy off Lanai, Hawaii, became operational in July 1997, collects daily data, and provides deployment, spectral, filtered spectral and platinum data repositories; the spectral data listing provides downloadable .mby products.
scale: daily long-term buoy radiometry record from 1997 onward
feature_count: large directory of MOBY spectral .mby files plus deployment/gold/filtered/platinum products

desc_en: PVST SO-PACE is a NASA SeaBASS/OB.DAAC dataset for PACE ocean-color validation, with DOI 10.5067/SeaBASS/PVST_SOPACE/DATA001. The SeaBASS page states that SO-PACE uses opportunistic deployments on research vessels and a pySAS continuous above-water autonomous solar-tracking system to collect water-leaving radiance, sky radiance and downwelling irradiance, from which hyperspectral Rrs spanning 350-750 nm is calculated. The experiment also includes IOP, pigment, flow-through, cast, mooring and above-water data accessible through SeaBASS search and cruise links.

Its description states that SO-PACE produces measurements of hyperspectral Rrs spanning 350 nm to 750 nm using the pySAS continuous above-water autonomous solar tracking platform, with water-leaving and sky radiances and downwelling irradiance. DataCite identifies the DOI as a NASA OB.DAAC dataset.

feature_count: SeaBASS experiment files across above-water Rrs, IOPs, pigments and associated cruise data

It provides estimates of chlorophyll content, nitrogen concentration and leaf mass per area as cloud-optimized GeoTIFF products with quicklooks and processing traceability, supporting SBG-like algorithm development and vegetation trait studies.

desc_zh: 该 SISTER v002 数据集提供由 DLR DESIS 空间载荷成像光谱数据派生的 30 m 水体色素产品。数据包含叶绿素 A 和藻蓝蛋白浓度变量，以云优化 GeoTIFF、quicklook 和处理追溯文件发布。它适合用于 SBG 类水色算法原型、内陆和近岸水体成像光谱验证，以及 DESIS 与宽谱段 VSWIR 传感器的产品对比。
desc_en: This SISTER v002 dataset provides 30 m aquatic pigment products derived from DLR DESIS spaceborne imaging spectroscopy. It includes chlorophyll-a and phycocyanin concentration variables as cloud-optimized GeoTIFFs with quicklooks and processing traceability files. The dataset supports SBG-like aquatic algorithm prototyping, inland and coastal water validation, and comparison of DESIS products with broader VSWIR imaging spectrometers.

source_type: derived spaceborne hyperspectral L2B product
evidence: ORNL DAAC guide Citation section gives DOI 10.3334/ORNLDAAC/2213 and states this dataset contains experimental L2B aquatic pigments at 30 m derived from DESIS imaging spectroscopy; the guide lists chlorophyll A and phycocyanin outputs in cloud optimized GeoTIFF format, 18 files, selected DESIS scenes, 400-1000 nm spectral range and 2.5 nm spectral resolution.

The spectroscopy component includes 3,205 leaf spectra from 1,181 species over 450-949 nm in CSV files. It is not an airborne image product, but it is an open supporting spectral dataset for BioSCape and imaging-spectroscopy biodiversity research.

desc_zh: SHIFT HyTES L2 数据集提供 2022 年 3 月 23 日 SBG High-Frequency Time Series 活动期间采集的地理定位地表温度和发射率产品。HyTES 是热红外高光谱成像光谱仪，覆盖 7.5-12 微米、256 个波段；该 L2 产品包含 91 个飞行场景，以 HDF5、KMZ 和 PNG quicklook 等形式发布。它适合用于 VSWIR/TIR 联合分析、地表温度、发射率和蒸散/水分通量相关算法验证。
desc_en: The SHIFT HyTES L2 dataset provides geolocated land-surface temperature and emissivity products acquired on March 23, 2022 during the SBG High-Frequency Time Series campaign. HyTES is a thermal infrared imaging spectrometer with 256 bands from 7.5 to 12 micrometers; this L2 release includes 91 flight scenes distributed as HDF5 data, KMZ overlays and PNG quicklooks. It supports joint VSWIR/TIR analysis, land-surface temperature, emissivity and evapotranspiration-related algorithm validation.

source_type: NASA airborne thermal hyperspectral derived product

feature_count: 91 HDF5 data files; 455 total files

desc_zh: 该 SHIFT 数据集提供 Santa Barbara County 样地干燥和研磨叶片材料的全谱段反射率测量。样品采自 2022 年 SHIFT 活动期间，使用 ASD FieldSpec 3 在 350-2500 nm 范围采集光谱，并以 FlashFrozen_Spectra.csv 和 OvenDried_Spectra.csv 两个 CSV 文件发布。它不是航空影像产品，但可作为 AVIRIS-NG/SBG 成像光谱植被性状反演和地面验证的支撑光谱数据。
desc_en: This SHIFT dataset provides full-spectrum reflectance measurements of dried and ground leaf materials from Santa Barbara County field plots. Samples were collected during the 2022 SHIFT campaign and measured with an ASD FieldSpec 3 spectroradiometer from 350 to 2500 nm, with FlashFrozen_Spectra.csv and OvenDried_Spectra.csv distributed as CSV files. It is not airborne imagery, but it is open supporting spectroscopy for AVIRIS-NG/SBG vegetation-trait retrieval and validation workflows.
openness: open NASA Earthdata/ORNL DAAC data; Earthdata login may be needed for data access
source_type: field/laboratory full-spectrum reflectance dataset
evidence: ORNL DAAC PDF guide Citation section gives DOI 10.3334/ORNLDAAC/2244 and states the dataset provides full-spectrum 350-2500 nm reflectance measurements of dried ground leaf samples collected during SHIFT; two CSV files are provided, FlashFrozen_Spectra.csv and OvenDried_Spectra.csv, with spectra measured using an ASD FieldSpec 3 full-range spectroradiometer.
scale: two CSV spectral data files
feature_count: 2 CSV files; six spectra collected for each sample

desc_zh: 该数据集收录 2023 年 ABoVE 航空观测中 AVIRIS-3 在阿拉斯加和加拿大西北部获取的 L1B 辐射与 L2A 地表反射率影像。Earthdata/ORNL 元数据说明 AVIRIS-3 覆盖 390-2500 nm 的 VSWIR 范围，约 7.4 nm 光谱间隔，并提供 ENVI 影像和 GeoJSON 边界。它是 ABoVE 北极-寒带生态系统机载高光谱观测链的新一代 AVIRIS-3 数据补充。
desc_en: This collection contains L1B radiance and L2A surface reflectance imagery acquired by AVIRIS-3 over Alaska and northwestern Canada during the 2023 ABoVE airborne campaign. Earthdata/ORNL metadata describe AVIRIS-3 measurements across 390-2500 nm in the VSWIR at about 7.4 nm intervals, with ENVI imagery and GeoJSON boundaries. It extends the ABoVE airborne imaging-spectroscopy record with a project-specific AVIRIS-3 collection distinct from the earlier AVIRIS-NG archive.
openness: public NASA dataset; Earthdata login may be needed for file access
source_type: observed airborne AVIRIS-3 radiance and surface reflectance archive

desc_en: This dataset provides SHIFT 2022 AVIRIS-NG L1B unrectified calibrated radiance imagery plus observation geometry, illumination parameters, and sensor-band information. ORNL DAAC metadata describe approximately weekly VSWIR acquisitions from February-May and September 2022 across the Santa Barbara County SHIFT study area, supporting SBG high-frequency time-series analyses. It is the upstream open radiance source for SHIFT AVIRIS-NG L2A reflectance and derived vegetation products.

source_type: observed airborne AVIRIS-NG radiance archive

desc_en: This collection provides Delta-X 2021 AVIRIS-NG L1B spectral radiance products over the Atchafalaya and Terrebonne basins of the Mississippi River Delta, Louisiana. CMR metadata describe AVIRIS-NG measurements from 380-2510 nm at about 5 nm intervals and roughly 200 spring and fall flight lines. It is the upstream airborne imaging-spectroscopy source for Delta-X reflectance, BRDF-adjusted, biomass, vegetation, and water-quality products.

desc_en: This dataset provides Delta-X 2021 AVIRIS-NG L2 atmospherically corrected surface reflectance over the Atchafalaya and Terrebonne basins, including post-Hurricane Ida flight data. CMR describes it as surface reflectance from AVIRIS-NG over regions of interest in the Louisiana coastal delta. It is upstream of later BRDF-adjusted reflectance and mosaic products.

source_type: observed/processed airborne AVIRIS-NG reflectance archive

desc_zh: 该 V3 数据集提供 Delta-X 2021 AVIRIS-NG 在 Mississippi River Delta 的 BRDF 与 sunglint 校正地表光谱反射率影像和镶嵌产品。CMR 摘要说明数据覆盖 Atchafalaya 与 Terrebonne 流域，提供每条 flight line 的反射率以及按时期和地点组织的镶嵌文件，并以 ENVI 二进制影像和头文件发布。它是 Delta-X 湿地植被、生物量和水环境分析的重要高光谱反射率底图。
desc_en: This V3 dataset provides Delta-X 2021 AVIRIS-NG BRDF- and sunglint-corrected surface spectral reflectance imagery and mosaics for the Mississippi River Delta. CMR metadata describe reflectance for individual flight lines plus mosaics by time period and location across the Atchafalaya and Terrebonne basins, distributed as ENVI binary image and header files. It is a key hyperspectral reflectance base layer for Delta-X wetland vegetation, biomass, and water-environment analyses.
openness: public NASA ORNL DAAC dataset; Earthdata login may be needed for file access
source_type: processed airborne AVIRIS-NG reflectance and mosaic archive
evidence: CMR collection DeltaX_L2A_AVIRIS-NG_BRDF_V3_2355 cites DOI 10.3334/ORNLDAAC/2355 and describes AVIRIS-NG BRDF/sunglint-corrected surface spectral reflectance and mosaics for 2021 Delta-X flights, provided as binary ENVI image/header files with masks.

feature_count: AVIRIS-NG VSWIR reflectance mosaics

desc_zh: 该 L3 数据集提供 Mississippi River Delta 中 Atchafalaya 与 Terrebonne 流域森林地上生物量估计。CMR 摘要说明产品由 AVIRIS-NG BRDF 调整地表反射率和 UAVSAR 产品联合推导，并使用与样地生物量观测对应的反射率光谱和雷达散射信息训练机器学习回归模型。它属于高光谱-雷达融合派生产品，不是原始影像。
desc_en: This L3 dataset provides forest aboveground biomass estimates across the Atchafalaya and Terrebonne basins of the Mississippi River Delta. CMR metadata state that it was derived from AVIRIS-NG BRDF-adjusted surface reflectance and UAVSAR products, using coincident reflectance spectra, radar scattering components, and field biomass plots in a machine-learning regression workflow. It is a hyperspectral-radar fused derived product rather than raw imagery.
openness: public NASA ORNL DAAC dataset; Earthdata login may be needed for file access
source_type: derived hyperspectral-radar biomass product
evidence: CMR collection DeltaX_AVIRIS-NG_UAVSAR_L3_AGB_2410 cites DOI 10.3334/ORNLDAAC/2410 and describes forest AGB derived from AVIRIS-NG BRDF-adjusted surface reflectance and UAVSAR over Atchafalaya and Terrebonne basins.

feature_count: derived from AVIRIS-NG spectral reflectance and UAVSAR

CMR metadata describe high-resolution, approximately 5 m gridded estimates derived from April and August 2021 AVIRIS-NG BRDF-adjusted surface reflectance and field biomass samples. It is an ecological product derived from hyperspectral reflectance.

The product is available through LP DAAC/Earthdata Cloud for methane-emission monitoring, source screening, and greenhouse-gas remote-sensing algorithm work.

name: H2Crop EnMAP Sentinel-2 Hierarchical Crop Classification Dataset
provider: University of Hong Kong / Beihang University / H2Crop authors
theme_canonical: EnMAP hyperspectral and Sentinel-2 crop classification benchmark
theme_raw: H2Crop EnMAP-Sentinel-2 hierarchical crop dataset
coverage: agricultural parcels in France, 2022-2023 growing seasons according to paper and dataset documentation
license: Apache-2.0 for code repository; dataset terms not separately stated on directory index, use with citation and provider terms
formats: HDF5 data archive (.7z), parcel label archive, prior parcel archive, SHA256 checksums
access: direct HTTPS directory download and GitHub repository documentation
doi_or_citation: Li et al. 2025 arXiv:2506.06155; H2Crop GitHub and direct download directory
notes: 2-hop evidence chain: arXiv paper describes H2Crop; GitHub README points to the HKU direct download directory; directory exposes h5_data.7z (~98G), label_parcels.7z, prior_parcels.7z and H2Crop.sha256. Hugging Face-like guessed URLs returned 401 and were not used.
desc_zh: H2Crop 是一个面向精细农业作物分类的大规模多模态数据集，将 30 m 分辨率 EnMAP 高光谱影像与 Sentinel-2 时间序列结合，并提供分层作物标签。论文和 README 描述其包含超过一百万个标注地块，直接下载目录提供约 98G 的 HDF5 数据压缩包、地块标签、先验地块文件和 SHA256 校验。它是非 NASA EnMAP 高光谱农业 benchmark 的重要开放线索。
desc_en: H2Crop is a large-scale multimodal dataset for fine-grained crop classification, integrating 30 m EnMAP hyperspectral imagery with Sentinel-2 time series and hierarchical crop labels. The paper and README describe more than one million annotated field parcels, while the direct download directory exposes an approximately 98 GB HDF5 data archive, parcel labels, prior parcels, and SHA256 checksums. It is an important non-NASA EnMAP hyperspectral agriculture benchmark lead.
openness: public direct download directory; repository code under Apache-2.0, dataset-specific terms should be checked by users
source_type: derived EnMAP-Sentinel-2 crop classification benchmark
evidence: GitHub README for flyakon/H2Crop states the dataset integrates 30 m EnMAP hyperspectral data with Sentinel-2 time series and links to https://glass.hku.hk/casual/H2Crop/. The direct directory lists H2Crop.sha256, h5_data.7z (98G), label_parcels.7z (229M), and prior_parcels.7z (228M). arXiv:2506.06155 describes H2Crop as a hierarchical hyperspectral crop dataset with over one million annotated field parcels.
scale: over one million annotated parcels; 30 m EnMAP plus Sentinel-2 time series according to paper
feature_count: EnMAP hyperspectral imagery integrated with Sentinel-2 temporal features and hierarchical crop labels
