theme_raw: Geometry Optimization of UAV Hyperspectral Surveys for Water Quality Retrieval and Satellite Upscaling in Mining Impacted Waters (Chalkidiki and Kirki, Greece)
coverage: Kassandra/Chalkidiki and Kirki mining-impacted waters, Greece
formats: ZIP containing CSV spectra, laboratory water chemistry tables, coordinate table and dataset description DOCX
access: Zenodo open download
notes: Added in v141 as a distinct Greece companion dataset to the earlier Pyrite Belt water-quality hyperspectral survey; rechecked in phase466 and kept as the canonical row rather than duplicating it. This record contains UAV/proximal VNIR spectra and water chemistry rather than raster image cubes.
desc_zh: Chalkidiki and Kirki UAV VNIR Water Quality 数据集是希腊矿区影响水体的无人机高光谱水质调查数据。Zenodo 条目提供 CC BY 4.0 的 ZIP，包含多组 VNIR 光谱 CSV、Chalkidiki/Kirki 实验室水化学分析、采样和光谱测量位置坐标表以及数据说明。它与已收录的西班牙 Pyrite Belt 条目同属 UAV 高光谱水质反演研究链，但覆盖不同区域和独立 DOI，适合水质参数反演、采样几何优化和卫星上尺度验证。
desc_en: The Chalkidiki and Kirki UAV VNIR Water Quality dataset contains hyperspectral water-quality survey data for mining-impacted waters in Greece. The Zenodo CC BY 4.0 ZIP includes multiple VNIR spectra CSV files, Chalkidiki/Kirki laboratory water-chemistry tables, a coordinate table for water samples and spectral measurements, and a dataset description. It is related to the previously cataloged Spain Pyrite Belt UAV water-quality record but has a distinct DOI and study area, supporting water-quality retrieval, survey-geometry optimization and satellite-upscaling validation.
openness: Zenodo CC BY 4.0 downloadable ZIP
source_type: UAV hyperspectral survey spectra with geolocated water-quality measurements
evidence: Zenodo API for record 20270805 reports DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20270805, CC BY 4.0 and Water_Quality_Dataset_Chalkidiki_Kirki.zip (1,271,552 bytes). The v141 ZIP inspection saved as research/zenodo_20270805_greece_zip_preview_v141.json lists 18 files, including In_Situ_Spectrum/Water_VNIR_* CSV files, Lab_Analysis/Chalkidiki_Water_Analysis.csv, Lab_Analysis/Kirki_Water_Analysis.csv and Localities_of_water_samples_and_spectral_measurement.csv with latitude/longitude fields. Phase466 DataCite/Zenodo recheck confirmed concept DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20270804, version DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20270805, CC-BY-4.0 license, publication_date 2026-05-18, and the same Water_Quality_Dataset_Chalkidiki_Kirki.zip package.
scale: geolocated UAV VNIR spectra and water samples across Chalkidiki and Kirki sites
feature_count: 18 ZIP entries; multiple Water_VNIR CSV spectra plus lab-analysis and location tables

name: HAMSTER Daily Global Hyperspectral Albedo Maps Dataset v2
provider: Zenodo / LMU Munich / ESA-linked HAMSTER authors
theme_canonical: daily global hyperspectral albedo maps
theme_raw: HAMSTER: Hyperspectral Albedo Maps dataset with high Spatial and TEmporal Resolution
coverage: global land surface, 0.25 degree latitude/longitude grid
formats: monthly ZIP archives containing NetCDF hyperspectral albedo maps
access: Zenodo open download
notes: Added in v141 as a derived hyperspectral product, not observed HSI imagery. Zenodo v1 points to this v2 release; DataCite also exposes LMU repository DOIs for HAMSTER. Lychee v141 verified landing URL alive (5/5 v141 links OK).
desc_zh: HAMSTER v2 是一个全球日尺度高光谱地表反照率图集，提供 365 天、0.25 度经纬网格的高光谱 albedo maps。数据由 10 年 MODIS Surface Reflectance 气候态和多类实验室/原位高光谱测量通过 PCA regression 重建 400-2500 nm 波段范围，并以按月份分包的 ZIP/NetCDF 文件开放发布。它不是直接观测的高光谱影像，但作为全球高光谱反照率派生产品，对辐射传输、传感器仿真和陆面参数研究很有价值。
desc_en: HAMSTER v2 is a daily global hyperspectral surface-albedo map dataset with 365 maps on a 0.25 degree latitude/longitude grid. It reconstructs 400-2500 nm albedo from a 10-year MODIS Surface Reflectance climatology and laboratory/in-situ hyperspectral measurements using PCA regression, and is distributed as monthly ZIP/NetCDF packages. It is not directly observed HSI imagery, but it is a valuable derived hyperspectral albedo product for radiative-transfer work, sensor simulation and land-surface studies.
openness: Zenodo CC BY 4.0 monthly ZIP downloads
source_type: derived global hyperspectral albedo map product
evidence: DataCite search found HAMSTER Zenodo DOI 10.5281/zenodo.11459410 and older DOI 10.5281/zenodo.10494404. Zenodo API for record 11459410 states the dataset contains 365 daily hyperspectral albedo maps built from MODIS MCD43D42-48 v6.1 and hyperspectral laboratory/in-situ measurements, covering 400-2500 nm at 0.25 degree resolution, with monthly ZIP files such as March.zip (5,580,570,667 bytes) and October.zip (5,550,762,241 bytes).
scale: 365 global daily maps, 0.25 degree grid, 400-2500 nm reconstructed spectra
feature_count: 12 monthly ZIP packages covering 365 daily NetCDF maps
file_size: monthly ZIP files around 4.3-5.6 GB each

name: Northern China GEO-LEO Hyperspectral Infrared Sounder Dust-Storm Retrieval Dataset
provider: Peking University / Zenodo
theme_canonical: GEO and LEO hyperspectral infrared sounder dust-storm retrieval products
theme_raw: Supplementary datasets for Monitoring rapidly evolving dust storms in Northern China from a constellation of GEO and LEO hyperspectral infrared sounders
coverage: Northern China dust-storm case study region
formats: ZIP supplementary retrieval dataset
access: Zenodo open download
notes: Added in v141 as an atmospheric retrieval supplement from hyperspectral infrared sounders, not as raw image-cube data. The record is useful for tracking hyperspectral sounder-derived geophysical products. Lychee v141 verified landing URL alive (5/5 v141 links OK).
desc_zh: Northern China GEO-LEO Hyperspectral Infrared Sounder Dust-Storm Retrieval 数据集是 JGR-Atmospheres 论文的开放补充数据，面向中国北方快速演变沙尘暴监测。Zenodo 条目说明数据来自 GEO 与 LEO 高光谱红外探测仪星座的反演产品，并提供 CC BY 4.0 的 GEO_LEO_RETRIEVED.zip 文件。该条不是原始高光谱影像，而是高光谱红外 sounder 的大气反演数据，适合沙尘暴过程分析和多平台高光谱红外资料融合研究。
desc_en: This Northern China dust-storm dataset is the open supplementary dataset for a JGR-Atmospheres study on monitoring rapidly evolving dust storms with a constellation of GEO and LEO hyperspectral infrared sounders. The Zenodo record provides a CC BY 4.0 GEO_LEO_RETRIEVED.zip file. This is not raw hyperspectral image-cube data; it is a hyperspectral infrared sounder retrieval supplement useful for dust-storm process analysis and multi-platform hyperspectral infrared data fusion.
openness: Zenodo CC BY 4.0 downloadable ZIP
source_type: hyperspectral infrared sounder retrieval product supplement
evidence: Zenodo API/page for record 20303866 reports DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20303866, CC BY 4.0, the related JGR-Atmospheres article DOI 10.1029/2025JD045990, and a single GEO_LEO_RETRIEVED.zip file of 356,078,559 bytes.
scale: Northern China dust-storm retrieval supplement from GEO/LEO hyperspectral infrared sounders
feature_count: one ZIP retrieval-data package

name: Coastal and Estuarine Waters Hyperspectral Rrs and Spectral Attenuation Dataset 2022-2023
provider: Universitaet Rostock / Zenodo
theme_canonical: coastal and estuarine hyperspectral remote-sensing reflectance and attenuation tables
theme_raw: Biogeochemical and Spectral Attenuation Data for Coastal and Estuarine Waters (June 2022 - August 2023)
coverage: coastal and estuarine stations including Warnemuende, Schnatermann and Rerik, Germany
formats: CSV tables and README
access: Zenodo open download
notes: Added in v141 as a compact hyperspectral water remote-sensing reflectance table dataset. This is station-based Rrs/attenuation data with coordinates and biogeochemistry, not imagery. Lychee v141 verified landing URL alive (5/5 v141 links OK).
desc_zh: Coastal and Estuarine Waters Rrs/Attenuation 数据集包含 2022 年 6 月至 2023 年 8 月德国海岸和河口站点的生物地球化学测量、深度分辨高光谱遥感反射率 Rrs 以及光谱衰减系数。Zenodo 条目提供 CC BY 4.0 的 CSV 和 README，包括站点元数据、坐标/水体类型、Chl-a、TSM、aCDOM、Secchi 深度、原始目标 Rrs 和 Keff/K0 等派生指标。它是水色/海岸光学方向的高光谱表格数据，不是栅格影像。
desc_en: The Coastal and Estuarine Waters Rrs/Attenuation dataset provides biogeochemical measurements, depth-resolved hyperspectral remote-sensing reflectance and derived spectral attenuation coefficients for German coastal and estuarine stations from June 2022 to August 2023. The Zenodo CC BY 4.0 files include station metadata, coordinates and optical classification, Chl-a, TSM, aCDOM, Secchi depth, raw target Rrs and Keff/K0 attenuation products. It is a compact ocean-optics hyperspectral table dataset rather than gridded imagery.
openness: Zenodo CC BY 4.0 downloadable CSV files
source_type: station-based hyperspectral water remote-sensing reflectance dataset
evidence: Zenodo API for record 19911435 reports DOI 10.5281/zenodo.19911435, CC BY 4.0 and four files: 1_Station_Biogeochemical_Dataset_20260430.csv, 2_Raw_Target_Reflectance_Rrs_20260430.csv, 3_Derived_Spectral_Attenuation_Data_20260430.csv and README_20260430.txt. The description states the Rrs file contains depth-resolved hyperspectral remote sensing reflectance data and the station dataset contains metadata/coordinates and biogeochemical measurements.
scale: station-based coastal and estuarine water Rrs/attenuation observations, June 2022-August 2023
feature_count: four CSV/README files; raw Rrs CSV 1.41 MB

name: PANGAEA Global Inland Coastal Ocean Water Quality and Hyperspectral Rrs Dataset
provider: PANGAEA / Maciel, Pahlevan and Barbosa
theme_canonical: global inland, coastal and ocean water quality and hyperspectral Rrs compilation
theme_raw: Water quality and remote sensing reflectance data for global inland, coastal and ocean waters
coverage: global inland, coastal and ocean waters, 1990-2022
formats: PANGAEA tab-delimited metadata and ZIP/XLSX files including rrs_hyper_v3.xlsx and satellite matchup workbooks
access: PANGAEA open DOI landing page and download data links
notes: Added in v142. Distinct from GLORIA because this record packages Secchi/water-quality data, simulated sensor Rrs sheets, hyperspectral Rrs workbook and Landsat ACOLITE matchups for a global water-transparency algorithm. Lychee v142 verified landing URL alive (6/6 v142 links OK).
desc_zh: 该 PANGAEA 数据集汇集了全球内陆、海岸和海洋水体的水质、遥感反射率和 Secchi 深度数据，用于全球水体透明度算法校准与验证。页面说明 Simulated Dataset.zip 中包含 TM/ETM+/OLI 传感器模拟 Rrs 和 hyperspectral Rrs workbook（rrs_hyper_v3.xlsx），另有 Landsat ACOLITE matchup 文件。它与 GLORIA 有引用关系但数据产品目标不同，适合水色遥感、透明度反演和多传感器算法评估。
desc_en: This PANGAEA dataset compiles water quality, remote-sensing reflectance and Secchi Disk depth data for global inland, coastal and ocean waters to calibrate and validate a global water-transparency algorithm. The page describes a Simulated Dataset.zip folder containing sensor-simulated Rrs workbooks and a hyperspectral Rrs workbook, rrs_hyper_v3.xlsx, plus Landsat ACOLITE matchup files. Although related to GLORIA, it packages a distinct water-transparency and multi-sensor validation product useful for aquatic remote sensing and Secchi-depth retrieval.
openness: Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International (CC BY 4.0) / PANGAEA open download
source_type: global aquatic hyperspectral Rrs and water-quality compilation
evidence: PANGAEA page for DOI 10.1594/PANGAEA.961720 states CC BY 4.0, global waters between 1990 and 2022, four data points/download objects, and comments that Simulated Dataset.zip contains rrs_tm_v3.xlsx, rrs_etm_v3.xlsx, rrs_oli_v3.xlsx and rrs_hyper_v3.xlsx, with ACOLITE_Matchups.ZIP for Landsat matchups.
scale: global inland/coastal/ocean waters, 1990-2022
feature_count: 4 PANGAEA binary/download objects; includes hyperspectral Rrs workbook and matchup workbooks
file_size: PANGAEA page reports 4 data points/download objects

name: PANGAEA Diverse Aquatic High Spectral Resolution IOP-AOP Dataset
provider: PANGAEA / Casey et al.
theme_canonical: in situ high spectral resolution aquatic IOP/AOP compilation for imaging spectrometry missions
theme_raw: In situ high spectral resolution inherent and apparent optical property data from diverse aquatic environments
coverage: global/diverse inland, estuarine and ocean waters
formats: PANGAEA tab-delimited metadata and linked XLSX ZIP package
access: PANGAEA open DOI landing page and download data links
notes: Added in v142 as a high spectral resolution aquatic optical-property compilation explicitly intended for PACE, SBG and AVIRIS-NG-style imaging spectrometry calibration/validation. Lychee v142 verified landing URL alive (6/6 v142 links OK).
desc_zh: Casey 等发布的 PANGAEA 数据集是多环境水体高光谱 IOP/AOP 观测汇编，覆盖内陆水、河口和海洋。页面说明数据包括吸收、衰减、后向散射、remote sensing reflectance 和 irradiance reflectance 等变量，并面向 PACE、SBG 与 AVIRIS-NG 等成像光谱任务的算法开发和定标验证。它不是栅格影像，而是高光谱水体光学原位观测库。
desc_en: The Casey et al. PANGAEA dataset is a high spectral resolution compilation of aquatic IOP/AOP observations across inland waters, estuaries and oceans. The page lists absorption, attenuation, backscattering, remote-sensing reflectance and irradiance reflectance variables, and states that the data were organized for aquatic remote-sensing algorithms and calibration/validation of PACE, SBG and AVIRIS-NG-style imaging spectrometry missions. It is not gridded imagery, but it is a strong hyperspectral aquatic optical reference dataset.
openness: Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International (CC BY 4.0) / PANGAEA open download
source_type: in situ high spectral resolution aquatic IOP/AOP and Rrs dataset
evidence: PANGAEA page for DOI 10.1594/PANGAEA.902230 states CC BY 4.0, 628 data points, version 2 XLSX files updated 2020-05-20, coverage from -90 to 90 latitude and -180 to 180 longitude, and measurements including remote sensing reflectance and irradiance reflectance for diverse aquatic environments.
scale: global/diverse aquatic environments
feature_count: 628 PANGAEA data points; original/versioned XLSX ZIP files

name: Lake Suesser See Inland Water Remote Sensing Validation Hyperspectral Rrs Dataset 2017
provider: PANGAEA / Thomas Schneider / Inland Water Remote Sensing Validation Campaign
theme_canonical: inland-water intercalibration hyperspectral remote-sensing reflectance
theme_raw: Remote-sensing reflectance determined from spectral data set within intercalibration campaign from Lake Suesser See
coverage: Lake Suesser See, Saxony-Anhalt, Germany
formats: PANGAEA tab-delimited data table
access: PANGAEA open DOI landing page and download data link
time_span: Inland Water Remote Sensing Validation Campaign 2017; published 2023
notes: Added in v142 as a focused inland-water validation/intercalibration dataset. DataCite and PANGAEA search snippets identify RAMSES hyperspectral radiance/irradiance measurements and calculated averaged Rrs. Lychee v142 verified landing URL alive (6/6 v142 links OK).
desc_zh: Lake Suesser See 数据集来自 2017 年德国 Inland Water Remote Sensing Validation Campaign 的内陆水体遥感校准/互校实验。DataCite/PANGAEA 元数据说明该数据由 RAMSES 高光谱辐亮度和辐照度传感器测量计算 remote-sensing reflectance，并提供平均 Rrs 数据。它适合内陆水体水色算法验证、传感器互校和现场高光谱 Rrs 方法比较。
desc_en: The Lake Suesser See dataset comes from the 2017 Inland Water Remote Sensing Validation Campaign in Germany. DataCite/PANGAEA metadata state that calculated remote-sensing reflectance was derived from RAMSES hyperspectral radiance and irradiance sensor measurements and provided as averaged Rrs data. It is useful for inland-water color algorithm validation, intercalibration and comparison of field hyperspectral Rrs methods.
openness: Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International (CC BY 4.0) / PANGAEA open download
source_type: inland-water hyperspectral remote-sensing reflectance validation dataset
evidence: DataCite metadata for DOI 10.1594/PANGAEA.908617 reports CC BY 4.0 and describes calculated remote sensing reflectance from RAMSES Hyperspectral Radiance and Irradiance Sensor (TriOS) measurement data, with averaged values. Web search snippet confirms the PANGAEA landing page and Inland Water Remote Sensing Validation Campaign context.
scale: single inland-water intercalibration campaign dataset
feature_count: averaged Rrs table from RAMSES/TriOS measurements

name: NORCOHAB II HEINCKE Shipborne Hyperspectral Ocean-Color Rrs Dataset Series
provider: PANGAEA / Garaba, Wernand and Zielinski
theme_canonical: shipborne automated hyperspectral ocean-color measurements and Rrs quality flags
theme_raw: Radiance, irradiance, and remote sensing reflectance during the North Sea Coast Harmful Algal Bloom (NORCOHAB II) HEINCKE cruise HE302
coverage: North Sea, The Minch, Irish Sea and Celtic Sea
formats: PANGAEA dataset publication series with downloadable tabular data
access: PANGAEA open DOI landing page and child dataset links
notes: Added in v142 as a PANGAEA collection/publication series of automated underway hyperspectral water-color measurements with Rrs and quality flags. Lychee v142 verified landing URL alive (6/6 v142 links OK).
desc_zh: NORCOHAB II HEINCKE 数据集系列记录了 2009 年 HE302 航次期间北海、The Minch、爱尔兰海和凯尔特海的自动化船载高光谱水色观测。PANGAEA 页面说明数据包含 above-water hyperspectral optical measurements、water-leaving radiance、remote sensing reflectance 和质量标记，并给出经纬度范围、时间范围和 RAMSES 高光谱辐射计事件。该系列适合航船水色质量控制、sun-glint 识别和海洋高光谱 Rrs 方法研究。
desc_en: The NORCOHAB II HEINCKE PANGAEA series documents automated shipborne hyperspectral ocean-color observations collected in 2009 across the North Sea, The Minch, the Irish Sea and the Celtic Sea. The page describes above-water hyperspectral optical measurements, water-leaving radiance, remote-sensing reflectance and quality flags, with geographic coverage, event metadata and RAMSES hyperspectral radiometer entries. It supports shipborne ocean-color quality control, sunglint screening and hyperspectral Rrs method studies.
openness: Creative Commons Attribution 3.0 Unported (CC BY 3.0) / PANGAEA open download
source_type: shipborne hyperspectral ocean-color Rrs dataset series
evidence: PANGAEA page for DOI 10.1594/PANGAEA.759690 states CC BY 3.0, coverage 51.368 to 59.460 latitude and -9.721 to 8.085 longitude, dates 2009-04-21 to 2009-05-09, automated above-water hyperspectral optical measurements, 629 spectra after meteorological masks and RAMSES hyperspectral radiometer events.
scale: North Sea/adjacent seas ship track, 2009
feature_count: publication series; 629 valid spectra after masks described on page

name: POLARSTERN ARK-XXVI/3 Arctic Ocean Hyperspectral Rrs Dataset
provider: PANGAEA / Alfred Wegener Institute / Bracher et al.
theme_canonical: Arctic Ocean underwater radiance and irradiance derived hyperspectral Rrs
theme_raw: Remote sensing reflectance obtained from spectral underwater upwelling radiance and solar downwelling irradiance measurements during POLARSTERN cruise ARK-XXVI/3 (PS78)
coverage: central-eastern Arctic Ocean, POLARSTERN ARK-XXVI/3 / PS78
license: PANGAEA open dataset; license shown on PANGAEA landing page
formats: PANGAEA tab-delimited data table
access: PANGAEA open DOI landing page and download data link
notes: Added in v142 as a focused Arctic Ocean hyperspectral Rrs dataset derived from RAMSES profiles and interpolated to a 1 nm wavelength grid. Lychee v142 verified landing URL alive (6/6 v142 links OK).
desc_zh: POLARSTERN ARK-XXVI/3 数据集提供北冰洋 PS78 航次的高光谱 remote sensing reflectance。PANGAEA 页面说明 Rrs 由 RAMSES/TriOS 高光谱辐射计测得的水下上行辐亮度和太阳下行辐照度剖面推导，光谱范围 320-950 nm，光学分辨率 3.3 nm，并线性插值到 1 nm 波长网格。数据适合北冰洋水色、CDOM 和高纬度遥感算法验证。
desc_en: The POLARSTERN ARK-XXVI/3 dataset provides hyperspectral remote-sensing reflectance for Arctic Ocean stations during the PS78 cruise. The PANGAEA page states that Rrs was derived from underwater upwelling radiance and solar downwelling irradiance profiles measured with RAMSES/TriOS hyperspectral radiometers from 320 to 950 nm, with 3.3 nm optical resolution, then interpolated to a 1 nm wavelength grid. It is useful for Arctic ocean color, CDOM and high-latitude remote-sensing algorithm validation.
openness: PANGAEA open dataset; license shown on PANGAEA landing page / PANGAEA open download
source_type: Arctic Ocean hyperspectral water Rrs dataset
evidence: PANGAEA page for DOI 10.1594/PANGAEA.884528 reports coverage 79.14783 to 89.965 latitude, 2011-08-21 to 2011-09-25, RAMSES hyperspectral radiometer events, and comments that RRS was obtained from Lu and Ed profiles measured from 320-950 nm and interpolated to 1 nm.
scale: Arctic Ocean cruise stations
feature_count: PANGAEA data table with event/station Rrs parameters

name: Maria S Merian MSM21-3 ARCHEMHAB Hyperspectral Rrs Dataset
provider: PANGAEA / Zielinski et al.
theme_canonical: west Greenland/Labrador Sea/Denmark Strait/Iceland hyperspectral Rrs measurements
theme_raw: Remote sensing reflectance during Maria S. Merian cruise MSM21/3 (ARCHEMHAB)
coverage: Baffin Bay, Labrador Sea, Denmark Strait and west of Iceland cruise transect
formats: PANGAEA tab-delimited data table
access: PANGAEA open DOI landing page and download data link
notes: Added in v142 as an open Satlantic/free-fall profiler Rrs dataset from the ARCHEMHAB cruise, binned from 1 nm processing into 5 nm steps. Lychee v142 verified landing URL alive (6/6 v142 links OK).
desc_zh: MSM21/3 ARCHEMHAB 数据集提供 Maria S. Merian 航次在 Baffin Bay、Labrador Sea、Denmark Strait 和冰岛以西海域的高光谱 remote sensing reflectance。PANGAEA 页面列出 360-800 nm、5 nm 间隔的 Rrs 参数，说明原始 1 nm 数据经 Satlantic PROSOFT 处理到 level 4 后按 5 nm 分箱，并给出经纬度范围、航次事件和 CC BY 3.0 许可。它适合比较 above-water 与 in-water Rrs、北大西洋/北极水色算法和航次级高光谱观测分析。
desc_en: The MSM21/3 ARCHEMHAB dataset provides hyperspectral remote-sensing reflectance from the Maria S. Merian cruise across Baffin Bay, the Labrador Sea, the Denmark Strait and waters west of Iceland. The PANGAEA page lists Rrs parameters from 360 to 800 nm in 5 nm steps, notes that primary 1 nm data were processed with Satlantic PROSOFT to level 4 and binned to 5 nm, and provides geographic coverage, cruise events and a CC BY 3.0 license. It supports above-water versus in-water Rrs comparison, North Atlantic/Arctic ocean-color algorithms and cruise-scale hyperspectral observation analysis.
openness: Creative Commons Attribution 3.0 Unported (CC BY 3.0) / PANGAEA open download
source_type: cruise hyperspectral water remote-sensing reflectance dataset
evidence: PANGAEA page for DOI 10.1594/PANGAEA.810742 reports coverage 62.1685 to 71.16683 latitude and -55.93917 to -23.070 longitude, dates 2012-07-27 to 2012-08-07, CC BY 3.0, 5782 data points, and Rrs parameters from 360 to 800 nm measured with a Satlantic Free Fall Hyperspectral Profiler/light/optics methods.
scale: Baffin Bay/Labrador Sea/Denmark Strait/Iceland cruise transect
feature_count: 5782 PANGAEA data points; Rrs 360-800 nm at 5 nm spacing

name: USGS Moab Utah UAS Headwall Nano-Hyperspec Orthorectified Reflectance Images 2025
provider: U.S. Geological Survey National Uncrewed Systems Office / ScienceBase
theme_canonical: UAS orthorectified hyperspectral reflectance imagery
theme_raw: Hyperspectral Orthorectified Reflectance Images Collected during Uncrewed Aircraft System (UAS) Operations near Moab, Utah in May 2025
coverage: Horsethief Campground and Salt Valley dryland sites near Moab, Grand County, Utah, USA
license: CC0 1.0 Universal / U.S. public domain data release
formats: ScienceBase data release with UAS hyperspectral orthorectified reflectance images, thermal imagery products, GCP data and metadata/data dictionary
access: USGS ScienceBase / Science Data Catalog public data release
notes: Added in v143. ScienceBase parent item API returned metadata, two parent files and hasChildren=True; ScienceBase child-search/list endpoint returned HTTP 500 during this pass, so child file enumeration remains to be retried. USGS SDC/DataCite evidence is sufficient for dataset identity and openness. Primary URL switched from ScienceBase item https://www.sciencebase.gov/catalog/item/6939fbf0d4be02165772a646 to stable USGS/SDC page because ScienceBase HTML returned HTTP 500 while JSON API remained 200 during v143 validation. Lychee v143 verified primary URL alive (2/2 v143 links OK after switching to stable USGS/SDC entry pages).
desc_zh: USGS Moab UAS 数据集发布了 2025 年 5 月在犹他州 Moab 附近 dryland 场地采集的无人机高光谱和热红外遥感数据。高光谱部分由 DJI Matrice 600 Pro 搭载 Headwall Nano-Hyperspec 获取，包含 274 个 VNIR 波段，覆盖 398-1002 nm，并发布为正射校正反射率影像。数据覆盖 Horsethief Campground 和 Salt Valley 两个土壤/植被特征不同的场地，适合旱地地表反射率、UAS 高光谱处理流程和地面控制/热红外联合分析。
desc_en: The USGS Moab UAS data release provides hyperspectral and thermal remote-sensing data collected over dryland sites near Moab, Utah in May 2025. The hyperspectral component was acquired by a DJI Matrice 600 Pro carrying a Headwall Nano-Hyperspec sensor, with 274 VNIR bands spanning 398-1002 nm, and is released as orthorectified reflectance imagery. The data cover Horsethief Campground and Salt Valley, two sites with contrasting vegetation and soil characteristics, supporting dryland surface-reflectance studies, UAS hyperspectral workflows and joint analysis with ground-control and thermal products.

desc_en: The USGS Missouri River HITTER release documents UAS hyperspectral image transects and field measurements from a Rhodamine WT dye tracer experiment near Lexington, Missouri on May 11, 2024. The release contains five child data items: fixed-wing orthophotos, ADCP flow velocity, dye concentration measurements, above-water field spectra from 400-900 nm, and hyperspectral image transects from four stationary UAS flights with trajectory and supporting files. It supports remote estimation of dye concentration in turbid rivers, transient river-process observation and reproduction of the HITTER workflow.

It is cataloged as a derived ML-ready hyperspectral remote-sensing dataset rather than as original georeferenced orthomosaic imagery.

time_span: spring, summer and fall 2013 source AVIRIS imagery; published 2020
notes: Simulated EnMAP data derived from AVIRIS-Classic HyspIRI Preparatory Campaign imagery, with brightness-gradient correction.
desc_zh: 该 GFZ 数据集包含美国旧金山湾区的模拟 EnMAP 高光谱镶嵌影像。源数据为 2013 年 HyspIRI 预备飞行中的 AVIRIS-Classic 春、夏、秋三期高光谱影像，经 EnMAP 端到端仿真工具生成 30 m、195 波段、423-2439 nm 的 EnMAP-like 影像，并进行了二次几何校正和跨航迹亮度梯度校正。数据适合城市-生态区域高光谱时相分析和 EnMAP 算法验证。
desc_en: This GFZ dataset provides simulated EnMAP mosaics for the San Francisco Bay Area, California. AVIRIS-Classic imagery from the 2013 HyspIRI Preparatory Campaign in spring, summer and fall was simulated to EnMAP-like data at 30 m resolution with 195 bands from 423-2439 nm, followed by secondary geometric correction and class-wise across-track brightness correction. It supports multi-season hyperspectral analysis and EnMAP algorithm validation.
openness: open GFZ record under CC BY 4.0
source_type: simulated EnMAP hyperspectral surface reflectance mosaics derived from AVIRIS-Classic
evidence: DataCite API for DOI 10.5880/enmap.2020.002 returned CC BY 4.0, GFZ URL and abstract describing simulated EnMAP mosaics for San Francisco Bay Area from 2013 AVIRIS-Classic HyspIRI imagery, 30 x 30 m imagery, 195 bands after band removal, 423-2439 nm spectral range, and geometric/brightness-gradient correction.
scale: regional seasonal mosaics

name: Toolik Lake AISA-Eagle Airborne Hyperspectral Mosaic and Simulated EnMAP Dataset
provider: GFZ Data Services / EnMAP preparatory phase / Alfred Wegener Institute campaign
theme_canonical: Airborne and simulated satellite arctic tundra hyperspectral imagery
theme_raw: Toolik Lake Research Natural Area AISA-Eagle hyperspectral mosaic
coverage: Toolik Lake Natural Research Area, Alaska North Slope, USA
formats: AISA-Eagle hyperspectral imagery, simulated EnMAP Level 2A imagery, metadata
access: GFZ Data Services direct/repository access
notes: Includes three AISA-Eagle flight lines over arctic tundra plus Level 2A EnMAP-like simulations.
desc_zh: 该 GFZ 数据集覆盖阿拉斯加北坡 Toolik Lake 自然研究区，包含 2016 年 8 月 27 日飞机搭载 Specim AISA-Eagle 获取的高光谱影像和 EnMAP-like Level 2A 模拟影像。元数据说明原始机载产品包含 3 条航线、130 个 451.7-897 nm 波段；模拟 EnMAP 产品包含 78 个 423-903 nm 波段。该数据与永久植被样方、地面光谱、色素和物种组成观测相结合，适合北极苔原植被制图和物候/物种组成研究。
desc_en: This GFZ dataset covers the Toolik Lake Natural Research Area on the Alaskan North Slope with aircraft AISA-Eagle hyperspectral imagery acquired on 2016-08-27 and simulated EnMAP-like Level 2A imagery. Metadata reports three flight lines with 130 bands from 451.7-897 nm and simulated EnMAP imagery with 78 bands from 423-903 nm. It is linked to permanent vegetation plots with ground reflectance, pigment and species-composition observations, supporting arctic tundra vegetation mapping.
openness: open GFZ record under CC BY 4.0
source_type: airborne AISA-Eagle hyperspectral mosaic plus simulated EnMAP imagery
evidence: DataCite API for DOI 10.5880/enmap.2020.001 returned CC BY 4.0, GFZ URL and abstract describing AISA-Eagle hyperspectral imagery acquired on 2016-08-27 over Toolik Lake, three flight lines, 130 bands from 451.7-897 nm, Level 2A EnMAP-like imagery with 78 bands from 423-903 nm, and campaign methods using Specim AISA-Eagle on Polar 5 Basler BT-67 aircraft.
scale: about 700 ha, three flight lines
feature_count: 130 AISA-Eagle bands; 78 simulated EnMAP bands

name: Quebec Mixed Temperate Forest Foliar Trait Maps from Imaging Spectroscopy
provider: FRDR / LEFO / Gravel, Laliberte and Kalacska
theme_canonical: Derived forest foliar trait maps from imaging spectroscopy
theme_raw: Foliar Functional Trait Mapping of a mixed temperate forest using imaging spectroscopy
coverage: mixed temperate forest in Quebec, Canada
formats: foliar trait maps, uncertainty maps, model coefficients, field trait tables, canopy reflectance tables
access: FRDR dataset landing page and repository download
time_span: published 2024; source acquisition dates in dataset/article metadata
notes: Derived imaging-spectroscopy product: maps and spectra/trait tables rather than original airborne image cubes.
desc_zh: 该 FRDR 数据集发布加拿大魁北克混交温带森林的叶片功能性状遥感反演产品。数据包含性状预测图、不确定性和相对不确定性、模型系数、野外测量叶片性状、每个树冠的平均冠层反射率以及亮度归一化反射率。它基于成像光谱与树级地面样本建模，适合森林功能性状制图、模型验证和未来高光谱卫星产品校验；目录中标为派生产品而非原始影像立方体。
desc_en: This FRDR dataset provides foliar functional trait maps for a mixed temperate forest in Quebec, Canada. The repository includes mapped trait predictions, uncertainty and relative uncertainty layers, model coefficients, field-measured foliar traits, mean canopy reflectance per tree crown and brightness-normalized canopy reflectance. It is derived from imaging spectroscopy and tree-level field measurements, and is cataloged as a derived remote-sensing product rather than raw image cubes.
openness: open FRDR record under CC BY-ND 4.0
source_type: derived foliar trait maps and canopy reflectance tables from imaging spectroscopy
evidence: DataCite API for DOI 10.20383/103.0922 returned FRDR URL eb8f9ff3-d2aa-4a17-850b-50252db71f7d, CC BY-ND 4.0 rights and abstract describing foliar functional trait maps, uncertainties, model coefficients, field-measured traits, mean canopy reflectance and brightness-normalized canopy reflectance for a mixed temperate forest in Quebec. TandF article data availability points to the same FRDR DOI.
scale: site-level forest trait maps
feature_count: 12 foliar traits in related article; canopy reflectance tables

name: Demmin Germany HySpex Soil Applications HYPERedu Dataset
provider: GFZ Data Services / EnMAP HYPERedu
theme_canonical: Airborne hyperspectral soil organic carbon mapping
theme_raw: HYPERedu Demmin HySpex airborne soil dataset
coverage: Demmin, northern Germany
license: HyMap imagery commercial EULA noted by DataCite; public GFZ record
formats: preprocessed HySpex BSQ image, soil sample shapefile, SOC table
access: GFZ Data Services repository access
notes: License field in DataCite says HyMap commercial EULA despite title/abstract describing HySpex; retained with caution and explicit caveat.
desc_zh: 该 GFZ/HYPERedu 数据集包含德国北部 Demmin 试验区 2015 年 10 月机载 HySpex 高光谱影像及土壤有机碳样点数据。元数据说明影像已预处理，非土壤像元被掩膜，光谱经过 Savitzky-Golay 平滑并转为一阶导数，以 BSQ 格式发布，同时包含 27 个采样点 shapefile 和 SOC 含量。它适合土壤有机碳、农业土壤和高光谱教学应用，但许可字段需按 GFZ/数据页说明谨慎处理。
desc_en: This GFZ/HYPERedu dataset provides an airborne HySpex hyperspectral image over Demmin in northern Germany acquired in October 2015, together with soil organic carbon sampling data. DataCite metadata states that non-soil pixels are masked, spectra are smoothed with a Savitzky-Golay filter and transformed to first derivatives, and the image is provided in BSQ format with a shapefile of 27 sampling locations and SOC contents. It supports soil organic carbon and agricultural soil remote-sensing workflows, with a license caveat preserved from the record.
openness: GFZ public metadata; imagery/license caveat noted
source_type: preprocessed airborne HySpex soil hyperspectral image with SOC samples
evidence: DataCite API for DOI 10.5880/enmap.2024.001 returned GFZ URL, title Demmin Germany HYPERedu soil applications dataset, subjects hyperspectral/HySpex/Demmin/soil/SOC, and abstract describing an October 2015 airborne HySpex image, masked and smoothed BSQ data, 27 soil sampling locations and SOC contents.
scale: single airborne soil study site
feature_count: HySpex airborne hyperspectral image

name: Neusling 2009 HyMap Agricultural EnMAP Preparatory Flight Campaign
provider: GFZ Data Services / EnMAP preparatory campaign
theme_canonical: Airborne agricultural hyperspectral campaign
theme_raw: Neusling 2009 HyMap agriculture campaign
coverage: Neusling and Steinbeissen near Landau a.d. Isar, southern Germany
formats: HyMap airborne image strips, ASD spectra, land-cover maps, biomass/CWC/LAI field data
access: GFZ Data Services repository access
notes: Agricultural EnMAP preparatory campaign with paired airborne and in-situ measurements.
desc_zh: 该 GFZ 数据集包含德国南部 Landau a.d. Isar 附近 Neusling 和 Steinbeissen 两个农业试验区 2009 年 7 月 27 日 HyMap 机载高光谱航带。元数据说明 HyMap 数据包含 125 个 455-2478 nm 波段，并配套 ASD FieldSpec 地面光谱、土地利用/覆盖图、作物生物量、冠层含水量和 LAI 等同步实测数据。它适合农业作物参数反演、EnMAP 算法开发和机载-地面联合验证。
desc_en: This GFZ dataset contains HyMap airborne hyperspectral image strips acquired on 2009-07-27 over the Neusling and Steinbeissen agricultural test areas near Landau a.d. Isar in southern Germany. Metadata reports 125 bands from 455-2478 nm and companion ASD FieldSpec spectra, land-use/land-cover maps, crop biomass, canopy water content and LAI field measurements. It supports crop-parameter retrieval and EnMAP preparatory algorithm validation.
openness: open GFZ record under CC BY 4.0
source_type: airborne HyMap agricultural hyperspectral image strips with in-situ data
evidence: DataCite API for DOI 10.5880/enmap.2015.002 returned CC BY 4.0, GFZ URL and abstract describing two 2009 HyMap airborne image strips over Neusling and Steinbeissen, 125 VIS-SWIR bands from 455-2478 nm, ASD FieldSpec spectra, land-cover maps and flight-parallel biomass/CWC/LAI measurements.
scale: two agricultural flight strips
feature_count: 125 HyMap bands, 455-2478 nm

name: Neusling 2012 Multitemporal AVIS-3 and HySpex Agricultural EnMAP Campaign
provider: GFZ Data Services / EnMAP preparatory campaign
theme_canonical: Multitemporal airborne agricultural hyperspectral campaign
theme_raw: Neusling 2012 AVIS-3 and HySpex multitemporal campaign
coverage: Neusling near Landau a.d. Isar, southern Germany
formats: AVIS-3 and HySpex image mosaics, land-cover maps, in-situ agricultural measurements
access: GFZ Data Services repository access / contact form where required by page
time_span: six overflights in 2012 growing season; published 2015
notes: GFZ page variants indicate public metadata and may require a form to contact authors for data access; cataloged as institutionally accessible rather than simple direct download. Phase408 DataCite version audit: DOI 10.5880/enmap.2016.007 is the later GFZ record for the same Neusling 2012 multitemporal AVIS-3/HySpex campaign; retained as one row with both DOIs rather than adding a duplicate.
desc_zh: 该 GFZ 数据集包含德国 Neusling 农业试验区 2012 生长季 6 期机载高光谱影像。元数据说明其中 4 期由 AVIS-3 成像光谱仪获取，包含 197 个 477-1704 nm 波段；2 期由 DLR OpAiRS HySpex 获取，包含 332 个 417-2496 nm 波段，并配套土地利用/覆盖图和同步实测农业数据。它是多时相作物监测、物候分析和 EnMAP 预备算法验证的高价值数据。
desc_en: This GFZ dataset provides a six-date airborne hyperspectral time series over the Neusling agricultural test area during the 2012 growing season. Metadata reports four AVIS-3 mosaics with 197 bands from 477-1704 nm and two HySpex mosaics with 332 bands from 417-2496 nm, together with land-use/land-cover maps and in-situ agricultural measurements. It is a valuable multitemporal crop monitoring and EnMAP preparatory dataset.
openness: open metadata under CC BY 4.0; data may require GFZ/contact-form access
source_type: multitemporal airborne AVIS-3 and HySpex agricultural mosaics
evidence: DataCite API for DOI 10.5880/enmap.2015.004 returned CC BY 4.0, GFZ URL and abstract describing six 2012 airborne hyperspectral mosaics: four AVIS-3 overflights with 197 bands from 477-1704 nm and two HySpex overflights with 332 bands from 417-2496 nm, plus land-cover and in-situ data. DataCite comparison 2026-06-12 shows 10.5880/enmap.2015.004 and 10.5880/enmap.2016.007 have the same title and abstract for the 2012 Neusling campaign; 2016.007 points to escidoc:1776913.
scale: six-date agricultural time series
feature_count: 197 AVIS-3 bands; 332 HySpex bands

name: Hunsrueck-Hochwald National Park 2014 EnMAP Preparatory Hyperspectral Forest Dataset
provider: GFZ Data Services / EnMAP preparatory campaign
theme_canonical: Airborne forest imaging spectroscopy
theme_raw: Hunsrueck-Hochwald 2014 EnMAP preparatory flight campaign
coverage: Nationalpark Hunsrueck-Hochwald, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany
formats: airborne hyperspectral imagery and campaign metadata
access: GFZ Data Services repository access
notes: Forest-dominated airborne imaging spectroscopy campaign over a newly founded German national park.
desc_zh: 该 GFZ 数据集包含德国莱茵兰-普法尔茨 Hunsrueck-Hochwald 国家公园 2014 年 5 月 5 日飞机高光谱观测。元数据说明影像覆盖约 116 平方公里，以云杉和山毛榉森林为主，包含 242 个 423-2438 nm 可见光到短波红外波段。它适合森林树种/结构、植被生态和 EnMAP 预备算法研究。
desc_en: This GFZ dataset contains airborne hyperspectral imagery acquired on 2014-05-05 over Hunsrueck-Hochwald National Park in Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany. Metadata reports about 116 square kilometers dominated by spruce and beech forests, with 242 VIS-SWIR bands from 423-2438 nm. It supports forest ecology, species/structure mapping and EnMAP preparatory algorithm work.
openness: open GFZ record under CC BY-SA 4.0
source_type: airborne forest hyperspectral imagery
evidence: DataCite API for DOI 10.5880/enmap.2015.005 returned GFZ URL, CC BY-SA 4.0, and abstract describing airplane hyperspectral imagery from 2014-05-05 with 242 bands from 423-2438 nm over about 116 km2 dominated by spruce and beech forests.
scale: about 116 km2 forest campaign

name: Donnersberg 2014 EnMAP Preparatory Hyperspectral Deciduous Forest Dataset
provider: GFZ Data Services / EnMAP preparatory campaign
theme_canonical: Airborne deciduous forest imaging spectroscopy
theme_raw: Donnersberg 2014 EnMAP preparatory flight campaign
coverage: Donnersberg region, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany
formats: airborne hyperspectral imagery and campaign metadata
access: GFZ Data Services repository access
notes: Different from the 2019 Donnersberg HySpex Zenodo dataset already in catalog; this is the 2014 EnMAP preparatory flight campaign DOI.
desc_zh: 该 GFZ 数据集包含德国莱茵兰-普法尔茨 Donnersberg 区域 2014 年 7 月 3 日机载高光谱影像。元数据说明影像覆盖约 78 平方公里，以山毛榉和橡树林为主，包含 242 个 423-2438 nm 可见光到短波红外波段，任务关注落叶林植物生理高光谱分析。它与目录中已有的 2019 Donnersberg HySpex Zenodo 数据不是同一 DOI/年份。
desc_en: This GFZ dataset contains airborne hyperspectral imagery acquired on 2014-07-03 over the Donnersberg region in Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany. Metadata reports about 78 square kilometers dominated by beech and oak forests, with 242 VIS-SWIR bands from 423-2438 nm, focused on plant physiology in deciduous forests. It is distinct from the separately cataloged 2019 Donnersberg HySpex Zenodo dataset.
openness: open GFZ record under CC BY 4.0
source_type: airborne deciduous forest hyperspectral imagery
evidence: DataCite API for DOI 10.5880/enmap.2015.006 returned GFZ URL, CC BY 4.0 and abstract describing airborne hyperspectral imagery acquired on 2014-07-03, 242 bands from 423-2438 nm, about 78 km2 dominated by beech and oak forests and focused on plant physiology in deciduous forests.
scale: about 78 km2 forest campaign

name: Isabena 2011 AISA Eagle-Hawk Hyperspectral and LiDAR Dryland Campaign
provider: GFZ Data Services / EnMAP preparatory campaign
theme_canonical: Airborne dryland hyperspectral and LiDAR campaign
theme_raw: Isabena 2011 EnMAP preparatory flight campaign
coverage: Isabena catchment, Spanish Pyrenees / Mediterranean drylands, Spain
formats: AISA Eagle/Hawk hyperspectral imagery, airborne LiDAR, ASD spectra, fractional-cover transects
access: GFZ Data Services repository access
notes: Includes concurrent LiDAR and field fractional cover, useful for erosion/sediment connectivity studies.
desc_zh: 该 GFZ 数据集包含西班牙 Isabena 干旱/半干旱流域 2011 年 4 月 2 日和 8 月 9 日 AISA Eagle/Hawk 机载高光谱影像、同步 LiDAR、ASD 地面光谱和样线分数覆盖数据。元数据说明高光谱覆盖 400-2500 nm，空间采样约 4 m，两个时相分别有 12 和 15 条航线。它适合地表覆盖分解、干旱地植被/裸土/岩石制图以及泥沙连通性研究。
desc_en: This GFZ dataset contains AISA Eagle/Hawk airborne hyperspectral imagery over the Isabena dryland catchment in Spain on 2011-04-02 and 2011-08-09, together with concurrent airborne LiDAR, ASD field spectra and fractional-cover transects. Metadata reports 400-2500 nm hyperspectral data at about 4 m ground sampling distance in 12 and 15 flight lines. It supports dryland surface-cover unmixing and sediment-connectivity studies.
openness: open GFZ record under CC BY 4.0
source_type: airborne AISA Eagle/Hawk hyperspectral imagery with LiDAR and field cover data
evidence: DataCite API for DOI 10.5880/enmap.2015.007 returned GFZ URL, CC BY 4.0 and abstract describing AISA Eagle/Hawk hyperspectral imagery from April 2 and August 9 2011, 400-2500 nm, 4 m GSD, 12 and 15 flight lines, concurrent LiDAR, ASD spectra and fractional-cover transects.
scale: two-date dryland campaign, 12 and 15 flight lines
feature_count: 400-2500 nm AISA Eagle/Hawk data

name: Omongwa Pan Namibia Neo HySpex VNIR-SWIR and Simulated EnMAP Dataset
provider: GFZ Data Services / EnMAP preparatory campaign
theme_canonical: Airborne and simulated satellite hyperspectral evaporite mineral mapping
theme_raw: Omongwa Pan 2015 Neo HySpex EnMAP preparatory campaign
coverage: Omongwa Pan, South-West Kalahari, Namibia
formats: Neo HySpex VNIR/SWIR flight lines, simulated EnMAP Level 2A imagery, metadata
access: GFZ Data Services repository access
notes: Saline playa/evaporite mineral mapping dataset with airborne and simulated spaceborne products.
desc_zh: 该 GFZ 数据集包含纳米比亚西南卡拉哈里 Omongwa Pan 的 Neo HySpex VNIR/SWIR 机载高光谱影像和 Level 2A EnMAP-like 模拟影像。元数据说明 2015 年 6 月 6 日获取了 3 条无云航线，包含 408 个 0.4-2.5 微米波段，目标是分析盐沼/蒸发岩表层沉积物和矿物组成。它适合盐湖、蒸发岩、石膏和高盐动态环境中的矿物遥感研究。
desc_en: This GFZ dataset contains Neo HySpex VNIR/SWIR airborne hyperspectral imagery and simulated Level 2A EnMAP-like imagery over Omongwa Pan in the South-West Kalahari, Namibia. Metadata reports three cloud-free flight lines acquired on 2015-06-06, with 408 bands from 0.4-2.5 micrometers. It supports saline playa, evaporite, gypsum and surface-sediment mineral mapping in a dynamic high-salinity environment.
openness: open GFZ record under CC BY 4.0
source_type: airborne Neo HySpex VNIR-SWIR imagery plus simulated EnMAP Level 2A
evidence: DataCite API for DOI 10.5880/enmap.2020.005 returned GFZ URL, CC BY 4.0 and abstract describing Neo HySpex VNIR/SWIR imagery over Omongwa Pan acquired on 2015-06-06, three cloud-free flight lines, 408 bands from 0.4-2.5 micrometers, simulated Level 2A EnMAP-like imagery and evaporite/salt mineral mapping purpose.
scale: three cloud-free flight lines
feature_count: 408 bands, 0.4-2.5 micrometers

name: HICO 6M Hyperspectral Remote-Sensing Reflectance Band-Shifting Dataset
provider: Zenodo / Salem, Higa, Ishizaka, Pahlevan and Oki
theme_canonical: Satellite ocean-color hyperspectral Rrs
theme_raw: HICO Rrs band-shifting lookup table and ancillary dataset
coverage: global HICO coastal/ocean scenes from ISS HICO archive
formats: NetCDF HICO Rrs and ancillary variables, Python scripts, sample CSV
access: Zenodo direct download
doi_or_citation: 10.5281/zenodo.10531621; related RSE paper on spectral band-shifting
time_span: HICO imagery across 2009-2014 mission era; published 2024-01-29
notes: Derived matchup/cross-mission consistency dataset built from HICO hyperspectral images, not raw HICO L1 scenes.
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 数据集发布 HICO 高光谱水色遥感反射率大表，用于多光谱 Rrs 产品的谱带平移和跨任务一致性分析。数据描述说明它从 8,893 景 HICO 图像中提取，包含约 620 万条 353-719 nm、1 nm 间隔的唯一 Rrs 记录及 9 个辅助产品。主文件为约 5.39 GB NetCDF，适合海洋/湖泊水色算法、传感器 matchup 和谱带响应函数研究。
desc_en: This Zenodo dataset provides a large HICO hyperspectral remote-sensing reflectance lookup table for spectral band-shifting and cross-mission consistency assessment. The record states that about 6.2 million unique Rrs records from 353-719 nm were extracted from 8,893 HICO images, together with nine ancillary products. The main NetCDF is about 5.39 GB and supports ocean-color algorithm and sensor matchup studies.
openness: open Zenodo record under CC BY 4.0
source_type: derived satellite hyperspectral water Rrs records from HICO
evidence: Zenodo API for record 10531621 returned DOI 10.5281/zenodo.10531621, CC BY 4.0, a 5,385,235,329 byte NetCDF file HICO_LookUpTable_Rrs1nm_Ancillary_6M.nc, and description stating 6.2 million unique Rrs records from 8,893 HICO images in 353-719 nm plus nine ancillary products.
scale: 6.2 million HICO Rrs records
feature_count: 353-719 nm at 1 nm records

name: PANTHYR VEIT Autonomous Hyperspectral Water Reflectance Dataset
provider: Zenodo / PANTHYR water reflectance data providers
theme_canonical: In situ hyperspectral aquatic reflectance for satellite validation
theme_raw: PANTHYR hyperspectral water reflectance VEIT
coverage: VEIT PANTHYR deployment site
formats: NetCDF water-leaving radiance reflectance ZIP
access: Zenodo direct download
notes: Companion to already cataloged PANTHYR O1BE site; this is a separate VEIT site record.
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 数据集包含 VEIT 站点自动 Pan and Tilt Hyperspectral Radiometer (PANTHYR) 的水离辐射反射率观测。元数据说明数据覆盖 2019-10 至 2020-10 和 2020-11 至 2022-03 两个部署期，提供通过质量控制、有定标信息和风速辅助数据的 NetCDF 文件。它适合水色卫星校验、近岸/内陆水体 Rrs 算法开发和多站点 PANTHYR 数据比较。
desc_en: This Zenodo dataset contains water-leaving radiance reflectance measurements from an autonomous Pan and Tilt Hyperspectral Radiometer at the VEIT site. Metadata states that quality-controlled NetCDF data are provided for deployments from Oct. 2019-Oct. 2020 and Nov. 2020-Mar. 2022 with calibration and ancillary wind-speed information. It complements the already cataloged PANTHYR O1BE site record.
openness: open Zenodo record under CC BY-NC-ND 4.0
source_type: in situ autonomous hyperspectral water reflectance time series
evidence: Zenodo API for record 10024445 returned DOI 10.5281/zenodo.10024445, CC BY-NC-ND 4.0, file PANTHYR-VEIT-v1.0.0.zip of 59,928,618 bytes, and description stating PANTHYR water-leaving radiance reflectance measurements at VEIT for two deployments, quality controlled with calibration and ancillary wind speed.
scale: two PANTHYR deployments at VEIT
feature_count: hyperspectral water-leaving reflectance

name: Baltic Sea Case-2 Coastal Waters Hyperspectral Rrs and Attenuation Dataset
provider: Zenodo / Baltic Sea optical campaign authors
theme_canonical: In situ coastal-water hyperspectral Rrs and attenuation
theme_raw: Baltic Sea Keff and Kd attenuation driver dataset
coverage: southern Baltic Sea coast, Germany
formats: CSV station biogeochemistry, raw target Rrs, derived attenuation, README
access: Zenodo direct download
notes: In situ optical/biogeochemical dataset, not imagery; included for hyperspectral water remote-sensing algorithm support.
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 数据集发布德国南部波罗的海海岸 2022-2023 年野外调查的原位光学和生物地球化学数据。文件包括站点元数据和叶绿素、TSM、CDOM 等光学活性组分，原始目标高光谱 Rrs，以及派生的有效/漫射光谱衰减数据。它适合 Case-2 近岸水体水色算法、Keff/Kd 对比和水质遥感验证。
desc_en: This Zenodo dataset provides in situ optical and biogeochemical measurements from 2022-2023 campaigns along the southern Baltic Sea coast in Germany. Files include station metadata and OAC concentrations, raw target hyperspectral Rrs and derived spectral attenuation data. It supports Case-2 coastal water-color algorithms and Keff/Kd validation studies.
openness: open Zenodo record under CC BY 4.0
source_type: in situ coastal hyperspectral Rrs and spectral attenuation dataset
evidence: Zenodo API for record 19479462 returned DOI 10.5281/zenodo.19479462, CC BY 4.0, four CSV/README files totaling 937,292 bytes, including 2_Raw_Target_Reflectance_Rrs.csv and 3_Derived_Spectral_Attenuation_Data.csv, and description tying data to 2022-2023 Baltic Sea field campaigns.
scale: 2022-2023 Baltic Sea field campaigns
feature_count: hyperspectral Rrs and attenuation spectra

name: Strait of Georgia Ferry BRDF-Corrected Hyperspectral Remote-Sensing Reflectance Dataset
provider: Zenodo / ferry radiometry data authors
theme_canonical: In situ ship/ferry hyperspectral Rrs
theme_raw: BRDF corrected hyperspectral remote sensing reflectance
coverage: Strait of Georgia, British Columbia, Canada
formats: CSV BRDF-corrected hyperspectral Rrs
access: Zenodo direct download
notes: Above-water ferry radiometry product; small but useful water-color validation dataset.
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 数据集包含加拿大不列颠哥伦比亚 Strait of Georgia 渡船航线上的船载/渡船上方水体辐射观测，经 BRDF 校正后计算的高光谱遥感反射率。数据采集于 2018 和 2019 年春夏季，以 CSV 发布。它适合区域水色校验、BRDF 影响研究和连续走航高光谱 Rrs 分析。
desc_en: This Zenodo dataset contains BRDF-corrected hyperspectral remote-sensing reflectance calculated from above-water radiometry deployed on a ferry crossing the Strait of Georgia. Data were collected in spring and summer 2018 and 2019 and are released as a CSV file. It supports regional water-color validation, BRDF studies and underway hyperspectral Rrs analysis.
openness: open Zenodo record under CC BY 4.0
source_type: ship/ferry above-water hyperspectral Rrs dataset
evidence: Zenodo API for record 15051957 returned DOI 10.5281/zenodo.15051957, CC BY 4.0, one file BRDF-Hyper-Rrs.csv of 370,619 bytes, and description stating hyperspectral remote sensing reflectance calculated from above-water radiometry on a ferry across the Strait of Georgia in spring/summer 2018 and 2019.
scale: ferry transects in 2018-2019
feature_count: hyperspectral Rrs CSV

name: MENA Multi-Mission Hyperspectral Satellite Methane Point-Source Products 2020-2023
provider: Zenodo / MENA methane hyperspectral satellite assessment authors
theme_canonical: Hyperspectral satellite methane point-source products
theme_raw: Four-year MENA methane point-source assessment from GF-5 ZY-1 HJ-2 PRISMA EnMAP
coverage: Middle East and North Africa oil and gas sector
formats: ZIP and XLSX plume products for GF-5/ZY-1/HJ-2 and EnMAP/PRISMA
access: Zenodo direct download
notes: Processed plume products, not raw L1 hyperspectral scenes; includes multiple Chinese and European hyperspectral missions.
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 数据集包含 2020-2023 年中东和北非油气部门甲烷点源排放的处理后 plume 产品。描述说明它整合了 GF-5、ZY-1、HJ-2 以及 PRISMA、EnMAP 多个高光谱卫星观测，并使用一致的反演框架生成甲烷羽流检测/排放产品。文件包括 GF5/ZY1/HJ2 和 EnMAP/PRISMA 的 ZIP 与 XLSX 产品，适合区域甲烷点源统计、跨传感器比较和排放清单验证。
desc_en: This Zenodo dataset contains processed methane plume products over the Middle East and North Africa oil and gas sector from 2020-2023. The description states that it integrates detections from GF-5, ZY-1, HJ-2, PRISMA and EnMAP hyperspectral missions using a consistent retrieval framework. ZIP and XLSX products support regional point-source assessment, cross-sensor comparison and inventory validation.
openness: open Zenodo record under CC BY 4.0
source_type: processed multi-mission hyperspectral methane plume products
evidence: Zenodo API for record 17948489 returned DOI 10.5281/zenodo.17948489, CC BY 4.0, four files totaling 1,818,512 bytes including GF5&ZY1&HJ2.zip/xlsx and EnMAP&PRISMA.zip/xlsx, and description stating processed methane plume products from hyperspectral satellite observations over MENA during 2020-2023.
scale: MENA region 2020-2023
feature_count: processed plume products from GF-5 ZY-1 HJ-2 PRISMA EnMAP

name: Operational Greenhouse Gas Plume Detection AVIRIS-NG and EMIT ML-Ready Tile Dataset
provider: Zenodo / JPL operational GHG plume detection authors
theme_canonical: ML-ready hyperspectral methane plume detection tiles
theme_raw: Towards Operational Automated Greenhouse Gas Plume Detection and Delineation dataset
coverage: AVIRIS-NG campaigns and EMIT scenes, multiple regions
formats: TAR archives of 256x256 matched-filter methane retrieval tiles
access: Zenodo direct download
time_span: published 2025-05-20; source campaigns include AVIRIS-NG and EMIT scenes
notes: ML-ready tile dataset sampled from columnwise matched-filter methane retrievals; not raw radiance cubes.
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 数据集为自动温室气体羽流检测与勾画模型提供机器学习就绪数据。记录说明数据来自 AVIRIS-NG 和 EMIT 任务的 columnwise matched filter 甲烷反演航线/场景，被切分为 256×256 像素 tile，用于训练甲烷 plume detection/delineation 模型。文件包括 Permian、CACH4、COVID、EMIT 和 multicampaign 等大型 TAR 包，总量约 28 GB。
desc_en: This Zenodo dataset provides ML-ready tiles for automated greenhouse-gas plume detection and delineation. The record states that 256x256 pixel tiles are sampled from columnwise matched-filter methane retrieval flightlines and scenes from AVIRIS-NG and EMIT. TAR archives cover Permian, CACH4, COVID, EMIT and multicampaign subsets, totaling about 28 GB.
openness: open Zenodo record under CC BY 4.0
source_type: ML-ready methane plume tiles derived from AVIRIS-NG and EMIT hyperspectral retrievals
evidence: Zenodo API for record 19011045 returned DOI 10.5281/zenodo.19011045, CC BY 4.0, five TAR files totaling 28,026,009,600 bytes, and description stating 256x256 pixel tiles from AVIRIS-NG and EMIT columnwise matched filter methane retrievals for operational plume detection/delineation.
scale: multiple AVIRIS-NG/EMIT campaigns
feature_count: 256x256 methane retrieval tiles

name: AVIRIS-3 Controlled Methane Plume Tracking Experiment 2025
provider: Zenodo / JPL AVIRIS-3 plume tracking authors
theme_canonical: Airborne hyperspectral methane plume time sequence
theme_raw: AVIRIS-3 Plume Tracking Experiment 26 January 2025
coverage: controlled methane release site
formats: ZIP of ENVI spectral radiance cubes and matched-filter methane concentration fields
access: Zenodo direct download
notes: Small but high-value three-frame airborne hyperspectral methane plume time sequence from AVIRIS-3.
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 数据集包含 JPL AVIRIS-3 在 2025 年 1 月 26 日受控甲烷释放实验中的三帧高光谱数据。记录说明三帧为 ENVI 格式光谱辐射立方体，帧间隔约 15 秒和 12 秒，可形成 plume 演化短片，并提供 matched filter 推导的甲烷浓度场。它适合甲烷羽流动态、时序检测和高光谱气体反演算法测试。
desc_en: This Zenodo dataset contains three AVIRIS-3 spectral radiance frames from a controlled methane release experiment on 2025-01-26. The frames are ENVI spectral radiance cubes separated by 15 and 12 seconds, forming a short plume-evolution sequence, and matched-filter methane concentration fields are provided. It is useful for plume dynamics, temporal detection and gas retrieval algorithm testing.
openness: open Zenodo record under CC BY 4.0
source_type: airborne AVIRIS-3 hyperspectral methane plume radiance cubes and concentration fields
evidence: Zenodo API for record 15185461 returned DOI 10.5281/zenodo.15185461, CC BY 4.0, one ZIP AVIRIS3_PlumeTracking.zip of 1,760,685,195 bytes, and description stating three AVIRIS-3 ENVI spectral radiance cubes over a controlled methane release with matched-filter methane concentration fields.
scale: three AVIRIS-3 frames
feature_count: AVIRIS-3 spectral radiance cubes

name: Synthetic EnMAP Methane Plume Source-Rate Estimation Dataset
provider: Zenodo / Ouerghi et al. EnMAP-PRISMA methane source-rate authors
theme_canonical: Synthetic hyperspectral satellite methane plume benchmark
theme_raw: Tightening-up methane plume source rate estimation in EnMAP and PRISMA images
coverage: simulated 30 m EnMAP methane plume scenes
formats: NumPy arrays of XCH4 maps, source rates, wind speed splits
access: Zenodo direct download
notes: Synthetic benchmark, not observed scenes; included for EnMAP/PRISMA methane source-rate estimation research.
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 数据集是 EnMAP/PRISMA 图像中甲烷 plume 源强估计的合成基准数据。记录说明数据在 30 m 分辨率 EnMAP 图像中模拟甲烷 plume，包含反演的甲烷增强图、用于模拟的源强和对应风速，并以 NumPy 数组划分训练、验证和测试集。它不是实测影像，但对高光谱甲烷源强估计和模型不确定性研究很有价值。
desc_en: This Zenodo dataset is a synthetic benchmark for methane plume source-rate estimation in EnMAP and PRISMA images. The record states that methane plumes are simulated at 30 m resolution in EnMAP images, with retrieved methane enhancement maps, source rates and wind speed arrays split into train/validation/test sets. It is cataloged as synthetic rather than observed imagery, but is relevant to hyperspectral methane flux-estimation research.
openness: open Zenodo record under CC BY 4.0
source_type: synthetic EnMAP/PRISMA methane plume source-rate benchmark arrays
evidence: Zenodo API for record 15618044 returned DOI 10.5281/zenodo.15618044, CC BY 4.0, nine NumPy files totaling 11,714,343,552 bytes, and description stating synthetic methane plume data at 30 m resolution in EnMAP images with XCH4 maps, source rates and wind speed.
scale: synthetic train/validation/test benchmark
feature_count: 30 m simulated XCH4 maps

name: AI4AGRI HyDACI6 PRISMA Crop Identification Dataset
provider: Zenodo / AI4AGRI Research Excellence Centre / Transilvania University of Brasov
theme_canonical: PRISMA agricultural crop classification benchmark
theme_raw: HyDACI6 PRISMA-derived hyperspectral crop identification data
coverage: north of Brasov, Romania
license: CC BY 4.0; derived PRISMA product released with ASI written permission
formats: ZIP with six PRISMA-derived .mat hyperspectral images, mask, legend, wavelength tables, RGB composites
access: Zenodo direct download
time_span: six PRISMA Level 2C-derived images from 2024; published 2025-07-07
notes: Derived from PRISMA mission data with ASI permission; images are 700 x 700 x 187 at 30 m resolution.
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 数据集包含罗马尼亚 Brasov 北部农业区 2024 年 6 景 PRISMA Level 2C 派生高光谱影像，用于作物识别。记录说明每景影像为 700×700×187 的 .mat 数据，空间分辨率 30 m，并附有作物掩膜、图例、波长表和 RGB 可视化。数据由 AI4AGRI 项目在 ASI 书面许可下开放发布，是 PRISMA 农业分类和时相作物识别的直接基准数据。
desc_en: This Zenodo dataset provides six PRISMA Level 2C-derived hyperspectral images over agricultural fields north of Brasov, Romania, for crop identification. The record states that each image is a 700 x 700 x 187 .mat cube at 30 m spatial resolution, with a crop mask, legend, wavelength tables and RGB composites. It was released by AI4AGRI with written permission from ASI and is a direct PRISMA agricultural classification benchmark.
openness: open Zenodo record under CC BY 4.0 with ASI permission statement
source_type: PRISMA-derived hyperspectral agricultural image benchmark
evidence: Zenodo API for record 15830646 returned DOI 10.5281/zenodo.15830646, CC BY 4.0, open access, one ZIP file AI4AGRI HyDACI6 dataset.zip of 1,017,368,841 bytes, and description stating six 2024 PRISMA Level 2C-derived hyperspectral images, 700x700x187, 30 m resolution, masks/legend/wavelength tables.
scale: six PRISMA scenes over Brasov agricultural area
feature_count: 187 spectral bands after water-band removal

name: PRISMA HSI Forest Restricted Request-Access Dataset
provider: Zenodo / AGENIUM Space / ESA CORTEX
theme_canonical: PRISMA forest hyperspectral semantic segmentation benchmark
theme_raw: PRISMA HSI Forest dataset
coverage: France / IGN BD Forest V2-aligned PRISMA forest scenes
license: CC BY-NC-SA conditions stated in Zenodo request form; files restricted
formats: restricted labeled PRISMA hyperspectral image database, technical note
access: Zenodo landing page with request-access workflow
notes: Restricted-access dataset: public metadata but files require request approval on Zenodo. Included because goal covers accessible/requestable institutional datasets, with access limitation explicit.
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 记录是 ESA CORTEX 项目的 PRISMA HSI Forest 数据库，页面说明包含 1000 多个基于 PRISMA 产品的高质量带标签高光谱图像，地面真值来自 IGN BD Forest V2，类别包括落叶林、针叶林、混交林和非树木。文件为 restricted，需要通过 Zenodo 表单申请访问，申请条件中说明数据库按 CC BY-NC-SA 条款交付。该条目在目录中明确标为 request-access，而不是直接下载。
desc_en: This Zenodo record describes the PRISMA HSI Forest database from ESA CORTEX, with more than 1000 labeled hyperspectral images based on PRISMA products and IGN BD Forest V2 ground truth. Classes include deciduous forest, coniferous forest, mixed forest and non-tree. Files are restricted and require a Zenodo access request, with CC BY-NC-SA conditions stated on the request page, so the catalog marks it as request-access rather than direct download.
openness: public metadata; files restricted, request access required
source_type: restricted PRISMA hyperspectral forest segmentation benchmark
evidence: Zenodo API for record 7230134 returned DOI 10.5281/zenodo.7230134, access_right restricted, no public file list, and description stating more than 1000 labeled PRISMA-based hyperspectral images with IGN BD Forest V2 ground truth and four forest/non-tree classes; web page states request-access and CC BY-NC-SA delivery conditions.
scale: more than 1000 labeled PRISMA image chips
feature_count: PRISMA hyperspectral forest images

name: PRISMA Wildfire HFDI Pan-Sharpened and Fire Spectra Dataset
provider: Zenodo / PRISMA wildfire temperature estimation authors
theme_canonical: PRISMA wildfire hyperspectral products
theme_raw: Wildfires temperature estimation using PRISMA HFDI and spectra
coverage: Oregon wildfire PRISMA case study and related scenes
formats: ENVI/HDR products, ROI files, HFDI imagery, pan-sharpened PRISMA data, spectra/readme
access: Zenodo direct download
notes: Application-specific PRISMA wildfire products and spectra; not a general archive.
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 数据集支持使用 PRISMA 高光谱和 ECOSTRESS/Landsat 热红外数据进行野火检测与温度分析。记录说明文件包含 Hyperspectral Fire Detection Index 结果、反射率/火点光谱和 PRISMA pan-sharpened 数据，公开文件包括 ENVI/HDR、ROI、HFDI 图像等约 1.30 GB。它适合高光谱火点识别、火场光谱分析和 PRISMA 应用研究。
desc_en: This Zenodo dataset supports wildfire detection and temperature analysis using PRISMA hyperspectral imagery with complementary thermal data. The record states that Hyperspectral Fire Detection Index outputs, reflectance/fire spectra and PRISMA pan-sharpened data are included, with ENVI/HDR, ROI and HFDI image products totaling about 1.30 GB. It is useful for PRISMA wildfire applications and fire-spectrum analysis.
openness: open Zenodo record under CC BY 4.0
source_type: PRISMA wildfire hyperspectral application products
evidence: Zenodo API for record 7271523 returned DOI 10.5281/zenodo.7271523, CC BY 4.0, 23 files totaling 1,295,507,418 bytes, and description stating HFDI results, reflectance spectra and PRISMA pan-sharpened data for wildfire temperature estimation.
scale: PRISMA wildfire case dataset
feature_count: PRISMA HFDI/spectra/pan-sharpened products

name: CASI Agricultural Crop Signatures and Heracleum Hyperspectral Detection Dataset
provider: Zenodo / EO4AMS methodology authors
theme_canonical: Airborne CASI agricultural hyperspectral signatures
theme_raw: Hyperspectral signatures of crops under management and Heracleum detection
coverage: Polkovice experimental agricultural site, Czech Republic
formats: ZIP of CASI-derived crop spectra, models, scripts and detection outputs
access: Zenodo direct download
time_span: published 2024-11-14; CASI time-series dates in package/methodology
notes: Primarily spectra/model outputs extracted from CASI aerial hyperspectral time series; not raw image archive.
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 数据集来自“使用创新遥感方法监测农作物”认证方法，包含从捷克 Polkovice 试验农田 CASI 机载高光谱时间序列中提取的作物光谱签名。记录说明数据包括不同管理方式下作物的 1,140,304 条光谱、处理和解释脚本、作物分类模型以及大豕草检测相关输出。它适合农业高光谱光谱库、作物分类和入侵植物检测研究。
desc_en: This Zenodo dataset contains crop hyperspectral signatures extracted from a CASI airborne hyperspectral time series over the Polkovice experimental agricultural site in the Czech Republic. The record describes 1,140,304 crop spectra under different management types, processing scripts, crop classification models and Heracleum detection outputs. It supports agricultural spectral-library construction, crop classification and invasive-plant detection research.
openness: open Zenodo record under CC BY 4.0
source_type: CASI-derived agricultural hyperspectral spectra and models
evidence: Zenodo API for record 14160887 returned DOI 10.5281/zenodo.14160887, CC BY 4.0, one EO4AMS.ZIP file of 527,798,516 bytes, and description stating 1,140,304 crop spectra extracted from CASI aerial hyperspectral time series plus scripts, classification models and Heracleum detection outputs.
scale: Polkovice agricultural site spectra/model package
feature_count: 1,140,304 CASI-derived spectra

name: HISUI Coastal Chlorophyll Double-Peaked Hyperspectral Features Dataset
provider: Zenodo / HISUI coastal chlorophyll feature authors
theme_canonical: HISUI coastal water hyperspectral imagery
theme_raw: Double-peaked hyperspectral features at 710 and 800 nm for coastal chlorophyll monitoring
coverage: Okinawa-area coastal HISUI scenes including Itoman City and Izena Island
formats: HISUI GeoTIFF/binary scene files, ASTER comparison bands, detection-point spreadsheet
access: Zenodo direct download
notes: Contains original HISUI Level-1G GeoTIFF data for Okinawa coastal chlorophyll double-peaked feature analysis, plus ASTER comparison bands, detection point locations, and supplementary in-situ concentration table in the newer Zenodo record. Phase229 compared earlier Zenodo 17074519 and newer 17825401; the catalog keeps 17825401 because it is the fuller record with supplementary table.
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 数据集发布用于研究 710 和 800 nm 双峰高光谱特征监测近岸叶绿素 a 的 HISUI 原始数据。记录列出 3 景 HISUI 数据，覆盖主目标、Itoman City 和 Izena Island，并附有 ASTER VNIR 对比波段和检测点位置表。公开文件约 2.98 GB，包括多个 HISUI TIFF 文件，适合 HISUI 近岸水体叶绿素、高光谱特征和多传感器对比研究。
desc_en: This Zenodo dataset provides original HISUI data used to study double-peaked hyperspectral features near 710 and 800 nm for coastal chlorophyll-alpha monitoring. The record lists three HISUI scenes, including main target, Itoman City and Izena Island, plus ASTER VNIR comparison bands and detection-point locations. About 2.98 GB of TIFF/binary files support HISUI coastal-water feature analysis and sensor comparison.
openness: open Zenodo record under CC BY 4.0
source_type: HISUI coastal hyperspectral imagery for chlorophyll feature analysis
evidence: Zenodo API for record 17825401 returned DOI 10.5281/zenodo.17825401, CC BY 4.0, nine files totaling 2,981,910,252 bytes, and description listing three HISUI scene files and ASTER VNIR bands used for figures in a coastal chlorophyll-alpha hyperspectral feature study. Phase229 Zenodo API comparison confirmed 17074519 and 17825401 are the same HISUI/ASTER coastal-chlorophyll repository lineage; 17825401 includes the HISUI files plus supplementary table and remains the canonical catalog URL.
scale: three HISUI coastal scenes plus ASTER bands
feature_count: HISUI hyperspectral scene files

name: USGS Korea River Experiment Center UAS Nano-Hyperspec Rhodamine Dye Dataset 2017
provider: U.S. Geological Survey / Korea Institute of Civil Engineering and Building Technology
theme_canonical: UAS hyperspectral river tracer dye remote sensing
theme_raw: Korea River Experiment Center Nano-Hyperspec Rhodamine WT tracer data
coverage: KICT River Experiment Center, Korea
formats: UAS Nano-Hyperspec image data, radiance spectra, Rhodamine WT concentration measurements, metadata
access: USGS data release / ScienceBase access
notes: Controlled channel tracer experiment with UAS hyperspectral time-series and spatial imaging, not a satellite/land-cover benchmark.
desc_zh: 该 USGS 数据发布包含韩国 KICT River Experiment Center 2017 年 5 月示踪实验中的 UAS 高光谱影像和 Rhodamine WT 染料浓度观测。元数据说明影像由 Aerotestra ATNK09 多旋翼搭载 Headwall Nano-Hyperspec 获取，包含悬停时间序列和飞行运动构建的空间影像，并用时间戳与电子荧光仪浓度序列匹配。数据适合河流污染物/示踪剂扩散、高光谱水体反演和 UAS 水文遥感算法研究。
desc_en: This USGS data release contains UAS hyperspectral image data and Rhodamine WT dye concentration measurements from a May 2017 tracer study at the KICT River Experiment Center in Korea. Metadata states that a Headwall Nano-Hyperspec mounted on an Aerotestra ATNK09 multirotor acquired both hovering time series and moving-platform spatial images, with image timestamps linked to fluorometer concentration time series. It supports UAS hyperspectral tracer-dye and river dispersion studies.
openness: CC0 / U.S. public-domain data release
source_type: UAS Nano-Hyperspec hyperspectral river dye tracer imagery
evidence: DataCite API for DOI 10.5066/P9V3Y334 returned USGS title, ScienceBase URL and abstract describing Nano-Hyperspec UAS image data, Rhodamine WT concentrations, radiance units, hovering and moving image acquisitions; USGS landing page returned HTTP 200 and states CC0 public domain rights.
scale: controlled river experiment channel
feature_count: Nano-Hyperspec radiance spectra / UAS HSI

name: USGS Kootenai River CASI 1500H Airborne Hyperspectral Dye Tracer Dataset 2017
provider: U.S. Geological Survey / Quantum Spatial / ITRES
theme_canonical: Airborne hyperspectral river tracer dye remote sensing
theme_raw: Kootenai River CASI 1500H dye tracer experiment imagery
coverage: Kootenai River near Bonners Ferry, Idaho, USA
formats: ENVI-compatible BSQ/HDR spectral radiance and apparent reflectance images, supporting field data links
access: USGS Science Data Catalog / ScienceBase access
notes: Uses DOI for parent/linked data release; URL points to hyperspectral image child catalog page for specificity.
desc_zh: 该 USGS 数据发布提供 2017 年 9 月 Kootenai River Rhodamine WT 示踪实验的机载高光谱影像。USGS 目录说明影像由 Quantum Spatial 使用 ITRES CASI 1500H 从 Cessna Caravan 获取，0.5 m 像元，48 个 380-1050 nm 波段，并以 ENVI 兼容 BSQ/HDR 格式发布，包含辐射定标和 ATCOR 表观反射率产品。数据用于从遥感反射率估计染料浓度并研究河流扩散过程。
desc_en: This USGS release provides airborne hyperspectral imagery from a September 2017 Rhodamine WT tracer experiment on the Kootenai River, Idaho. The USGS catalog page states that Quantum Spatial acquired CASI 1500H imagery from a Cessna Caravan with 0.5 m pixels and 48 bands from 380-1050 nm, delivered as ENVI-compatible BSQ/HDR radiance and ATCOR apparent-reflectance products. It supports remote-sensing estimation of dye concentration and river dispersion.
openness: U.S. public-domain / USGS data release
source_type: airborne CASI 1500H hyperspectral river dye imagery
evidence: USGS Science Data Catalog page returned HTTP 200 and describes CASI 1500H imagery, 0.5 m pixels, 48 bands from 380-1050 nm, BSQ/HDR radiance and reflectance products; DataCite DOI 10.5066/P9CV4XEO returned parent release abstract linking hyperspectral image data, field spectra, dye concentration and RGB aerial photos.
scale: river flight lines during dye plume passage
feature_count: 48 bands, 380-1050 nm; 0.5 m pixels

name: USGS Columbia CERC UAS Hyperspectral Turbid-Water Rhodamine Dye Dataset 2019
provider: U.S. Geological Survey Columbia Environmental Research Center
theme_canonical: UAS hyperspectral turbid-water tracer dye experiment
theme_raw: Columbia CERC UAS hyperspectral and RGB turbidity/dye experiment
coverage: USGS Columbia Environmental Research Center, Columbia, Missouri, USA
formats: field spectra, UAS hyperspectral and RGB images, turbidity and Rhodamine WT concentration measurements
access: USGS data release / ScienceBase access
notes: Tank/turbid-water experiment designed to test dye concentration retrieval from UAS hyperspectral/RGB imagery and field spectra.
desc_zh: 该 USGS 数据发布包含 2019 年 4 月 2 日在 Columbia Environmental Research Center 进行的浑浊水体 Rhodamine WT 染料实验。公开页面说明数据包括 400-900 nm 上方水面反射率场光谱、UAS 高光谱和 RGB 图像，以及浊度和染料浓度原位测量。它为在高浊度条件下评估可见染料浓度遥感反演、UAS 水质实验和 OBRA 波段比方法提供基准。
desc_en: This USGS data release contains an April 2019 turbid-water Rhodamine WT dye experiment at the Columbia Environmental Research Center. The public page states that field spectra from 400-900 nm, UAS-based hyperspectral and RGB images, and in situ turbidity and dye concentration measurements are included. It supports testing dye-concentration retrieval in turbid water from UAS imagery and field spectra.
openness: CC0 / U.S. public-domain data release
source_type: UAS hyperspectral/RGB turbid-water dye experiment with field spectra
evidence: DataCite API for DOI 10.5066/P91ZRGKQ returned USGS title, ScienceBase URL and abstract describing field spectra, UAS hyperspectral/RGB images and turbidity/Rhodamine WT measurements; USGS landing page returned HTTP 200 and states DOI and CC0 public-domain rights.
scale: controlled tanks / turbid water experiment
feature_count: 400-900 nm field spectra plus UAS HSI

name: USGS ECCOE 2023 UAS Multispectral and Hyperspectral Radiometric Calibration Evaluation Field Data
provider: U.S. Geological Survey EROS Calibration/Validation Center of Excellence / National Uncrewed Systems Office
theme_canonical: UAS hyperspectral radiometric calibration/validation
theme_raw: ECCOE 2023 UAS MS/HS imagery calibration evaluation
coverage: USGS EROS facility, Minnehaha County, South Dakota, USA
formats: UAS multispectral and hyperspectral imagery, field spectrometer measurements, calibration target data
access: USGS Science Data Catalog / ScienceBase access
notes: Calibration/validation field data, not an application scene classification benchmark.

The abstract states that ECCOE and NUSO assessed imagery from commonly used UAS-mounted cameras under manufacturer-recommended calibration procedures and empirical line methods. It supports UAS hyperspectral calibration/validation workflows.

feature_count: UAS MS/HS imagery and field spectra

The abstract states that multi-scale spectroscopic data were used to build PLS models for chlorophyll-a, biofilm community types, diversity and functional traits. It is a companion training/validation dataset for hyperspectral biofilm mapping and estuarine ecology remote sensing.

desc_en: This Dryad dataset supports UAV hyperspectral and thermal phenotyping of Dothistroma needle blight resistance in Pinus radiata. DataCite metadata states that UAV hyperspectral and thermal imaging were used to compute narrow-band hyperspectral indices, canopy temperature indices, radiative-transfer inverted plant traits and solar-induced fluorescence, alongside severity scores and mixed-effect models. It is useful for forest disease remote sensing and tree-breeding phenomics.

desc_en: This Dryad dataset supports research on detecting liana-infested forests from remote sensing. DataCite metadata describes leaf reflectance spectra from 5,424 leaves, fine-scale airborne reflectance data from 999 liana-infested canopies, and coarse-scale satellite reflectance covering 775 ha of liana-infested forest, plus canopy and leaf-structure measurements. It is a multi-scale reflectance database for tropical forest optics.

evidence: DataCite API for DOI 10.5061/dryad.xpnvx0krs returned CC0 rights and abstract describing 5,424 leaf reflectance spectra, airborne reflectance data from 999 liana-infested canopies, and satellite reflectance over 775 ha of liana-infested forest stands.

feature_count: 5424 leaves, 999 airborne canopies, 775 ha satellite reflectance

desc_en: This Dryad dataset comes from a long-term precipitation manipulation experiment at KAEFS in central Oklahoma. DataCite technical metadata states that canopy-level spectral reflectance was acquired with an ASD FieldSpec during 2022-2023 and linked to seven precipitation treatments and grassland structure/function measurements. It supports hyperspectral ecosystem-function and drought-response modeling.

evidence: DataCite API for DOI 10.5061/dryad.280gb5n3b returned CC0 rights and technical metadata stating ASD canopy-level spectral reflectance measurements at KAEFS during 2022 and 2023, linked to a long-term experimental precipitation gradient.

feature_count: ASD canopy spectral reflectance

DataCite metadata frames the work around hyperspectral imagery and the spectral variance hypothesis, with data collected in Boulder, Colorado grassland monitoring transects and linked to vegetation composition. It is useful for grassland biodiversity remote sensing and spectral-diversity research.

desc_en: This Harvard Dataverse dataset supports simulation-based water-quality mapping in shallow coral reef environments. DataCite metadata lists drone-measured reflectance, environmental parameters including chlorophyll-a, CDOM, suspended particulate matter, wind speed and depth, hyperspectral reflectance data with varying noise levels, and multispectral reflectance downsampled to MicaSense RedEdge-MX Dual bands. It supports coral reef water-quality retrieval and hyperspectral/multispectral sensor comparison.
