name: Western Ghats AVIRIS-NG Foliar Functional Trait Maps
provider: Zenodo / Zheng et al. / NASA AVIRIS-NG research users
theme_canonical: AVIRIS-NG-derived foliar functional trait GeoTIFF maps
theme_raw: Foliar functional trait maps for six sites along the Western Ghats of India derived from AVIRIS-NG
coverage: Six sites along the Western Ghats of India
license: Creative Commons Attribution 3.0 United States (CC BY 3.0 US)
formats: ZIP archive containing foliar trait map rasters
access: Open Zenodo record with downloadable TraitMaps.zip archive
time_span: Published 2023-08-15; AVIRIS-NG acquisition dates not specified in checked metadata
notes: Added after 2-hop verification from DataCite/Zenodo metadata and the related JGR Biogeosciences paper. This is a hyperspectral-derived trait-map archive, not raw AVIRIS-NG flight-line imagery.
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 数据集发布印度 Western Ghats 六个样区的七类叶片功能性状图层，基于野外叶片测量和 NASA AVIRIS-NG 机载高光谱影像反演生成。元数据列出的性状包括叶质量面积、叶氮、纤维、木质素、糖、钙和总酚等，数据以开放 Zenodo 记录中的 TraitMaps.zip 下载包提供，许可为 CC BY 3.0 US。相关 JGR Biogeosciences 论文说明该研究使用 AVIRIS-NG 成像光谱在 Western Ghats 气候梯度上制图，因此它适合作为热带森林叶性状和高光谱生态功能产品数据。
desc_en: This Zenodo dataset publishes maps of seven foliar functional traits for six sites along the Western Ghats of India, derived from field leaf measurements and NASA AVIRIS-NG airborne hyperspectral imagery. The metadata lists traits including leaf mass per area, foliar nitrogen, fiber, lignin, sugars, calcium and total phenolics, with the data provided through an open TraitMaps.zip archive under CC BY 3.0 US. The related JGR Biogeosciences paper states that AVIRIS-NG imaging spectroscopy was used to map these traits across a Western Ghats climatic gradient, making the record useful for tropical forest trait and hyperspectral ecosystem-function studies.
openness: open Zenodo dataset; CC BY 3.0 US license; downloadable ZIP archive
source_type: hyperspectral-derived ecological trait map raster archive
evidence: DataCite for DOI 10.5281/zenodo.8250553 returned open-access rights and CC BY 3.0 US. Zenodo API for concept record 8250552/current record 8250553 returned title Foliar functional trait maps for six sites along the Western Ghats of India, publication_date 2023-08-15, access_right open, license cc-by-3.0-us, and one downloadable file TraitMaps.zip of 8,242,224,271 bytes. Search/Article metadata for JGR Biogeosciences DOI 10.1029/2023JG007753 links the dataset DOI and describes mapping seven foliar functional traits using AVIRIS-NG across the Western Ghats.
scale: six Western Ghats sites; hyperspectral-derived trait maps
feature_count: seven foliar functional traits; one 8.24 GB TraitMaps.zip archive

name: Dryad Grassland Airborne Imaging Spectroscopy Traits and Drought Response Dataset
provider: Dryad / Dao, He, Lu and Axiotis
theme_canonical: airborne VNIR hyperspectral images and trait maps for grassland drought response
theme_raw: Imaging spectroscopy reveals topographic variability effects on grassland functional traits and drought responses
coverage: Heterogeneous grassland study site; topographic gradients sampled in 2016 and 2017
formats: Dryad ZIP archive with GeoTIFF hyperspectral images, shapefiles, CSV spectra/traits, trait-map extracts, masks and code
access: Dryad dataset landing page with individual Data_and_Codes.zip and README.md files
time_span: 2016-08-23 and 2017-08-20 airborne hyperspectral acquisitions; Dryad published 2025-01-03
notes: Added after DataCite, Dryad API and Dryad page README verification. This is a research package containing both raw/processed hyperspectral GeoTIFF images and derived trait/drought-response tables, not a national flight-line archive.
desc_zh: 该 Dryad 数据集支撑草地功能性状、地形差异和干旱响应的成像光谱研究。Dryad README 说明数据包含 2016 年 8 月 23 日和 2017 年 8 月 20 日获取的高光谱影像 GeoTIFF，均为 301 个波段、400-1000 nm、2 nm 间隔，由 Headwall Photonics Micro-Hyperspec VNIR 推扫传感器搭载 JetRanger 直升机采集。数据包还包括物种分类训练/测试 shapefile、土壤阴影掩膜、FieldSpec 叶片与影像级光谱-性状 CSV、TPI 栅格、trait map 提取表和分析代码，适合草地高光谱性状反演、干旱响应和物种/地形差异研究。
desc_en: This Dryad dataset supports an imaging-spectroscopy study of grassland functional traits, topographic variability and drought response. The Dryad README states that the package includes hyperspectral GeoTIFF images acquired on 2016-08-23 and 2017-08-20, each with 301 bands from 400-1000 nm at 2 nm spacing, collected by a Headwall Photonics Micro-Hyperspec VNIR push-broom sensor on a JetRanger helicopter. The package also includes species-classification shapefiles, soil/shadow masks, FieldSpec leaf- and image-level spectra/trait CSVs, topographic-position-index rasters, trait-map extracts and analysis code, making it useful for grassland hyperspectral trait retrieval and drought-response studies.
openness: Dryad public dataset; CC0 1.0; page lists downloadable Data_and_Codes.zip and README.md
source_type: article-linked airborne hyperspectral image and trait-map research package
evidence: DataCite for DOI 10.5061/dryad.2jm63xt0d returned Dryad publisher, 2025 publication, CC0 rights, subjects including imaging spectroscopy, plant functional trait, topographic variability and drought impact. Dryad API reports public visibility, version 4, publicationDate 2025-01-03, storageSize 6,673,045,626 bytes and file list with Data_and_Codes.zip (6,673,033,221 bytes) plus README.md. Dryad landing page/README lists hyperspectral_images with 20160823_HSI.tif and 20170820_HSI_INT_N.tif, 301 bands from 400 nm to 1000 nm at 2 nm interval, acquired by Headwall Micro-Hyperspec VNIR on a JetRanger helicopter, plus FieldSpec spectra from 400-2500 nm and trait-map extracts.
scale: two airborne VNIR hyperspectral acquisitions plus trait and topographic analysis data
feature_count: 2 hyperspectral GeoTIFF images with 301 bands; 6.67 GB Dryad package

name: Dryad California Coast Redwood GAO Imaging-Spectroscopy-Derived Distribution and Hydrologic Niche Maps
provider: Dryad / Francis, Asner, Mach and Field / Global Airborne Observatory
theme_canonical: GAO airborne imaging-spectroscopy-derived redwood distribution and hydrologic niche GeoTIFF maps
theme_raw: Landscape scale variation in the hydrologic niche of California coast redwood
coverage: Three California coast redwood forest landscapes spanning about one-third of the species latitudinal range; 34,800 ha
formats: GeoTIFF maps packaged in a Dryad ZIP archive
access: Dryad dataset landing page with downloadable doi_10_1111_ecog_05080.zip
doi_or_citation: 10.5061/dryad.fbg79cns5; related Ecography DOI 10.1111/ecog.05080; related Remote Sensing DOI 10.3390/rs11030351
time_span: Dryad published 2020-07-16; source GAO flights dates described in related publications
notes: Added as a hyperspectral-derived open raster product. The Dryad package provides redwood presence/absence and hydrologic niche GeoTIFF maps derived partly from Global Airborne Observatory airborne imaging spectroscopy, not raw hyperspectral cube imagery.
desc_zh: 该 Dryad 数据集发布加州海岸红杉水文生态位研究的开放 GeoTIFF 栅格数据，覆盖三个红杉森林景观、约 34,800 公顷，空间分辨率为 10 m。Dryad 摘要和方法说明红杉 presence/absence 图由 Global Airborne Observatory 的 airborne imaging spectroscopy 分类得到，并与 GAO LiDAR DEM 派生的 IHAS、TWI、曲率、热负荷指数、MODIS 雾频率和 USDA 土壤可用水存储等变量结合。它不是原始高光谱影像库，而是由机载成像光谱派生的森林分布/生态位开放栅格产品，适合红杉分布、微避难所和高光谱生态分类结果应用研究。
desc_en: This Dryad dataset provides open GeoTIFF maps for a California coast redwood hydrologic-niche study across three forest landscapes and about 34,800 ha at 10 m resolution. The Dryad abstract and methods state that the redwood presence/absence map was derived from Global Airborne Observatory airborne imaging spectroscopy, combined with GAO LiDAR DEM-derived moisture/topographic metrics, MODIS fog frequency and USDA soil water storage. It is not a raw hyperspectral image archive, but it is an open hyperspectral-derived forest distribution and niche raster product useful for redwood habitat, microrefugia and imaging-spectroscopy classification applications.
openness: Dryad public dataset; CC0 1.0; downloadable ZIP archive
source_type: hyperspectral-derived forest distribution and hydrologic niche GeoTIFF product
evidence: DataCite for DOI 10.5061/dryad.fbg79cns5 returned Dryad publisher, 2020 publication, CC0 rights, subjects including Global Airborne Observatory, DEM, hydrologic niche and redwood. Dryad API reports public visibility, version 2, storageSize 51,692,327 bytes and one file doi_10_1111_ecog_05080.zip of 51,639,875 bytes. Dryad page states the dataset contains maps of redwood presence/absence and six moisture-access measures in three California landscapes, all provided as GeoTIFF files; it states the redwood presence/absence maps were produced through trained classification of GAO airborne imaging spectroscopy data and references Remote Sensing DOI 10.3390/rs11030351.
scale: 34,800 ha across three California redwood landscapes at 10 m resolution
feature_count: redwood presence/absence plus six moisture-access GeoTIFF measures

name: CABO Forest Canopy-Level Airborne Imaging Spectroscopy Spectra and Inventory Dataset
provider: Dryad / Canadian Airborne Biodiversity Observatory / Crofts et al.
theme_canonical: airborne imaging spectroscopy canopy-level spectra linked to forest inventory and traits
theme_raw: CABO forest inventory survey data: Canopy-level spectra, species abundances, and environmental conditions
coverage: 65 field plots along a temperate-to-boreal forest gradient in southern Québec, Canada; Mont Mégantic and Mont-Saint-Bruno sites
license: Creative Commons Zero v1.0 Universal in Dryad API; Dryad README also states CC-BY sharing/access information
formats: CSV tables for continuum-removed spectral reflectance/band-depth data, metadata, plot vegetation, environmental variables and species mean traits
access: Dryad dataset landing page with individual CSV downloads; also mirrored/published in EcoSIS
doi_or_citation: 10.5061/dryad.5mkkwh7dh; related Ecological Monographs DOI 10.1002/ecm.1605; associated code DOI 10.5281/zenodo.10735410; protocol DOI 10.17504/protocols.io.q26g7rn23vwz/v2
time_span: Dryad published 2024-04-02 and updated 2024-10-04; spectral acquisition dates listed per flightline in metadata
notes: Added as canopy-level airborne imaging spectroscopy spectra linked to forest inventory, not as full raster image cubes. The dataset is also exposed through EcoSIS, making it useful as a spectral library / plot-level biodiversity remote-sensing resource.
desc_zh: 该 Dryad 数据集发布 Canadian Airborne Biodiversity Observatory 在加拿大魁北克南部温带到寒带森林梯度上的 65 个样地机载成像光谱与森林清查数据。Dryad 页面和 README 说明数据包含 airborne imaging spectroscopy 获取的 continuum removed spectral reflectance / band-depth 光谱、样地树种相对丰度、环境变量和物种平均叶性状；光谱元数据列出 CASI-1500 与 SASI-640 成像光谱仪、Twin Otter 固定翼平台、航线和采集日期。主光谱表覆盖约 454.2-2412.5 nm 波段，是连接航空高光谱、森林组成和光谱变异假说研究的开放样地级数据集。
desc_en: This Dryad dataset publishes Canadian Airborne Biodiversity Observatory canopy-level airborne imaging spectroscopy and forest inventory data for 65 plots along a temperate-to-boreal forest gradient in southern Québec, Canada. The Dryad page and README state that it includes continuum-removed spectral reflectance / band-depth spectra, relative tree species abundances, plot environmental variables and species-mean foliar traits; the spectral metadata names CASI-1500 and SASI-640 imaging spectrometers on a Twin Otter fixed-wing aircraft with flightline and acquisition-date fields. The main spectra table spans wavelengths from about 454.2 to 2412.5 nm, making it an open plot-level airborne hyperspectral resource for forest composition and spectral-variation-hypothesis studies.
openness: Dryad public dataset with downloadable CSV files; Dryad API reports CC0 1.0, README notes CC-BY and EcoSIS mirror
source_type: airborne imaging spectroscopy plot-level spectra and forest inventory dataset
evidence: DataCite for DOI 10.5061/dryad.5mkkwh7dh returned Dryad publisher, 2024 publication, CC0 rights and subjects including imaging spectroscopy, forest inventory, temperate forest and boreal forest. Dryad API reports public visibility, version 5, storageSize 128,787,472 bytes and seven files, including cabo_forests_spectra_bd_dataset.csv (105,536,030 bytes) and cabo_forests_spectra_bd_metadata.csv (23,163,663 bytes). Dryad landing page/README states the data were acquired by airborne imaging spectroscopy as continuum removed spectral reflectance for 65 field plots, lists CASI-1500 and SASI-640 imaging spectrometers on a Twin Otter aircraft, and defines spectral columns from 454.2 to 2412.5 nm.
scale: 65 forest inventory plots across southern Québec temperate-to-boreal gradient
feature_count: continuum-removed spectral table, spectral metadata, plot metadata, vegetation, environmental variables and species mean traits; 7 CSV/README files

coverage: Hawaiʻi Island, annual GAO coverage regions from 2016 through 2019
formats: GeoJSON point detections and coverage/clipped-region GeoJSON files
access: Open Zenodo record with downloadable GeoJSON files
doi_or_citation: 10.5281/zenodo.20162855; concept DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20162854; related Vaughn et al. 2018/2023 methods
notes: Included as a hyperspectral-derived geospatial detection product. The distributed data are GeoJSON point/coverage files, not raster cubes; they are retained because detections are derived from 2 m VSWIR imaging spectroscopy pixels collected by GAO.
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 数据集发布夏威夷岛 2016-2019 年 Rapid ʻŌhiʻa Death 相关褐变树冠的年度地理检测结果。记录说明这些检测由 Global Airborne Observatory 采集的 airborne laser-guided visible-to-shortwave infrared (VSWIR) imaging spectroscopy 生成，每个 2 m × 2 m 像元通过 SVM 与 GBM 分类得到 brown crown likelihood，超过阈值的相邻像元聚合为单株树冠并输出质心位置和簇大小。数据以 GeoJSON 点检测、覆盖范围和裁剪区域文件开放发布，适合林木病害高光谱监测和树冠级派生产品研究。
desc_en: This Zenodo dataset publishes annual geospatial detections of brown tree crowns associated with Rapid ʻŌhiʻa Death on Hawaiʻi Island from 2016-2019. The record states that the detections were produced from Global Airborne Observatory airborne laser-guided visible-to-shortwave infrared (VSWIR) imaging spectroscopy; each 2 m by 2 m pixel received a brown-crown likelihood from combined SVM and GBM classifiers, and thresholded neighboring pixels were aggregated into individual crown detections with centroid and cluster size. The open GeoJSON point, coverage and clipped-region files are useful for forest disease monitoring and crown-level hyperspectral-derived products.
openness: open Zenodo dataset; CC BY 4.0; downloadable GeoJSON files
source_type: airborne VSWIR imaging-spectroscopy-derived forest disease point-detection product
evidence: DataCite and Zenodo API for DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20162855 returned CC BY 4.0 and description stating annual geospatial detections were produced from GAO airborne laser-guided VSWIR imaging spectroscopy. Zenodo API lists 12 downloadable GeoJSON files including GAO_brown_trees_FEMpaper_2016/2017/2018/2019.geojson and coverage/clipped-region GeoJSON files, totaling about 45,280,690 bytes in the listed files. The description states brown crown likelihood was derived for each 2 m x 2 m VSWIR imaging spectroscopy pixel using SVM and GBM methods.

feature_count: 12 GeoJSON files: annual brown-tree detections plus coverage and clipped regions
file_size: about 45,280,690 bytes across listed GeoJSON files

desc_en: This CaltechDATA dataset provides Mako thermal-infrared hyperspectral airborne imagery and classification-support data for the Lavic Lake fault / Red Flake site. DataCite describes a `redFlakeSite` folder with an emissivity-processed thermal infrared hyperspectral airborne image and ENVI header, lithologic contact shapefiles and laboratory spectra of lithologic sample chips, plus a `completeHyperspectralImageMNFcomponents` folder with the first 15 MNF components of the complete Lavic Lake fault hyperspectral airborne image and header. The CaltechDATA API reports public record/files, cc-zero rights and a 263 MB `llfDataArchive_submitted02282019.zip` package.

desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 三部分数据集发布玉米蒸腾速率建模研究中的原始和处理后热红外/高光谱图像数据。元数据说明数据来自自动化高通量表型平台，玉米在不同干旱强度和 transferability experiment 中由 hyperspectral line scanners 与热红外成像跟踪，目标是结合环境数据和图像建立经验蒸腾速率预测模型。part1 包含 DR 实验原始高光谱、原始热红外、处理数据和脚本，part2/part3 分别发布 TF hyperspectral 数据的其它部分；这是开放的近地/表型高光谱图像数据，不是航空或卫星遥感数据。
desc_en: This three-part Zenodo dataset publishes raw and processed thermal-infrared and hyperspectral image data for maize transpiration-rate modelling. The metadata state that the data were collected on an automated high-throughput phenotyping platform, where maize drought-severity and transferability experiments were monitored with hyperspectral line scanners and thermal imaging to build empirical transpiration-rate prediction models from environmental data and images. Part 1 contains DR raw hyperspectral data, raw thermal data, processed data and scripts, while parts 2 and 3 provide the remaining TF hyperspectral archives; it is an open proximal/phenotyping hyperspectral image dataset rather than airborne or satellite remote sensing.

source_type: proximal automated-phenotyping hyperspectral and thermal infrared image archive
evidence: DataCite for DOI 10.5281/zenodo.7807989 returned CC BY 4.0 and a description of raw hyperspectral and thermal infrared image data for maize transpiration-rate modelling collected on an automated high-throughput phenotyping platform. Zenodo API for record 7807989 returned 11 files including DR_raw_hyperspectral_data.7z (8,660,306,056 bytes), raw_thermal_data.7z (4,410,258,629 bytes) and TF_hyp_part3.7z (1,237,688,790 bytes). DataCite/Zenodo for related records 8164473 and 8033640 returned CC BY 4.0, raw hyperspectral data from maize drought/transferability experiments, and files TF_hyp_part1.7z (49,529,275,350 bytes) and TF_hyp_part2.7z (49,128,121,776 bytes).
scale: maize automated high-throughput phenotyping platform drought and transferability experiments
feature_count: three Zenodo parts; raw hyperspectral line-scanner archives, raw thermal infrared archive, processed data and scripts
file_size: part1 includes at least 14.39 GB across listed key archives; part2 49.53 GB; part3 49.13 GB

desc_zh: 该 Mendeley Data 数据集发布用于环境塑料废弃物检测的 UAV SWIR 高光谱数据立方体。DataCite 和 Mendeley 页面说明数据由安装在无人机上的 push-broom SWIR 相机在受控自然环境中采集，场景中放置了分类塑料目标；数据包含 9 个 hyperspectral cubes，每个立方体由 81 个 900-1700 nm 波长层组成，采样间隔 10 nm，其中 900-930 nm 层为未实际采集的 dummy 零值层。每个 cube 配套手工绘制 masks，用于按塑料聚合物或其它材料标注，并包含训练深度学习模型所用的数据文件夹。
desc_en: This Mendeley Data record provides UAV SWIR hyperspectral cubes for environmental plastic-waste detection. DataCite and the Mendeley page state that the data were acquired with a push-broom SWIR camera mounted on a drone in controlled natural environments with sorted plastic objects placed on the ground; the dataset contains 9 hyperspectral cubes, each organized as 81 wavelength layers from 900-1700 nm at 10 nm spacing, with 900-930 nm layers filled as dummy zeros because they were not acquired. Manually drawn masks label plastics polymers or other materials for each cube, and an additional training-data folder supports the deep-learning segmentation model.

desc_en: This ScienceDB record is a processed benchmark package for hyperspectral anomaly detection, containing San Diego Airport and Downtown Pavia datasets. desc_zh: ICONES-HSI 是 XLIM 实验室发布的高光谱遥感图像 patch 数据集，由 NASA/JPL AVIRIS 高光谱影像生成。README 说明数据包含 468 个 300x300 像素的 HSI/RGB patch，高光谱部分为 ENVI Standard 的 .hdr/.img 文件，覆盖 365-2497 nm 的 224 个连续波段。数据按农业、森林、沙漠、城市、雪地、山地、海洋、湿地和云等九类组织，可用于高光谱遥感图像检索、场景分类和光谱敏感性函数研究。下载需要通过网页表单提交机构和邮箱获取链接，页面要求引用 2019 年 Remote Sensing 论文。
desc_en: ICONES-HSI is a hyperspectral remote-sensing image-patch dataset released by XLIM Laboratory and generated from NASA/JPL AVIRIS imagery. Its README states that it contains 468 HSI/RGB patches of 300 by 300 pixels, with the hyperspectral patches stored as ENVI Standard .hdr/.img files across 224 contiguous bands from 365 to 2497 nm. The patches are grouped into nine scene categories including agriculture, forest, desert, dense urban, snow, mountain, ocean, wetland and cloud, supporting hyperspectral image retrieval, scene classification and spectral-sensitivity studies. Download access is mediated by an email form, and the page asks users to cite the 2019 Remote Sensing paper.

source_type: derived AVIRIS hyperspectral image-patch dataset
evidence: Dataset page states 468 hyperspectral remote-sensing images of 300x300 pixels generated from NASA JPL AVIRIS imagery, sampled in 224 contiguous bands between 365 and 2497 nm, organized into nine categories, and downloadable via a form as an 11.5 Go package. README confirms ENVI .hdr/.img HSI patches plus RGB .png files.

feature_count: 468 hyperspectral/RGB image patches

desc_zh: USGS Upper Sacramento River UAS Nano-Hyperspec 数据集提供美国加州北部 Sacramento River 上游河段的无人机高光谱反射率影像，用于河流水深反演、鲑鱼栖息地表征和河道地貌变化研究。data.gov 与 ScienceBase 元数据说明数据由 DJI Matrice M600 搭载 Headwall Nano-Hyperspec 于 2017 年 9 月 13 日采集，空间分辨率为 0.178 m，包含 396.025-1005.09 nm 范围的 276 个波段。影像像元为 32 位浮点反射率，格式为 ENVI 兼容 BSQ 并配套 .hdr 头文件。当前 ScienceBase API 可见 HDR、footprint、缩略图、CSV 和元数据文件，但大型 BSQ 文件入口未在本地验证出来，因此访问状态标为元数据已核实、文件端点需复核。
desc_en: The USGS Upper Sacramento River UAS Nano-Hyperspec dataset provides UAV hyperspectral reflectance imagery for river bathymetry, salmon-habitat characterization and geomorphic-change studies in northern California. data.gov and ScienceBase metadata state that the data were acquired on 13 September 2017 from a DJI Matrice M600 carrying a Headwall Nano-Hyperspec system, with 0.178 m pixels and 276 bands from 396.025 to 1005.09 nm. Pixels are 32-bit floating-point reflectances in an ENVI-compatible BSQ image with an associated .hdr header. The ScienceBase API currently exposes HDR, footprint, thumbnail, CSV and metadata files, but the large BSQ endpoint was not verified locally, so access is marked as metadata verified with a file-endpoint caveat.

desc_zh: USGS Upper Sacramento River Airborne CASI 数据集提供 Sacramento River 上游的机载高光谱影像，是 USGS 2019 年河流水深遥感数据发布的一部分。ScienceBase 子项说明数据于 2017 年 9 月 14 日由 Quantum Spatial 使用 ITRES CASI 1500H 从固定翼飞机采集，空间分辨率为 0.5 m，包含 48 个波段。公开文件清单包括约 1.54 GB 的 ENVI BSQ 影像、HDR 头文件、footprint、缩略图、元数据和处理报告，可用于河流水深反演、栖息地评估和跨平台遥感比较。
desc_en: The USGS Upper Sacramento River Airborne CASI dataset provides airborne hyperspectral imagery from the upper Sacramento River as part of a USGS river-bathymetry remote-sensing data release. The ScienceBase child item states that the data were acquired on 14 September 2017 by Quantum Spatial using an ITRES CASI 1500H from a fixed-wing aircraft, with 0.5 m pixels and 48 spectral bands. The public file list includes an approximately 1.54 GB ENVI BSQ image, HDR header, footprint, thumbnail, metadata and processing report, supporting river-depth retrieval, habitat assessment and cross-platform sensor comparisons.
openness: public USGS ScienceBase data release; large BSQ listed in public file metadata
source_type: observed airborne hyperspectral river imagery
evidence: ScienceBase API lists the child item title, DOI parent 10.5066/F7Q52NZ1, acquisition date 2017-09-14, summary with CASI 1500H fixed-wing 0.5 m 48-band imagery, and files including Upper_Sacramento_River_CASI_48b_WGS84_UTM10N_0pt5mXY_Tile_113.bsq of 1,536,768,096 bytes plus .hdr and processing report. v179 curl/API check confirmed the JSON API endpoint is reachable while the ScienceBase HTML landing returned a Grails Runtime Exception HTTP 500.
scale: 0.5 m airborne river corridor image; 48 bands
feature_count: one CASI tile plus support files

name: DIRSIG-LWIR-HSI-SF6 Plume Simulated Hyperspectral Remote Sensing Dataset
provider: Los Alamos National Laboratory / Rochester Institute of Technology DIRSIG team
theme_canonical: Simulated LWIR hyperspectral gas-plume remote sensing
theme_raw: DIRSIG LWIR HSI SF6 plume NeRF benchmark
coverage: simulated facility scene with smokestack, infrastructure and SF6 gas plume
formats: ZIP; ENVI .img/.hdr hyperspectral images; truth ENVI files; JSON camera metadata; spectral reference text
access: direct download from Zenodo
notes: Zenodo v1.0.1 open dataset for hsi-nerfstudio/DIRSIG. Contains 231 DIRSIG-simulated LWIR hyperspectral images of an SF6 plume over a simplified facility scene, 128x128 pixels, 128 channels, 7-13 µm MAKO sensor model, associated geometry/plume truth data, camera metadata and spectral reference; data.zip is about 3.8 GB. Marked as simulated remote-sensing validation data, not field-acquired imagery. Consolidated in v262 with the older Zenodo record 18626748, which described the same 231-image DIRSIG LWIR HSI SF6 plume data and pointed to a newer-version notice.
desc_zh: DIRSIG-LWIR-HSI-SF6 Plume 是一个用于高光谱 NeRF、三维场景重建和气体羽流遥感仿真验证的开放数据集。数据由 DIRSIG 模拟生成，场景包含烟囱、建筑与基础设施，并设置 SF6 气体羽流；共 231 张 LWIR 高光谱图像，128×128 像素、128 个通道，光谱范围为 7-13 µm。数据以 ENVI .img/.hdr、真值文件、相机参数 JSON 和 SF6 光谱参考形式发布，需注意它是模拟数据而非实测机载或星载影像。
desc_en: DIRSIG-LWIR-HSI-SF6 Plume is an open simulated hyperspectral remote-sensing dataset for HSI NeRF, 3D reconstruction and gas-plume analysis. The DIRSIG-generated facility scene includes a smokestack, buildings, infrastructure and an SF6 plume, with 231 LWIR hyperspectral images at 128 by 128 pixels, 128 channels and a 7-13 µm MAKO sensor-model spectral range. Files include ENVI .img/.hdr image cubes, corresponding truth products, camera metadata JSON and an SF6 spectral reference. It is explicitly cataloged as simulated validation data rather than field-acquired airborne or satellite imagery.
openness: open under CC BY 4.0
source_type: simulated remote sensing hyperspectral imagery
evidence: Zenodo record 18626884 is an Open Dataset under CC BY 4.0. The record states the dataset contains DIRSIG-simulated LWIR hyperspectral imagery for a facility scene with an SF6 plume; specifications list 231 hyperspectral images, 128x128 pixels, 128 channels, 7-13 µm spectral range, geometry/plume truth data and camera metadata. File listing includes data.zip (3.8 GB) and examples, with ENVI .img/.hdr images and truth files described in the dataset contents. Earlier catalog row 220 at https://zenodo.org/records/18626748 had the same title stem, scene, 231 images, 128 channels, 7-13 µm, ENVI/truth/camera metadata and 3.8 GB data.zip; it was removed as superseded by 18626884.
scale: 231 simulated LWIR hyperspectral images, 128x128 pixels, 128 channels
feature_count: 231 images

name: European Temperate Hemiboreal and Boreal Forests Airborne Hyperspectral Dataset
provider: Aalto University / CzechGlobe FLIS / Fairdata IDA
theme_canonical: Airborne forest imaging spectroscopy and laser scanning
theme_raw: Spectral-structural European forest airborne data
coverage: 58 forest stands across Hyytiälä Finland, Järvselja Estonia, Lanžhot and Bílý Kříž Czech Republic
formats: Fairdata IDA repository files; airborne hyperspectral plot spectra / imagery products; airborne laser scanning products; article metadata
access: open repository landing page via Aalto/Fairdata DOI; Fairdata/Etsin download interface
doi_or_citation: 10.23729/c6da63dd-f527-4ec9-8401-57c14f77d19f; Hovi et al. (2024b), A spectral-structural characterization of European temperate, hemiboreal and boreal forests: Airborne data, Aalto University / Fairdata
notes: 2-hop from ESSD data description paper. The paper states airborne hyperspectral measurements were collected in July/September 2019 using CASI-1500 and SASI-600 push-broom sensors mounted on CzechGlobe FLIS Cessna C208B, with CASI covering 382-1052 nm and SASI covering 958-2443 nm. Data availability points to Fairdata IDA DOI 10.23729/c6da63dd-f527-4ec9-8401-57c14f77d19f for airborne data. Aalto portal lists the airborne dataset, Fairdata publisher, DOI, CC-BY-NC-4.0 license and related laboratory/field companion dataset.
desc_zh: European Temperate Hemiboreal and Boreal Forests Airborne Hyperspectral Dataset 是 ESSD 2024 数据论文配套的机载高光谱与激光扫描数据集，覆盖芬兰、爱沙尼亚和捷克的 58 个森林样地。论文说明机载高光谱数据由 CzechGlobe FLIS 平台搭载 CASI-1500 与 SASI-600 推扫式传感器采集，CASI 覆盖 382-1052 nm，SASI 覆盖 958-2443 nm，并与森林结构、地面/叶片光谱等数据共同用于森林辐射传输模型验证。数据通过 Fairdata IDA/Aalto DOI 发布，许可证为 CC BY-NC 4.0。
desc_en: The European Temperate, Hemiboreal and Boreal Forests airborne dataset accompanies a 2024 ESSD data paper on spectral-structural forest characterization across 58 stands in Finland, Estonia and the Czech Republic. The paper reports contemporaneous airborne hyperspectral and laser-scanning acquisition using CzechGlobe’s FLIS Cessna platform with CASI-1500 and SASI-600 push-broom sensors, covering 382-1052 nm and 958-2443 nm respectively. It is intended for forest radiative-transfer modeling, vegetation remote-sensing method development and validation. The airborne data are published through Fairdata IDA/Aalto with a DOI and CC BY-NC 4.0 license.
openness: open under CC BY-NC 4.0
source_type: airborne hyperspectral imagery and laser scanning dataset
evidence: ESSD article states data are available at Fairdata IDA and identifies Hovi et al. 2024b DOI 10.23729/c6da63dd-f527-4ec9-8401-57c14f77d19f for airborne data. The article specifies airborne hyperspectral measurements across all study sites using CASI-1500 and SASI-600 push-broom sensors on CzechGlobe FLIS, with CASI 382-1052 nm and SASI 958-2443 nm. Aalto research portal dataset page confirms the airborne dataset DOI, Fairdata publisher and CC-BY-NC-4.0 license.
scale: 58 forest stands; airborne CASI/SASI hyperspectral and ALS campaign data
feature_count: 58 forest stands / plot-centered airborne data products
file_size: not listed in checked HTML sources

name: Urbana Tallgrass Prairie UAS Hyperspectral Mosaic and Vegetation Classification Dataset
provider: PANGAEA / University of Illinois researchers
theme_canonical: UAS hyperspectral vegetation mapping
theme_raw: UAS multisensor input imagery and random forest classification products for tallgrass prairie
coverage: Weaver Park, Urbana, Illinois, United States
formats: PANGAEA tabular metadata with binary raster objects; WGS 1984 World Mercator mosaic raster files; hyperspectral product fused with LiDAR CHM; classification map products
access: open download from PANGAEA landing page
doi_or_citation: 10.1594/PANGAEA.967351; Hall, E. and Lara, M. J. (2024), UAS-multisensor input imagery and random forest classification products for mapping vegetation species at a tallgrass prairie in Urbana, IL, PANGAEA
notes: PANGAEA record provides UAS RGB, multispectral and hyperspectral mosaic raster files collected at Weaver Park, Urbana, IL. The hyperspectral image product is fused with a LiDAR-derived canopy height model; related products include multispectral phenology time-series, dGPS species data and seven random-forest vegetation maps. All files use WGS 1984 World Mercator.
desc_zh: Urbana Tallgrass Prairie UAS 数据集提供美国伊利诺伊州 Urbana Weaver Park 的无人机多传感器遥感产品，其中包括高光谱镶嵌栅格、RGB/多光谱产品、冠层高度模型融合产品以及植被分类图。PANGAEA 摘要说明高光谱产品与 LiDAR 派生的 CHM 融合，数据还包含用于随机森林分类训练/测试的 dGPS 植被物种点。该数据适合草地植被类型识别、UAS 高光谱分类和传感器融合方法评估。
desc_en: The Urbana Tallgrass Prairie UAS dataset provides multisensor drone imagery and vegetation classification products from Weaver Park in Urbana, Illinois. The PANGAEA record includes RGB, multispectral and hyperspectral mosaic raster files, with the hyperspectral product fused with a LiDAR-derived canopy height model. It also includes multispectral phenology products, dGPS vegetation species data and random-forest vegetation maps. The dataset supports UAS hyperspectral classification, grassland vegetation mapping and sensor-fusion studies.

It contains 1,350 labeled L2A surface-reflectance spectra from 450 to 2431 nm, distributed as an ENVI spectral library with a matching header and lookup-table CSV. It is cataloged as a hyperspectral remote-sensing-derived ground-truth library, not as the full APEX image cube.

desc_zh: GreenHyperSpectra 是面向全球植被性状预测的多源高光谱反射率数据集，发布在 Hugging Face。数据以 CSV/宽表形式提供，包含 unlabeled、labeled_all 和 labeled_splits 等配置，光谱范围为 400-2450 nm，共 1721 个有效波段，并带有部分植物性状标签。它聚合了真实世界跨传感器、跨生态系统的植被光谱样本，适合用于高光谱植被性状预测、自监督/半监督预训练和跨平台泛化研究。
desc_en: GreenHyperSpectra is a multi-source vegetation hyperspectral reflectance dataset published on Hugging Face for global plant-trait prediction. The dataset is distributed as wide CSV/tabular data with unlabeled, labeled_all and labeled_splits configurations, covering 400-2450 nm with 1,721 spectral bands and trait labels for the labeled subset. It aggregates real-world cross-sensor and cross-ecosystem vegetation spectra and supports self-supervised, semi-supervised and supervised trait-prediction research across remote-sensing platforms.

source_type: multi-source hyperspectral vegetation reflectance table/spectral library

feature_count: 152,827 spectral rows

desc_en: The Whitlingham Broad submerged tarpaulin dataset is an open UAV VNIR hyperspectral environmental remote-sensing dataset from Cefas, TEXO and Headwall. It was collected on 2021-08-19 over an artificial 10 by 10 m tarpaulin deployed in Whitlingham Broad, Norwich, UK, to study attenuation of plastic spectral signatures in freshwater. The record states that a Headwall visible-near infrared sensor covering 400-1000 nm was used. The dataset is relevant for freshwater plastic detection, shallow-water target analysis and hyperspectral water-correction studies.

desc_en: This USGS data release provides UAS hyperspectral orthorectified reflectance imagery from two dryland BLM AIM plots at the NEON Moab site, about 40 km south of Moab, Utah, acquired on 2023-05-03 and 2023-05-05. A Headwall Nano-Hyperspec line-scanning sensor flown on a DJI Matrice 600 Pro collected 274 VNIR bands spanning 398-1002 nm at centimeter-scale spatial resolution. The data are distributed as ENVI-compatible BSQ floating-point images with .hdr headers and support dryland vegetation, soil, carbon-sequestration and multi-scale remote-sensing validation studies.

source_type: observed UAS hyperspectral image archive
evidence: USGS Science Data Catalog states this portion of the release presents hyperspectral data products from low-altitude UAS flights at two dryland sites, using a Headwall Nano-Hyperspec line-scanning sensor, with 274 bands spanning 398-1002 nm; it lists DOI 10.5066/P9MMCJET, public access and public-domain license.
scale: UAS site survey
feature_count: 30 hyperspectral images at site 1 and 33 hyperspectral images at site 7, each with headers
file_size: not summarized; see USGS / ScienceBase release files

desc_zh: 该 USGS 数据发布提供 2018 年 11 月在加利福尼亚 American River Nimbus Dam 下游采集的 UAS 高光谱与 RGB 影像，用于鲑鱼产卵地（redd）遥感制图。高光谱数据由 Headwall Nano-Hyperspec 系统采集，空间分辨率约 0.15 m，包含 252 个 398-956 nm VNIR 波段，反射率影像以 ENVI 兼容 BSQ 浮点格式和头文件提供。数据适合河流栖息地、浅水遥感、水深/底质和生态目标检测方法研究。
desc_en: This USGS data release provides UAS hyperspectral and RGB imagery acquired over the American River below Nimbus Dam, California, from 2018-11-05 to 2018-11-07 to support remote mapping of salmon spawning locations, or redds. The hyperspectral data were collected with a Headwall Nano-Hyperspec imaging system from a DJI Matrice M600 UAS, with about 0.15 m spatial resolution and 252 VNIR bands from 398 to 956 nm. Reflectance image data are distributed in ENVI-compatible BSQ format with an associated header and support river habitat mapping, shallow-water remote sensing, substrate/depth analysis and ecological target detection.

scale: UAS river reach survey
feature_count: one georeferenced/masked hyperspectral ortho-mosaic plus RGB/supporting field datasets under the parent release

desc_zh: 该 USGS 数据发布包含 2012 年 11 月和 2016 年 8 月在 Nebraska Niobrara River 获取的 CASI 1500H 机载高光谱影像。数据覆盖可见光到近红外波段，空间分辨率约 0.5-0.6 m，经过辐射校正，面向河流水深反演和移动沙床地貌追踪。它补充了 Upper Sacramento、Kootenai、American River 和 Missouri River 等 USGS 河流高光谱系列。
desc_en: This USGS data release provides CASI 1500H airborne hyperspectral imagery acquired over the Niobrara River, Nebraska, in November 2012 and August 2016. The imagery spans visible to near-infrared wavelengths, has about 0.5-0.6 m spatial resolution, and is radiometrically corrected for river bathymetry and mobile-bedform remote-sensing studies. It complements the cataloged USGS Upper Sacramento, Kootenai, American River and Missouri River hyperspectral river datasets.

desc_zh: 该 GFZ Data Services 数据集记录了 2020 年 8 月 8 日 MOSES 热浪观测活动期间，在德国中部 Bode 流域 Oschersleben 试验区获取的航空高光谱影像。数据包括 Neo HySpex VNIR-SWIR 正射反射率镶嵌、Telops Hyper-Cam LWIR 地表温度/发射率产品，以及用 EnMAP 端到端仿真工具生成的 EnMAP L2A 类反射率影像。页面提供 DOI、CC BY 4.0 许可证和直接下载入口，适合热浪、干旱、生态梯度和高光谱传感器互校研究。
desc_en: This GFZ Data Services dataset contains airborne hyperspectral imagery acquired on 8 August 2020 during the MOSES heatwave campaign over the Oschersleben test area in the Bode catchment, Central Germany. It includes a Neo HySpex VNIR-SWIR orthorectified reflectance mosaic, Telops Hyper-Cam LWIR land-surface temperature/emissivity products, and simulated EnMAP L2A-like reflectance imagery. The landing page provides a DOI, CC BY 4.0 license and direct download endpoint, making it useful for heatwave, drought, ecological-transect and hyperspectral sensor intercalibration studies.

desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 数据集是 HyperGas 1.0 论文和 HyperGas-GMD 工作流的核心配套数据，面向高光谱温室气体羽流反演与排放率估计。数据包包含甲烷案例的 L2/L3 NetCDF 与 CSV、二氧化碳 matched filter / lognormal matched filter L3 产品、风速校准 CSV，以及 EPA 电厂和 Stanford controlled-release 相关排放估计表。它不是原始 L1 影像档案，而是基于 PRISMA、EnMAP、EMIT 等高光谱传感器工作流产生的开放派生产品，适合复现实验、算法对比和温室气体高光谱应用研究。
desc_en: This Zenodo dataset provides the core supporting data for the HyperGas 1.0 paper and HyperGas-GMD workflow, focused on hyperspectral greenhouse-gas plume retrieval and emission-rate estimation. The package contains methane Level 2/3 NetCDF and CSV cases, carbon-dioxide Level 3 products for matched-filter and lognormal matched-filter workflows, wind-calibration CSVs, EPA power-plant emissions tables, and Stanford controlled-release estimates. It is not a raw Level 1 image archive; it is an open derived-product dataset built around PRISMA, EnMAP, EMIT and related hyperspectral gas-retrieval workflows.

desc_zh: MethaneSET 是一个面向卫星甲烷羽流检测的统一多传感器数据集，其中高光谱部分包含 EMIT 成像光谱仪的 calibrated radiance cubes 和预计算 matched-filter 产品，并配套专家核验的羽流分割掩膜。数据按 TACO 规范组织，使用 Parquet catalog、Cloud-Optimized GeoTIFF 和 tacozip 等形式发布，另含 Sentinel-2、Landsat-8/9 多光谱伴随数据和超过百万个 WRF-LES 合成羽流样本。它适合训练/评估高光谱甲烷检测、端到端影像模型和 retrieval-based 检测流程，但许可证为 CC BY-NC-SA 4.0，使用时需注意非商业和相同方式共享限制。
desc_en: MethaneSET is a unified multi-sensor dataset for satellite methane plume detection. Its hyperspectral component provides EMIT imaging-spectrometer calibrated radiance cubes and precomputed matched-filter products with expert-verified plume segmentation masks, alongside Sentinel-2 and Landsat-8/9 companion datasets. The repository follows the TACO specification and distributes Parquet catalogs, Cloud-Optimized GeoTIFFs and tacozip plume-bank archives, including a large WRF-LES synthetic plume bank. It is suitable for hyperspectral methane detection, end-to-end image models and retrieval-based workflows, with CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 licensing.

desc_zh: UAV-HSI-Crop 是 ScienceDB 发布的农作物无人机高光谱遥感数据集，研究区位于河北省深州市马家口村和西景明村地块。数据于 2019 年 9 月 18 日由电动六旋翼无人机搭载 Resonon Pika L 高光谱成像仪采集，光谱范围 385-1024 nm，共 200 个波段，飞行高度 100 m，空间分辨率约 0.1 m。处理后的影像被裁剪为 96×96×200 的 NumPy patch，并按 8:2 划分训练/测试集。
desc_en: UAV-HSI-Crop is a Science Data Bank crop-classification dataset derived from UAV hyperspectral imagery over plots in Shenzhou City, Hebei Province, China. The data were acquired on 18 September 2019 by an electric hexacopter carrying a Resonon Pika L hyperspectral imager with 385-1024 nm coverage and 200 bands, flown at 100 m for about 0.1 m spatial resolution. The imagery was calibrated, corrected, mosaicked and atmospherically corrected, then cropped into 96x96x200 NumPy patches with an 8:2 train/test split.

desc_en: HWHYPCCMN1MM is a NASA LP DAAC hyperspectral reflectance collection for the Cedar Creek LTER BioDIV experiment in Minnesota. A Headwall Series E imaging spectrometer mounted on a tram system acquired field image cubes from about 3 m above the ground, producing 1 mm ground pixels over the 400-1000 nm spectral range with roughly 920-924 bands. It is separate from the existing 300 mm airborne Cedar Creek mosaic and is useful for fine-scale optical diversity, biodiversity, and plot-scale spatial sensitivity studies.

desc_en: This EcoSIS package contains floating-matter reflectance spectra derived from HICO hyperspectral observations on the International Space Station. The ESSD data paper reports that 9,411 HICO scenes were inspected and that nearest-neighbor atmospheric correction plus spectral unmixing were used to derive 400-800 nm hyperspectral reflectance spectra for floating matters in oceans and lakes. It is a derived spectral library rather than a full image-cube archive, useful for ocean-color and future PACE/SBG algorithm development.

theme_canonical: AVIRIS-NG and UAVSAR derived forest aboveground biomass maps
theme_raw: Delta-X AVIRIS-NG and UAVSAR L3 Derived Forest Aboveground Biomass, MRD, LA
coverage: Atchafalaya and Terrebonne Basins, Mississippi River Delta, Louisiana, USA; N 29.7069, S 28.9907, E -90.3607, W -91.5934
license: NASA/ORNL DAAC open data; Earthdata/ORNL access terms
formats: Cloud optimized GeoTIFF biomass maps and supporting metadata
access: NASA Earthdata / ORNL DAAC landing page and data access
doi_or_citation: 10.3334/ORNLDAAC/2410; Jensen et al. 2025, Delta-X AVIRIS-NG and UAVSAR L3 Derived Forest Aboveground Biomass, MRD, LA, Version 1
time_span: 2021-09-23 to 2021-09-24 remote sensing products; in situ forest AGB plots from Summer 2015 and Fall 2021 used in modeling
notes: This dataset provides forest aboveground biomass estimates across Delta-X Mississippi River Delta study basins. AGB was derived from AVIRIS-NG surface reflectance and UAVSAR products using coincident in situ forest AGB plot data, local pixel reflectance spectra, and radar scattering components to train and scale a machine-learning regression model; outputs are cloud optimized GeoTIFFs.
desc_zh: 该 ORNL DAAC 数据集提供 Louisiana Mississippi River Delta 中 Atchafalaya 和 Terrebonne 流域的森林地上生物量估计图。产品由 AVIRIS-NG 表面反射率和 UAVSAR 雷达散射分量共同建模得到，并使用 2015 与 2021 年实地森林 AGB 样地数据训练机器学习回归模型。数据以云优化 GeoTIFF 形式发布，是 AVIRIS-NG 高光谱在湿地森林生物量制图中的派生产品。
desc_en: This ORNL DAAC dataset provides forest aboveground biomass estimates for the Atchafalaya and Terrebonne basins in the Mississippi River Delta, Louisiana. The product combines AVIRIS-NG surface reflectance, UAVSAR radar scattering components, and in situ forest AGB plots from 2015 and 2021 in a machine-learning regression workflow. Outputs are distributed as cloud optimized GeoTIFFs and represent a derived AVIRIS-NG hyperspectral ecology product.
openness: Public NASA Earthdata/ORNL DAAC catalog with DOI and downloadable COG products
source_type: AVIRIS-NG-derived biomass raster product with UAVSAR fusion
evidence: Phase231 search result and Earthdata catalog snippet: DOI 10.3334/ORNLDAAC/2410, AVIRIS-NG+UAVSAR L3 forest AGB, COG format, 2021-09-23 to 2021-09-24; local v224 duplicate search found no forest AGB row; lychee phase231 succeeded.
scale: Atchafalaya and Terrebonne basins; COG biomass maps; 2021 Delta-X deployment
feature_count: Forest AGB map product for two Delta-X basins

name: NEON AOP Field Spectral Data Leaf Reflectance and Transmittance Dataset
provider: NSF NEON / Airborne Observation Platform support measurements
theme_canonical: NEON field hyperspectral spectra supporting airborne remote sensing
theme_raw: DP1.30012.001 Field spectral data
coverage: NEON terrestrial sites with field spectra collected within about two weeks of AOP overpasses
formats: NEON tabular field spectral reflectance/transmittance data and metadata; downloadable via NEON data portal/API
access: Open NEON data product page and API/download workflow
doi_or_citation: NEON Data Product DP1.30012.001, Field spectral data
time_span: Ongoing NEON campaigns; field spectral campaigns coordinated with AOP overflights
notes: This is not an airborne image raster. NEON describes DP1.30012.001 as field-spectrometer and leaf-clip measurements of leaf-level reflectance and transmittance, collected in conjunction with NEON AOP overflights and often linked with foliar physical and chemical properties. It is cataloged as a hyperspectral support spectral library for airborne remote-sensing calibration, validation and scaling workflows.
desc_zh: NEON Field Spectral Data 是与 NEON AOP 机载观测协同采集的野外光谱数据产品，使用野外光谱仪和叶夹测量叶片反射率与透射率。它不是机载影像栅格，而是用于连接地面叶片光谱、植被性状和 AOP 高光谱影像的支撑光谱库。该数据对高光谱遥感定标、验证、端元分析和尺度转换很有价值。
desc_en: NEON Field Spectral Data are field-spectrometer and leaf-clip measurements of leaf-level reflectance and transmittance collected in coordination with NEON AOP overflights. This is not an airborne image raster; it is a support spectral library that links ground leaf spectra, foliar traits, and AOP hyperspectral imagery. It is valuable for calibration, validation, endmember analysis, and scaling workflows in hyperspectral remote sensing.
openness: Open NEON data product with portal/API access
source_type: Field hyperspectral support spectra for airborne remote sensing
evidence: NEON data product page and user-guide snippets: DP1.30012.001 field spectral data, leaf-level reflectance/transmittance, collected with field spectrometer and coordinated with AOP overpasses; local v224 duplicate search found no DP1.30012.001/Field Spectral Data row; lychee phase231 succeeded.
scale: NEON terrestrial field spectral campaigns coordinated with AOP; leaf-level reflectance and transmittance spectra
feature_count: Open NEON field spectra product; sample count varies by site/date

name: Trento Hyperspectral and LiDAR Multimodal Benchmark Dataset
provider: University of Trento / public third-party GitHub mirror tyust-dayu/Trento
theme_canonical: Multimodal hyperspectral and LiDAR benchmark
theme_raw: Trento HSI-LiDAR rural/urban classification benchmark
coverage: South of Trento, Trentino, Italy
license: No license declared on the public GitHub mirror; original dataset commonly credited to Lorenzo Bruzzone / University of Trento and should be treated as research-use with citation and permission ambiguity
formats: MATLAB .mat files: Italy_hsi.mat, Italy_lidar.mat, allgrd.mat
access: public GitHub mirror direct raw-file download; original official distribution not identified in this pass
doi_or_citation: Commonly cited in HSI-LiDAR fusion literature; no DOI found for the public mirror
time_span: not stated on mirror; literature describes acquisition over Trento, Italy for HSI-LiDAR fusion/classification experiments
notes: Added from benchmark/competition gap-fill pass. The repository is public and contains Italy_hsi.mat, Italy_lidar.mat, allgrd.mat and a short README. Secondary sources and rs-fusion-datasets list it as Trento HSI+LiDAR data; papers commonly describe a southern Trento scene with hyperspectral imagery and a LiDAR DSM. Because the mirror has no license and is not clearly the official source, access/openness are deliberately conservative.
desc_zh: Trento 高光谱与 LiDAR 数据集是遥感多模态融合文献中常用的 HSI-LiDAR 分类基准，覆盖意大利 Trento 南部区域。公开 GitHub 镜像提供 `Italy_hsi.mat`、`Italy_lidar.mat` 和 `allgrd.mat`，可用于高光谱影像与 LiDAR DSM/高程信息联合分类、特征融合和跨模态网络评测。该镜像未声明许可证，且原始官方发布源在本轮未确认，因此应按研究使用、引用/授权不明确的数据处理。
desc_en: The Trento hyperspectral and LiDAR dataset is a commonly used HSI-LiDAR classification benchmark in multimodal remote-sensing fusion studies over an area south of Trento, Italy. A public GitHub mirror provides `Italy_hsi.mat`, `Italy_lidar.mat`, and `allgrd.mat`, supporting experiments on joint classification, feature fusion, and cross-modal models using hyperspectral imagery and LiDAR-derived elevation information. The mirror declares no license and the original official distribution was not confirmed in this pass, so reuse should be treated conservatively as research use with citation and permission ambiguity.
openness: public GitHub repository; no explicit license; original provider/permission chain unclear
source_type: observed airborne/remote-sensing multimodal benchmark, public mirror
evidence: GitHub repository tyust-dayu/Trento is public, describes itself as the public Hyperspectral Image and LiDAR Data in Trento dataset, and contains Italy_hsi.mat (12,021,358 bytes), Italy_lidar.mat (404,109 bytes), README.md and allgrd.mat. The rs-fusion-datasets project lists Trento as an HSI+LiDAR dataset with fetch_trento, and multiple papers cite the Trento HSI-LiDAR benchmark as provided by University of Trento/Bruzzone or related researchers.
scale: repository size about 12 MB; HSI and LiDAR .mat benchmark scene; literature often reports 48-band or similar HSI-LiDAR classification variants, but mirror README does not state sensor details
feature_count: ground/class data included as allgrd.mat; exact class count not stated on mirror
file_size: GitHub API contents total about 12.43 MB: Italy_hsi.mat 12.02 MB, Italy_lidar.mat 0.40 MB, allgrd.mat 3.2 KB

name: 3D3 Benchmark Dataset Multi-Sensor Forest Inventory Hyperspectral LiDAR RGB
provider: 3DOM-FBK / Bruno Kessler Foundation
theme_canonical: Forestry hyperspectral, LiDAR, RGB benchmark
theme_raw: 3D3 Benchmark Dataset / Dataset B hyperspectral forest inventory
coverage: Diverse European forest types; Dataset B dense continental forest area of interest about 1680 m x 1550 m
formats: SharePoint dataset folders; hyperspectral data, LiDAR point clouds, orthophoto RGB, tree segmentation/species labels; README lists Dataset B hyperspectral package
access: GitHub landing page public; all-data SharePoint folder listed, but lychee/curl-style check receives 403 after redirect; likely browser or Microsoft/SharePoint mediated access
doi_or_citation: Bocaux, L.; Takhtkeshha, N.; Ma, Z.; Remondino, F. (2025), A multi-sensor multi-resolution dataset to support forest inventory methods, Int. Arch. Photogramm. Remote Sens. Spatial Inf. Sci. XLVIII-1/W6-2025, 33-40
time_span: released with Geobench 2025 paper; acquisition dates not summarized in README excerpt
notes: Added from 2-hop Trento/FBK forest-inventory chain. README states all data are available via a SharePoint folder at about 20 GB and that 3D3 integrates airborne/helicopter/UAV/mobile/terrestrial LiDAR with hyperspectral and RGB data across European forest types. Dataset B includes SPECIM AISAFENIX hyperspectral imagery from 381.35 to 2502.38 nm, 364 bands, 60 cm resolution, with LiDAR, OrthoRGB, individual tree segmentation and 5-class species ground truth. The SharePoint folder returned 403 to lychee after redirect, so direct automated access is not considered verified.
desc_zh: 3D3 Benchmark Dataset 是 FBK/3DOM 发布的多传感器森林清查基准，服务于高分辨率 3D 林业方法评测。README 明确说明数据融合了机载、直升机、无人机、车载和地面 LiDAR，并包含高光谱与 RGB 数据，覆盖欧洲多种森林类型；其中 Dataset B 提供 SPECIM AISAFENIX 高光谱数据，381.35-2502.38 nm、364 个波段、约 60 cm 分辨率，并配套 LiDAR、正射 RGB、单木分割和 5 类树种标签。GitHub 入口公开且许可证为 CC BY-NC-SA 4.0，但全量 SharePoint 数据链接在 lychee 自动核实时返回 403，因此应标记为公开说明页可达、数据下载需浏览器/SharePoint 访问复核。
desc_en: The 3D3 Benchmark Dataset from FBK/3DOM is a multi-sensor forest-inventory benchmark for evaluating high-resolution 3D forestry methods. Its README states that it integrates airborne, helicopter, UAV, mobile and terrestrial LiDAR with hyperspectral and RGB data across diverse European forest types; Dataset B includes SPECIM AISAFENIX hyperspectral imagery from 381.35 to 2502.38 nm with 364 bands at about 60 cm resolution, alongside LiDAR, OrthoRGB, individual-tree segmentation and five-class species labels. The GitHub landing page is public and the data are licensed CC BY-NC-SA 4.0, but the listed SharePoint all-data folder returned 403 to lychee after redirect, so practical file access should be rechecked in a browser or SharePoint session.
openness: public GitHub documentation and CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 license; data link listed on SharePoint but automated URL verification receives 403
source_type: observed multi-sensor forestry benchmark with hyperspectral component
evidence: README saved as 3d3_readme_phase233.md states the 2025 ISPRS Archives citation, all data available via SharePoint at ca 20.0 GB, integration of airborne/helicopter/UAV/mobile/terrestrial LiDAR with hyperspectral and RGB data, Dataset B SPECIM AISAFENIX hyperspectral camera range 381.35-2502.38 nm, 364 bands, 60 cm resolution, and CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 license.
scale: all data ca 20 GB; Dataset B AOI 1680 m x 1550 m; hyperspectral 4.90 GB, 364 bands, 60 cm; LiDAR 662 MB; OrthoRGB 738 MB
feature_count: Dataset B includes ITS labels and 5 species classes; broader 3D3 includes ITS, FSS, species and tree-parameter ground truth depending on sub-dataset
file_size: all data ca 20.0 GB; Dataset B hyperspectral 4.90 GB listed in README

name: HyperPanCollection Hyperspectral Pansharpening Benchmark Dataset Collection
provider: Liang-Jian Deng / Yu-Wei Zhuo / Hyper-DSNet authors
theme_canonical: Derived hyperspectral pansharpening benchmark collection
theme_raw: HyperPanCollection for hyperspectral pansharpening
coverage: Washington DC Mall, Pavia Center, Botswana, and FR1 full-resolution hyperspectral pansharpening scene
license: GitHub repository license GPL-3.0; underlying data reuse terms should follow original source datasets and linked challenge/data packages
formats: Google Drive and Baidu Cloud prepared training/testing packages for hyperspectral pansharpening; reduced-resolution and full-resolution datasets
access: public GitHub landing page with Google Drive and Baidu Cloud download links; OpenRemoteSensing page for FR1
doi_or_citation: Zhuo et al. 2022 IEEE JSTARS, DOI 10.1109/JSTARS.2022.3202866; FR1 citation Vivone et al. 2022/2023 IEEE JSTARS, DOI 10.1109/JSTARS.2022.3220974
time_span: repository created 2022; paper published 2022; source scenes include established classic hyperspectral datasets
notes: Added from PAirMax / hyperspectral pansharpening 2-hop pass. README states the collection provides complete training and testing data for Washington DC Mall, Pavia Center and Botswana reduced-resolution datasets, plus FR1 full-resolution data linked to the OpenRemoteSensing hyperspectral pansharpening challenge. This is a prepared ML benchmark collection derived from classic datasets and challenge data, not a new airborne/satellite acquisition.
desc_zh: HyperPanCollection 是面向高光谱 pansharpening / 高光谱-全色融合的派生基准数据集合，由 Hyper-DSNet 相关作者维护。README 提供 Google Drive 与百度云下载，包含 Washington DC Mall、Pavia Center、Botswana 三个降分辨率训练/测试数据包，以及 FR1 全分辨率数据包；对应大小分别约 6.27 GB、11.34 GB、8.28 GB 和 3.08 GB。它适合深度学习高光谱 pansharpening 的公平训练和测试，但应理解为基于经典高光谱场景与挑战数据整理出的派生 ML 数据包，复用时需同时关注原始数据和挑战数据的许可/引用要求。
desc_en: HyperPanCollection is a derived benchmark collection for hyperspectral pansharpening and hyperspectral-panchromatic image fusion, maintained by the Hyper-DSNet authors. Its README provides Google Drive and Baidu Cloud downloads for reduced-resolution Washington DC Mall, Pavia Center and Botswana training/testing packages, plus a full-resolution FR1 package, with listed sizes of about 6.27 GB, 11.34 GB, 8.28 GB and 3.08 GB. It is useful for fair deep-learning experiments in hyperspectral pansharpening, but it should be treated as a prepared ML benchmark derived from classic hyperspectral scenes and challenge data, with reuse subject to the original datasets and cited challenge/data-package terms.
openness: public GitHub page and public Drive/Baidu links; repository GPL-3.0 applies to repo code/documentation, while underlying data terms require source-aware citation and license review
source_type: derived machine-learning benchmark collection for hyperspectral pansharpening
evidence: GitHub API reports public repository liangjiandeng/HyperPanCollection with description Datasets for Hyperspectral Pansharpening and GPL-3.0 license. README lists reduced-resolution Washington DC Mall 6.27G, Pavia Center 11.34G and Botswana 8.28G complete training/testing downloads, FR1 3.08G full-resolution download, Google Drive/Baidu links, and citations to Zhuo et al. 2022 JSTARS and Vivone et al. WHISPERS/PRISMA challenge paper.
scale: four prepared hyperspectral pansharpening packages; listed total about 28.97 GB across Washington DC Mall, Pavia Center, Botswana and FR1
feature_count: hyperspectral and panchromatic/MS-style pansharpening training/testing pairs; exact patch counts not stated in README
file_size: Washington DC Mall 6.27G; Pavia Center 11.34G; Botswana 8.28G; FR1 3.08G

name: Real Ziyuan-1 02D HSI-MSI-PAN Image Dataset
provider: rs-lsl / Shuangliang Li / CSSNet project
theme_canonical: Real satellite hyperspectral multispectral panchromatic fusion benchmark
theme_raw: Real HSI-MSI-PAN image dataset from Ziyuan 1-02D
coverage: Ziyuan-1 02D satellite scenes; geographic scene locations not stated in README
license: No explicit license declared in CSSNet GitHub repository or README; Kaggle/AI Studio terms and citation requirements should be checked before redistribution
formats: real registered HSI, MSI and PAN images; dataset downloads via Baidu AI Studio, Baidu Netdisk, Kaggle and Google Drive; Python loading/cropping scripts in CSSNet
access: public GitHub documentation and multiple public dataset links: AI Studio, Baidu Netdisk, Kaggle, Google Drive
doi_or_citation: Hyperspectral Image Super-Resolution Network Based on Cross-Scale Nonlocal Attention, IEEE TGRS; CSSNet README requests citation; exact DOI not captured in this pass
time_span: README updates in 2023-08 and 2024-06-28; Ziyuan-1 02D scenes acquisition date not stated
notes: Added from hyperspectral fusion 3-hop pass after HyperPanCollection/FR1. CSSNet README states that on 2024-06-28 the authors open-sourced real Ziyuan hyperspectral datasets including HSI/MSI/PAN images for hyperspectral image fusion, freely downloadable from Baidu AI Studio dataset 281612, Baidu Netdisk, and Kaggle. It also notes earlier 2023 HSI/PAN and HSI/MSI Ziyuan-1 02D datasets, spatial registration, and code for loading/cropping. This is a real satellite fusion benchmark, not simulated downsampling only.
desc_zh: Real Ziyuan-1 02D HSI-MSI-PAN Image Dataset 是 CSSNet 项目在 2024 年公开的真实卫星高光谱/多光谱/全色融合数据。项目 README 明确说明数据由资源一号 02D 卫星获取，包含已空间配准的 HSI、MSI 和 PAN 图像，并提供 AI Studio、百度网盘、Kaggle 等下载入口以及 Python 读取和裁剪代码。它补充了许多只靠降采样模拟的高光谱融合基准，适合真实 HSI-MSI-PAN 超分辨率、融合和跨尺度网络评测；但仓库未声明明确数据许可证，复用和再分发需要按 AI Studio/Kaggle/作者引用要求谨慎处理。
desc_en: The Real Ziyuan-1 02D HSI-MSI-PAN Image Dataset is a real satellite hyperspectral, multispectral and panchromatic fusion benchmark released through the CSSNet project in 2024. The README states that the data were acquired by the Ziyuan 1-02D satellite, include spatially registered HSI, MSI and PAN images, and are freely downloadable through Baidu AI Studio, Baidu Netdisk and Kaggle, with Python scripts for loading and cropping. It complements hyperspectral fusion benchmarks based only on simulated downsampling and is useful for real HSI-MSI-PAN super-resolution, fusion and cross-scale model evaluation; however, no explicit data license is declared in the repository, so reuse and redistribution should follow the linked platform terms and author citation requirements.
openness: public project and public dataset links; no explicit data license in GitHub README; platform terms apply
source_type: observed satellite hyperspectral/multispectral/panchromatic fusion benchmark
evidence: CSSNet README states the code is for Hyperspectral Image Super-Resolution Network Based on Cross-Scale Nonlocal Attention and says the authors open-sourced real Ziyuan hyperspectral datasets including HSI/MSI/PAN images on 2024-06-28. It lists AI Studio dataset 281612, Baidu Netdisk with password abcd, Kaggle dataset shuangliangli123/real-hsimsipan-image-dataset, notes acquisition from Ziyuan 1-02D and spatial registration, and gives band indices used for RGB visualization from HSI/MSI.
scale: real HSI/MSI/PAN dataset; exact file size and scene dimensions not stated in README excerpt
feature_count: registered hyperspectral, multispectral and panchromatic image arrays; crop generation examples for model training/testing
file_size: not stated in CSSNet README; linked platform pages should be checked for exact size

name: SPOD Hyperspectral Multi-Class Point Object Detection Benchmark Dataset
provider: SpecDETR / HODToolbox authors
theme_canonical: Hyperspectral tiny/point object detection benchmark
theme_raw: SPOD / hyperSpectral Point Object Detection benchmark
coverage: simulated hyperspectral point-object detection benchmark based on public HTD-style data; geographic scene lineage not fully specified in README
license: No explicit dataset license found in SpecDETR/HODToolbox README; reuse should follow project citation and cloud-download terms
formats: SPOD_150b_8c and SPOD_30b_8c zip packages; .npy hyperspectral cubes, COCO-style JSON annotations, .mat masks and target spectral library, PNG color previews
access: public GitHub landing pages; SPOD packages linked through Baidu Drive and OneDrive; Baidu link verified by lychee, OneDrive returns 403 to automated check after redirect
doi_or_citation: SpecDETR: A transformer-based hyperspectral point object detection network, ISPRS Journal of Photogrammetry and Remote Sensing, 2025; arXiv:2405.10148
time_span: SpecDETR accepted 2025; README update 2025-06-29 open-sourced simulated training sets and HODToolbox companion data
notes: Added from target/object detection benchmark pass. SpecDETR README describes SPOD as a simulated hyperSpectral Point Object Detection benchmark and the first multi-class hyperspectral tiny object detection benchmark dataset. HODToolbox README provides stronger dataset details: SPOD has 150 spectral channels, a 30-band benchmark version, 8 object categories, mostly mixed/subpixel targets, COCO annotations, .npy image data and .mat masks/target spectral libraries. Converted Avon, SanDiego and MUUFLGulfport HOD datasets are related derivatives; they are not split into separate catalog rows because Avon/SanDiego/MUUFLGulfport source datasets are already represented elsewhere or are derivatives.
desc_zh: SPOD 是 SpecDETR/HODToolbox 项目发布的高光谱多类别点目标/亚像元小目标检测基准。项目说明称其为首个 hyperspectral multi-class point/sub-pixel/tiny object detection dataset，包含 8 类目标，原始数据为 150 个光谱通道，并提供用于实验的 30-band benchmark 版本；数据结构包括 `.npy` 高光谱图像、COCO 风格 JSON 标注、`.mat` 像素级 mask/丰度/目标光谱库以及彩色预览图。该数据适合从传统像素级高光谱目标检测转向对象级/点目标检测的模型评测；但它是模拟/派生 benchmark，许可证未在 README 明确声明，OneDrive 自动核验返回 403，百度盘入口可达。
desc_en: SPOD is a hyperspectral multi-class point/sub-pixel/tiny object detection benchmark released with SpecDETR and HODToolbox. The project describes it as the first hyperspectral multi-class point/sub-pixel/tiny object detection dataset, with eight object categories, original 150-channel hyperspectral data and a 30-band benchmark version used for experiments. The dataset structure includes `.npy` hyperspectral images, COCO-style JSON annotations, `.mat` pixel-level masks/abundance/target spectral libraries and color previews. It is useful for evaluating the shift from pixel-level hyperspectral target detection to object-level or point-object detection, but it should be treated as a simulated/derived benchmark; no explicit dataset license is declared, the OneDrive link returns 403 to automated checks, and the Baidu Drive entry is reachable.
openness: public GitHub documentation and public Baidu/OneDrive download links; no explicit dataset license; OneDrive requires browser/auth-like access for automated clients
source_type: simulated/derived hyperspectral object detection benchmark
evidence: SpecDETR README states the authors developed the first multi-class hyperspectral tiny object detection benchmark dataset SPOD and provide SPOD_30b_8c.zip via Baidu Drive/OneDrive. HODToolbox README states SPOD contains 8 object categories, original 150 spectral channels, a 30-band experiment version, .npy image data, COCO JSON annotations, .mat masks and target.mat spectral library. Lychee v231 checked GitHub SpecDETR, GitHub HODToolbox and Baidu Drive successfully; the OneDrive SPOD_30b_8c link redirected then returned 403.
scale: SPOD_150b_8c original 150-band dataset; SPOD_30b_8c benchmark evaluation dataset; converted Avon/SanDiego/MUUFLGulfport HOD derivatives also listed by HODToolbox
feature_count: 8 object categories; COCO-style train/test JSON annotations; subpixel/mixed-pixel target masks and target spectral library
file_size: not stated in README; SPOD_30b_8c.zip and SPOD_150b_8c.zip are linked through Baidu/OneDrive

name: Hyperspectral UAV Imagery of Agricultural Fields Central Macedonia Greece
provider: Haris Ampas / Zenodo
theme_canonical: UAV agricultural field reflectance orthomaps
theme_raw: Hyperspectral UAV imagery of Agricultural Fields
coverage: Agricultural fields in Central Macedonia, Greece; fields include Rodia, Elies, Dekari, Kliros, Redestos, Mouchis and Apothiki
formats: georeferenced GeoTIFF corrected reflectance orthomaps and RGB reference orthomaps
access: Zenodo direct download
notes: Boundary-aware addition from 2026 Zenodo UAV HSI scan. Zenodo title says hyperspectral UAV imagery, but the distributed products are six-band corrected reflectance orthomaps centered at 660, 730, 880, 900, 1100 and 1150 nm, plus RGB orthomaps for Elies and Rodia. Products were white-panel calibrated and adjusted with field Spectral Evolution PSR+3500 measurements through per-band multiplicative gain correction.
desc_zh: 该数据集发布了 2026 年 2 月在希腊 Central Macedonia 农田上空采集的无人机反射率正射图。Zenodo 记录说明数据为地理配准 GeoTIFF，包含 660、730、880、900、1100 和 1150 nm 六个波段，经过白板校准并利用 Spectral Evolution PSR+3500 野外光谱仪观测进行逐波段增益校正，同时包含 Elies 和 Rodia 两块地的 RGB 正射图作可视参考。由于分发产品只有 6 个波段，应作为“小波段 UAV 高光谱/窄带反射率邻近数据”保守标记，而不是完整连续光谱影像立方体。
desc_en: This Zenodo dataset provides UAV-derived corrected reflectance orthomaps acquired over agricultural fields in Central Macedonia, Greece in February 2026. The products are georeferenced GeoTIFF files with six bands centered at 660, 730, 880, 900, 1100 and 1150 nm, initially white-panel calibrated and then adjusted using Spectral Evolution PSR+3500 field spectroradiometer measurements through per-band multiplicative gain correction; RGB orthomaps are included for Elies and Rodia as visual references. Because the distributed products contain six selected bands rather than a continuous hyperspectral cube, the row is marked conservatively as a narrow-band UAV hyperspectral-adjacent reflectance dataset.
openness: open Zenodo dataset under CC BY 4.0
source_type: observed UAV narrow-band/hyperspectral-adjacent agricultural reflectance orthomap dataset
evidence: Zenodo API for record 20594065 reports title Hyperspectral UAV imagery of Agricultural Fields, DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20594065, publication date 2026-06-08, open access, CC-BY-4.0 license, nine files totaling 1,451,661,233 bytes. name: SensOFOREST Leaf Biochemical Spectral and UAV HySpex Dataset
provider: SensOFOREST / FORWARDS network / Zenodo

notes: Added with explicit availability caveat. Zenodo description says the dataset includes airborne hyperspectral and thermal data plus leaf biochemical/spectral measurements. The UAV hyperspectral README gives detailed HySpex Mjolnir VS-620 metadata: 13 pushbroom overpasses, 487 bands, 0.06 m pixel size, 410.55-2500.94 nm, empirical-line surface reflectance, west healthy and east declining holm oak areas. However, the Zenodo API file manifest exposed in phase239 lists README_uav_hyperspectral.md, leaf CSV/readme, tree geojson, TIR_images.zip and thermal README, not the .bsq/.hdr hyperspectral image files themselves; access_status records this caveat.
desc_zh: SensOFOREST 数据集来自西班牙 Las Majadas de Tiétar FLUXNET/ICOS 生态超级站，面向地中海 Quercus ilex open forest 的健康/衰退监测。Zenodo 描述包含叶片生化和叶片光谱测量、UAV 热红外数据、树冠 GeoJSON，以及 UAV 高光谱采集说明；高光谱 README 明确列出 HySpex Mjolnir VS-620 在两个采样区获取的 13 条 pushbroom 过境，487 个波段、0.06 m 像元、约 410.55-2500.94 nm，并采用经验线法获得表面反射率。需要注意的是，本轮 Zenodo API 文件清单没有列出 `.bsq/.hdr` 高光谱影像文件本体，因此该条目应标记为 Zenodo 记录和高光谱元数据可达、实际影像 cube 文件可用性需进一步复核。
desc_en: The SensOFOREST dataset comes from the Las Majadas de Tietar FLUXNET/ICOS ecosystem supersite in Spain and supports monitoring of healthy and declining Quercus ilex open forest. The Zenodo description covers leaf biochemical and leaf spectral measurements, UAV thermal imagery, tree GeoJSON files and UAV hyperspectral acquisition metadata; the hyperspectral README lists 13 HySpex Mjolnir VS-620 pushbroom overpasses over two sampling zones, 487 bands, 0.06 m pixels, approximately 410.55-2500.94 nm wavelengths and empirical-line surface reflectance retrieval. A caveat is important: the Zenodo API file manifest seen in this pass exposes the hyperspectral README, leaf CSV/readme, tree GeoJSONs and thermal zip, but not the `.bsq/.hdr` hyperspectral image cubes themselves, so practical HSI cube availability needs follow-up.
openness: open Zenodo record under CC BY 4.0, with component README stating CC BY-SA 4.0; actual HSI cube file availability requires follow-up

README_uav_hyperspectral.md states HySpex Mjolnir VS-620 surface reflectance factors, 487 bands, 0.06 m pixel size, 13 overpasses, BSQ/HDR filenames, WGS84 UTM 30N, empirical-line calibration and two Quercus ilex sampling zones.
scale: two sampling areas, 13 listed hyperspectral overpasses, 12 sampled holm oak trees for leaf measurements; Zenodo manifest seven files totaling 25.6 MB
feature_count: 487 hyperspectral bands described; leaf CSV includes biochemical variables and dense 400 nm onward leaf reflectance columns; tree GeoJSON labels healthy/declining areas

desc_zh: ScienceDB “Hyperspectral Image Classification Dataset” 是 2026 年发布的高光谱图像分类基准集合，由中国科学院大学 Xiao Daifeng 上传到 Science Data Bank。页面说明其包含四个真实 HSI 数据集：Pavia University、Hanchuan、HongHu 和 Houston，覆盖城市与复杂农业场景，波段数从 103 到 274 不等。该条目按“机构 DOI/再打包基准集合”收录，组成场景与目录中已有经典数据存在重叠。
desc_en: The ScienceDB “Hyperspectral Image Classification Dataset” is a 2026 hyperspectral image-classification benchmark collection deposited by Xiao Daifeng of the University of Chinese Academy of Sciences. The landing page describes four real HSI datasets: Pavia University, Hanchuan, HongHu and Houston, covering urban and complex agricultural scenes with 103 to 274 spectral bands. It is cataloged as an institutional DOI-backed repackaged benchmark collection, with overlap against classic constituent datasets already present elsewhere in the catalog.
openness: public ScienceDB record; CC BY-NC-ND 4.0 metadata license; constituent source terms should be checked before redistribution
source_type: curated hyperspectral ML benchmark collection / institutional mirror
evidence: ScienceDB JSON-LD and SSR page expose DOI 10.57760/sciencedb.j00240.00182, title Hyperspectral Image Classification Dataset, creator Xiao Daifeng, UCAS affiliation, datePublished 2026-04-13, conditionsOfAccess PUBLIC and license CC BY-NC-ND 4.0. The description lists four representative real HSI datasets: PaviaU/ROSIS with 610x340 pixels, 1.3 m resolution and 103 bands; Hanchuan/Headwall Nano Hypersec with 1217x303 pixels, 0.109 m resolution and 274 bands from 400-1000 nm; HongHu/Headwall Nano Hypersec with 940x475 pixels, 0.043 m resolution and 270 bands from 400-1000 nm; and Houston/ITRES CASI 1500 with 349x1905 pixels, 2.5 m resolution and 144 bands from 380-1050 nm. Local duplicate probe found no existing ScienceDB DOI or dataSetId row, but did find constituent-scene overlap with EHU/Pavia, WHU-Hi, Houston and Tanishq165/Data-CSHSI aggregate rows.
scale: 4 constituent HSI benchmark scenes; PaviaU, Hanchuan, HongHu and Houston
feature_count: 4 real HSI classification benchmark scenes; 103, 274, 270 and 144 spectral bands respectively

desc_zh: JRC “Spectral Adjustment of Surface reflectance dataset” 是欧盟联合研究中心发布的高光谱表面反射率光谱校正数据集。页面说明数据由三部分组成：900 条 USGS 光谱测量、20,000 条 PROSAIL 辐射传输模型模拟反射率，以及 10,000 条真实 Hyperion 观测。该条目不是完整影像立方体集合，而是面向卫星/遥感高光谱反射率校正和跨传感器调整的光谱样本数据集。
desc_en: The JRC “Spectral Adjustment of Surface reflectance dataset” is a hyperspectral surface-reflectance spectral-adjustment dataset published by the European Commission Joint Research Centre. The catalogue page states that it contains three hyperspectral components: 900 USGS spectral measurements, 20,000 PROSAIL simulated reflectance spectra and 10,000 real-world Hyperion observations. It is not a scene-level image-cube collection, but is cataloged as a remote-sensing hyperspectral spectral-sample dataset for satellite surface-reflectance adjustment and cross-sensor work.
openness: JRC Data Catalogue downloadable file/directory with no limitations; European Commission reuse notice
source_type: hyperspectral spectral-library / Hyperion observation sample dataset
evidence: JRC Data Catalogue page saved in phase244 states: dataset title Spectral Adjustment of Surface reflectance dataset; contributors Joint Research Centre European Commission; citation claverie, martin (2026); DOI 10.2905/JRC.X0RVFH0 and PID http://data.europa.eu/89h/6c90c9f0-e355-4eb2-9890-13244f9a5d99. The description says the dataset is composed of three hyperspectral datasets: USGS spectral measurements (900 spectra), simulated reflectance by the PROSAIL radiative transfer model (20,000 spectra), and real-world Hyperion observations (10,000 spectra). Keywords include hyperspectral, Remote sensing and Satellite. Data access link is https://jeodpp.jrc.ec.europa.eu/ftp/jrc-opendata/DRLL/SaSurf. Lychee v237 found the DOI landing page successful with one redirect; curl HEAD to FTP directory returned HTTP 200 after redirect.
scale: 900 USGS spectra; 20,000 PROSAIL simulated reflectance spectra; 10,000 Hyperion observation spectra
feature_count: 30,900 hyperspectral spectral samples across measured, simulated and Hyperion-observed groups

desc_zh: NOAA “2000 Photo Mosaics and Hyperspectral Imagery for the Main Eight Hawaiian Islands” 是用于夏威夷主岛浅水底栖生境/珊瑚礁制图的历史航空影像集合。InPort 元数据说明项目由 NOAA NCCOS、夏威夷大学和 Analytical Laboratories of Hawaii 合作完成，AURORA 高光谱成像系统在可见光-近红外范围采集 72 个 10 nm 波段，像元约 3 m，并将影像处理为用于浅水和深水底栖特征识别的波段组合/镶嵌产品。该条目按集合级收录；旧 NCCOS/CCMA ZIP 下载链接部分已迁移或失效，因此标记为元数据可达、下载需复核。
desc_en: NOAA’s “2000 Photo Mosaics and Hyperspectral Imagery for the Main Eight Hawaiian Islands” is a historical airborne imagery collection for shallow-water benthic habitat and coral-reef mapping around the main Hawaiian Islands. InPort metadata describes a cooperative NOAA NCCOS, University of Hawaii and Analytical Laboratories of Hawaii project using the AURORA hyperspectral imaging system to collect 72 ten-nanometer VNIR bands at about 3 m pixel resolution, then process band combinations and mosaics for shallow and deep benthic feature mapping. It is cataloged at collection level; some legacy NCCOS/CCMA ZIP download links have moved or return 404, so data access should be rechecked per flightline.
openness: NOAA InPort metadata states no access constraints and no use constraints; legacy data download URLs require per-file verification
source_type: airborne hyperspectral coastal/coral-reef imagery collection
evidence: NOAA InPort item 39332 parent collection page saved in phase247 states title 2000 Photo Mosaics and Hyperspectral Imagery for the Main Eight Hawaiian Islands Utilized to Map Shallow Water Benthic Habitats, short name hawaii_image_parent, status Completed, publication date 2000, access constraints None and use constraints None. The abstract says the project compared benthic habitat maps from georeferenced aerial photography and hyperspectral imagery for the Main Eight Hawaiian Islands. Process metadata states AURORA Hyperspectral Imaging data acquisition system collected 72 ten-nm bands in the visible and near-infrared at 3 m pixel resolution, with navigation from an Applanix inertial navigation system, ENVI processing, georeferencing and mosaicking. The NCCOS stats page lists 59 related hyperspectral island/flightline records. Sample InPort item 38639 was reachable and reported Oahu flightline 201-0611-272217; lychee v239 found InPort item 39332 and sample item 38639 successful, but sample legacy ZIP https://coastalscience.noaa.gov/datasets/ccma/biogeo/hawaii/mosaics/201-0611-HSI.zip returned 404.
scale: parent collection plus 59 listed hyperspectral island/flightline InPort records; AURORA 72-band VNIR imagery at about 3 m pixels
feature_count: 72 ten-nm VNIR bands in original AURORA acquisitions; public flightline composites expose selected band combinations

desc_zh: S-MODE PRISM Level 2a Reflectance 是 NASA PO.DAAC 发布的航空 PRISM 水面离水反射率数据集，来自旧金山外海约 300 km 的 Sub-Mesoscale Ocean Dynamics Experiment IOP1 航次/飞行观测。CMR 元数据说明 PRISM 是搭载在 G-III 飞机上的推扫式成像光谱仪，覆盖 350-1050 nm，并带有 1240 和 1640 nm 的 SWIR 双通道点辐射计用于海色大气校正。该产品提供正射校正和大气校正后的 water-leaving reflectance，ENVI 格式，适合海洋亚中尺度过程、水色和生物光学研究。
desc_en: S-MODE PRISM Level 2a Reflectance is a NASA PO.DAAC airborne PRISM water-leaving reflectance dataset from the Sub-Mesoscale Ocean Dynamics Experiment IOP1 campaign about 300 km offshore of San Francisco. CMR describes PRISM as a G-III-mounted pushbroom imaging spectrometer covering 350-1050 nm, with 1240 and 1640 nm SWIR spot radiometer channels for ocean-color atmospheric correction. The product provides orthocorrected and atmospherically corrected water-leaving reflectance in ENVI format for ocean submesoscale, ocean-color and bio-optical studies.
openness: NASA Earthdata/PO.DAAC collection; Earthdata login may be required for data download
source_type: airborne hyperspectral ocean-color reflectance imagery
evidence: NASA CMR phase248 returned concept C2727951862-POCLOUD, short_name SMODE_L2a_PRISM_REFL_V1, title S-MODE PRISM Level 2a Reflectance Version 1, data_center POCLOUD, time range 2022-10-19 to 2023-05-10. Summary states orthocorrected and atmospherically corrected water-leaving reflectance from S-MODE IOP1 about 300 km offshore of San Francisco; PRISM is a pushbroom imaging spectrometer on G-III operating at 350-1050 nm and resolving spatial features as small as 30 cm, with SWIR spot radiometer channels at 1240/1640 nm. Lychee v240 verified Earthdata Search and CMR virtual directory URLs.
scale: S-MODE IOP1 airborne PRISM survey; high-temporal-resolution flight data over offshore San Francisco field domain
feature_count: near-UV to near-IR PRISM reflectance, 350-1050 nm; SWIR atmospheric-correction channels 1240/1640 nm

desc_en: S-MODE PRISM Level 2 Water Surface Chlorophyll-a is a NASA PO.DAAC PRISM-derived ocean biogeochemistry product providing chlorophyll-a and particulate organic carbon concentration estimates for the S-MODE IOP1 offshore San Francisco field domain. CMR links it to the G-III-mounted PRISM imaging spectrometer, which covers 350-1050 nm and uses 1240/1640 nm SWIR spot radiometer channels for ocean-color atmospheric correction. It is cataloged as a hyperspectral-imagery-derived product rather than a raw reflectance cube.

desc_zh: USATEC “Hyperspectral Signatures (400 to 2500 nm)” 是早期高光谱材料反射率光谱库，记录植被、土壤、矿物、岩石和人造材料在 400-2500 nm 范围内的光谱特征。NASA CMR 摘要说明数据由实验室三脚架测量，使用 EG&G 550 radiometer 和 GER IRIS spectroradiometer，结果以 ASCII 格式保存为百分比反射率；NTIS 记录对应 Satterwhite 与 Henley 的 1990 年 486 页技术报告。该条不是遥感影像立方体，而是用于遥感材料识别和高光谱算法验证的历史光谱库。
desc_en: USATEC “Hyperspectral Signatures (400 to 2500 nm)” is an early hyperspectral material reflectance/signature library covering vegetation, soils, minerals, rocks and man-made materials across 400-2500 nm. NASA CMR describes laboratory tripod measurements with an EG&G 550 radiometer and GER IRIS spectroradiometer, stored as ASCII percent-reflectance data; the NTIS landing page corresponds to the 1990 Satterwhite and Henley 486-page technical report. It is not an imagery cube, but is included as a historical spectral library for remote-sensing material identification and hyperspectral algorithm validation.

CMR describes the N1 sensor as surveying Earth in 96 narrow bands from 400-1100 nm with 30 m spatial resolution, a 25 km swath and about a three-day revisit, while the N2 entry states 96-255 narrow bands over the same spectral range and similar spatial/revisit characteristics.
