desc_zh: HyMars 是 ScienceDB 发布的火星高光谱图像分类基准数据集，基于 Mars Reconnaissance Orbiter 上 CRISM 传感器获取的数据。数据包含 Holden Crater、Nili Fossae 和 Utopia Planitia 三个场景；ScienceDB 描述 Holden 为 418×595 像元、过滤后 440 个波段，Nili Fossae 为 478×593 像元、425 个波段，Utopia Planitia 为 478×595×432。数据以 `.mat` 高光谱立方体和 ground-truth 标签文件发布，许可证为 CC BY 4.0，适合火星矿物/地貌高光谱分类和行星遥感算法验证。
desc_en: HyMars is a Science Data Bank Mars hyperspectral image-classification benchmark derived from CRISM observations aboard the Mars Reconnaissance Orbiter. It includes three scenes: Holden Crater, Nili Fossae and Utopia Planitia; the ScienceDB description reports 418x595 pixels with 440 retained bands for Holden, 478x593 pixels with 425 bands for Nili Fossae, and 478x595x432 for Utopia Planitia. The dataset provides `.mat` hyperspectral cubes and ground-truth label files under CC BY 4.0, supporting Mars mineral/terrain classification and planetary remote-sensing algorithm evaluation.

GitHub MCTGCL README links to the ScienceDB record and cites TGRS 2025 doi 10.1109/TGRS.2025.3529996. Lychee v243 verified ScienceDB, DOI and GitHub URLs.

desc_en: HVDHSD is a Figshare hyperspectral dataset for wine-grape disease research collected in the eastern Helan Mountain foothills of Ningxia, China. It covers multiple wine-grape varieties and plant organs, including leaves, fruits and vines, and provides field-collected hyperspectral imagery with pixel-level spectral information under a binary healthy/diseased annotation scheme. The Figshare record has a DOI, CC BY 4.0 license and an approximately 18.07 GB download-all package, making it useful for agricultural remote sensing, pathology monitoring and hyperspectral deep-learning experiments.

desc_en: This Mendeley Data release is a geographically extensive hyperspectral reflectance library for peatland vegetation from 13 hemiboreal, boreal, sub-Arctic and Arctic sites in Finland and Estonia. It contains 350-2500 nm hemispherical-conical reflectance factors measured on 1 m x 1 m plots during the 2022-2023 growing seasons, together with plot coordinates, peatland type, tree cover, soil moisture, vegetation fractional cover and SWIR quality information. Although it is a field spectral library rather than an image cube, it is explicitly categorized for remote sensing and hyperspectral imaging and is valuable for wetland/peatland retrieval calibration and validation.

desc_en: This Mendeley Data release provides a hyperspectral branch-reflectance library for seven boreal and temperate tree species. Branch samples were collected in southern Finland from September to November 2024 and measured under laboratory conditions with an ASD FieldSpec 4, a contact-probe setup and an integrating-sphere setup. The files include contact-probe CCRF spectra, integrating-sphere HDRF spectra, sampled-tree descriptions and sample photos; while it is not an airborne image cube, it supports forest remote sensing, reflectance modeling and hyperspectral vegetation interpretation.

desc_en: The Maoer Mountain HIT dataset is a Figshare release for hierarchical tree-species classification from stand-scale to individual-tree tasks. It covers the Maoer Mountain region near Harbin in Northeast China and integrates georeferenced high-resolution hyperspectral imagery, aligned canopy-height models and ground-validated field data. The HSI is described as approximately 0.2 m spatial resolution, WGS84 georeferenced, and spanning 387.8-1025.5 nm in 150 contiguous bands with about 4.28 nm average bandwidth; the record provides a DOI, CC BY 4.0 license and a 1.57 GB download-all entry.

desc_zh: 该 Mendeley Data 数据集记录了苹果树在复合干旱和热胁迫下的高光谱反射率、热红外温度、水势、土壤水分和环境数据。实验于 2023 年 7 月 17 日至 8 月 6 日在意大利 Bolzano 的 Eurac Research terraXcube 气候舱中开展，包含 12 棵苹果树；高光谱部分为 SR-3500 光谱仪 350-2500 nm、1 nm 间隔的叶片反射率测量，约 1228 条光谱。数据以 CC BY 4.0 发布，附带 `.sed` 原始光谱、元数据表和 R 分析代码，适合果树胁迫遥感、近地高光谱诊断和热-光谱联合建模。
desc_en: This Mendeley Data release contains hyperspectral reflectance, thermal infrared temperature, stem and soil water potential, and environmental measurements for apple trees under combined drought and heat stress. The experiment was conducted from 17 July to 6 August 2023 at the terraXcube facility of Eurac Research in Bolzano, Italy, using 12 apple trees in climate chambers. The hyperspectral component consists of SR-3500 spectroradiometer leaf measurements from 350-2500 nm at 1 nm intervals, with raw `.sed` spectra, metadata tables and R analysis code; it is useful for proximal remote sensing of orchard stress and joint thermal-hyperspectral modeling.

source_type: repository

feature_count: 350-2500 nm at 1 nm intervals; thermal and physiology measurements

Collection-level row avoids overcounting the four tightly coupled scene datasets; individual item URLs are kept in citation/notes.
desc_zh: Manchester Time-Lapse Hyperspectral Radiance Images of Natural Scenes 2015 是 University of Manchester Figshare 发布的室外自然场景时序高光谱辐射影像集合。集合包含 Nogueiro、Gualtar、Levada 和 Sete Fontes 四个葡萄牙场景，每个场景约 7-9 个约 1 小时间隔采集的高光谱辐射影像；单景文件为 Matlab MAT 格式，约 1344 × 1024 像元，波段为 400、410、…、720 nm，并附 RGB 渲染图和包含地理位置的信息文档。该集合不是卫星或机载遥感，但作为近地环境/自然场景高光谱影像可用于光照变化、阴影、颜色恒常性和大气/场景辐射统计研究。
desc_en: The Manchester Time-Lapse Hyperspectral Radiance Images of Natural Scenes 2015 collection provides outdoor ground-based hyperspectral radiance image sequences for four Portuguese scenes: Nogueiro, Gualtar, Levada and Sete Fontes. Each scene contains about 7-9 hyperspectral radiance images acquired at roughly one-hour intervals, with Matlab MAT image cubes of approximately 1344 x 1024 pixels and spectral samples from 400 to 720 nm every 10 nm, plus rendered BMP/RGB products and information documents with geographic location. It is not satellite or airborne remote sensing, but it is a useful adjacent proximal environmental hyperspectral image collection for illumination, shadow, atmospheric and natural-scene radiance studies.

desc_zh: MASSIMAL 是 NIRD/Sigma2 发布的挪威海岸栖息地制图多模态开放数据集，覆盖挪威沿岸四个浅海区域，时间跨度为 2021-2023 年。数据包含航空高光谱和多光谱影像、水下影像、声呐测量以及高光谱影像标注，按时间、地点和数据类型组织为 ZIP 文件，总量约 1.1 TB。数据 DOI 为 10.11582/2025.00041，许可证为 CC BY 4.0，适合海草/海岸栖息地制图、浅水遥感、多模态融合和语义分割算法研究。
desc_en: MASSIMAL is a public NIRD/Sigma2 multimodal dataset for coastal habitat mapping in Norway. It covers four shallow coastal locations along the Norwegian coast during 2021-2023 and combines aerial hyperspectral and multispectral imaging, underwater imagery, sonar measurements and annotations of hyperspectral images. The archive is organized as ZIP files by time, location and data type, is about 1.1 TB, and is released under CC BY 4.0 with DOI 10.11582/2025.00041, making it valuable for coastal habitat mapping, seagrass and benthic remote sensing, multimodal fusion and semantic segmentation research.

Included because it is tied to IGARSS remote-sensing work and provides hyperspectral snapshot-camera data plus soil moisture ground truth for regression benchmarking. License wording differs between Zenodo package and GitHub README; both are open but should be reviewed before redistribution.
desc_zh: KIT soil moisture hyperspectral benchmark 是一个用于土壤水分回归的高光谱野外实验数据集，采集于 2017 年 5 月德国 Karlsruhe 的五天 lysimeter field campaign。数据使用 Cubert UHD 285 高光谱快照相机，形成 50 × 50 像元、125 个光谱波段、450-950 nm 范围、约 4 nm 光谱分辨率的数据，并配套 2 cm 深度 TDR 土壤水分和土壤温度测量。Zenodo 提供 DOI 和 ZIP 下载，GitHub 提供 CSV、示例 notebook 和说明，适合土壤水分遥感反演和高光谱回归算法测试。
desc_en: The KIT hyperspectral soil-moisture benchmark is a field-campaign dataset for soil-moisture regression. It was measured during a five-day campaign in May 2017 in Karlsruhe, Germany, using an undisturbed soil sample and a Cubert UHD 285 hyperspectral snapshot camera producing 50 x 50 images with 125 spectral bands from 450 to 950 nm at about 4 nm resolution. Soil moisture was measured with a TRIME-PICO TDR sensor at 2 cm depth, and the public Zenodo/GitHub release provides data, metadata and example code for remote-sensing regression benchmarks.
openness: open
source_type: repository
evidence: Zenodo page gives dataset DOI, download file, keywords hyperspectral/soil moisture/field campaign and IGARSS related work; GitHub README gives sensor, 50x50 images, 125 bands, 450-950 nm, 4 nm resolution, TDR soil moisture and CC BY 4.0 repository license.
scale: 50 x 50 hyperspectral snapshots; 125 bands; five-day field campaign

desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 数据集提供地衣标本的 4D 高光谱成像数据，用于改进地衣识别和分类。数据使用多激发光源和 Nuance FX Imaging System 采集，光谱范围为 420-720 nm，光谱分辨率为 2 或 10 nm；文件包括原始 `.im3`、转换后的 `.tif`、人工 mask、类别元数据和成像条件元数据。它不是航空/卫星遥感影像，但与 WHISPERS 遥感高光谱会议论文关联，并可作为地衣制图、样本光谱识别和生态遥感算法的近地/实验室数据。
desc_en: This Zenodo release provides a 4D hyperspectral imaging dataset of lichen specimens for classification and identification. The data were acquired with a multi-excitation illumination setup and a Nuance FX Imaging System, covering 420-720 nm at either 2 or 10 nm spectral resolution, and are distributed as original `.im3` and converted `.tif` files with manual masks and metadata CSV files. It is a laboratory specimen dataset rather than airborne or satellite imagery, but it is linked to a WHISPERS remote-sensing hyperspectral paper and is useful for lichen mapping, spectral classification and ecological remote-sensing method development.

source_type: repository
evidence: Zenodo page gives DOI, 2026 publication date, HSI.zip 1.8 GB, .im3/.tif formats, manual mask and metadata, 420-720 nm range, 2 or 10 nm spectral resolution, WHISPERS citation and CC BY 4.0 license.

name: PlumeBed Multi-Source Hyperspectral Methane Plume Remote-Sensing Dataset
provider: Shutao Zhao / Yuzhong Zhang / Westlake University / Science Data Bank / AERS Cloud
theme_canonical: methane super-emitter detection using multi-source hyperspectral plume products and Sentinel-2 backgrounds
theme_raw: PlumeBed: a multispectral satellite methane plume detector enabled by transfer learning of a multi-source hyperspectral data set; Multi-source remote sensing data
coverage: six major oil and gas field regions globally plus Tarim Basin background data in Xinjiang, China; Dauletabad case study in Turkmenistan referenced by article
license: not clearly stated on indexed ScienceDB page; open Science Data Bank/AERS download entry; associated article under AGU terms
formats: Science Data Bank package; Sentinel-2 L1C-derived methane plume/background imagery; synthetic Sentinel-2-style training data generated from Carbon Mapper L3 hyperspectral plume products and Sentinel-2 backgrounds

time_span: 2017-2023 according to AERS Cloud data page; ScienceDB V2 cited 2025

Included because it documents accessible remote-sensing data derived from hyperspectral Carbon Mapper plume products and Sentinel-2 backgrounds. License should be revisited if direct redistribution is planned.
desc_zh: PlumeBed 是围绕甲烷超级排放源检测构建的多源遥感数据集和迁移学习框架，Science Data Bank/AERS 页面将其列为“multi-source hyperspectral dataset/remote sensing data”。AERS 描述显示，该数据集包括全球六个主要油气田区域的 30 个甲烷超级排放源数据集，以及中国新疆塔里木盆地无甲烷超级排放源背景数据；研究利用 Carbon Mapper L3 高光谱羽流产品与 Sentinel-2 背景构造 Sentinel-2 风格训练样本，并用于多光谱卫星甲烷羽流检测。它不是一个纯高光谱影像产品，但对于高光谱甲烷羽流产品向多光谱卫星检测迁移的遥感数据谱系很重要。
desc_en: PlumeBed is a methane super-emitter detection dataset/framework registered through Science Data Bank and described by AERS Cloud as a multi-source hyperspectral remote-sensing data product. The AERS page states that it includes 30 methane super-emitter datasets from six major oil-and-gas regions plus no-super-emitter background data from the Tarim Basin in Xinjiang, China. The associated JGR Atmospheres article explains that Carbon Mapper hyperspectral methane plume products are fused with Sentinel-2 backgrounds to generate Sentinel-2-style training data for transfer-learning methane plume detection; it is therefore a boundary case but an important dataset lineage for hyperspectral-to-multispectral methane remote sensing.

source_type: repository

scale: 30 methane super-emitter datasets plus background data; six oil and gas regions; 2017-2023
feature_count: Sentinel-2-derived plume/background scenes; Carbon Mapper hyperspectral plume products used for synthetic training data

Included because the objective covers remote-sensing hyperspectral data broadly and ESSD/Zenodo explicitly identify it as a public dataset from a hyperspectral vertical remote-sensing network, with spectral DOAS retrievals and gridded vertical profiles.
desc_zh: 该数据集由中国高光谱垂直遥感网络获取，提供 2021-2024 年中国 22 个地基站点的 HONO、O3、光解频率和 OH 生成率垂直剖面。ESSD 论文说明，剖面覆盖地表至 4 km，高度分辨率约 100 m，时间分辨率约 15 min，站点覆盖城市、郊区、高原和盆地等多种环境。Zenodo 发布 HONO、O3、P(OH)HONO 和 P(OH)O3 四个 XLSX 文件，总文件量约 532.1 MB，CC BY 4.0，适合大气化学、污染垂直结构和多平台遥感协同分析。
desc_en: This public Zenodo/ESSD dataset provides vertical profiles of HONO, O3, photolysis frequencies and OH production derived from the Chinese Hyperspectral Vertical Remote Sensing Network during 2021-2024. The data cover 22 ground-based sites across major regions of China, with profiles from the surface to 4 km, about 100 m vertical resolution and about 15 min temporal resolution. Four downloadable XLSX files provide HONO, O3, P(OH)HONO and P(OH)O3 products under CC BY 4.0, supporting atmospheric chemistry, boundary-layer pollution studies and multi-platform remote-sensing analyses.

source_type: repository_and_data_paper

desc_en: This Figshare dataset provides Sargassum biomass measurements and associated hyperspectral reflectance data from controlled mesocosm experiments and in situ observations of drifting mats in La Parguera, Puerto Rico. The files include mesocosm biomass/reflectance measurements and field observations with sample ID, date, patch and quadrant information, wavelength, average reflectance, biomass, patch depth and estimated volume. Released under CC BY 4.0, it supports coastal remote-sensing algorithm development for Sargassum biomass estimation and biological oceanography monitoring.

The record provides the training polygons and hyperspectral imagery used for the mixed-conifer tree-species CNN paper, including a 9.6 GB hyperspectral reflectance GeoTIFF and label shapefiles. desc_en: This Zenodo dataset packages the NEON AOP hyperspectral imagery and field-derived labels used for mixed-conifer tree species classification in the Teakettle Experimental Forest of the southern Sierra Nevada, California. It includes the NEON_D17_TEAK_DP1_20170627_181333 reflectance GeoTIFF, RGB reflectance subset, canopy-height model products and shapefile training labels, with about 18.9 GB of files including a 9.6 GB hyperspectral reflectance image. The dataset is linked to a Remote Sensing 2019 paper and public code, and is useful for forest species mapping, tree mortality detection, NEON AOP hyperspectral/LiDAR fusion and deep-learning benchmarks.

desc_en: This Figshare record provides source data for a study on full-time hyperspectral tomography monitoring of ozone and multiple air pollutants. The landing page and Figshare API identify it as a CC BY 4.0 dataset with a downloadable Source Data.zip package of about 21.23 MB. It is atmospheric hyperspectral remote-sensing/tomography data rather than airborne imagery, useful for reproducing pollutant monitoring and inversion analyses.

It is best treated as field hyperspectral water-quality retrieval data rather than hyperspectral image cubes.

name: HyperBOOST Tara Europa Hyperspectral Bio-Optical Collocated In Situ Dataset
provider: ESA-HYPERBOOST / Zenodo / CNR
theme_canonical: collocated biogeochemical IOP and AOP hyperspectral remote-sensing reflectance observations from Tara Europa
theme_raw: Hyperspectral Bio-Optical Observations Sailing on Tara (HyperBOOST) Collocated In situ Dataset
coverage: Tara Europa sailing campaign stations; aquatic in situ observations
formats: Zenodo Excel workbooks for biogeochemical, IOP and AOP categories; files embargoed until 2026-06-30
access: Zenodo landing page public; files embargoed until 2026-06-30
notes: Current date is 2026-06-11, so this is not yet downloadable. Included as scheduled-open institutional dataset with explicit Zenodo metadata and future public availability.
desc_zh: HyperBOOST 是 ESA-HYPERBOOST 社区发布在 Zenodo 的 Tara Europa 共址原位生物光学数据集，组织为生物地球化学、固有光学性质（IOPs）和表观光学性质（AOPs）三类 Excel 工作簿。AOP 文件包含由 SoRad 与 HTSRB 测得的遥感反射率（Rrs），用于水色和高光谱水体遥感研究。当前日期为 2026-06-11，Zenodo 标注文件将于 2026-06-30 公开，因此本条按 embargoed/scheduled-open 记录，而非已下载数据。
desc_en: HyperBOOST is an ESA-HYPERBOOST Zenodo dataset of collocated Tara Europa in situ bio-optical observations. It is organised into biogeochemical, IOP and AOP Excel workbooks, with AOPs including remote-sensing reflectance measured by SoRad and HTSRB. As of 2026-06-11 the files are embargoed until 2026-06-30, so this entry records a scheduled-open institutional dataset rather than currently downloadable files.
openness: scheduled open
source_type: repository landing page
evidence: Zenodo page and API report Dataset, CC BY 4.0, access_right=embargoed, and files scheduled for public availability on 2026-06-30.
scale: dataset

name: Danjiangkou Reservoir Synthetic Hyperspectral Bio-Optical Dataset
provider: Zenodo / Nanjing Institute of Geography and Limnology / Shun Bi et al.
theme_canonical: synthetic hyperspectral remote-sensing reflectance and inherent optical properties for inland water bio-optical modeling
theme_raw: A Synthetic Bio-Optical Dataset for Danjiangkou Reservoir: Hyperspectral Reflectance and Inherent Optical Properties
coverage: Danjiangkou Reservoir, China; synthetic samples calibrated for local optical characteristics
formats: NetCDF4 file DBOM_synthetic_dataset.nc; 10,000 samples; 276 bands from 350-900 nm at 2 nm interval
access: open Zenodo record with NetCDF download
notes: Synthetic but explicitly remote-sensing reflectance and IOP data for inland water hyperspectral algorithm development. Included with synthetic status clearly stated.
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 数据集为丹江口水库光学特性构建 10,000 个合成生物光学样本，连接叶绿素 a、无机悬浮物、CDOM 和浮游植物群落结构与 IOP 及高光谱遥感反射率 Rrs。数据覆盖 350-900 nm、2 nm 间隔，共 276 个波长，并以压缩 NetCDF4 文件发布。它是合成数据，不是实测影像，但适合内陆水体高光谱算法训练、半解析模型验证和不确定性分析。
desc_en: This Zenodo release contains 10,000 synthetic bio-optical samples tailored to Danjiangkou Reservoir. It links water-quality and phytoplankton variables to IOPs and hyperspectral remote-sensing reflectance from 350 to 900 nm at 2 nm spacing, stored as a NetCDF4 file. The dataset is synthetic rather than observed imagery, but it is directly relevant to inland-water hyperspectral algorithm development and uncertainty analysis.
openness: open
source_type: repository landing page
evidence: Zenodo page/API list Dataset, CC BY 4.0, open access, DBOM_synthetic_dataset.nc, 39.0 MB, and spectral range/band details.
scale: dataset
feature_count: 10,000 samples; 276 wavelengths

name: Archaeological Cropmark Synthetic Signatures ACSS Dataset
provider: Mendeley Data / Cyprus University of Technology / Elias Gravanis and Athos Agapiou
theme_canonical: measured and PROSAIL-simulated hyperspectral signatures for archaeological cropmark detection

access: open Mendeley Data landing page with Download All
doi_or_citation: 10.17632/465vpcsd84.1; associated with IEEE Access 2024 physically based detection algorithm for buried archaeological remains
notes: Included as spectral-signature remote sensing dataset for archaeological target/cropmark detection. Contains both measured and synthetic hyperspectral signatures plus script.
desc_zh: ACSS 是 Mendeley Data 上的考古 cropmark 高光谱特征数据集，包含与地下遗存 cropmark 相关的实测和合成高光谱光谱特征。合成数据由 PROSAIL 辐射传输模型生成，并附带仿真脚本，支撑基于物理机理的地下考古遗存检测算法研究。该记录以 CC BY 4.0 发布，适合考古遥感、植被胁迫光谱响应和合成光谱方法验证。
desc_en: ACSS on Mendeley Data contains measured and synthetic hyperspectral signatures associated with archaeological cropmarks from buried remains. The synthetic signatures are generated with PROSAIL and accompanied by a simulation script, supporting physically based remote-sensing detection of archaeological targets. The dataset is licensed CC BY 4.0 and is useful for archaeological remote sensing and spectral simulation studies.
openness: open
source_type: repository landing page
evidence: Mendeley page lists DOI 10.17632/465vpcsd84.1, Download All, description of measured/synthetic hyperspectral signatures, remote-sensing categories, and CC BY 4.0.

name: OC-CCI Global Bio-Optical In Situ Ocean-Colour Dataset Version 3
provider: PANGAEA / ESA Ocean Colour Climate Change Initiative / Valente et al.
theme_canonical: global spectral remote-sensing reflectance and bio-optical in situ observations for ocean-colour satellite validation
theme_raw: A compilation of global bio-optical in situ data for ocean-colour satellite applications - version 3
coverage: Global ocean/coastal in situ observations; latitude about -78.043 to 89.965; 1997-2021
formats: PANGAEA bundled publication; tab-delimited text ZIP; NetCDF ZIP; 7 datasets
access: open PANGAEA landing page with ZIP and NetCDF downloads
notes: Discovered via aquatic hyperspectral roadmap/GLORIA source chasing. Included because it contains spectral remote-sensing reflectance and related bio-optical variables for satellite ocean-colour validation; not all wavelengths are hyperspectral imaging, so notes keep boundary explicit.
desc_zh: 该 PANGAEA 数据集是 ESA Ocean Colour CCI 的全球海色卫星验证用原位生物光学数据汇编第 3 版，覆盖 1997-2021 年全球海洋和近岸观测。记录汇集了光谱遥感反射率、叶绿素 a、光谱固有光学性质、光谱漫衰减系数和总悬浮物等变量，并保留来源项目和观测元数据。它不是成像高光谱立方体，但包含可下载的光谱 Rrs 与相关生物光学观测，适合水色遥感验证和算法交叉比较。
desc_en: This PANGAEA bundled publication is version 3 of the ESA Ocean Colour CCI global bio-optical in situ compilation for validating ocean-colour satellite products. It includes spectral remote-sensing reflectance, chlorophyll-a, spectral IOPs, spectral diffuse attenuation and total suspended matter from 1997 to 2021, with provenance metadata. It is not hyperspectral image-cube data, but it provides downloadable spectral Rrs and bio-optical observations for aquatic remote-sensing validation.
openness: open
source_type: repository landing page
evidence: PANGAEA page lists spectral remote-sensing reflectance variables, global/time coverage, CC BY 4.0, seven datasets, ZIP text download and NetCDF download; ESSD paper documents the compilation.
scale: dataset
feature_count: 7 bundled datasets

provider: NASA Jet Propulsion Laboratory / Zenodo / EMIT SDS

theme_raw: JPL trace gases dataset: Fully Automatic Trace Gas Plume Detection - v1
coverage: Global EMIT scenes for detected point-source trace gas events, negatives and confounders
license: Apache License 2.0; copyright 2026 California Institute of Technology, Government Sponsorship Acknowledged
formats: Zenodo CSV and ZIP downloads; GeoTIFF matched-filter products, RGB bands, prediction GeoJSON, manual label shapefiles for detections
access: open Zenodo dataset landing page with 26.0 GB downloadable files
doi_or_citation: 10.5281/zenodo.19992726; associated paper: Fully Automatic Trace Gas Plume Detection; codebase https://github.com/emit-sds/daily-trace-gases/
time_span: published 2026-05-03; created/modified 2026-05-05; EMIT archive through events ending in 2025 per associated arXiv paper
notes: Discovered through 2-hop from Fully Automatic Trace Gas Plume Detection arXiv data availability section and MARS-Hyperspectral v2025 references. Included as derived EMIT imaging spectroscopy trace-gas detection dataset with geospatial raster products and labels.
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 数据集是论文“Fully Automatic Trace Gas Plume Detection”的官方数据发布，基于 NASA EMIT 成像光谱仪数据构建点源痕量气体检测样本。数据包含 CH4、NH3、NO2、CO 的检测事件、负样本和混淆样本，文件结构包括 matched-filter 增强 GeoTIFF、RGB 波段、模型预测 GeoJSON，以及检测样本的人工标注 shapefile。页面列出 26.0 GB 文件，并给出 CO、NH3、NO2 的检测数量统计，适合空间高光谱气体羽流检测、自动筛查和遥感机器学习评估。
desc_en: This Zenodo release is the official dataset for the paper “Fully Automatic Trace Gas Plume Detection,” built from NASA EMIT imaging spectroscopy observations. It contains point-source events for CH4, NH3, NO2 and CO, together with negative and confounder scenes; files include matched-filter GeoTIFF products, RGB bands, prediction GeoJSON and manual label shapefiles for detections. The record lists 26.0 GB of downloadable data and supports hyperspectral trace-gas plume detection and machine-learning evaluation.
openness: open
source_type: repository landing page
evidence: Zenodo page lists Dataset Open, DOI 10.5281/zenodo.19992726, EMIT imaging spectroscopy trace-gas point-source event description, file structure with cmf.tif/rgb.tif/prediction.geojson/label.shp, 26.0 GB files, and Apache License 2.0.
scale: global derived EMIT event dataset
feature_count: CO 51 detections/40 scenes; NH3 70 detections/62 scenes plus 8 overlapping CH4; NO2 219 detections/153 scenes; negatives and confounders included

name: Zenodo Synthetic Hyperspectral Multi-Angular Water Optical Properties Dataset
provider: Zenodo / CNR / Jaime Pitarch and Vittorio Brando
theme_canonical: synthetic hyperspectral and multi-angular IOP-AOP water optical properties for aquatic remote sensing
theme_raw: A hyperspectral and multi-angular synthetic dataset of optical properties for waters with varying trophic levels and optical complexity
coverage: Synthetic water optical scenarios spanning varying trophic levels and optical complexity; angular solar/view geometry coverage
formats: Zenodo ZIP downloads; SD_hyper.zip 28.2 GB; SD_OLCI.zip 809.2 MB; 5000 files from Hydrolight simulations
access: open Zenodo record with downloadable hyperspectral and OLCI-condensed archives
notes: Discovered by following ACIX/CVD aquatic hyperspectral references. Synthetic but explicitly generated at 1 nm true hyperspectral resolution with Hydrolight for present and future hyperspectral satellite algorithm development.
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 数据集由 CNR 的 Pitarch 与 Brando 发布，面向不同营养状态和光学复杂度水体，提供合成的固有光学性质（IOPs）、表观光学性质（AOPs）及生物地球化学组分。数据由 Hydrolight 辐射传输模拟生成，覆盖 350 nm 起的 1 nm “真高光谱”分辨率，并包含完整太阳/观测天顶角和方位角组合的多角度 AOP。记录提供 28.2 GB 的高光谱压缩包和 809.2 MB 的 OLCI 波段版本，适合水色高光谱算法开发、方向性校正和卫星任务验证。
desc_en: This Zenodo dataset by Pitarch and Brando provides synthetic IOPs, AOPs and biogeochemical constituents for waters with varying trophic levels and optical complexity. It was generated with Hydrolight at true 1 nm hyperspectral resolution from 350 nm and includes angularly resolved AOPs across solar and viewing geometries. The record provides a 28.2 GB hyperspectral archive and an 809.2 MB OLCI-band version for aquatic hyperspectral algorithm development, directionality studies and satellite validation.
openness: open
source_type: repository/portal landing page
evidence: Zenodo page lists Dataset Open, DOI 10.5281/zenodo.11637178, CC BY 4.0, Hydrolight simulations, 1 nm hyperspectral resolution from 350 nm, 6,500,000 simulations in 5000 files, SD_hyper.zip 28.2 GB and SD_OLCI.zip 809.2 MB.
scale: dataset
feature_count: 6,500,000 Hydrolight simulations; 5000 files

desc_zh: WATERHYPERNET 数据门户提供 QC 通过的自动化高光谱水体反射率数据，用于多卫星水色和水面反射率验证。最新发布（2025-06-20）覆盖 2023-2024 年 7 个站点，包含 Lake Garda、Rio de la Plata、Acqua Alta、Wraysbury、Chesapeake Bay、Oostende 等，数据以 NetCDF 发布，每个文件对应一次高光谱水离水辐亮度反射率测量，并包含下行辐照度、天空辐亮度、上行辐亮度、观测几何和元数据。访问需要通过联系表单注册并获取密码，属于开放机构可获取的高光谱水体遥感验证档案。
desc_en: The WATERHYPERNET data portal provides QC-approved automated hyperspectral water reflectance data for multi-mission satellite validation. The latest release, dated 2025-06-20, covers 2023-2024 data from seven sites including Lake Garda, Rio de la Plata, Acqua Alta, Wraysbury, Chesapeake Bay and Oostende. Files are distributed as NetCDF, one per hyperspectral water-leaving radiance reflectance measurement, with irradiance, radiance, geometry, processing and metadata variables; access requires registration and a portal password.
openness: open with registration
source_type: repository/portal landing page
evidence: WATERHYPERNET data page states all QC-approved datasets are accessible for download after registration, distributed under CC-BY-ND, latest release 2025-06-20 contains 2023-2024 data from 7 sites, provides all-site and site-level downloads, and NetCDF files every 15-30 minutes during daytime when QC-approved.
scale: dataset
feature_count: 7 sites; 2023-2024 QC-approved measurements; up to about 50 measurements/day/site

desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 记录是 WATERHYPERNET/HYPERNETS 历史列表中的 LAPR La Plata Estuary 站点 HYPSTAR 初始高光谱水体反射率样本，用于卫星水色/水面反射率验证。门户说明这批 beta-release 数据为截至 2023 年 4 月的 HYPSTAR 高光谱观测，早于当前 WATERHYPERNET 最新处理和质量控制流程，因此更适合结果复现和历史可追溯，而不是替代最新门户数据。数据类型为水离水辐亮度反射率及相关观测几何/质量信息的 NetCDF 产品。
desc_en: This Zenodo record is a historical WATERHYPERNET/HYPERNETS HYPSTAR initial sample for the LAPR La Plata Estuary site, intended for satellite water-reflectance validation. The WATERHYPERNET portal states that these beta-release records cover measurements up to April 2023 and do not reflect the latest processing and QC, so they are best used for traceability and reproducibility rather than as replacements for the current portal archive. The data are hyperspectral water-leaving reflectance NetCDF products with geometry and quality metadata.
openness: open
source_type: repository landing page / portal-cited historical release
evidence: WATERHYPERNET data page lists this Zenodo record among first beta-release HYPSTAR hyperspectral datasets; De Vis/Goyens Frontiers 2024 references list corresponding site datasets and describe NetCDF L2A water reflectance products with wavelength, acquisition time, viewing/solar angles and quality flags for similar HYPERNETS records.

feature_count: site-level HYPSTAR measurements up to April 2023

desc_en: This Zenodo record is an initial HYPERNETS/LANDHYPERNET hyperspectral surface-reflectance sample for the IFEVA site in Buenos Aires, Argentina. Related HYPERNETS documentation describes L2A NetCDF products containing surface reflectance, associated uncertainties and error-correlation information, with wavelength and geometry-series dimensions plus acquisition time, viewing/solar angles, valid scan counts and quality flags. The site represents natural pastures with treatments in 7 m x 7 m patches, making it useful for satellite surface-reflectance validation and reproducible method testing.

name: NSIQ Near-Space Hyperspectral Interferometric Imaging IQA Dataset
provider: Bwhitebear / Hugging Face / Jiang, Tong and Ma / Scientific Reports
theme_canonical: simulated near-space hyperspectral interferometric images with image quality annotations for IQA benchmarking
theme_raw: Near space hyperspectral interferometric imaging image quality assessment with a physically grounded dataset / NSIQ
coverage: Near-space hyperspectral interferometric imaging simulation scenario, 20-100 km altitude atmospheric observation context
license: MIT on Hugging Face; article/preprint describes open/non-commercial research use
formats: Hugging Face dataset repository; TIFF interferograms, dist_interferogram.txt, dist_processed.txt, interferogram.zip, processed.zip
access: public Hugging Face dataset files page
doi_or_citation: Scientific Reports DOI 10.1038/s41598-026-38036-2; preprint DOI 10.21203/rs.3.rs-7868618/v1; Hugging Face dataset Bwhitebear/NSIQ
time_span: Scientific Reports published 2026-02-27, version of record 2026-03-11; Hugging Face files uploaded about 10 months before checked date
notes: Included as simulated physically grounded remote-sensing hyperspectral interferometric IQA benchmark. It is not conventional geo-rectified imagery, but it targets near-space atmospheric hyperspectral interferometric imaging and includes quality annotations.
desc_zh: NSIQ 是近空间高光谱干涉成像的图像质量评价（IQA）基准数据集，由 Scientific Reports 论文明确指向 Hugging Face 公开仓库。数据包含 201 个基于物理一致仿真框架生成的灰度干涉图，覆盖相位误差、Littrow 角偏差、平台振动、传感器非均匀性等六类系统级退化，并配有结合专家感知评分和物理参数的混合质量标注。它不是常规地理配准影像，但服务于 20-100 km 近空间大气观测中的高光谱干涉遥感质量控制和算法评估。
desc_en: NSIQ is an image-quality-assessment benchmark for near-space hyperspectral interferometric imaging, explicitly linked from a Scientific Reports data availability statement to a public Hugging Face repository. It contains 201 simulated grayscale interferograms generated with a physically consistent framework, covering six system-level degradation types such as phase errors, Littrow-angle deviations, vibration and sensor non-uniformity, together with hybrid quality labels based on expert perception and physical parameters. It is not conventional georeferenced imagery, but it supports quality-control and IQA research for near-space atmospheric hyperspectral interferometric remote sensing.
openness: open
source_type: paper data availability / Hugging Face dataset repository
evidence: Nature Scientific Reports data availability section states the NSIQ dataset is publicly available on Hugging Face at Bwhitebear/NSIQ and includes simulated near-space hyperspectral interferometric images with quality annotations. Hugging Face files page lists MIT license, 22 MB repository, TIFF files, dist_interferogram.txt, dist_processed.txt, interferogram.zip and processed.zip.
scale: simulated benchmark dataset
feature_count: 201 grayscale interferograms; six representative degradation types

name: Mine Soil Metal GF-5 AHSI Hyperspectral Retrieval Dataset in Lengshuijiang
provider: Science Data Bank / Zhang X.; Remote Sensing MDPI authors
theme_canonical: GF-5 AHSI hyperspectral imagery and field soil heavy-metal measurements for mine-soil metal retrieval
theme_raw: Mine soil metal hyperspectral retrieval dataset in Lengshuijiang City, Hunan Province
coverage: Lengshuijiang Antimony Mine, Hunan Province, China; 111°20′-111°35′E, 27°35′-27°45′N
license: Science Data Bank dataset DOI; MDPI article is CC BY 4.0; dataset access stated as public/no embargo/no login in article data availability statement
formats: GF-5 AHSI hyperspectral imagery, soil sampling data, and processing code; repository file formats not fully visible in accessible metadata
access: public Science Data Bank landing page via DOI; article states no embargo or login requirement
doi_or_citation: Science Data Bank DOI 10.57760/sciencedb.29811; Zhang X. Mine soil metal hyperspectral retrieval dataset in Lengshuijiang City, Hunan Province. Sci. Data Bank 2025; Remote Sensing DOI 10.3390/rs18050767
time_span: GF-5 AHSI scene acquired 2024-09-24; field soil samples collected July-August 2024; Science Data Bank dataset 2025; article published 2026-03-03
notes: Added from a 2-hop literature-to-repository chain: Remote Sensing 2026 article data availability statement -> DOI 10.57760/sciencedb.29811 -> ScienceDB dataset landing page. Includes one GF-5 AHSI mining-area scene, 53 soil samples, eight heavy metals (Pb, Cd, Cr, Hg, As, Cu, Zn, Ni), and processing code for retrieval experiments.
desc_zh: 该数据集面向湖南冷水江市锑矿区土壤重金属遥感反演，论文数据可用性声明明确指向 Science Data Bank 的公开 DOI。数据包含 2024 年 9 月 24 日获取的 GF-5 AHSI 高光谱影像、2024 年 7-8 月采集的 53 个表层土壤样点，以及支撑 Pb、Cd、Cr、Hg、As、Cu、Zn、Ni 八种金属反演实验的处理代码。它适合用于矿区土壤污染高光谱解混、重金属含量反演和遥感环境监测算法验证。
desc_en: This dataset supports hyperspectral retrieval of soil heavy metals in the Lengshuijiang antimony mining area of Hunan, China, and is explicitly linked from the article data-availability statement to a Science Data Bank DOI. It includes a GF-5 AHSI hyperspectral scene acquired on 24 September 2024, 53 surface-soil samples collected in July-August 2024, and processing code for retrieval experiments on Pb, Cd, Cr, Hg, As, Cu, Zn, and Ni. It is useful for mine-soil hyperspectral unmixing, heavy-metal inversion, and remote-sensing environmental monitoring benchmarks.
openness: public Science Data Bank repository; no embargo/login stated in article data availability statement
source_type: satellite hyperspectral environmental retrieval dataset
evidence: Remote Sensing 18(5):767 describes GF-5 AHSI data over Lengshuijiang, 53 field soil samples, and eight metals; its Data Availability Statement says the hyperspectral imagery, soil sampling data, and processing code are publicly available at DOI 10.57760/sciencedb.29811 without embargo or login for peer review. DOI resolution returned ScienceDB dataSetId 1bc8a73bc20545518841ec8fd8a0ed83.
scale: single GF-5 AHSI mining-area scene plus field soil sampling campaign
feature_count: 53 soil samples; 8 heavy metals; GF-5 AHSI 330-band scene

name: UnorthoDOS EMIT Orthorectified and Unorthorectified Methane Plume Dataset
provider: SpaceML / Hugging Face / Chen, Lambdouar, Marini, Martínez-Ferrer, Bridges and Acciarini
theme_canonical: EMIT hyperspectral methane plume tiles for onboard satellite methane detection, with orthorectified and unorthorectified variants
theme_raw: UnorthoDOS - Unorthorectified Dataset for On board Satellite methane detection
coverage: EMIT methane plume scenes; Hugging Face tags include region:us, file names include geolocated latitude/longitude tile identifiers
formats: Hugging Face dataset repository; NumPy .npy tiles under tiles_orthorectified and unorthorectified plume folders; README and Git LFS/Xet-hosted files
access: public Hugging Face dataset repository; not gated; repository contains plume subset, full publication dataset available by contacting authors
doi_or_citation: Hugging Face DOI 10.57967/hf/6778; arXiv:2509.00626, Towards Methane Detection Onboard Satellites
time_span: Hugging Face repository last modified 2025-10-24; example EMIT tile filenames include 2022-08-10 acquisitions; paper arXiv published 2025-08-30
notes: Added from Hugging Face search and API verification. The repository explicitly states that it contains only the methane-plume subset because of storage limits, while the full dataset used in the associated publication is available from the authors. It complements existing MARS/STARCOP/EMIT methane rows by focusing on onboard-detection-ready orthorectified versus unorthorectified EMIT tiles.
desc_zh: UnorthoDOS 是面向星上甲烷检测研究的 EMIT 高光谱数据集，发布在 Hugging Face，并带有数据 DOI。仓库包含正射校正与未正射校正两类机器学习就绪影像切片，重点覆盖含甲烷 plume 的 EMIT 场景，文件以 NumPy `.npy` 形式组织。由于仓库存储限制，公开仓库收录的是 plume 子集；关联论文使用的完整数据集可联系作者获取，因此该条记录为公开子集加可申请完整集的数据入口。
desc_en: UnorthoDOS is an EMIT hyperspectral dataset for onboard satellite methane-detection research, published on Hugging Face with a dataset DOI. The repository provides ML-ready orthorectified and unorthorectified image tiles, focused on EMIT scenes containing methane plumes and stored primarily as NumPy `.npy` files. Because of repository storage limits, the public release contains the plume subset, while the full dataset used in the associated paper is available from the authors on request.
openness: open Hugging Face subset under MIT; full publication dataset by author contact
source_type: satellite hyperspectral methane detection benchmark
evidence: Hugging Face page lists tasks image segmentation/classification, tags methane-detection/hyperspectral/satellite-imagery, DOI 10.57967/hf/6778, MIT license, and total file size 33.6 GB. Dataset card states the repository contains two ML-ready datasets made from EMIT hyperspectral images, one orthorectified and one unorthorectified, for methane detection; it also states that only plume images are included publicly due to storage limits. Hugging Face API confirmed private=false, gated=false, downloads=451, 11,722 sibling files, and arXiv:2509.00626.
scale: 33.6 GB public plume subset; 11,722 repository files; full dataset available by author contact
feature_count: orthorectified and unorthorectified EMIT methane-plume tiles

name: China Hyperspectral Vertical Remote Sensing Aerosol NO2 HCHO Profiles Dataset 2019-2023
provider: Zenodo / University of Science and Technology of China / Atmospheric Composition Hyperspectral Vertical Remote Sensing Network
theme_canonical: ground-based hyperspectral vertical remote-sensing profiles of aerosol, NO2 and HCHO atmospheric composition
theme_raw: A dataset of ground-based vertical profile observations of aerosol, NO2 and HCHO from the hyperspectral vertical remote sensing network in China (2019-2023)
coverage: 32 ground-based sites across seven major regions of China; urban and regional atmospheric-composition monitoring contexts
formats: Zenodo XLSX files: AEROSOL.xlsx, HCHO.xlsx, NO2.xlsx, plus Readme.doc; earlier v2 includes AEROSOL(1).xlsx, HCHO(1).xlsx and NO2(1).xlsx
access: public Zenodo dataset download; version v3 record plus concept DOI/version chain
doi_or_citation: 10.5281/zenodo.19396716; concept/related DOI 10.5281/zenodo.15211604; Jiao et al. (2025), Earth System Science Data, doi:10.5194/essd-17-3167-2025
time_span: observations from 2019-2023; Zenodo v3 published 2026-04-03; ESSD article published 2025
notes: Added through a 2-hop chain from the already cataloged O3/HONO hyperspectral vertical remote-sensing dataset and its ESSD references. This is a separate atmospheric-composition profile dataset for aerosol, NO2 and HCHO, not a duplicate of the O3/HONO/OH-radical profile dataset. Zenodo v3 is a smaller curated file package, while the related v2/concept page exposes large XLSX files under DOI 10.5281/zenodo.15211604.
desc_zh: 该数据集来自中国大气成分高光谱垂直遥感网络，提供 2019-2023 年 32 个地基站点的气溶胶、NO2 和 HCHO 垂直剖面观测。Zenodo v3 页面显示数据以 AEROSOL、HCHO、NO2 三个 XLSX 文件和 Readme 发布，许可为 CC BY 4.0；关联 ESSD 数据论文说明该网络具有约 15 分钟级高时间分辨率，覆盖中国七大区域。它补充了已收录的 O3/HONO 剖面数据，适合大气污染垂直结构、源-受体关系、卫星反演验证和多平台遥感协同研究。
desc_en: This dataset comes from China’s Atmospheric Composition Hyperspectral Vertical Remote Sensing Network and provides vertical profile observations of aerosol, NO2 and HCHO at 32 ground-based sites from 2019 to 2023. The Zenodo v3 record distributes AEROSOL, HCHO and NO2 XLSX files plus a Readme under CC BY 4.0, and the associated ESSD data paper describes high-temporal-resolution observations across seven major regions of China. It complements the already cataloged O3/HONO profile dataset and supports atmospheric pollution profiling, source-receptor analysis, satellite-retrieval validation and multi-platform remote-sensing studies.
openness: open Zenodo dataset under CC BY 4.0
source_type: ground-based hyperspectral atmospheric vertical-profile dataset
evidence: Zenodo v3 page states Dataset Open, DOI 10.5281/zenodo.19396716, CC BY 4.0, files AEROSOL.xlsx, HCHO.xlsx, NO2.xlsx and Readme.doc totaling 2.7 MB. The Zenodo/concept page for 10.5281/zenodo.15211604 describes the same dataset as passive-remote-sensing vertical profile observations of aerosol, NO2 and HCHO across 32 sites in seven major Chinese regions from 2019-2023 with approximately 15 min temporal resolution, and exposes larger XLSX files totaling 415.9 MB. ESSD 2025 article confirms public Zenodo availability and hyperspectral vertical remote-sensing network source.
scale: 32 sites across seven major regions of China; v3 file package 2.7 MB, related v2/concept files 415.9 MB; total Zenodo data volume reported much larger through downloads/versioning
feature_count: aerosol extinction, NO2 and HCHO vertical profiles
file_size: 2.7 MB v3 package; related v2/concept page lists 415.9 MB files

name: DOORS Black Sea Cruise 3 TriOS Hyperspectral Remote Sensing Reflectance Dataset
provider: Zenodo / DOORS Black Sea Project / University of Stirling / Institute of Oceanology Bulgarian Academy of Sciences
theme_canonical: above-water TriOS hyperspectral remote-sensing reflectance and optical-biogeochemical validation data for Black Sea ocean-colour products
theme_raw: Optical and biogeochemical data from DOORS cruise 3, 01-20 June 2024
coverage: Black Sea DOORS cruise 3, 01-20 June 2024
formats: Zenodo CSV and PDF: DOORS_Jun2024_Rrs.csv and Readme.pdf
access: public Zenodo dataset download; part of EU Open Research Repository / Doorsblacksea Project
doi_or_citation: 10.5281/zenodo.15778382; Jiang et al. 2025e; data availability chain from GIScience & Remote Sensing DOI 10.1080/15481603.2026.2662816
time_span: DOORS cruise 3, 01-20 June 2024; dataset published 2025-05-31; checked open 2026-06-11
notes: Added from a 2-hop literature data-availability chain: GIScience & Remote Sensing 2026 Black Sea ocean-colour validation paper -> Zenodo DOORS data citations -> Cruise 3 open Zenodo record. Related DOORS cruise 1 and cruise 2 Zenodo pages 15778233 and 15778332 were not added in this pass because Zenodo still marked their files Embargoed at check time, despite the article noting an embargo date of 2026-05-31.
desc_zh: 该数据集来自欧盟 DOORS Black Sea 项目的第 3 航次，提供 2024 年 6 月 1-20 日黑海现场观测的高光谱遥感反射率数据。Zenodo 页面说明 Rrs 由 TriOS 仪器采用 above-water 方法测量，单位为 sr^-1，并以 `DOORS_Jun2024_Rrs.csv` 和 Readme 发布，许可为 CC BY 4.0。它可用于黑海水色产品验证、区域水体光学算法评估，以及与 Copernicus/CERTO/EUMETSAT 海洋水色产品的对比分析。
desc_en: This dataset comes from the third DOORS Black Sea cruise and provides hyperspectral remote-sensing reflectance observations collected from 1-20 June 2024. The Zenodo record states that Rrs was measured with TriOS using an above-water approach and is distributed as `DOORS_Jun2024_Rrs.csv` with a Readme under CC BY 4.0. It supports Black Sea ocean-colour validation, regional optical-water algorithms, and comparison with Copernicus, CERTO and EUMETSAT ocean-colour products.
openness: open Zenodo dataset under CC BY 4.0
source_type: shipborne/in-situ hyperspectral ocean-colour validation dataset
evidence: Zenodo record 15778382 states Dataset Open, DOI 10.5281/zenodo.15778382, published 2025-05-31, DOORS Black Sea project, CC BY 4.0, and files DOORS_Jun2024_Rrs.csv (148.5 kB) plus Readme.pdf. Description says Rrs remote sensing reflectance was measured using TriOS with the above-water approach during DOORS cruise 3. The 2026 GIScience & Remote Sensing Black Sea validation article cites this DOI as openly available TriOS hyperspectral / optical-biogeochemical DOORS data.
scale: one Black Sea cruise data package; Zenodo files total 180.2 kB; total served data volume 689.3 kB at check time
feature_count: TriOS above-water Rrs remote-sensing reflectance records for DOORS cruise 3
file_size: 180.2 kB files; 689.3 kB total data volume reported by Zenodo
