provider: Zenodo / Wrocław University of Science and Technology / Polish Academy of Sciences / MIRORES Mining Data Services
theme_canonical: EnMAP-derived spectral curves and mineral-abundance support data for porphyry copper deposit detection in arid climates
theme_raw: Towards transferable detection of Porphyry Copper Deposits: integrating multispectral, hyperspectral and field data in arid climates
coverage: Sierra Gorda / arid porphyry copper study area, UTM zone EPSG:32719 test pixels
formats: Zenodo ZIP/7z package; EnMAP_supplementary_data.zip contains README, CSV source tables and PNG quicklooks; Sentinel-2 archives and waypoint archives also provided
access: public Zenodo dataset download; latest version v2 at DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20506706
time_span: Published 2026-06-02; supplementary EnMAP-derived products for manuscript figures 10 and 11
notes: Added from a June 2026 Zenodo/DataCite follow-up. The record is a supplementary geospatial dataset, not a full redistribution of the original EnMAP scene. ZIP inspection confirmed derived EnMAP products: normalized spectral curves, 850 nm absorption-depth source data, UTM coordinates for four EnMAP test pixels, field-estimated mineral abundance values aggregated to EnMAP pixels, and SWIR quicklook figures. Sentinel-2 files are included in the same Zenodo record but the catalog row is scoped to the EnMAP/hyperspectral supplementary component.
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo v2 记录是论文《Towards transferable detection of Porphyry Copper Deposits》配套的开放地理空间数据集，面向干旱区斑岩铜矿可迁移识别。页面列出 `EnMAP_supplementary_data.zip`、Sentinel-2 压缩包和航点文件，许可为 CC BY 4.0；本轮 ZIP 预览确认 EnMAP 补充包包含归一化光谱曲线、850 nm 吸收深度源数据、4 个 EnMAP 测试像元的 UTM 坐标、聚合到像元的野外矿物丰度摘要以及 SWIR 快视图。它不是完整 EnMAP 原始场景重分发，而是可复现实验和图件解释用的高光谱派生数据，适合矿物填图、斑岩铜矿遥感识别和多源遥感迁移性研究。
desc_en: This Zenodo v2 record is an open supplementary geospatial dataset for the manuscript “Towards transferable detection of Porphyry Copper Deposits”, focused on transferable mineral-exploration mapping in arid climates. The page lists `EnMAP_supplementary_data.zip`, Sentinel-2 archives and waypoint files under CC BY 4.0; local ZIP inspection confirmed EnMAP-derived normalized spectral curves, 850 nm absorption-depth source data, UTM coordinates for four EnMAP test pixels, field-estimated mineral abundances aggregated to those pixels, and SWIR quicklook figures. It does not redistribute the full original EnMAP scene, but provides reproducible hyperspectral derived data for figure interpretation, mineral mapping, porphyry-copper detection and multisource remote-sensing transfer studies.
openness: open
source_type: repository dataset
evidence: Zenodo page for latest record 20506706 states Dataset Open, published 2026-06-02, DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20506706, CC BY 4.0, and files EnMAP_supplementary_data.zip, SENTINEL.7z, SENTINEL GRID.7z and waypoints.7z. Zenodo API returned the same title, DOI and file list. Local ZIP inspection saved as research/zenodo_20506706_enmap_zip_preview_phase280.json found README text saying the package contains derived EnMAP products for manuscript figures 10 and 11 and that the full EnMAP scene is not redistributed; files include enmap_normalized_spectral_curves.csv, enmap_absorption_depth_at_850_nm_source_data.csv, enmap_test_points_coordinates_UTM.csv and enmap_pixel_mineral_abundance_summary.csv.
scale: four analyzed EnMAP test pixels with derived spectral curves, absorption metrics and aggregated field mineral-abundance support tables; companion Sentinel-2 and waypoint archives in same record
feature_count: 4 EnMAP test pixels plus source-data curves and supporting geospatial tables

name: USDA Cotton Multi-Site FieldSpec Hyperspectral Reflectance and Growth Dataset
provider: USDA Agricultural Research Service / Ag Data Commons / Figshare
theme_canonical: cotton canopy hyperspectral reflectance with biophysical and biochemical field measurements across USDA-ARS stations
theme_raw: Data from: Hyperspectral reflectance and machine learning for multi-site monitoring of cotton growth
coverage: El Reno, Oklahoma and Temple, Texas USDA-ARS research stations, USA
formats: CSV via Ag Data Commons/Figshare; MasterCottonCombinedFinal.csv
access: public Ag Data Commons/Figshare download
doi_or_citation: 10.15482/USDA.ADC/27765477.v1; Flynn et al. 2024, Cotton biophysical, biochemical, and hyperspectral data from LTAR USDA-ARS stations
time_span: 2019 and Texas Gulf station cotton field experiments; dataset posted 2024-11-20
notes: Added from USDA Ag Data Commons/Figshare API and local CSV preview. This is a field/proximal hyperspectral reflectance table rather than a raster image cube, but it is an open institutional hyperspectral remote-sensing support dataset with geospatial/agronomic station context and paired biophysical/biochemical variables. Preview saved as research/usda_cotton_27765477_preview_phase281.json.
desc_zh: 该 USDA Ag Data Commons 数据集汇集了 Oklahoma El Reno 与 Texas Temple/ Texas Gulf USDA-ARS 站点的棉花田间高光谱反射率、作物长势和生物物理/生化观测。Figshare API 显示其 DOI 为 10.15482/USDA.ADC/27765477.v1，许可为 U.S. Public Domain，文件为 `MasterCottonCombinedFinal.csv`。本地预览确认表格有 294 行、2159 列，包含 location、Date、株高、LAI、冠层覆盖、叶绿素以及从 350 nm 起的逐纳米高光谱反射率字段，适合棉花长势监测、作物参数反演和机器学习建模。
desc_en: This USDA Ag Data Commons dataset combines cotton field hyperspectral reflectance, crop-growth and biophysical/biochemical observations from the El Reno, Oklahoma and Temple/Texas Gulf USDA-ARS stations. The Figshare API reports DOI 10.15482/USDA.ADC/27765477.v1, U.S. Public Domain licensing and the file `MasterCottonCombinedFinal.csv`. Local preview confirmed 294 rows and 2,159 columns, including location, date, plant height, LAI, canopy cover, chlorophyll and per-nanometer hyperspectral reflectance fields starting at 350 nm, supporting cotton growth monitoring, crop-parameter retrieval and machine-learning studies.
openness: open
source_type: repository dataset; field/proximal hyperspectral reflectance
evidence: Ag Data Commons/Figshare API for article 27765477 returned title, DOI 10.15482/USDA.ADC/27765477.v1, U.S. Public Domain license, one downloadable CSV file MasterCottonCombinedFinal.csv (4,227,783 bytes), and description of cotton field projects at El Reno, OK and Temple, TX. Local CSV preview saved as usda_cotton_27765477_preview_phase281.json found 294 rows, 2,159 columns and spectral columns beginning at 350 nm.
scale: 294 field records with 2,159 columns including 350 nm onward hyperspectral reflectance and cotton biophysical/biochemical variables
feature_count: 294 rows; 2,159 columns

name: USDA Southern Plains Legume FieldSpec Hyperspectral and Biophysical Dataset
provider: USDA Agricultural Research Service / Ag Data Commons / Figshare
theme_canonical: legume canopy hyperspectral reflectance with in-situ biophysical and biochemical measurements in the Southern Plains
theme_raw: Legume hyperspectral and in-situ biophysical/biochemical dataset collected in the Southern Plains
coverage: El Reno, Oklahoma, USA; Southern Plains legume experiment
formats: CSV via Ag Data Commons/Figshare; LegumesCombinedNitrogenV2.csv
access: public Ag Data Commons/Figshare download
doi_or_citation: 10.15482/USDA.ADC/27868425.v1; Flynn et al. 2024, Legume hyperspectral and in-situ biophysical/biochemical dataset collected in the Southern Plains
notes: Added from USDA project-page lead and Figshare API. This is a field/proximal hyperspectral reflectance table paired with agronomic and biochemical measurements for soybean, mothbean and tepary bean, not an image cube. Preview saved as research/usda_legume_27868425_preview_phase281.json.
desc_zh: 该 USDA Ag Data Commons 数据集提供 Southern Plains / El Reno, Oklahoma 2018-2019 年豆科作物试验的高光谱反射率和原位生物物理/生化观测。Figshare API 显示其 DOI 为 10.15482/USDA.ADC/27868425.v1，许可为 U.S. Public Domain，文件为 `LegumesCombinedNitrogenV2.csv`。本地预览确认表格有 334 行、2168 列，包含作物种类、行距、冠层覆盖、叶绿素、干重、氮/碳含量以及从 350 nm 起的逐纳米光谱字段，可用于豆科作物氮素、冠层结构和高光谱参数反演研究。
desc_en: This USDA Ag Data Commons dataset provides hyperspectral reflectance and in-situ biophysical/biochemical observations from a 2018-2019 Southern Plains legume experiment at El Reno, Oklahoma. The Figshare API reports DOI 10.15482/USDA.ADC/27868425.v1, U.S. Public Domain licensing and the file `LegumesCombinedNitrogenV2.csv`. Local preview confirmed 334 rows and 2,168 columns, including species, row spacing, canopy cover, chlorophyll, dry weight, nitrogen/carbon content and per-nanometer spectral fields starting at 350 nm, supporting legume nitrogen, canopy-structure and hyperspectral retrieval studies.
openness: open
source_type: repository dataset; field/proximal hyperspectral reflectance
evidence: Ag Data Commons/Figshare API for article 27868425 returned title, DOI 10.15482/USDA.ADC/27868425.v1, U.S. Public Domain license, one downloadable CSV file LegumesCombinedNitrogenV2.csv (7,384,317 bytes), and description of a soybean/mothbean/tepary bean field experiment with FieldSpec Pro FR 350-2500 nm readings and biophysical/biochemical measures. Local CSV preview saved as usda_legume_27868425_preview_phase281.json found 334 rows, 2,168 columns and spectral columns beginning at 350 nm.
scale: 334 field records with 2,168 columns including 350 nm onward hyperspectral reflectance and legume biophysical/biochemical variables
feature_count: 334 rows; 2,168 columns

name: AHS-FGCC Cotton Full-Growth-Cycle UAV Hyperspectral Orthophoto Dataset
provider: Science Data Bank / Shihezi University
theme_canonical: full-growth-cycle UAV hyperspectral orthophotos of cotton acquired with a Rikola imaging spectrometer
theme_raw: Construction and analysis of Airborne Hyperspectral orthophoto data set in the whole growth cycle of cotton
coverage: Cotton field study area in Xinjiang / Shihezi University agricultural remote-sensing context, China
license: Creative Commons Attribution Non Commercial No Derivatives 4.0 International
formats: ScienceDB dataset package; UAV hyperspectral orthophoto data and metadata
access: public ScienceDB dataset page and DOI; 4.5 GB package indicated by JSON-LD
doi_or_citation: 10.57760/sciencedb.07098; Cheng et al. 2023, Construction and analysis of airborne hyperspectral orthophoto data set in the whole growth cycle of cotton
time_span: seven cotton growth phases; dataset published 2023-02-06 on Science Data Bank
notes: Added from ScienceDB JSON-LD and the Shihezi University journal data-availability chain. The dataset is an actual UAV hyperspectral orthophoto collection for the full growth cycle of cotton, acquired at 100 m altitude with a DJI M600 Pro and Rikola hyperspectral imager. Local page snapshot saved as research/sciencedb_ahs_fgcc_a07c3451_phase281.html.
desc_zh: AHS-FGCC 是科学数据银行发布的棉花全生长周期机载高光谱正射影像数据集。论文与 ScienceDB 页面说明，该数据由 DJI M600 Pro 无人机搭载 Rikola 高光谱成像仪在 100 m 航高采集，同一区域同一棉花品种覆盖苗期、苗后期、蕾期、花期、铃期、盛铃期和吐絮期 7 个阶段，并经过标准预处理。ScienceDB JSON-LD 给出 DOI 10.57760/sciencedb.07098、PUBLIC 访问、CC BY-NC-ND 4.0 许可和约 4.5 GB 数据包，适合棉花长势监测、作物参数反演和低空遥感精细农业研究。
desc_en: AHS-FGCC is a Science Data Bank airborne hyperspectral orthophoto dataset covering the full growth cycle of cotton. The associated paper and ScienceDB page state that a DJI M600 Pro UAV carrying a Rikola hyperspectral imager acquired seven growth phases for the same cotton variety and area at 100 m altitude: seedling, post-seedling, bud, flowering, boll-forming, peak-boll and open-boll stages, followed by standard preprocessing. ScienceDB JSON-LD reports DOI 10.57760/sciencedb.07098, PUBLIC access, CC BY-NC-ND 4.0 licensing and an approximately 4.5 GB package, supporting cotton growth monitoring, crop-parameter retrieval and low-altitude precision-agriculture remote sensing.
openness: open
source_type: repository dataset; UAV hyperspectral orthophoto imagery
evidence: ScienceDB page snapshot phase281 exposes schema.org Dataset JSON-LD with DOI 10.57760/sciencedb.07098, conditionsOfAccess PUBLIC, license CC BY-NC-ND 4.0, keywords cotton/UAV remote sensing/hyperspectral/dataset/growth cycle/orthophoto, publisher Science Data Bank and size 4,500,158,880 bytes. The page description states DJI M600 Pro + Rikola hyperspectral imager, seven cotton growth phases at 100 m altitude, standard preprocessing, and consistency against ASD ground spectrometer curves in 503-850 nm. The Shihezi University journal page states the data are published at the same ScienceDB dataSetId.
scale: 7 UAV hyperspectral orthophoto phases for one cotton variety and area across the full growth cycle
feature_count: 7 growth-stage UAV hyperspectral acquisitions

name: HYPERNETS Multi-Site Sentinel-2/Sentinel-3 Water Product Match-up Database
provider: HYPERNETS / Zenodo / González Vilas et al. / RBINS and partner site PIs
theme_canonical: match-up database linking HYPSTAR hyperspectral in-situ water reflectance with Sentinel-2 MSI and Sentinel-3 OLCI water products
theme_raw: Match-up Database (MDB) files for the validation of satellite water products from Sentinel-3 OLCI and Sentinel-2 MSI using the initial samples of HYPERNETS in situ data
coverage: Six HYPERNETS water sites: BEFR, VEIT, MAFR, LPAR, GAIT and M1BE; Europe and Argentina
formats: Zenodo NetCDF MDB files; Sentinel-3 OLCI WFR and Sentinel-2 MSI ACOLITE/C2RCC matchups with HYPSTAR in-situ radiometry
access: public Zenodo dataset download
doi_or_citation: 10.5281/zenodo.10721333; González Vilas et al. 2024 Frontiers in Remote Sensing validation study
time_span: HYPSTAR in-situ radiometry and satellite matchups from 2021-01-01 to 2023-03-31; dataset published 2024-03-04
notes: Added from a HYPERNETS literature/reference-chain follow-up. This is not a new single-site HYPSTAR raw reflectance sample; it is a derived multi-site MDB product that links initial HYPERNETS in-situ hyperspectral radiometry to Sentinel-2 MSI and Sentinel-3 OLCI satellite water products for validation. Constituent site samples such as VEIT, BEFR, MAFR, LAPR/LPAR, GAIT and M1BE are represented elsewhere in the catalog, so this row is scoped to the cross-sensor match-up database.
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 数据集提供用于验证 Sentinel-3 OLCI 和 Sentinel-2 MSI 水体产品的 HYPERNETS 多站点 match-up database。Zenodo API 显示其 DOI 为 10.5281/zenodo.10721333、许可为 CC BY 4.0，包含 28 个 NetCDF 文件，总量约 516 MB，文件名覆盖 S3A/S3B OLCI WFR、S2A/S2B MSI ACOLITE/DSF 与 C2RCC 产品，以及 BEFR、VEIT、MAFR、LPAR、GAIT、M1BE 等 HYPSTAR 站点。它把 2021-01 至 2023-03 的高光谱原位水体辐射/反射率观测与卫星产品配对，适合水色产品验证、算法互比和多站点误差分析。
desc_en: This Zenodo dataset provides HYPERNETS multi-site match-up database files for validating Sentinel-3 OLCI and Sentinel-2 MSI water products. The Zenodo API reports DOI 10.5281/zenodo.10721333, CC BY 4.0 licensing and 28 NetCDF files totaling about 516 MB, covering S3A/S3B OLCI WFR, S2A/S2B MSI ACOLITE/DSF and C2RCC products together with HYPSTAR sites such as BEFR, VEIT, MAFR, LPAR, GAIT and M1BE. It pairs hyperspectral in-situ water radiometry/reflectance observations from January 2021 to March 2023 with satellite products, supporting water-colour validation, processor intercomparison and multi-site error analysis.
openness: open
source_type: repository dataset; derived satellite/in-situ match-up database
evidence: Zenodo API for record 10721333 returned title, DOI 10.5281/zenodo.10721333, CC BY 4.0, 28 NetCDF files totaling 516,228,342 bytes, and description stating that the MDB validates Sentinel-3 OLCI L2 WFR, Sentinel-2 MSI ACOLITE/DSF and Sentinel-2 MSI C2RCC water products using HYPSTAR hyperspectral in-situ radiometry acquired between January 2021 and March 2023 at six water sites. File names explicitly include HYPSTAR_BEFR, VEIT, MAFR, LPAR, GAIT and M1BE matchups.
scale: 28 NetCDF match-up database files for 6 HYPERNETS water sites and multiple Sentinel-2/Sentinel-3 processors
feature_count: 28 NetCDF MDB files

name: PANGAEA Global OLCI-Matched Phytoplankton Absorption Hyperspectral IOP Dataset
provider: PANGAEA / AWI / HCMR / Bracher et al.
theme_canonical: global in-situ hyperspectral phytoplankton absorption coefficients matched to Sentinel-3 OLCI bands for ocean-colour validation
theme_raw: Absorption coefficients by phytoplankton at the first eight Ocean Land Colour Instrument (OLCI) bands from a global in-situ collection of open ocean, coastal and inland surface waters matched to OLCI
coverage: Global open ocean, coastal and inland surface waters; matchups to Sentinel-3A/3B OLCI
formats: PANGAEA tab-separated table; Croissant/HTML metadata; in-situ aph and OLCI matchup variables
access: public PANGAEA direct download
time_span: OLCI era matchups from 2016-05 to 2022-11; dataset published 2025-06-24; DOI registered 2025-07-08
notes: Added from 2026-06-12 PANGAEA/SeaBASS/PACE water-colour follow-up. This is an in-situ and satellite matchup IOP validation dataset rather than an image cube or Rrs table. It is included because the source aph(lambda) measurements are hyperspectral and the table directly supports Sentinel-3 OLCI / ocean-colour hyperspectral algorithm validation. Local PANGAEA text preview saved as research/pangaea_983241_preview_phase283.json.
desc_zh: 该 PANGAEA 数据集汇集全球开阔海、近岸和内陆水体的浮游植物吸收系数，用于 Sentinel-3 OLCI 水色产品验证。页面说明原始 aph(λ) 来自公开数据与 AWI/HCMR 新测数据，许多输入数据为 1 nm、2 nm 或约 3.3 nm 分辨率的高光谱吸收谱，并被转换到 OLCI 前 8 个波段；数据与 Sentinel-3A/3B OLCI 进行 3x3 像元、±12 小时窗口匹配。PANGAEA JSON-LD 标明 unrestricted、CC BY 4.0 和免费访问；本地预览确认 TSV 有约 554 行、51 列，包含 in-situ aph、卫星 aph 中位数、不确定度、变异系数和光学水体类别。
desc_en: This PANGAEA dataset compiles phytoplankton absorption coefficients from global open-ocean, coastal and inland surface waters for Sentinel-3 OLCI ocean-colour validation. The page states that the source aph(lambda) measurements combine public data and newly measured AWI/HCMR data, with many inputs provided at hyperspectral resolutions of 1 nm, 2 nm or about 3.3 nm and transformed to the first eight OLCI bands; in-situ points were matched to Sentinel-3A/3B OLCI within a 3x3 pixel box and ±12 h window. PANGAEA JSON-LD reports unrestricted, free CC BY 4.0 access; local TSV preview confirmed about 554 rows and 51 columns including in-situ aph, satellite median aph, uncertainties, coefficients of variation and optical water classes.
openness: open
source_type: repository dataset; in-situ hyperspectral IOP and satellite matchup table
evidence: PANGAEA page for DOI 10.1594/PANGAEA.983241 reports published 2025-06-24, CC BY 4.0 license, unrestricted/free access, and a textfile distribution. The abstract states that the dataset contains phytoplankton absorption coefficients at OLCI bands from global in-situ open, coastal and inland waters matched to Sentinel-3A/3B OLCI, using hyperspectral aph(lambda) data transformed to OLCI bands. Local download preview saved as pangaea_983241_preview_phase283.json found 660 lines, estimated 554 data rows, 51 columns, and fields for in-situ aph400-aph665, satellite median aph, uncertainties, CV and OWC.
scale: ~554 matchup rows; global in-situ/satellite aph validation table at first eight OLCI bands
feature_count: 554 data rows; 51 columns in downloaded PANGAEA TSV preview

name: CH4Vision Point-source Methane Plume Simulation Dataset for GaoFen-5 Hyperspectral Flux Estimation
provider: East China Normal University / Li and Bai; Zenodo; Journal of Remote Sensing CH4Vision authors
theme_canonical: simulated point-source methane plume data for GF-5 hyperspectral methane flux estimation
theme_raw: Point-source Methane Plume Simulations for CH4RF/CH4Vision GaoFen-5 methane plume feature framework
coverage: Ten simulated point-source methane plume cases supporting GaoFen-5 hyperspectral methane flux estimation; associated CH4Vision article applies to GaoFen-5 observations and Shanxi coal-related sources
formats: NetCDF4/HDF5 .nc files; ten simulated methane plume files
access: public Zenodo direct download
time_span: Dataset published 2025-03-24; CH4Vision article published 2026-02-27; simulated plume cases rather than direct acquisition dates
notes: Added from 2026-06-12 2-hop methane/GF-5 follow-up. The Journal of Remote Sensing CH4Vision article states that simulated methane plume data are publicly available at Zenodo record 15075874. The Zenodo record contains ten NetCDF files for simulated point-source methane plume dispersion processes. This is not a raw GF-5 image archive; it is included as a hyperspectral remote-sensing derived/simulation dataset because it directly supports a GaoFen-5 hyperspectral methane flux estimation framework and is distributed as scientific data rather than only code or a PDF.
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 数据集发布 CH4Vision/CH4RF 相关研究使用的点源甲烷羽流模拟数据，用于支持基于高分五号高光谱影像的甲烷排放通量估计。数据包包含 10 个 NetCDF4/HDF5 格式的 simulated methane plume 文件，Zenodo 元数据标注为开放数据集并采用 CC BY 4.0。它不是原始 GF-5 影像包，而是与 GF-5 高光谱甲烷羽流特征建模直接配套的模拟/派生训练验证数据，因此按边界型高光谱遥感数据集收录。
desc_en: This Zenodo dataset publishes point-source methane plume simulations used by the CH4Vision/CH4RF research line for methane emission flux estimation from GaoFen-5 hyperspectral imagery. The package contains ten NetCDF4/HDF5 simulated plume files, and the Zenodo metadata identifies it as an open CC BY 4.0 dataset. It is not a raw GF-5 image archive; it is cataloged as a boundary hyperspectral remote-sensing dataset because it directly supports GF-5 hyperspectral methane plume feature modeling and flux-estimation experiments.
openness: open
source_type: repository dataset; simulated methane plume data for hyperspectral satellite flux estimation
evidence: Web search found the CH4Vision Journal of Remote Sensing article data-availability statement pointing to Zenodo record 15075874 for simulated methane plume data. Zenodo API reports dataset resource type, DOI 10.5281/zenodo.15075874, CC BY 4.0 license, publication date 2025-03-24, and ten .nc files totaling about 5.6 MB. Local preview downloaded two files and file inspection confirmed HDF5/NetCDF4 structure with Plume/TIME strings.
scale: 10 simulated point-source methane plume NetCDF files
feature_count: 10 plume simulation files
file_size: 5.61 MB total across ten NetCDF files

name: WRF-LES Benchmark Methane Plume Simulations for Hyperspectral Emissions Validation
provider: LARS-UPV / University of Valencia / Gorroño, Pei and Guanter; Zenodo
theme_canonical: benchmark methane plume simulations for hyperspectral satellite emissions validation and sensitivity studies
theme_raw: Benchmark simulations for methane emissions validation and sensitivity studies
coverage: Simulation scenarios for point, area and multi-source methane plumes; designed for validation/sensitivity studies of satellite methane emission estimation including hyperspectral imagers
formats: Split ZIP archives; WRF-LES simulation outputs; WRF configuration files; README metadata
access: public Zenodo direct download; very large multipart archives
doi_or_citation: 10.5281/zenodo.18161182; AMT 2026 angular configuration / methane emissions validation data availability statement
time_span: Dataset published 2026-01-06; simulations rather than direct sensor acquisition dates
notes: Added from 2026-06-12 follow-up on AMT 2026 code/data availability and the already cataloged MethaneSET EMIT dataset, whose plume-bank metadata cites this Zenodo DOI. Zenodo describes WRF-LES 4.7.0 simulations of realistic methane plumes representing 3-D mass distributions in the atmospheric boundary layer over time. The dataset is not raw EMIT/EnMAP/PRISMA/GF-5 imagery; it is included as a hyperspectral remote-sensing support dataset because the stated use is methane flux-rate validation and sensitivity analysis for satellite methane emission estimation, including studies of source typology and illumination/viewing angular effects relevant to imaging spectrometers.
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 数据集发布 WRF-LES 4.7.0 生成的甲烷羽流基准模拟，用于卫星甲烷排放通量估计的验证和敏感性分析。数据包含点源、面源和多源等模拟情景的大型分卷 ZIP 档案以及 WRF 配置文件，总量约 50.9 GB；AMT 2026 论文的数据可用性声明和 MethaneSET 的 plume-bank 元数据均指向该 DOI。它不是原始高光谱影像，而是服务于 EMIT、EnMAP、PRISMA 等成像光谱仪甲烷羽流反演/通量估计评估的模拟支撑数据。
desc_en: This Zenodo dataset provides WRF-LES 4.7.0 benchmark methane plume simulations for validating satellite methane flux-rate estimation and testing sensitivity to source typology and viewing/illumination geometry. The archive includes large multipart ZIP files for point-, area- and multi-source scenarios plus WRF configuration files, totaling about 50.9 GB; both the AMT 2026 data-availability statement and MethaneSET plume-bank metadata point to this DOI. It is not raw hyperspectral imagery, but is cataloged as a support dataset for hyperspectral methane plume retrieval and emission-estimation workflows involving instruments such as EMIT, EnMAP and PRISMA.
openness: open
source_type: repository dataset; WRF-LES simulated methane plume benchmark for hyperspectral satellite validation
evidence: Web search found the AMT 2026 code/data availability statement: data available at DOI 10.5281/zenodo.18161182. Zenodo API reports dataset resource type, CC BY 4.0, publication date 2026-01-06, 26 files totaling about 50.9 GB, including WRF_configuration_files.zip plus multipart areasource_simulations.zip and multisource_simulations.zip archives. The record description states WRF-LES 4.7.0 was used to generate realistic methane plumes for validation of methane flux-rate estimations and sensitivity analysis. The existing MethaneSET catalog row also cites this DOI for its synthetic plume bank.
scale: 26 Zenodo files; point/area/multi-source methane plume simulation archives
feature_count: large multipart simulation archives plus WRF configuration files

name: Global Spectra-Trait Initiative Leaf Hyperspectral Reflectance and Photosynthetic Traits Database
provider: Global Spectra-Trait Initiative / plantphys GitHub / ESS-DIVE / NGEE Tropics
theme_canonical: paired leaf hyperspectral reflectance and photosynthetic trait database for spectra-trait model development
theme_raw: The Global Spectra-Trait Initiative: paired leaf spectroscopy and functional traits associated with leaf photosynthetic capacity
coverage: Global/diverse ecosystems; about 400 species and 41 sites in v1.0.0/v1.0.1 metadata
license: Open public GitHub and ESS-DIVE dataset; ESSD article CC BY 4.0; repository release terms should be checked for downstream reuse
formats: ESS-DIVE dataset package; GitHub repository ZIP/release; synthesized CSV database; metadata files; input datasets and code
access: public ESS-DIVE DOI and public GitHub repository/release
time_span: ESS-DIVE issued 2025; ESSD article published 2026-01-09; GitHub latest release v1.0.1 published 2026-02-06
notes: Added from 2026-06-12 ESSD code/data availability follow-up. This is not a remote-sensing image cube or raster product. It is included as a boundary/support dataset because the ESSD paper and DataCite abstract describe paired leaf hyperspectral reflectance and gas-exchange/functional trait observations for building and validating spectra-trait models relevant to imaging spectroscopy and hyperspectral remote sensing. The dataset is kept in the hyperspectral workstream with this boundary explicitly stated.
desc_zh: Global Spectra-Trait Initiative (GSTI) 是一个开放的叶片高光谱反射率与光合作用功能性状配对数据库，用于开发和验证基于光谱的叶片性状模型。DataCite/ESS-DIVE 元数据说明 v1.0.0 包含超过 7500 条配对观测，覆盖约 400 个物种和广泛生物群落；ESSD 论文说明数据和代码在 GitHub 公开，并发布到 ESS-DIVE。它不是遥感影像栅格数据，而是服务于高光谱成像/遥感性状反演模型的原位光谱支撑数据集。
desc_en: The Global Spectra-Trait Initiative (GSTI) is an open paired leaf hyperspectral reflectance and photosynthetic trait database for developing and validating spectra-trait models. DataCite/ESS-DIVE metadata describe more than 7,500 paired observations from around 400 species, while the ESSD paper states that the data and code are public on GitHub and published to ESS-DIVE. It is not a remote-sensing image raster or hyperspectral cube; it is cataloged as an in-situ spectral support dataset for hyperspectral imaging and remote-sensing trait retrieval models.
openness: open public GitHub plus ESS-DIVE dataset DOI
source_type: repository dataset; in-situ leaf hyperspectral spectra-trait database for remote-sensing model support
evidence: Web search found the ESSD 2026 paper code/data availability statement: GSTI data and code are public at https://github.com/plantphys/gsti and published to ESS-DIVE DOI 10.15485/2530733. DataCite API for 10.15485/2530733 reports Dataset resource type, publisher NGEE Tropics, issued 2025, and an abstract describing >7500 paired observations from around 400 species, synthesized CSV database, metadata files and GitHub repository ZIP. GitHub API confirmed a public plantphys/gsti repository and latest release v1.0.1 published 2026-02-06.
scale: >7500 paired leaf observations; about 400 species; 41 sites reported by ESSD/search metadata
feature_count: synthesized spectra-trait database plus input datasets, metadata and code
file_size: not fully summed; ESS-DIVE/GitHub repository package

name: HyLAP EnMAP Agricultural Vegetation Traits Demonstrator Dataset 2024
provider: HyLAP project / Zenodo / EnMAP and Sentinel-2 agricultural products
theme_canonical: EnMAP-based agricultural vegetation trait products for field crops and grassland validation and mapping
theme_raw: HyLAP - Hyperspectral Products for Agricultural Practise - Demonstrator Dataset - Hybrid Retrieval of Vegetation Traits - Validation and Mapping
coverage: HyLAP 2024 agricultural demonstrator fields for crops and grassland; EnMAP and Sentinel-2 product integration
formats: QGIS ZIP demonstrator package; PDF methods/validation results; PNG overview
access: public Zenodo direct download
notes: Added from DataCite updated-dataset search for hyperspectral remote sensing. Zenodo describes demand-oriented agricultural information products based on hyperspectral satellite data, including EnMAP tasking, field campaigns, hybrid retrieval of LAI, Cab, Narea and AGB, EWTcanopy inversion, and EnMAP/Sentinel-2 product integration. The downloadable QGIS package is a derived/product demonstrator rather than raw EnMAP scenes.
desc_zh: HyLAP demonstrator 数据集面向农业实践中的高光谱产品应用，围绕作物和草地的植物发育监测、甜菜病害制图、草地产量与质量评估等场景组织。Zenodo 页面说明该项目结合现场调查、EnMAP 任务规划和 Sentinel-2 产品，提供 LAI、Cab、Narea、AGB 与 EWTcanopy 等植被变量的混合反演和验证/制图结果。该条记录收录的是 QGIS 形式的派生产品演示包，而不是原始 EnMAP 影像。
desc_en: The HyLAP demonstrator dataset targets practical agricultural hyperspectral products for crop and grassland monitoring, sugar-beet disease mapping, and grassland yield/quality assessment. The Zenodo record describes field campaigns, EnMAP tasking, Sentinel-2 integration, and hybrid retrieval of vegetation variables such as LAI, Cab, Narea, AGB and EWTcanopy. The catalog records the QGIS-based derived product demonstrator rather than raw EnMAP image scenes.
openness: open
source_type: repository dataset; EnMAP agricultural derived product demonstrator
evidence: DataCite search returned DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20639620. Zenodo API reports dataset type, CC BY 4.0, publication 2026-06-11, concept DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20072059, three files totaling about 29 MB including HyLAP_Demonstrator_2024_QGIS.zip, methods/validation PDF and overview PNG. Record description states development of agricultural products based on hyperspectral satellite data, field campaigns, EnMAP tasking, vegetation-variable retrieval and EnMAP/Sentinel-2 integration.
scale: 2024 agricultural demonstrator package
feature_count: QGIS demonstrator ZIP plus methods/validation PDF and overview PNG

name: EMIT Kabul Region Geospatially Validated Hyperspectral Mineral Classification Dataset
provider: Zenodo dataset authors / NASA EMIT imaging spectrometer / USGS geological reference maps
theme_canonical: EMIT hyperspectral reflectance tabular dataset for supervised mineral classification in Afghanistan
theme_raw: A Novel Geospatially Validated EMIT-Based Hyperspectral Dataset for AI-Driven Mineralogical Mapping
coverage: Kabul Province and surrounding regions, Afghanistan; pilot independent test area in Bagrami district; Surobi district described in metadata
formats: CSV train/test tables with 244 spectral bands and mineral labels; preprocessed GeoTIFF patch; README
access: public Zenodo direct download
time_span: Dataset published 2026; EMIT acquisition dates not stated in accessible metadata
notes: Added from DataCite updated-dataset search. This is a processed EMIT machine-learning dataset rather than a full EMIT scene archive. Each row represents one pixel with 244 reflectance bands and an integer mineral class label derived from geological reference maps; a small preprocessed GeoTIFF patch is included.
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 数据集基于 NASA EMIT 成像光谱仪数据，面向阿富汗 Kabul 及周边地区的监督式矿物分类。数据以 train/test CSV 发布，每行代表一个像元，包含 244 个光谱反射率波段和一个矿物类别标签，标签来自 USGS 地质参考图；同时提供 README 和小型预处理 GeoTIFF patch。它不是完整 EMIT 原始影像档案，而是面向 AI 矿物制图的地理验证高光谱派生数据。
desc_en: This Zenodo dataset is built from NASA EMIT imaging-spectrometer reflectance data for supervised mineral classification across Kabul Province and nearby regions in Afghanistan. It provides train/test CSV tables where each row represents one pixel with 244 spectral reflectance bands and one mineral class label derived from USGS geological reference maps, plus a README and a small preprocessed GeoTIFF patch. It is a geospatially validated AI-ready derivative rather than a full raw EMIT scene archive.
openness: open
source_type: repository dataset; EMIT hyperspectral mineral-classification derivative
evidence: DataCite search returned DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20570403. Zenodo API reports dataset type, CC BY 4.0, four files totaling about 622 MB: train.csv, test.csv, README.txt and small_patch_preprocessed.tif. Record description states NASA EMIT reflectance data, pixel-level supervised mineral classification, 244 spectral band features, integer mineral class labels and USGS geological reference maps.
scale: multiple districts across Kabul Province and surrounding regions; pixel-level tabular EMIT dataset
feature_count: train/test CSV rows with 244 spectral features plus labels; one preprocessed GeoTIFF patch

name: GASST Experimental Hyperspectral Classification and Depth Data Package
provider: Figshare / GASST authors; derived from Pavia University, Houston 2013, Indian Pines and WHU-Honghu benchmarks
theme_canonical: experimental HSI classification package with standard benchmark cubes, depth data, splits and outputs
theme_raw: GASST: Experimental Datasets and Depth Data for Hyperspectral Image Classification
coverage: Benchmark scenes: Pavia University, Houston 2013, Indian Pines and WHU-Honghu; plus associated depth/intermediate outputs
formats: MAT hyperspectral cubes and ground truth files; ZIP depth data; experimental outputs/splits
access: public Figshare direct download
time_span: Published 2026-06-08; source benchmark acquisition dates vary by dataset
notes: Added from DataCite updated-dataset search. This is a reproducibility/experimental package that republishes or packages preprocessed standard HSI benchmarks and adds depth data, standardized splits, feature embeddings and classification-map outputs for the GASST framework. It is included as a derivative benchmark package, not as a new original sensor campaign.
desc_zh: GASST Figshare 数据包面向高光谱图像分类实验复现，包含 Indian Pines、Pavia University、Houston 2013 和 WHU-Honghu 等标准 HSI benchmark 的预处理 MAT 数据、ground truth、深度数据、标准训练/测试划分和模型输出。它不是新的原始采集任务，而是一个把经典数据与 GASST 实验中间/最终结果组合在一起的派生实验包。由于其提供直接下载和可复现实验材料，因此作为高光谱分类 benchmark 支撑数据收录。
desc_en: The GASST Figshare package supports reproducible hyperspectral image classification experiments. It includes preprocessed MAT versions and ground truth for Indian Pines, Pavia University, Houston 2013 and WHU-Honghu, plus depth data, standardized train/test splits and GASST intermediate/final outputs. It is not a new original acquisition campaign, but a derivative benchmark package combining classic HSI datasets with experimental artifacts for the GASST framework.
openness: open
source_type: repository dataset; derived HSI classification benchmark/reproducibility package
evidence: DataCite search returned Figshare DOI 10.6084/m9.figshare.32603718.v2. Figshare API reports dataset type, CC BY 4.0, publication 2026-06-08, nine files totaling about 745 MB, including Depth data.zip, WHU_Hi_HongHu.mat/gt, PaviaU.mat/gt, Indian_pines_corrected.mat/gt and GRSS2013.mat/gt. Description states original HSI datasets, GASST outputs and standardized experimental splits.
scale: four common HSI benchmark scenes plus depth and output artifacts
feature_count: 9 Figshare files; MAT cubes/ground truth plus depth ZIP

name: GFZ Apliki Mine HySpex VNIR-SWIR Field and Laboratory Hyperspectral Imaging Dataset
provider: GFZ Data Services / Koerting et al.; HySpex field and laboratory campaign
theme_canonical: VNIR-SWIR raw and reference hyperspectral imaging of Apliki copper-gold-pyrite mine face and samples
theme_raw: Hyperspectral imaging data of the northern mine face and laboratory samples of the Apliki mine, Cyprus
coverage: Apliki copper-gold-pyrite mine, Nicosia District, Republic of Cyprus; field open-cut mine face and GFZ laboratory samples
formats: Open directory download; ENVI IMG/HDR hyperspectral cubes; ROI files; PNG previews; technical report PDF; field VNIR/SWIR radiance and reflectance folders
access: public GFZ Data Services metadata and direct open directory download
doi_or_citation: 10.5880/GFZ.1.4.2021.001; Koerting et al. 2021 GFZ Data Services
time_span: Field outcrop scan acquired March 2018; dataset issued 2021
notes: Added from DataCite updated-dataset search and GFZ direct download index. This is close-range/field and laboratory HySpex imaging spectroscopy rather than airborne/satellite raster remote sensing, but it is a geoscience hyperspectral imaging dataset for mine-face geology and sample spectroscopy, with open VNIR/SWIR radiance and reflectance cubes.
desc_zh: GFZ Apliki 数据集包含 Cyprus Apliki 铜-金-黄铁矿露天矿北部矿壁和矿区表面样品的 VNIR/SWIR 高光谱成像数据。DataCite 摘要说明 field 和 lab 数据由 HySpex 系统采集，覆盖约 414-2498 nm，包含原始/参考 radiance 与 reflectance 数据；开放目录中可见 FIELD 的 RADIANCE/REFLECTANCE 子目录以及 LAB 的 ENVI `.img/.hdr` 反射率 cube、ROI 和 PNG 预览。该数据是近景/实验室矿山成像光谱数据，不是航空或卫星影像，但对矿山地质高光谱方法具有直接价值。
desc_en: The GFZ Apliki dataset contains VNIR/SWIR hyperspectral imaging data for the northern mine face and surface samples of the Apliki copper-gold-pyrite mine in Cyprus. DataCite metadata state that HySpex field and laboratory data cover roughly 414-2498 nm and include raw/reference radiance and reflectance data. The open download index exposes FIELD RADIANCE/REFLECTANCE folders and LAB ENVI .img/.hdr reflectance cubes with ROI and PNG preview files. It is close-range/laboratory mine imaging spectroscopy rather than airborne or satellite imagery, but is directly relevant to hyperspectral geologic remote sensing methods.
openness: open
source_type: repository dataset; close-range field/laboratory HySpex geologic hyperspectral imaging
evidence: DataCite API for DOI 10.5880/GFZ.1.4.2021.001 reports Dataset resource type, GFZ Data Services publisher, CC BY 4.0 rights and an abstract describing VNIR/SWIR raw and reference hyperspectral imaging of Apliki mine open cut and lab samples. GFZ open download index exposes FIELD/RADIANCE, FIELD/REFLECTANCE and LAB directories; LAB contains a 2.4 GB ENVI IMG reflectance cube, HDR, ROI and PNG files, plus a technical report PDF. Search snippets confirm direct GFZ public metadata and download pages.
scale: field mine-face VNIR/SWIR cubes plus laboratory sample cube
feature_count: FIELD radiance/reflectance VNIR/SWIR folders; LAB ENVI cube and 36 ROI file
file_size: LAB processed IMG about 2.4 GB; additional field VNIR/SWIR files in open directory

name: Bobcat Prairie Airborne Hyperspectral and Thermal Grassland Restoration Imagery
provider: University of Nebraska-Lincoln / SANDY data repository / Wang, Gamon and collaborators
theme_canonical: airborne imaging spectroscopy and thermal remote sensing of tallgrass prairie restoration treatments
theme_raw: High-Resolution Airborne Hyperspectral and Thermal Imagery of Bobcat Prairie, Nebraska
coverage: Bobcat Prairie, Nebraska, USA; tallgrass prairie restoration experiment plots
formats: DataArchive.zip direct download; airborne hyperspectral and thermal imagery; geospatial dataset metadata
access: public SANDY repository direct download
doi_or_citation: 10.71964/111; Wang, Ran (2025), High-Resolution Airborne Hyperspectral and Thermal Imagery of Bobcat Prairie, Nebraska, University of Nebraska-Lincoln; related article DOI 10.1111/nph.70195
notes: Added from 2026-06-12 imaging-spectroscopy web follow-up. The SANDY page schema metadata describes a geospatial dataset with airborne hyperspectral and thermal remote sensing collected for a tallgrass prairie restoration experiment. The distribution exposes DataArchive.zip with content size 116,871,193 bytes. This is a direct remote-sensing imagery dataset, not merely a paper supplement. v458 evidence refresh added DOI 10.71964/111, related New Phytologist article DOI 10.1111/nph.70195, collection/update dates and geolocation from SANDY record page.
desc_zh: Bobcat Prairie 数据集发布 Nebraska tallgrass prairie 恢复实验的高分辨率航空高光谱和热红外遥感影像，用于分析不同管理措施对生物多样性、生产力、冠层水分、反照率和地表温度等生态过程的影响。SANDY 页面以 schema.org Dataset 形式给出 geospatial 元数据、CC BY-NC 4.0 许可和直接下载的 DataArchive.zip。该数据是明确的航空成像光谱/热遥感数据集。
desc_en: The Bobcat Prairie dataset provides high-resolution airborne hyperspectral and thermal imagery for a tallgrass prairie restoration experiment in Nebraska. It supports analysis of how management treatments affect biodiversity, productivity, canopy water content, albedo, surface temperature and related surface-atmosphere feedbacks. The SANDY page exposes schema.org Dataset metadata, CC BY-NC 4.0 licensing and a direct DataArchive.zip download, making it a true airborne imaging-spectroscopy and thermal remote-sensing dataset.
openness: open under CC BY-NC 4.0
source_type: repository dataset; airborne hyperspectral and thermal geospatial imagery
evidence: SANDY/University of Nebraska record 111 lists DOI 10.71964/111, creator Ran Wang, date 2025-03-05, resource type Dataset/Geospatial, ZIP file format, geolocation -96.82, 40.71, CC BY-NC 4.0 usage statement, and keywords including grassland, imaging spectroscopy, restoration, tallgrass prairie and thermal remote sensing. The description states that a multi-year grassland restoration experiment used in situ measurements plus airborne hyperspectral and thermal remote sensing to analyze biodiversity, productivity, albedo, canopy water content and surface temperature. It also lists related article DOI 10.1111/nph.70195. Existing schema evidence reports DataArchive.zip contentSize 116,871,193 bytes.
scale: Bobcat Prairie tallgrass restoration experiment; airborne imagery archive
feature_count: one DataArchive.zip distribution plus repository metadata

name: DANS Soil Surface Mineralogy VNIR Imaging Spectroscopy Moisture-Series Dataset
provider: DANS Data Station Physical and Technical Sciences / ITC University of Twente / I. Ymeti
theme_canonical: laboratory visible-near-infrared imaging spectroscopy of soil surface mineralogy under moisture conditions
theme_raw: Monitoring Soil Surface Mineralogy at Different Moisture Conditions Using Visible Near-Infrared Spectroscopy Data
coverage: Laboratory experiment on three silty-loam soils with different organic matter levels and moisture treatments
license: DANS dataset license DOI 10.17026/fp39-0x58; file access includes restricted files
formats: DANS Data Station files; ENVI-style/octet-stream imaging spectroscopy files, .hdr, .enp and migration ZIP; many file-level downloads listed in schema metadata
access: DANS Data Station dataset page; mixed file-level access with many restricted files and one public file shown on page
time_span: Issued 2017-08-01; eight-week laboratory measurement series collected every 72 h
notes: Added as a boundary institutional-access dataset. It is not airborne/satellite remote sensing; it is laboratory VNIR imaging spectroscopy of soil surfaces, relevant to hyperspectral soil-mineralogy retrieval and calibration. The DANS page exposes dataset metadata and many DataDownload entries but the UI reports 1,158 restricted files and 1 public file, so access is recorded as mixed/restricted rather than fully open direct download.
desc_zh: 该 DANS 数据集记录了不同水分条件下土壤表面矿物学的可见近红外成像光谱实验。DataCite 和页面元数据说明，研究在实验室条件下对三种有机质水平不同的 silty-loam 土壤进行 8 周、每 72 小时一次的成像光谱采集，用于分析水分变化对土壤表面矿物学光谱响应的影响。它不是航空或卫星遥感影像，且 DANS 页面显示多数文件为 restricted，因此作为机构可访问的边界型土壤高光谱支撑数据记录。
desc_en: This DANS dataset records visible-near-infrared imaging spectroscopy of soil surface mineralogy under different moisture conditions. DataCite and page metadata describe an eight-week laboratory experiment with imaging spectroscopy collected every 72 h for three silty-loam soils with different organic-matter levels and moisture treatments. It is not airborne or satellite remote-sensing imagery, and the DANS page reports mostly restricted files, so the catalog records it as a boundary institutional-access soil hyperspectral support dataset.
openness: metadata public; many files restricted; file-level access through DANS
source_type: institutional dataset; laboratory VNIR soil imaging spectroscopy support data
evidence: DataCite API for DOI 10.17026/dans-zan-fjsg reports Dataset resource type, DANS Data Station publisher and an abstract describing visible near-infrared imaging spectroscopy of soil constituents under moisture variations. The DANS page schema metadata lists DataDownload entries including .hdr/.enp/octet-stream files and a migration ZIP, while the page UI reports 1,159 files with 1 public and 1,158 restricted. This supports inclusion as linked/institutional-access rather than fully open imagery.
scale: three silty-loam soils; 8-week moisture-series laboratory imaging spectroscopy
feature_count: 1,159 files listed by DANS page; mostly restricted file-level access
file_size: individual files around 97-98 MB in schema examples; full dataset too large for single download per DANS UI

name: CSIRO LIB-HSI RGB and Hyperspectral Building Facade Images
provider: CSIRO Data61 / Australian National University / Research Data Australia
theme_canonical: proximal hyperspectral and RGB building facade semantic segmentation dataset
theme_raw: LIB-HSI: RGB and Hyperspectral images of Building Facades
coverage: Light industrial building facades; close-range/proximal Specim IQ acquisitions; Australia-based CSIRO collection
license: Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial 4.0; All Rights (including copyright) CSIRO 2022 noted by RDA
formats: ENVI hyperspectral reflectance images; corresponding RGB images; pixel-level annotation masks; CSIRO download package
access: Research Data Australia landing page and CSIRO Data Access Portal download tab; open/free access under non-commercial licence
notes: Added as a boundary close-range/proximal hyperspectral imaging dataset rather than satellite or airborne remote sensing. It is relevant because it provides real hyperspectral reflectance cubes, RGB pairs and pixel-level material labels for built-environment hyperspectral segmentation.
desc_zh: CSIRO LIB-HSI 是建筑立面材料分割用的近景高光谱/RGB 数据集， DOI 为 10.25919/3541-S396。Research Data Australia 元数据说明，数据包含建筑立面的高光谱反射率影像、对应 RGB 影像以及像素级标注，使用 Specim IQ 高光谱相机采集，影像为 ENVI 格式，并划分为 393 张训练、45 张验证和 75 张测试影像。它不是卫星或航空遥感数据，但作为真实高光谱反射率影像和材料分类标注数据，对城市/建筑材料高光谱识别和算法迁移有参考价值。
desc_en: CSIRO LIB-HSI is a close-range hyperspectral/RGB dataset for building-facade material segmentation, with DOI 10.25919/3541-S396. Research Data Australia states that it contains hyperspectral reflectance images, corresponding RGB images and pixel-level annotations for building facades, captured with a Specim IQ hyperspectral camera and stored as ENVI-format hyperspectral images. The record reports 393 training images, 45 validation images and 75 test images. It is not satellite or airborne remote sensing, but it is a useful real HSI material-recognition dataset for built-environment hyperspectral segmentation and algorithm transfer.
openness: open/free access via CSIRO Data Access Portal; reuse under CC BY-NC 4.0 conditions
source_type: institutional dataset; proximal hyperspectral imaging benchmark
evidence: Research Data Australia record for DOI 10.25919/3541-S396 reports dataset type, open access, CC BY-NC 4.0 licence, CSIRO Data Access Portal URL csiro:55630, Specim IQ acquisition, ENVI hyperspectral files, RGB counterparts, pixel-level annotations, and 393 train / 45 validation / 75 test images. The associated ECCV Workshops paper is cited in the metadata.
scale: 513 paired hyperspectral/RGB facade images split into 393 train, 45 validation and 75 test images; 44 material classes noted in associated paper/search metadata
feature_count: 513 hyperspectral/RGB images with pixel-level annotations
file_size: one CSIRO download package; size not captured from JavaScript-only portal in this pass

name: CEDA NCAVEO 2006 Shrewsbury ARSF AISA Eagle Level 3a Airborne Hyperspectral Data
provider: NERC Earth Observation Data Centre / CEDA / NCAVEO
theme_canonical: airborne AISA Eagle calibration-validation hyperspectral imagery over Shrewsbury
theme_raw: NCAVEO: ARSF Specim AISA Eagle Level 3a data collected on board the Dornier Do228-101 D-CALM aircraft
coverage: Shrewsbury / Chilbolton NCAVEO study area, UK; 2006-06-17 flight window
license: UK Open Government Licence v3.0; CEDA citation required
formats: BIL, HDR and HDF files; level 3a airborne AISA Eagle data
access: CEDA catalogue and archive web download/OPeNDAP; available to registered CEDA users
doi_or_citation: CEDA UUID 714c110263864a82b3484c4351e120ca; Network for Calibration and Validation of EO data (2008)
notes: Added from CEDA 2-hop archive search. This is an older but well-described airborne calibration/validation hyperspectral dataset; access requires a CEDA account although permitted use is Any. Phase381 CEDA quality resample lychee 2026-06-12: URL reachable with CEDA redirect.
desc_zh: CEDA NCAVEO 2006 Shrewsbury 数据集提供 NERC ARSF Dornier 228 飞机搭载 Specim AISA Eagle 获取的航空高光谱 Level 3a 数据。CEDA 页面说明，数据于 2006 年 6 月 17 日在 Shrewsbury 研究区获取，AISA Eagle 覆盖 400-970 nm，可达 2.9 nm 光谱分辨率，共 8 条航线，文件格式包括 BIL、HDR 和 HDF。页面显示数据在线、19 个文件约 5 GB，使用 UK Open Government Licence v3.0，但下载需注册 CEDA 用户。
desc_en: The CEDA NCAVEO 2006 Shrewsbury dataset provides Level 3a airborne hyperspectral data collected by a Specim AISA Eagle sensor on a NERC ARSF Dornier 228 aircraft. The CEDA record states that the data were acquired on 17 June 2006 over the Shrewsbury study area, with AISA Eagle covering 400-970 nm at up to 2.9 nm spectral resolution and 8 flight lines. The page reports 19 files totaling about 5 GB in BIL, HDR and HDF formats, with use under the UK Open Government Licence v3.0 and download through registered CEDA access.
openness: metadata public; data available to registered CEDA users under OGL v3.0
source_type: institutional airborne hyperspectral calibration-validation dataset
evidence: CEDA page states permitted use Any, online status ONLINE, dataset size 19 files / 5GB, abstract describing NCAVEO 2006 AISA Eagle hyperspectral measurements over Shrewsbury, 400-970 nm coverage, 8 flightlines, registered-user access, OGL v3.0 licence and BIL/HDR/HDF file formats.
scale: 8 AISA Eagle flightlines; 19 files; 5GB
feature_count: 8 airborne hyperspectral flight lines

name: CEDA ARSF 2012_250 RG12_10 Bedford AISA Eagle-Hawk Airborne Hyperspectral Flight
provider: NERC Airborne Research and Survey Facility / CEDA
theme_canonical: airborne AISA Eagle Hawk hyperspectral and LiDAR measurements over Bedford UK
theme_raw: ARSF Flight 2012_250 - for RG12_10: Hyperspectral Remote Sensing Measurements
coverage: Bedford / Milton Keynes / Luton area, UK; 2012-09-06 flight reference 2012_250
license: UK Open Government Licence v3.0; CEDA citation required
formats: ENVI Binary hyperspectral data; LAS lidar; PNG/JPG imagery; ASCII/PDF ancillary files

desc_zh: Zenodo Mt Ruapehu 数据集提供新西兰 Ruapehu 火山的航空高光谱影像。Zenodo 页面说明，影像由 Cessna 185 飞机搭载 AISA Fenix 全谱推扫式高光谱系统于 2018 年 3 月 31 日 10:25-12:45 NZST 获取，数据经过辐亮度转换、ATCOR4 表面反射率校正和 PARGE 几何编码，并与同步获取的高分辨率 RGB 正射影像配准。页面标注 Dataset Open、CC BY 4.0，提供 12.3 GB 的 ruapehu.zip 下载，适合火山热液蚀变、矿物制图和地质遥感研究。
desc_en: The Zenodo Mt Ruapehu dataset provides airborne hyperspectral imagery of Mt Ruapehu volcano in New Zealand. The Zenodo landing page states that the image was captured by an AISA Fenix full-spectrum pushbroom hyperspectral system on a Cessna 185 aircraft between 10:25 and 12:45 NZST on 31 March 2018, converted to radiance and surface reflectance with ATCOR4 and geocoded with PARGE. Individual strips were co-registered to high-resolution RGB orthophotos acquired simultaneously. The page marks the dataset Open under CC BY 4.0 and provides a 12.3 GB ruapehu.zip file, making it valuable for volcanic hydrothermal alteration, mineral mapping and geologic remote sensing.
openness: open Zenodo record under CC BY 4.0; 12.3 GB download listed on landing page
source_type: open airborne AISA Fenix volcano hyperspectral imagery
evidence: Zenodo landing page for record 3905352 states Dataset Open, DOI 10.5281/zenodo.3905352, title Hyperspectral imagery - Mt Ruapehu volcano, New Zealand, description of an airborne AISA Fenix pushbroom survey on Cessna 185 over Mt Ruapehu on 2018-03-31, ATCOR4/PARGE processing, co-registered RGB orthophotos, CC BY 4.0 license, and file ruapehu.zip of 12.3 GB. Command-line Zenodo API/requests returned 403 during this pass, so evidence is from the readable landing page.
scale: one airborne AISA Fenix volcano hyperspectral archive; 12.3 GB zip
feature_count: airborne hyperspectral image strips over Mt Ruapehu

desc_zh: WaRM 是比利时 Wallonia 屋顶材料高光谱光谱库，面向城市材料识别、屋顶材料检测和遥感算法验证。ORBi/论文摘要说明，数据包含 26 条屋顶材料光谱，覆盖 350-2500 nm，由 ASD FieldSpec3 Hi-Res 光谱仪在实验室条件下采集，采样间隔为 1 nm；材料类型反映 Wallonia 及西北欧常见屋顶材料，并包含危险/特定屋顶材料检测场景。它不是影像立方体，而是城市遥感和高光谱材料分类的原始支撑光谱库。
desc_en: WaRM is a hyperspectral spectral library of roof materials from Wallonia, Belgium for urban material mapping, roof-material detection and remote-sensing algorithm validation. The ORBi/article metadata states that it contains 26 roof-material spectra from 350-2500 nm, acquired under laboratory conditions with an ASD FieldSpec3 Hi-Res spectrometer at 1 nm sampling. The materials represent Wallonia and broader northwest-European roof types, including use cases such as specific or hazardous roof-material detection. It is not an image cube, but it is an original supporting spectral library for urban hyperspectral remote sensing.

The page lists Hyperspectral remote sensing as a subject and DOI 10.5565/ddd.uab.cat/196065. It is an original supporting spectral dataset for urban hyperspectral/optical remote sensing rather than an image archive.

desc_en: This dataset provides an airborne HySpex VNIR/SWIR imaging-spectroscopy scene over Nationalpark Hunsrück-Hochwald, Germany, published by the Universität Trier team on Zenodo. The record describes VNIR 410-990 nm and SWIR 970-2500 nm data, with 160 and 256 bands respectively, delivered mainly as a 19.4 GB BSQ cube plus an HDR file and overview/geometry images. It is useful for forest imaging spectroscopy, EnMAP-preparation studies, airborne hyperspectral processing workflows, and land-cover or vegetation analysis.
