name: PANGAEA Chiloé Marine Litter Thermal Infrared Hyperspectral Spectral Database
provider: PANGAEA / Universidad de Chile
theme_canonical: Thermal infrared hyperspectral spectral library / marine debris remote sensing
theme_raw: HyLogger3 TIR spectral signatures of marine litter debris and natural beach materials
coverage: Archipelago of Chiloé, Chile
formats: Tab-delimited text
access: Open download via PANGAEA
notes: PANGAEA page reports 76 spectral signatures from Chiloé, Chile, including natural sand and anthropogenic marine debris such as buoys, ropes, nets and Styrofoam. Measurements used a HyLogger3 sensor with 25 nm spectral resolution in the thermal infrared range from 6000 to 14500 nm, supporting marine debris remote-sensing applications. Lychee v293 returned transient PANGAEA 503 during batch verification; retained for later scheduled recheck after transient service outage.
desc_zh: 该 PANGAEA 数据库收集了智利 Chiloé 群岛海滩自然样品和人类海洋垃圾的热红外高光谱谱线。页面说明共有 76 条光谱签名，目标包括沙、浮标、绳索、渔网和泡沫塑料等，使用 HyLogger3 在 6000-14500 nm 热红外范围内以 25 nm 光谱分辨率采集。它适合海洋垃圾遥感、热红外端元识别和机器学习检测算法验证。
desc_en: This PANGAEA database contains thermal-infrared hyperspectral signatures of natural beach materials and anthropogenic marine debris from the Chiloé archipelago in Chile. The landing page reports 76 spectral signatures, including sand, buoys, ropes, nets and Styrofoam, measured with a HyLogger3 sensor at 25 nm spectral resolution across 6000-14500 nm. It is useful for marine-debris remote sensing, thermal-infrared endmember analysis and machine-learning detection studies.
openness: open
source_type: PANGAEA dataset / thermal infrared spectral library
evidence: PANGAEA page: DOI 10.1594/PANGAEA.919536, CC BY 4.0, 25,992 data points, HyLogger3 TIR 6000-14500 nm spectral signatures, related Remote Sensing of Environment marine-debris paper.
scale: field spectral signatures / beach samples
feature_count: 76 spectral signatures; 25,992 data points

name: PANGAEA HE462 North Sea Hyperspectral Remote Sensing Reflectance Profiles
provider: PANGAEA / Alfred Wegener Institute / DLR EnMAP preparation
theme_canonical: Aquatic hyperspectral remote sensing reflectance / ocean colour
theme_raw: Remote sensing reflectance measured at discrete underwater profile stations during RV HEINCKE cruise HE462
coverage: North Sea and Sogne Fjord; RV HEINCKE cruise HE462
formats: Tab-delimited text
access: Open download via PANGAEA
notes: PANGAEA page describes remote sensing reflectance at 1 nm resolution from 350 to 800 nm, derived from hyperspectral underwater profile measurements using RAMSES sensors. The funding entry links the dataset to DLR preparation for scientific use of the EnMAP hyperspectral satellite mission. Lychee v293 returned transient PANGAEA 503 during batch verification; retained for later scheduled recheck after transient service outage.
desc_zh: 该 PANGAEA 数据集提供 RV HEINCKE HE462 航次在北海和 Sogne Fjord 站位采集的水体遥感反射率。页面说明 Rrs 以 1 nm 分辨率覆盖 350-800 nm，由 RAMSES 高光谱水下剖面辐射计测得的上行辐亮度和下行辐照度计算而来。它可用于水色遥感、EnMAP 等高光谱卫星算法准备、光学水质产品验证和 GLORIA 类水体光谱库研究。
desc_en: This PANGAEA dataset provides hyperspectral remote-sensing reflectance from RV HEINCKE cruise HE462 stations in the North Sea and Sogne Fjord. The landing page states that Rrs is given at 1 nm resolution from 350 to 800 nm, derived from RAMSES hyperspectral underwater profile measurements of upwelling radiance and downwelling irradiance. It is useful for aquatic remote sensing, EnMAP algorithm preparation, ocean-colour validation and GLORIA-style water reflectance library work.
openness: open
source_type: PANGAEA dataset / aquatic hyperspectral Rrs
evidence: PANGAEA page: DOI 10.1594/PANGAEA.944796, CC BY 4.0, 8,118 data points, hyperspectral underwater profile measurements with RAMSES sensors, 350-800 nm Rrs at 1 nm resolution.
scale: shipborne station profiles
feature_count: 8,118 data points; 350-800 nm Rrs

name: 4TU Hyperspectral Reflectance of Marine Plastics VIS-SWIR Dataset
provider: VITO / 4TU.ResearchData
theme_canonical: Marine plastic hyperspectral reflectance library / VIS-SWIR
theme_raw: Hyperspectral reflectance of marine plastics in the VIS to SWIR
coverage: VITO calibration facility and Flanders Hydraulics water tank; Port of Antwerp samples
formats: 4TU dataset download; format not exposed in DataCite
access: Open download via 4TU.ResearchData
notes: DataCite reports 47 hyperspectral reflectance measurements of plastic litter samples, including virgin samples and real samples from the Port of Antwerp. Measurements were made in dry conditions at the VITO calibration facility, and a subset was measured wet and submerged in a water tank at Flanders Hydraulics.
desc_zh: 该 4TU.ResearchData 数据集提供海洋塑料在 VIS-SWIR 范围内的高光谱反射率测量。DataCite 摘要说明数据包含 47 条塑料垃圾样品反射率，既有原生塑料，也有来自安特卫普港的真实样品，并覆盖干燥、潮湿和水下条件。它可用于海洋塑料遥感、端元库构建、漂浮/淹没塑料检测和水色算法验证。
desc_en: This 4TU.ResearchData record provides VIS-SWIR hyperspectral reflectance measurements of marine plastic litter. The DataCite abstract reports 47 reflectance measurements, including virgin plastics and real samples from the Port of Antwerp, measured dry at the VITO calibration facility and, for a subset, wet and submerged in a water tank at Flanders Hydraulics. It is useful for marine-plastic remote sensing, endmember-library construction, floating or submerged plastic detection, and aquatic algorithm validation.
openness: open
source_type: 4TU dataset / spectral library
evidence: DataCite: DOI 10.4121/12896312.v2, Dataset, CC0, title Hyperspectral reflectance of marine plastics in the VIS to SWIR, abstract reports 47 measurements and dry/wet/submerged conditions.
scale: laboratory/tank spectral measurements
feature_count: 47 hyperspectral reflectance measurements

name: 4TU Hyperspectral Plastics Dataset for Floating Macroplastic Detection from Space
provider: Wageningen University & Research / 4TU.ResearchData
theme_canonical: Experimental hyperspectral imagery / floating plastic detection
theme_raw: Hyperspectral plastics dataset supplementary to Advancing floating plastic detection from space using hyperspectral imagery
coverage: Experimental plastic imagery and riverbank-harvested macrolitter samples
formats: ZIP hyperspectral image database
access: Open download via 4TU.ResearchData
notes: DataCite describes this as supplementary material for Tasseron et al. (2021), Advancing floating plastic detection from space using hyperspectral imagery. The format field states that it is a zipped hyperspectral image database of virgin plastics at three levels of detail and raw riverbank-harvested macrolitter imagery.
desc_zh: 该 4TU 数据集是“Advancing floating plastic detection from space using hyperspectral imagery”论文的补充高光谱塑料影像数据库。DataCite 格式字段说明它包含原生塑料的多层级高光谱影像，以及河岸采集大型垃圾的原始影像。它适合漂浮/岸边宏塑料遥感检测、卫星高光谱算法模拟、塑料指数开发和分类模型训练。
desc_en: This 4TU dataset is the supplementary hyperspectral plastics image database for the paper “Advancing floating plastic detection from space using hyperspectral imagery”. DataCite states that the package is a zipped hyperspectral image database of virgin plastics at three levels of detail plus raw riverbank-harvested macrolitter imagery. It is useful for floating or shoreline macroplastic remote sensing, satellite hyperspectral algorithm simulation, plastic-index development and classifier training.
openness: open
source_type: 4TU dataset / experimental hyperspectral imagery
evidence: DataCite: DOI 10.4121/14518278.v3, Dataset, CC BY 4.0, supplementary material for floating plastic detection from space, zipped hyperspectral image database.
scale: experimental imagery / macrolitter samples
feature_count: zipped hyperspectral image database; counts not exposed in DataCite

name: 4TU Haus Riswick UAV Hyperspectral Grassland Nitrogen and Biomass Campaign Dataset
provider: Wageningen University & Research / 4TU.ResearchData
theme_canonical: UAV hyperspectral grassland monitoring / biomass and nitrogen
theme_raw: Haus Riswick grassland experiment with N fertilization and plant growth monitoring based on UAV hyperspectral imagery
coverage: Haus Riswick grassland experiment near Kleve, Germany
formats: ZIP, text/plain
access: Open download via 4TU.ResearchData
notes: DataCite abstract reports grassland dry aboveground biomass, nitrogen content and nitrogen uptake measurements for five harvest dates, plus UAV flights on the same dates to acquire hyperspectral images with the WageningenUR Hyperspectral Mapping System (HYMSY), a pushbroom imaging sensor with a spectrometer and photogrammetric camera.
desc_zh: 该 4TU 数据集来自德国 Kleve 附近 Haus Riswick 黑麦草草地氮肥实验，结合地面生物量/氮含量测量和 UAV 高光谱影像。DataCite 摘要说明 2014 与 2017 年共 5 个收获日期进行了 UAV 飞行，使用 WageningenUR HYMSY 推扫式高光谱制图系统获取影像。它适合草地生物量、氮含量、氮吸收、精准农业和 UAV 高光谱建模研究。
desc_en: This 4TU dataset comes from the Haus Riswick grassland nitrogen-fertilization experiment near Kleve, Germany, combining field measurements of dry aboveground biomass, nitrogen content and nitrogen uptake with UAV hyperspectral imagery. The DataCite abstract reports UAV flights on five harvest dates in 2014 and 2017 using the WageningenUR Hyperspectral Mapping System (HYMSY), a pushbroom imaging sensor with a spectrometer and photogrammetric camera. It is useful for grassland biomass, nitrogen-content, nitrogen-uptake, precision-agriculture and UAV hyperspectral modelling studies.
openness: open
source_type: 4TU dataset / UAV hyperspectral campaign
evidence: DataCite: DOI 10.4121/19188872.v1, Dataset, CC BY-SA 4.0, abstract reports UAV hyperspectral images acquired by HYMSY in 2014 and 2017 campaigns.
scale: UAV grassland experiment / five harvest dates
feature_count: five harvest dates; UAV hyperspectral flights plus biomass/N measurements

name: Marine Data Archive Macroplastic Dry Wet Submerged Hyperspectral Reflectance Dataset
provider: Flanders Marine Institute (VLIZ) / VITO / Marine Data Archive
theme_canonical: Marine macroplastic hyperspectral reflectance library / dry wet submerged conditions
theme_raw: Hyperspectral reflectance dataset for dry, wet and submerged plastics in clear and turbid water
coverage: Port of Antwerp docks and river Scheldt near Temse Bridge, Belgium; optical calibration and mesocosm settings
formats: XLSX / Marine Data Archive download
access: Open download via Marine Data Archive
time_span: Latest version published 2025; original dataset 2021, updated 2024/2025
notes: Latest Marine Data Archive version of the dry/wet/submerged macroplastic hyperspectral reflectance dataset. The landing page states that samples include pristine, artificially weathered and biofouled plastics plus field samples from the Port of Antwerp and river Scheldt; measurements were made in an optical calibration facility and mesocosm settings that mimic environmentally relevant microalgae/turbidity conditions. Older DOIs 10.14284/530 and 10.14284/709 were not added separately.
desc_zh: 该 Marine Data Archive 数据集是宏塑料在干燥、潮湿和清水/浑水水下条件下的高光谱反射率库，当前最新版 DOI 为 10.14284/750。页面说明样品包括原生、人工风化、生物污损塑料，以及从安特卫普港和 Scheldt 河 Temse Bridge 附近采集的现场样品；光谱在 VITO 光学校准设施和模拟环境条件的 mesocosm 中测量。它可用于海洋/河流塑料遥感、端元库、漂浮和水下塑料检测算法训练与验证。
desc_en: This Marine Data Archive record is the latest version of a hyperspectral reflectance library for macroplastic samples measured dry, wet and submerged in clear or turbid water. The landing page states that the samples include pristine, artificially weathered and biofouled plastics, plus field samples from the Port of Antwerp and the river Scheldt near Temse Bridge, measured in an optical calibration facility and mesocosm settings. It supports marine and riverine plastic remote sensing, endmember-library work, and training or validation of floating and submerged plastic detection algorithms.
openness: open
source_type: Marine Data Archive dataset / spectral library
evidence: MDA/IMIS page: DOI 10.14284/750, CC BY 4.0, title Hyperspectral reflectance dataset for dry, wet and submerged plastics in clear and turbid water, latest version with previous DOIs 530 and 709.
scale: laboratory/mesocosm spectral measurements and field-collected samples
feature_count: XLSX spectral dataset; count not extracted from landing page

name: SEANOE COASTLOOC Coastal Ocean Colour Optical Dataset
provider: SEANOE / Takuvik / CNRS / Sorbonne Université / EUMETSAT partners
theme_canonical: Coastal ocean colour / water-leaving reflectance and optical properties
theme_raw: The COASTlOOC dataset
coverage: European coastal-to-open-ocean gradients: Gulf of Lion, Adriatic, Baltic, North Sea, English Channel and Atlantic Ocean
formats: CSV, text, ZIP
access: Open download via SEANOE
notes: SEANOE JSON-LD and page describe 379 stations across European coastal-to-open-ocean gradients, with apparent and inherent optical properties collected to support ocean-colour remote-sensing algorithms. Downloadable files include Water-leaving reflectance, Surface irradiance and diffuse attenuation, AC9 absorption/attenuation, pigments, SPM/DOC and station lists.
desc_zh: COASTLOOC 是 SEANOE 发布的欧洲多海域海岸-外海梯度水色光学数据集，覆盖 Gulf of Lion、Adriatic、Baltic、North Sea、English Channel 和 Atlantic Ocean 等 379 个站位。页面说明数据集中包含表观光学特性和固有光学特性，用于支持 ocean colour remote sensing algorithms，并提供 water-leaving reflectance、表面辐照度/漫衰减、AC9 吸收衰减、色素和悬浮颗粒等 CSV/文本文件。它适合海岸水色遥感算法开发、卫星验证和高光谱/多光谱 Rrs 模型研究。
desc_en: COASTLOOC is a SEANOE coastal ocean-colour dataset spanning 379 stations across European coastal-to-open-ocean gradients, including the Gulf of Lion, Adriatic Sea, Baltic Sea, North Sea, English Channel and Atlantic Ocean. The page and JSON-LD state that it provides apparent and inherent optical properties to support ocean-colour remote-sensing algorithms, with downloadable files for water-leaving reflectance, surface irradiance and diffuse attenuation, AC9 absorption/attenuation, pigments, suspended matter and station metadata. It is useful for coastal ocean-colour algorithm development, satellite validation and hyperspectral or multispectral Rrs modelling.
openness: open
source_type: SEANOE dataset / coastal optical remote-sensing data
evidence: SEANOE page/JSON-LD: DOI 10.17882/93570, CC BY 4.0, 379 stations, apparent/inherent optical properties, downloadable Water-leaving reflectance CSV and other ocean-colour files.
scale: 379 shipborne stations / European coastal seas
feature_count: multiple open CSV/text files including water-leaving reflectance
file_size: Water-leaving reflectance 119 KiB; profiles ZIP about 7 MiB; additional CSV files

name: USGS Landsat 8/9 OLI Aquatic Reflectance Validation Hyperspectral Rrs Record
provider: U.S. Geological Survey / ScienceBase
theme_canonical: Aquatic reflectance validation / hyperspectral Rrs matchup record
theme_raw: Validation Data Record for Landsat 8/9 OLI Level 2 Aquatic Reflectance Products
coverage: Coastal and inland waters represented by AERONET-OC and GLORIA matchups with Landsat 8/9 OLI
formats: ScienceBase dataset; formats not exposed in DataCite
access: Open via ScienceBase / USGS data release
notes: DataCite abstract states this validation record combines AERONET-OC (n=418) and GLORIA (n=1,638) hyperspectral remote sensing reflectance measurements in visible to near-infrared spectral bands, coincident with same-day Landsat 8/9 OLI acquisitions, for evaluating OLI aquatic reflectance products.
desc_zh: 该 USGS/ScienceBase 数据发布是 Landsat 8/9 OLI Level 2 Aquatic Reflectance 产品的验证记录。DataCite 摘要说明数据由 AERONET-OC 的 418 条和 GLORIA 的 1,638 条高光谱遥感反射率 Rrs 观测组成，并与同日 Landsat OLI 获取匹配。它适合水色遥感产品验证、OLI 水体反射率算法评估和高光谱原位 Rrs 到多光谱卫星波段的交叉验证。
desc_en: This USGS/ScienceBase data release is a validation record for Landsat 8/9 OLI Level 2 Aquatic Reflectance products. The DataCite abstract states that it combines 418 AERONET-OC and 1,638 GLORIA hyperspectral remote-sensing reflectance measurements in visible to near-infrared bands, matched with same-day OLI acquisitions. It is useful for aquatic reflectance validation, OLI algorithm evaluation and cross-validation between hyperspectral in situ Rrs and multispectral satellite products.
openness: open
source_type: USGS ScienceBase data release / validation record
evidence: DataCite DOI 10.5066/P14RSMQD: Dataset, CC0, combined AERONET-OC and GLORIA hyperspectral Rrs measurements coincident with Landsat 8/9 OLI.
scale: 2,056 hyperspectral Rrs matchups
feature_count: AERONET-OC n=418; GLORIA n=1,638

name: USGS Cyanobacteria Harmful Algal Bloom Hyperspectral Microscopy Profiles V2
provider: U.S. Geological Survey / ScienceBase / NIST collaboration
theme_canonical: Hyperspectral microscopy / harmful algal bloom spectral profiles
theme_raw: Hyperspectral Characterization of Common Cyanobacteria Associated with Harmful Algal Blooms ver. 2.0
coverage: USGS water-quality samples and commercial algae material; laboratory hyperspectral microscope measurements
license: USGS public data release; rights not exposed in DataCite
formats: ScienceBase dataset; hyperspectral image profiles
access: Open via ScienceBase / USGS data release
notes: DataCite abstract reports hyperspectral imagery profiles of 13 common algae associated with harmful algal blooms. Measurements were retrieved from a hyperspectral microscope at NIST; profiles are provided in basic hyperspectral imagery form, first derivative, and flat-field-corrected versions.
desc_zh: 该 USGS 数据集收录 13 种常见有害藻华相关蓝藻/藻类的显微高光谱影像谱线。DataCite 摘要说明数据来自 NIST 合作的 hyperspectral microscope，样品来源包括 USGS 水质采样和商业生物材料，并提供基础高光谱影像、一次导数以及平场校正版本。它可用于 HAB 光谱识别、藻类分类、实验室高光谱基准和水质遥感算法支撑。
desc_en: This USGS data release contains hyperspectral microscopy profiles of 13 common algae associated with harmful algal blooms. The DataCite abstract states that the data were retrieved from a hyperspectral microscope in cooperation with NIST, using USGS water-quality samples and commercially sourced biological materials, and are provided as basic hyperspectral imagery, first-derivative data and flat-field-corrected versions. It supports HAB spectral identification, algae classification, laboratory hyperspectral benchmarking and water-quality remote-sensing development.
openness: open
source_type: USGS ScienceBase data release / laboratory hyperspectral imagery
evidence: DataCite DOI 10.5066/P9SY4PSK: Dataset, hyperspectral imagery profiles of 13 HAB-associated algae, NIST hyperspectral microscope, version 2.0.
scale: 13 algae taxa/profiles
feature_count: hyperspectral image profiles plus derivative and flat-field-corrected forms

name: USGS Waquoit Bay Ground Hyperspectral Profiles and UAV Multispectral Marsh Dataset
provider: U.S. Geological Survey / ScienceBase
theme_canonical: Ground hyperspectral reflectance profiles / marsh vegetation and UAV mapping support
theme_raw: Dog Head Marsh and South Cape Beach UAS topographic, multispectral and ground spectra dataset
coverage: Dog Head Marsh and South Cape Beach, Waquoit Bay National Estuarine Research Reserve, Mashpee, Massachusetts, USA
formats: TIFF, CSV, JPG
access: Open via ScienceBase / USGS data release
notes: DataCite abstract says OceanInsight HDX Mini Spectrometer and ASD FieldSpec collected side-by-side ground-based hyperspectral reflectance profiles for landcover analysis. Low-altitude RGB and MicaSense RedEdge-3 multispectral UAS images, GCPs, ground-reference data and photogrammetric/topographic products are included for marsh mapping and Phragmites australis applications.
desc_zh: 该 USGS 数据发布覆盖 Massachusetts Waquoit Bay National Estuarine Research Reserve 的 Dog Head Marsh 和 South Cape Beach，包含地面高光谱反射率剖面、UAV RGB/多光谱影像、地形产品和植被/地面参考数据。DataCite 摘要说明 OceanInsight HDX Mini Spectrometer 与 ASD FieldSpec 并行采集地面高光谱反射率，用于比较传感器并服务于 Phragmites australis 等湿地植被制图。它不是机载高光谱影像，但作为地面高光谱校准/验证数据和 UAV 遥感配套数据很有价值。
desc_en: This USGS data release covers Dog Head Marsh and South Cape Beach in the Waquoit Bay National Estuarine Research Reserve, Massachusetts, and includes ground hyperspectral reflectance profiles, UAV RGB/multispectral imagery, topographic products and vegetation reference data. The DataCite abstract states that an OceanInsight HDX Mini Spectrometer and an ASD FieldSpec were used side by side to collect ground hyperspectral profiles for land-cover analysis and Phragmites australis marsh mapping. It is not airborne hyperspectral imagery, but it is valuable as calibration/validation spectroscopy and companion UAV remote-sensing data.
openness: open
source_type: USGS ScienceBase data release / ground spectra and UAV companion data
evidence: DataCite DOI 10.5066/P9W8JS7P: Dataset, CC0, ground hyperspectral reflectance profiles collected with OceanInsight HDX Mini and ASD FieldSpec plus UAV imagery and products.
scale: marsh field campaign / UAS survey
feature_count: hyperspectral profiles, GCPs, UAV RGB/multispectral imagery, DSM/orthomosaic products

name: CHIME AVIRIS-NG Doñana and Ríotinto Vicarious Calibration Field Spectroscopy Dataset
provider: Digital.CSIC / CSIC / CHIME support activity
theme_canonical: Calibration and validation spectral measurements
theme_raw: CHIME vicarious calibration field spectroscopy; AVIRIS-NG, DESIS, PRISMA, UAV hyperspectral cross-calibration
coverage: Doñana National Park and Ríotinto mines, Huelva, Spain
license: openAccess (Digital.CSIC record; rights statement does not specify a reuse license)
formats: field spectroscopy tables/files via Digital.CSIC repository
access: repository landing page with files
notes: Near-simultaneous ASD FieldSpec surface reflectance over invariant targets, collected within +/- 1 hour of AVIRIS-NG flight for CHIME support and cross-calibration with DESIS/PRISMA/UAV hyperspectral sensors.
desc_zh: 该数据集来自 CHIME 任务支持活动，在西班牙 Doñana 国家公园和 Ríotinto 矿区的不变目标上采集地面高光谱场谱。测量与 AVIRIS-NG 飞行近同步，可用于 AVIRIS-NG、DESIS、PRISMA 和无人机高光谱载荷的交叉定标与验证。数据覆盖 400-2500 nm 的高光谱地表反射率，是轨道/机载成像光谱产品校准链的重要支撑数据。
desc_en: This Digital.CSIC dataset contains near-simultaneous field spectroscopy collected for CHIME vicarious calibration at invariant targets in Doñana National Park and the Ríotinto mining area. ASD spectrometers measured high spectral resolution surface reflectance from 400 to 2500 nm within about one hour of an AVIRIS-NG overflight. The record supports cross-calibration and validation for AVIRIS-NG, DESIS, PRISMA, UAV hyperspectral sensors, and the Copernicus CHIME mission.
openness: openAccess metadata and repository access; reuse license not explicit in DataCite rights
source_type: field spectral calibration dataset
evidence: DataCite DOI metadata states the dataset consists of field spectral data collected for CHIME support, simultaneous with AVIRIS-NG and for cross-calibration of AVIRIS-NG, DESIS, PRISMA, and UAV hyperspectral sensors; ASD FieldSpec 400-2500 nm.
scale: two invariant target sites; ASD 400-2500 nm spectra
feature_count: not stated

name: CABO Spectral and Field Biodiversity Data from Five Canadian Sites
provider: Canadian Airborne Biodiversity Observatory / Zenodo
theme_canonical: Airborne and UAV imaging spectroscopy for biodiversity
theme_raw: CABO airborne/UAV imaging spectroscopy extracted plot spectra and field biodiversity surveys
coverage: five Canadian CABO sites
formats: ZIP archive; extracted spectral tables; R code; field survey tables
access: direct-download via Zenodo
notes: Contains atmospherically corrected reflectance data acquired through airborne and UAV-borne imaging spectroscopy, with plot-level spectral extraction and field inventory/trait/diversity measurements.
desc_zh: CABO 数据集汇集加拿大五个样地的机载和无人机成像光谱数据，并配套野外物种、性状和功能多样性调查。光谱部分以样地为单位提取大气校正反射率像元值，适合研究光谱多样性与植物多样性之间的关系。Zenodo 记录提供 ZIP 数据包和 R 分析代码，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可。
desc_en: This CABO release combines airborne and UAV-borne imaging spectroscopy with plot-level biodiversity field surveys across five Canadian sites. The spectral component provides atmospherically corrected reflectance values extracted for each plot, alongside species abundance, trait, and functional diversity measurements. It is intended for spectral-plant diversity studies and includes analysis code in a Zenodo archive under CC-BY-4.0.
openness: open; CC-BY-4.0
source_type: observed image-derived spectral/field dataset
evidence: Zenodo and DataCite metadata describe airborne and UAV-borne imaging spectroscopy, atmospherically corrected reflectance data, plot-level extracted pixel values, field inventory surveys, and a 354 MB ZIP archive.
scale: five Canadian sites; plot-level extracted spectral pixels
feature_count: not stated

name: Karlsruhe 2010 HyMap Forest HYPERedu Hyperspectral Dataset
provider: GFZ Data Services / EnMAP HYPERedu
theme_canonical: Airborne imaging spectroscopy for forest applications
theme_raw: HyMap airborne hyperspectral image and forest reference data for HYPERedu MOOC
coverage: north of Karlsruhe, Southwest Germany
license: HyMap imagery available under commercial End User Licensing Agreements
formats: TIF imagery and ancillary/reference data
access: GFZ landing page; license-controlled imagery
notes: HYPERedu forest applications training dataset with an atmospherically and topographically corrected airborne HyMap image over mixed forest near Karlsruhe plus tree-species/reference information.
desc_zh: 该 GFZ/EnMAP HYPERedu 数据集提供德国 Karlsruhe 北部混交林区 2010 年 8 月 HyMap 机载高光谱影像。影像已由 DLR 进行大气和地形校正，并以 TIF 形式提供，用于森林树种分类和成像光谱教学。由于 HyMap 数据带有商业终端用户许可，开放性低于 CC 类数据，但元数据和访问入口明确。
desc_en: This GFZ EnMAP HYPERedu dataset provides an airborne HyMap hyperspectral image acquired north of Karlsruhe, Germany, in August 2010. The image was atmospherically and topographically corrected by DLR and distributed in TIF format for forest applications such as tree-species classification and imaging spectroscopy training. desc_zh: 该 NOAA/NCEI 数据集提供 MOBY 海洋光学浮标的过滤后高光谱辐射数据，文件为 TXT ASCII 格式，包含 Lw、Lwn、Es 以及建模的 Kl/Lw/Lwn 等变量。MOBY 位于夏威夷 Lanai 附近海域，自 1997 年以来是美国海洋水色卫星交叉/替代定标的重要海上观测系统。该条目与已收录的 raw binary MOBY 数据不同，更适合直接用于卫星水色产品验证和定标分析。
desc_en: This NOAA/NCEI dataset provides filtered MOBY hyperspectral radiance files in TXT ASCII format, including Lw, Lwn, Es, and modeled Kl/Lw/Lwn variables. MOBY is an autonomous radiometric buoy off Lanai, Hawaii, and has served as a primary in-water observatory for vicarious calibration of ocean-colour satellites since 1997. This filtered product complements the raw binary MOBY spectral radiance collection and is more directly usable for validation and calibration analyses.
openness: public NOAA metadata and associated data access; NCEI order/request constraints may apply
source_type: in situ autonomous hyperspectral radiometry
evidence: NCEI C01694 metadata states the dataset contains MOBY filtered spectral radiance TXT ASCII files with hyperspectral Lw, Lwn, Es and modeled Kl data, used by satellite ocean color vicarious calibration community.
scale: MOBY time series off Lanai; ongoing project
feature_count: not stated

access: NOAA OCM data access portal and NCEI archive request

desc_zh: 该 NOAA OCM/NCEI 海岸航空影像档案包含美国海岸地区的高分辨率航空影像，类型包括真彩色、红外、4 波段、黑白以及高光谱正射镶嵌瓦片。数据以 GeoTIFF 或 ERDAS Imagine IMG 等格式提供，并带有 GIS 瓦片索引和 manifest 文件。该档案不是纯高光谱数据集，但元数据明确包含高光谱正射镶嵌产品，适合需要查找美国海岸高光谱航空子集的用户。
desc_en: This NOAA OCM/NCEI archive contains high-resolution aerial imagery over U.S. coastal areas, including true-color, infrared, 4-band, black-and-white, and hyperspectral orthorectified mosaic tiles. Files are distributed as GeoTIFF or ERDAS Imagine IMG imagery with GIS tile-index shapefiles and manifest files. It is a mixed archive rather than a hyperspectral-only collection, but NCEI explicitly lists hyperspectral orthomosaics among the products.
openness: public NOAA metadata and portal access; order constraints may apply
source_type: mixed airborne imagery archive with hyperspectral subsets
evidence: NCEI C01633 metadata says the aerial imagery dataset includes high-resolution true color, infrared, 4-band, black-and-white and hyperspectral orthorectified mosaic tiles, with GeoTIFF/IMG images and GIS tile indexes.
scale: U.S. coastal archive; subset-dependent
feature_count: not stated

theme_raw: FL_Estuaries and FL_Optics high spectral resolution inherent and apparent optical property data
coverage: Florida estuaries and broader aquatic optical compilation context

formats: ZIP downloads, data dictionary PDF

desc_en: This EPA/Data.gov record provides hyperspectral aquatic optical data for satellite remote sensing, with downloadable FL_Estuaries_updated.zip and FL_Optics_data.zip resources plus a data dictionary. The record is associated with Casey et al. on a global compilation of in situ high-spectral-resolution inherent and apparent optical properties for remote-sensing applications. It is a support and validation spectroscopy dataset rather than an image-cube archive.
openness: open U.S. government data via Data.gov/EPA
source_type: in situ hyperspectral aquatic optical dataset
evidence: Data.gov page states “Hyperspectral optical data for satellite remote sensing” and lists FL_Estuaries_updated.zip and FL_Optics_data.zip download URLs plus an EPA data dictionary and associated ESSD publication.
scale: Florida estuaries plus optical data package; exact sample count not stated in Data.gov summary
feature_count: not stated

provider: PANGAEA / NASA PACE Science Team
theme_canonical: Synthetic hyperspectral ocean color radiance for PACE algorithm development
theme_raw: top-of-atmosphere and sea-surface hyperspectral radiances, 350-800 nm at 5 nm resolution, generated with coupled ocean-atmosphere radiative transfer models

formats: tab-delimited text via PANGAEA, linked data files and documentation
access: direct-download via PANGAEA DOI landing page
notes: Synthetic rather than observed imagery. Included because it provides hyperspectral 350-800 nm ocean-color radiance scenarios for PACE remote-sensing algorithm development, with open PANGAEA distribution.
desc_zh: 该 PANGAEA 数据集为 NASA PACE 海色算法开发提供合成的高光谱海表与大气顶辐亮度数据，光谱范围为 350-800 nm、5 nm 分辨率。数据由耦合海洋-大气辐射传输模型生成，并以开放 DOI 页面提供下载。它不是实测影像，但适合海色算法测试、误差隔离和 PACE 高光谱任务仿真。
desc_en: This PANGAEA record provides synthetic hyperspectral sea-surface and top-of-atmosphere radiance data for NASA PACE ocean-color algorithm development, spanning 350-800 nm at 5 nm spectral resolution. The data were generated with coupled ocean-atmosphere radiative-transfer modelling and are distributed through an open DOI landing page. It is synthetic rather than observed imagery, useful for algorithm testing and PACE mission simulation.
openness: open
source_type: repository
evidence: PANGAEA citation page states DOI 10.1594/PANGAEA.915747, CC BY 4.0 license, 80 data points, and a synthetic hyperspectral 350-800 nm, 5 nm dataset for PACE ocean color algorithm development.
scale: global/synthetic ocean radiance scenarios
feature_count: 80 data points

name: PANGAEA Keppel Islands Coral Spectral Reflectance Library
provider: PANGAEA / University of Queensland Biophysical Remote Sensing Group
theme_canonical: In situ coral spectral reflectance library for reef remote sensing
theme_raw: healthy, dead and bleached coral radiance-reflectance measurements collected underwater with Ocean Optics USB2000 spectrometer
coverage: Keppel Islands, Great Barrier Reef, Queensland, Australia
formats: PANGAEA downloadable dataset
access: direct-download via PANGAEA DOI landing page
notes: In situ spectral library rather than airborne/spaceborne image cubes. Included as a reef remote-sensing reference dataset because the record links coral reflectance measurements to coral reef mapping and bleaching detection literature.
desc_zh: 该 PANGAEA 数据集收录澳大利亚大堡礁 Keppel Islands 的珊瑚光谱反射率测量，包括健康、死亡和白化珊瑚类型。数据使用 Ocean Optics USB2000 光谱仪在水下采集，并可作为珊瑚礁遥感、底质反射率建模和白化检测的参考光谱库。它属于原位光谱支撑数据，不是航空或卫星影像立方体。
desc_en: This PANGAEA dataset contains spectral reflectance measurements of healthy, dead, and bleached corals from the Keppel Islands in the Great Barrier Reef, Australia. Measurements were collected underwater with an Ocean Optics USB2000 spectrometer and support coral-reef remote sensing, bottom-reflectance modelling, and bleaching-detection studies. It is an in situ spectral library rather than an airborne or satellite image cube.
openness: open
source_type: repository
evidence: PANGAEA page lists DOI 10.1594/PANGAEA.872507, CC BY 3.0 license, 914.3 kB size, Keppel Islands coverage, and underwater radiance-reflectance measurements of healthy, dead and bleached corals.
scale: site spectral library
feature_count: 36 coral samples; 914.3 kB

theme_raw: 2-D average and standard deviation values for pixels of suspended sediment plus white and black control backgrounds

desc_en: This figshare dataset provides hyperspectral pixel statistics for suspended sediment and white/black control backgrounds, including two-dimensional averages and standard deviations. Different sediment sizes and concentrations were tested, making it useful for water and sediment remote-sensing method development. It is a small laboratory support dataset rather than georeferenced imagery.

source_type: repository

desc_en: HIDSAG is a hyperspectral image database for supervised and unsupervised geometallurgy analysis, built from five characterized mineral sample sets. The figshare collection lists component datasets such as GEOMET, PORPHYRY, GEOCHEM, MINERAL2, and MINERAL1, supporting mineral identification, material classification, and hyperspectral machine-learning research. This row uses the collection landing page; users should inspect component datasets for file-level details and licenses.
openness: open_with_component_license_check
source_type: repository_collection
evidence: Springer Nature figshare collection page states DOI 10.6084/m9.figshare.c.5983921.v1, posted 2023-03-20, five results found, and describes spectral data from five characterized mineral sample sets.

feature_count: 5 component datasets

desc_en: This Mendeley Data record contains in-field hyperspectral imagery of Manzanilla and Gordal olive varieties across the growing season, with raw, normalized, and processed data files. The page describes pixel-level olive spectral signatures with 204 spectral columns, supporting cultivar classification, growth-stage analysis, and agricultural hyperspectral method development. It is close-range field imaging rather than airborne or satellite data.
openness: open
source_type: repository
evidence: Mendeley page states DOI 10.17632/8xvhcsdvst.1, CC BY 4.0 license, raw/normalized/processed hyperspectral files, May-September monitoring, and 204-column spectral signatures.
scale: seasonal field imaging
feature_count: 204 spectral columns in processed signatures

desc_en: This Taylor & Francis figshare dataset supports a review of hyperspectral plastic-detection studies from 2014-2025, covering laboratory spectra, UAV, airborne, and satellite platforms. It is not a raw image-cube archive, but it provides structured information on platforms, sensors, plastic types, data characteristics, and methods. It is useful as a 2-hop/3-hop seed for locating underlying hyperspectral plastic-pollution datasets.

source_type: review_dataset
evidence: Figshare page states DOI 10.6084/m9.figshare.32587757, CC BY 4.0, 110.35 MB download, posted 2026-06-05, and describes a structured search of hyperspectral plastic-detection studies from 2014 to 2025.

feature_count: 29 studies summarized

source_type: repository
evidence: Data.gov page states public access, DOI 10.5066/P94QAHLC, ASD FieldSpec 4 Hi-Res NG reflectance collected at Black Rock Desert, and files including raw ASD, CSV, TXT spectra, wavelength/bandpass, KMZ/shapefile and photos for imaging spectrometer calibration/validation.

desc_en: This USDA ARS dataset combines cotton hyperspectral reflectance and biophysical/biochemical measurements from field experiments at El Reno, Oklahoma, and Temple, Texas. FieldSpec Pro FR spectra from 350-2500 nm are paired with plant height, node count, LAI, canopy cover, and chlorophyll measurements. feature_count: one MasterCottonCombinedFinal.csv resource

name: NASA USGS Advanced Solid-state Array Spectroradiometer ASAS Airborne Hyperspectral Multiangle Archive
provider: NASA / DOI-USGS EROS / Data.gov
theme_canonical: Historic airborne multiangle hyperspectral BRDF archive
theme_raw: ASAS airborne hyperspectral multiangle data collected from NASA C-130 or P-3 aircraft for surface BRDF over land-cover targets

desc_zh: ASAS 是 NASA/USGS 维护的历史航空高光谱多角度遥感数据档案，传感器安装在 NASA C-130 或 P-3 飞机下方，用于研究不同地表覆盖类型的太阳散射方向性和 BRDF。数据主要覆盖美国本土，也包含加拿大和西非部分区域，采集时间为 1988-1994 年。该档案通过 USGS EarthExplorer 访问，适合历史多角度高光谱反射率与地表辐射特性研究。
desc_en: ASAS is a historic NASA/USGS airborne hyperspectral multiangle archive collected from NASA C-130 or P-3 aircraft. It supports studies of directional solar scattering and BRDF over land-cover types such as crops, forests, prairie grass, snow, and bare soil. The collection mainly covers the conterminous United States, with some Canada and western Africa coverage, and is accessed through USGS EarthExplorer.
openness: public_metadata_earthExplorer_access
source_type: institutional_archive
evidence: Data.gov page describes ASAS as a hyperspectral, multiangle airborne remote-sensing instrument, collected from 1988 to 1994, primarily over the continental United States, with public access and EarthExplorer download/order link.
scale: historic airborne archive
feature_count: not stated

desc_zh: 该 PANGAEA 数据集汇集全球开阔海、海岸和内陆水体的 CDOM 吸收系数，并与 Sentinel-3 OLCI 像元进行时空匹配，用于水色遥感产品评估。页面说明许多原始 aCDOM 光谱为 1 nm、2 nm 或约 3.3 nm 的高光谱分辨率，并被转换到 OLCI 标称波段。它是原位光学属性与卫星 matchup 支撑数据，而非影像立方体。
desc_en: This PANGAEA dataset compiles CDOM absorption coefficients from open-ocean, coastal, and inland surface waters and matches them to Sentinel-3 OLCI pixels for ocean-colour validation. The page notes that many source aCDOM spectra were provided at hyperspectral resolution of 1 nm, 2 nm, or about 3.3 nm before conversion to OLCI bands. It is an in situ optical-property matchup dataset rather than image cubes.
openness: open_metadata_download
source_type: repository_validation_dataset
evidence: PANGAEA page states DOI 10.1594/PANGAEA.983195, publication date 2025-06-24, global in situ aCDOM(443) data matched to OLCI from May 2016 to November 2022, and that many aCDOM(lambda) records were hyperspectral at 1 nm, 2 nm or about 3.3 nm resolution.
scale: global aquatic optical matchup collection
feature_count: not stated in summary

name: Zenodo Laboratory Phytoplankton Hyperspectral Reflectance Analysis Dataset
provider: Zenodo / University of Bologna
theme_canonical: Laboratory hyperspectral reflectance spectra for phytoplankton species identification
theme_raw: raw reflectance spectra for five algal species, controlled mixtures, preprocessing outputs and scripts for PCA, LDA, similarity index and spectral unmixing
coverage: Controlled laboratory phytoplankton experiments; geographic coverage not applicable
formats: TXT, ZIP archives, Python scripts
access: direct-download via Zenodo DOI landing page
notes: Laboratory spectroscopy support dataset rather than remote-sensing imagery. Included because it provides open hyperspectral reflectance spectra and unmixing inputs for aquatic/phytoplankton optical remote-sensing research.
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 数据集提供实验室条件下五种藻类及三种受控混合物的高光谱反射率测量，以及水体校正、归一化和 PCA/LDA/相似性指数/线性光谱解混脚本。文件包括反射率 TXT 和多个 ZIP 包，总量约 1.2 MB。它不是遥感影像，但可作为浮游植物光学特性、光谱分类和水色遥感算法研究的开放支撑数据。
desc_en: This Zenodo dataset provides laboratory hyperspectral reflectance measurements for five algal species and three controlled mixtures, along with water-correction, normalization, PCA/LDA, similarity-index, and linear spectral-unmixing scripts. Files include reflectance TXT tables and ZIP archives totaling about 1.2 MB. It is not remote-sensing imagery, but it supports phytoplankton optical-property, spectral-classification, and aquatic remote-sensing research.
openness: open
source_type: repository_spectral_library
evidence: Zenodo page states Dataset/Open, DOI 10.5281/zenodo.17563974, CC BY 4.0, raw reflectance spectra for five algal species and three controlled mixtures, and downloadable files including Algae_reflectances.zip, Mix.zip and Reflectance_spectra.txt.
scale: laboratory spectral library
feature_count: five algal species plus three mixtures

name: Zenodo ForestFactory Simulated Temperate Forest Hyperspectral Reflectance Dataset
provider: Zenodo / UFZ / Julius Kühn-Institut / FORMIND ForestFactory team
theme_canonical: Simulated hyperspectral satellite-like forest reflectance and structural attributes
theme_raw: 900000 simulated 20 m forest patches with biomass, LAI, productivity, diversity attributes and reflectance spectra from 409.68 to 2499.14 nm
coverage: Simulated temperate forest patches; satellite-like EnMAP/hyperspectral use case
formats: ZIP of CSV files
access: direct-download via Zenodo DOI landing page
notes: Synthetic radiative-transfer/model dataset rather than observed imagery. Included because it explicitly mimics hyperspectral satellite data such as EnMAP and provides spectra for training and analyzing forest-attribute inference models.
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 数据集包含 90 万个模拟温带森林斑块的属性与高光谱反射率，由 ForestFactory 和 FORMIND 辐射传输组件生成。每个 20 m x 20 m 斑块包含生物量、LAI、GPP/NPP、多样性指标以及 409.68-2499.14 nm 的反射率列。它是模拟数据，不是实测影像，但可用于训练和分析基于 EnMAP 等高光谱卫星数据的森林属性反演模型。
desc_en: This Zenodo dataset contains attributes and hyperspectral reflectance spectra for 900,000 simulated temperate forest patches generated with ForestFactory and FORMIND radiative-transfer components. Each 20 m x 20 m patch includes biomass, LAI, GPP/NPP, diversity metrics, and reflectance columns from 409.68 to 2499.14 nm. It is synthetic rather than observed imagery, but is designed to mimic hyperspectral satellites such as EnMAP for forest-attribute inference.
openness: open
source_type: repository_synthetic_dataset
evidence: Zenodo page states Dataset/Open, DOI 10.5281/zenodo.16748242, CC BY 4.0, 900000 simulated temperate forest patches, 20 m x 20 m rows, reflectance from 409.68 to 2499.14 nm, and a 953.7 MB ZIP file.
scale: 900000 simulated 20 m forest patches
feature_count: 900000 patches

The page states that the dataset includes 22 UAV Parrot Sequoia multispectral flight campaigns and hyperspectral datasets used for mite monitoring. It is cataloged as a linked institutional dataset with weaker openness than CC-BY records because the RDA summary lists access as Other and rights-holder terms rather than an explicit open license.

feature_count: 22 UAV multispectral campaigns plus hyperspectral mite-monitoring datasets

desc_en: Rocklea Dome C3DMM is a CSIRO 3D Mineral Mapping project dataset demonstrating hyperspectral remote and proximal sensing for mineral systems analysis. The record describes hyperspectral mapping and validation of iron oxides, aluminium clays, hematite/goethite ratios, clay mineralogy, regolith and resource-characterization products. Research Data Australia marks the data as open, CC BY 4.0, and accessible through the CSIRO data portal.
openness: open
source_type: institutional_repository
evidence: RDA page states DOI 10.25919/5ed83bf55be6a, CC BY 4.0, open/free access, data accessible online, and project use of hyperspectral remote and proximal sensing technologies for Rocklea Dome 3D mineral mapping from 2009 to 2012.

feature_count: not stated

theme_raw: HydroLight synthetic IOP/AOP database with netCDF radiance, irradiance, remote-sensing reflectance and optical-property outputs from 350-750 nm at 5 nm intervals

desc_en: This Dryad database provides synthetic hyperspectral IOP/AOP data generated with HydroLight radiative-transfer simulations for ocean optics and optical remote sensing. It includes 3320 IOP combinations and 29880 simulations, with outputs such as radiances, irradiances, remote-sensing reflectance, diffuse attenuation coefficients, and other AOPs from 350-750 nm at 5 nm intervals. It is synthetic rather than observed imagery, useful for ocean-colour algorithm and radiative-transfer research.
openness: open
source_type: repository_synthetic_dataset
evidence: Dryad page states DOI 10.6076/D1630T, 6.72 GB latest version, netCDF Hydrolight files, 3320 IOP combinations, 29880 radiative-transfer simulations, and AOP/remote-sensing-reflectance outputs from 350 to 750 nm at 5 nm intervals.
scale: 3320 IOP scenarios; 29880 simulations
feature_count: 18 netCDF-4 files plus README/PDF

desc_en: CBSR is a Mendeley Data record for cross-spectral image super-resolution, including multi-band image data, scripts, and model-training code for spectral enhancement, preprocessing, and model evaluation. The landing page explicitly targets remote sensing, hyperspectral image analysis, and machine-learning applications, and uses a CC BY 4.0 license. It is a method/benchmark dataset rather than a named airborne or satellite mission product.

source_type: repository_benchmark

desc_zh: 该 ScienceDB 数据集包含 1000 个室内/室外高光谱场景，室外场景包括道路、建筑、花卉、车辆等，室内场景包括食物、布料、玩具和模型等。D1 覆盖 400-1000 nm、10 nm 间隔、61 个通道，D2 覆盖 400-1700 nm、10 nm 间隔、131 个通道，并提供合成 RGB 参考图。它不是传统航空/卫星遥感数据，但可作为高光谱成像、场景理解和模型训练的开放支撑数据。
desc_en: This ScienceDB dataset contains 1000 indoor and outdoor hyperspectral scenes, with outdoor examples such as roads, buildings, flowers, and vehicles, and indoor examples such as food, cloth, toys, and models. Database D1 spans 400-1000 nm at 10 nm intervals with 61 bands, while D2 spans 400-1700 nm at 10 nm intervals with 131 bands, with synthesized RGB references. It is not conventional airborne or satellite remote-sensing imagery, but is useful as an open support dataset for hyperspectral imaging and model development.
openness: open_metadata_license_unclear
source_type: repository_general_hsi_dataset
evidence: ScienceDB page metadata states DOI 10.57760/sciencedb.18287, CSTR 31253.11.sciencedb.18287, 1000 indoor/outdoor scenes, D1 400-1000 nm at 10 nm intervals with 61-channel 960x1230 H5 images, D2 400-1700 nm at 10 nm intervals with 131-channel 640x660 H5 images, and ZIP packages plus synthesized RGB images.

feature_count: 1000 HSI images in each database range; 61-band and 131-band versions

desc_en: This PANGAEA dataset provides visible-to-near-infrared hyperspectral cloud-top solar radiance fields measured by the AISA Eagle instrument aboard Polar 5 during the COMPEX-EC 2025 field campaign. The landing page describes a pushbroom sensor with 1024 across-track pixels and 504 channels from 400 to 993 nm, observing cold-air-outbreak cloud structures over the open ocean north of Norway. Zipped netCDF flight files include radiance, wavelength, geolocation, attitude, and time variables, making the dataset useful for cloud microstructure studies, EarthCARE validation, and airborne atmospheric imaging spectroscopy.

feature_count: 504 channels; 1024 across-track pixels

desc_zh: 该 Figshare 数据集是 Journal of Remote Sensing 论文“Unraveling Ecosystem Function Responses to Grazing Intensity through UAV-Based Hyperspectral Analysis”的统计数据仓库。论文摘要说明研究使用内蒙古草原 UAV 高光谱影像反演地上生物量和 9 个关键植物功能性状，并分析不同放牧强度下群落功能性状、功能多样性和生物量关系。Figshare 提供 `xlht_df.csv` 和 README，README 说明数据为 1 m x 1 m 网格尺度的功能性状组成、生物量和放牧强度表；该条目按文献衍生高光谱生态产品收录，不视为原始影像 cube。
desc_en: This Figshare dataset is the statistical repository for the Journal of Remote Sensing article on ecosystem-function responses to grazing intensity using UAV-based hyperspectral analysis. The article abstract states that UAV hyperspectral imagery over an Inner Mongolian Steppe grassland was used to retrieve aboveground biomass and nine key functional traits, then analyze functional-trait composition, diversity and biomass across grazing pressures. Figshare provides `xlht_df.csv` and a README; the README describes 1 m x 1 m grid-level functional-trait composition, biomass and grazing-intensity variables. The catalog treats it as a literature-derived hyperspectral ecological product, not a raw image-cube archive.

The downloaded README states xlht_df.csv contains functional trait composition, biomass and grazing intensity at 1 m x 1 m grid level. Search and institutional metadata identify the associated Journal of Remote Sensing article DOI 10.34133/remotesensing.0732 and summarize UAV hyperspectral retrieval of biomass and nine traits in an Inner Mongolian Steppe grassland.

desc_en: This GFZ Data Services record provides a HySpex hyperspectral reflectance spectral library for rare-earth-bearing minerals, rare-earth oxide powders and niobium/tantalum oxides, paired with mineral-chemistry analyses. DataCite and the GFZ page state that spectra cover 400-2500 nm, are scaled from 0 to 10000, and include 16 rare-earth oxide powders and 14 REE-bearing mineral samples plus Nb/Ta oxide materials. It is not remote-sensing imagery, but it is an open reference library for mineral exploration, rare-earth identification and geologic hyperspectral algorithm validation.

source_type: laboratory HySpex mineral hyperspectral spectral library
evidence: DataCite DOI 10.5880/GFZ.1.4.2019.004 reports Dataset, GFZ Data Services publisher, CC BY 4.0 rights and abstract describing chemical analyses plus HySpex 400-2500 nm hyperspectral spectra for 32 REE/oxide materials; GFZ HTML snapshot confirms citation, DOI, abstract and CC BY 4.0.

desc_en: This GFZ dataset contains HySpex hyperspectral reflectance spectra and mineral-chemistry analyses for 20 copper-bearing mineral samples. DataCite states that spectra were acquired from 414 to 2498 nm, with reflectance scaled from 0 to 10000 and detailed sample-area and mineral-chemistry information. It is an open geologic remote-sensing reference library for copper mineral identification, mineralization mapping and algorithm validation.

source_type: laboratory HySpex mineral hyperspectral spectral library
evidence: DataCite DOI 10.5880/GFZ.1.4.2019.003 reports Dataset, CC BY 4.0 rights and an abstract describing 20 copper-bearing minerals, HySpex 414-2498 nm reflectance spectra and chemistry; GFZ HTML snapshot confirms DOI/citation/abstract.

feature_count: HySpex spectra 414-2498 nm; reflectance scaled 0-10000

desc_en: This GFZ dataset provides HySpex hyperspectral reflectance spectra and chemistry for 37 surface-material samples from the Apliki copper-gold-pyrite mine in Cyprus. The page states that samples were collected in March 2018 with the Cyprus Geological Survey Department and GFZ, and that HySpex spectra cover 400-2500 nm with reflectance scaled from 0 to 10000. It complements the already cataloged Apliki field/lab image-cube dataset and serves as a reference library for mine surface-material identification and mineralization mapping.

source_type: field-sample HySpex geologic hyperspectral spectral library
evidence: DataCite DOI 10.5880/GFZ.1.4.2019.005 reports Dataset, CC BY 4.0 rights and abstract describing 37 Apliki mine surface samples with HySpex 400-2500 nm spectra and chemistry; GFZ HTML snapshot confirms DOI/citation/abstract.

feature_count: HySpex spectra 400-2500 nm; reflectance scaled 0-10000

coverage: Bajoca feldspar mine, Almendra, Portugal; surface samples collected May 2019
formats: HySpex laboratory spectra, Spectral Evolution PSR+ field spectra, chemistry data sheets and reports
access: GFZ Data Services DOI landing page and data publication files

notes: Lithium exploration spectral library from the LIGHTS project; includes both laboratory HySpex and on-site PSR+ spectra.
desc_zh: 该 GFZ/LIGHTS 数据集提供葡萄牙 Almendra 的 Bajoca feldspar mine 32 个含锂地表材料样品的化学分析和高光谱反射率光谱。DataCite 摘要说明实验室 HySpex 光谱覆盖 414-2498 nm，现场 Spectral Evolution PSR+ 3500 光谱覆盖 350-2500 nm，HySpex 反射率缩放为 0-10000，PSR+ 反射率缩放为 0-1。该数据面向锂靶区勘查、无人机高光谱与地面光谱联合分析、矿物识别和地质遥感验证。
desc_en: This GFZ/LIGHTS dataset provides chemistry and hyperspectral reflectance spectra for 32 Li-bearing surface samples from the Bajoca feldspar mine in Almendra, Portugal. DataCite states that laboratory HySpex spectra cover 414-2498 nm and on-site Spectral Evolution PSR+ 3500 spectra cover 350-2500 nm, with HySpex reflectance scaled from 0 to 10000 and PSR+ reflectance from 0 to 1. The dataset supports lithium-target exploration, drone/ground spectral integration, mineral identification and geologic remote-sensing validation.

source_type: field and laboratory lithium-bearing mineral hyperspectral spectral library
evidence: DataCite DOI 10.5880/GFZ.1.4.2021.002 reports Dataset, CC BY 4.0 rights and abstract describing 32 Bajoca Li-bearing surface samples, laboratory HySpex 414-2498 nm spectra, PSR+ 350-2500 nm spectra and chemistry; GFZ HTML snapshot confirms DOI/citation/abstract.
scale: 32 Li-bearing surface samples
feature_count: HySpex 414-2498 nm plus PSR+ 350-2500 nm spectra

desc_en: This GFZ/LIGHTS dataset contains LIBS emission spectra and corresponding HySpex hyperspectral reflectance spectra for 18 lithium-bearing mineral samples, including lepidolite, petalite and spodumene specimens. DataCite states that HySpex data cover 414-2498 nm and are distributed as a spectral library; the LIGHTS project targets lithium exploration by combining drone-borne hyperspectral data and field observations. The dataset supports lithium mineral identification, LIBS-hyperspectral joint modelling and geologic remote-sensing method validation.

feature_count: HySpex 414-2498 nm reflectance plus LIBS emission spectra

name: Zenodo Water-Deficit Potato Plant HySpex Hyperspectral Imaging Dataset
provider: Agricultural Institute of Slovenia / Zenodo / Lapajne et al.

theme_raw: Hyperspectral imaging dataset of potato plants exposed to water-deficit condition
coverage: Agricultural Institute of Slovenia greenhouse experiment, Ljubljana, Slovenia; KIS Krka and KIS Savinja potato cultivars
formats: Five large Zenodo ZIP archives containing hyperspectral imaging data and associated experiment files
access: Zenodo record with direct file downloads
doi_or_citation: 10.5281/zenodo.7936850; associated with water-deficient potato plant hyperspectral imaging studies
notes: Greenhouse close-range/controlled-environment plant hyperspectral imaging dataset rather than airborne/satellite remote sensing. Included because it is a large open HySpex imaging dataset for agricultural remote-sensing method development and water-stress detection.
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 数据集提供在斯洛文尼亚农业研究所温室实验中获取的马铃薯水分胁迫高光谱成像数据，许可证为 CC BY 4.0。Zenodo 描述说明实验于 2021 年 4-8 月进行，包含 KIS Krka 和 KIS Savinja 两个品种，部分植株接受限制灌溉处理；页面提供 5 个 imaging ZIP 文件，总量约 60.1 GB。该数据是近距离/温室 HySpex 作物成像数据，不是航空或卫星影像，但对农业高光谱、作物水分胁迫识别和模型可解释性研究很有价值。
desc_en: This Zenodo record provides potato water-deficit hyperspectral imaging data from a greenhouse experiment at the Agricultural Institute of Slovenia under CC BY 4.0. The description states that the experiment ran from April to August 2021, used KIS Krka and KIS Savinja cultivars, and assigned plants to water-deficient and well-watered groups; Zenodo exposes five imaging ZIP files totaling about 60.1 GB. It is a close-range/greenhouse HySpex crop-imaging dataset rather than airborne or satellite imagery, but is valuable for agricultural hyperspectral remote-sensing methods, water-stress detection and explainable modelling research.
openness: Zenodo CC BY 4.0 dataset with direct ZIP downloads
source_type: close-range greenhouse crop HySpex hyperspectral imaging dataset
evidence: Zenodo API for record 7936850 reports DOI 10.5281/zenodo.7936850, CC BY 4.0, publication date 2023-08-01 and five imaging ZIP files. The description states a controlled greenhouse potato experiment at the Agricultural Institute of Slovenia, two cultivars, water-deficient vs well-watered treatments and soil-moisture control.
scale: two cultivars; water-deficient and well-watered greenhouse treatments; five imaging ZIP archives
feature_count: HySpex plant hyperspectral images and experiment-associated measurements/files
file_size: 60,114,575,275 bytes across five ZIP archives (~60.1 GB)

theme_raw: HYPERNETS Lonzee L2B surface reflectance for satellite validation
coverage: Lonzee HYPERNETS site in Belgium (LOBE); quality-checked periods suitable for satellite validation through 2025-10-01
formats: ZIP NetCDF L2B surface reflectance products and CSV sequence index
access: Zenodo record and LANDHYPERNET data portal
time_span: data included until 2025-10-01; Zenodo publication date 2025-11-15
notes: Included as in situ terrestrial hyperspectral validation data rather than airborne/spaceborne image cubes; record points to LANDHYPERNET for near-real-time and monthly products.
desc_zh: 该数据集提供比利时 Lonzee（LOBE）HYPERNETS 站点经过质量检查的 L2B 高光谱地表反射率数据，用于光学卫星产品验证。记录说明数据仅保留空间均一、晴空等适合验证的观测时段，覆盖至 2025-10-01，并提供 ZIP 数据包与序列索引 CSV。它补充了已收录的 Gobabeb、Wytham Woods、Järvselja 等 LANDHYPERNET 站点。
desc_en: This Zenodo record provides quality-checked L2B hyperspectral surface-reflectance data from the HYPERNETS Lonzee site in Belgium (LOBE) for optical satellite validation. The record keeps periods suitable for validation, such as homogeneous and clear-sky observations, includes data through 2025-10-01, and distributes a site ZIP plus a sequence-index CSV. It extends the catalog beyond the already captured LANDHYPERNET sites such as Gobabeb, Wytham Woods, and Järvselja.

source_type: in situ terrestrial hyperspectral surface-reflectance validation dataset
evidence: Zenodo API record 17616380 lists DOI 10.5281/zenodo.17616380, license cc-by-4.0, publication date 2025-11-15, files LOBE.zip (884,336,580 bytes) and Zenodo_L2B_sequences_LOBE.csv (119,560 bytes); the abstract states quality-checked L2B surface reflectance for the Lonzee HYPERNETS site in Belgium and HYPSTAR-XR VNIR/SWIR measurements for satellite validation. Phase471 Zenodo API recheck: current version DOI 10.5281/zenodo.17616380, concept DOI 10.5281/zenodo.17616379, CC-BY-4.0, publication_date 2025-11-15, quality-checked L2B surface reflectance suitable for satellite validation through 2025-10-01, files LOBE.zip 884,336,580 bytes and Zenodo_L2B_sequences_LOBE.csv.

feature_count: HYPSTAR-XR VNIR/SWIR hyperspectral measurements; VNIR 380-1000 nm and SWIR 1000-1680 nm described in record

name: FIRE-MAPS AVIRIS-3 Fish Lake Canopy Water Content and Fractional Cover Dataset
provider: NASA FireSense / Jet Propulsion Laboratory / Zenodo
theme_canonical: Airborne imaging spectroscopy vegetation wildfire products
theme_raw: FIRE-MAPS AVIRIS-3 derived orthorectified canopy water content and fractional cover
coverage: Fish Lake, Utah, United States; pre- and post-wildfire flight-line chunks from 2023-09-26 to 2023-10-19
formats: Orthorectified GeoTIFF products in ZIP archive
access: Zenodo direct download
notes: Added through DataCite/Zenodo citation-chain follow-up. This is an AVIRIS-3 derived product dataset rather than raw radiance cubes, but the record documents the hyperspectral source, calibration chain and orthorectified GeoTIFF outputs.
desc_zh: FIRE-MAPS 数据集提供 NASA FireSense 任务期间 AVIRIS-3 航空成像光谱数据派生的逐像元冠层含水量（CWC）和植被覆盖度（fCover）产品。Zenodo 记录说明 AVIRIS-3 在 380-2500 nm 范围以 7.5 nm 间隔获取 284 个波段，数据经过辐射/几何校正与 ISOFIT 大气校正，并以约 3 m 分辨率的正射 GeoTIFF 发布。该版本覆盖犹他州 Fish Lake 的多条火前/火后航线片段，适合森林火灾生态响应、植被水分和成像光谱产品验证研究。
desc_en: FIRE-MAPS provides per-pixel canopy water content (CWC) and fractional-cover products derived from AVIRIS-3 airborne imaging spectroscopy acquired during NASA’s FireSense campaign. The Zenodo record states that AVIRIS-3 measured 284 bands from 380-2500 nm at 7.5 nm spacing, with radiometric/geometric calibration and ISOFIT atmospheric correction, and distributes approximately 3 m orthorectified GeoTIFF outputs. This Fish Lake release covers pre- and post-wildfire flight-line chunks and supports wildfire ecology, vegetation-water and imaging-spectroscopy product validation studies.
openness: open Zenodo dataset under CC BY 4.0
source_type: airborne AVIRIS-3 imaging spectroscopy derived GeoTIFF product dataset
evidence: Zenodo API record 18370879 lists DOI 10.5281/zenodo.18370879, license cc-by-4.0, publication date 2026-01-25, one file Fishlake.zip of 9,249,618,546 bytes, and a description stating AVIRIS-3 284-band 380-2500 nm imaging spectroscopy from NASA FireSense, calibrated and atmospherically corrected with ISOFIT, distributed as approximately 3 m orthorectified GeoTIFF canopy water content and fractional cover products.
scale: Fish Lake AVIRIS-3 flight-line chunks
feature_count: AVIRIS-3 source imagery: 284 bands, 380-2500 nm, 7.5 nm interval; derived CWC and fCover GeoTIFF products

name: GFZ SpecWa Inland Waters Spectral Remote Sensing and Chlorophyll-a Dataset
provider: GFZ Data Services / FID GEO / Karlsruhe inland-water monitoring team

theme_raw: SpecWa spectral remote sensing data and chlorophyll a values of inland waters
coverage: Eleven small inland water bodies around Karlsruhe, Germany; summers 2018 and 2019
formats: GFZ data package with spectral data, chlorophyll-a/reference values and processing scripts
access: GFZ Data Services landing page and dataset download

notes: Included as in situ spectral remote-sensing validation data for inland-water quality rather than image cubes.

GFZ/DataCite metadata state that each datapoint contains spectra from 389-910 nm plus in situ or laboratory reference parameters, with 1,305 datapoints in 2018 and 2,830 in 2019. It supports hyperspectral inland-water quality retrieval, machine-learning calibration and chlorophyll-a validation studies.
openness: open GFZ Data Services dataset under CC BY 4.0
source_type: in situ inland-water hyperspectral/spectral remote-sensing validation dataset
evidence: DataCite record 10.5880/FIDGEO.2020.036 lists GFZ Data Services, CC BY 4.0 rights, URL https://dataservices.gfz.de/panmetaworks/showshort.php?id=6800b0c8-dd51-11ea-9603-497c92695674, and abstract stating spectral data from 389-910 nm plus chlorophyll-a/reference water-quality values for 1,305 datapoints in 2018 and 2,830 datapoints in 2019 around Karlsruhe inland waters.
scale: eleven inland-water bodies; thousands of spectral datapoints
feature_count: 1,305 datapoints in 2018 and 2,830 datapoints in 2019; spectra 389-910 nm

name: NASA OMI/Aura OMOCNUV Hyperspectral UV Irradiance and Underwater Attenuation L2 Dataset
provider: NASA GES DISC / Aura OMI mission
theme_canonical: Satellite hyperspectral UV irradiance and aquatic attenuation product
theme_raw: OMI/Aura Hyperspectral UV Irradiance and Underwater Attenuation Coefficient 1-Orbit L2 Swath 13x24km V004
coverage: Global sunlit Aura/OMI orbital swaths; about 13 x 24 km Level-2 pixels
license: NASA Earthdata open data policy / public DAAC access
formats: NetCDF Level-2 orbital swath files via HTTPS and OPeNDAP
access: NASA GES DISC data collection page, HTTPS archive and OPeNDAP endpoint
time_span: Aura OMI Collection 4 ongoing archive; DataCite publication year 2025
notes: Operational NASA DAAC product; access may require Earthdata login for file download, while collection metadata and OPeNDAP/HTTPS endpoints are public.
desc_zh: OMOCNUV 是 NASA GES DISC 发布的 Aura OMI Collection 4 Level-2 轨道产品，提供高光谱 UV 地表辐照度和水下衰减相关变量。NASA CMR 元数据说明产品包含 290-399 nm 地表 UV irradiance、水体 planar/scalar irradiance、diffuse attenuation coefficients 和辅助变量，文件为 NetCDF，每个轨道文件覆盖约 53 分钟日照段，平均约 91 MB。该数据适合 UV 辐射、水体光学、水色和大气-水体遥感交叉分析。
desc_en: OMOCNUV is a NASA GES DISC Aura OMI Collection 4 Level-2 orbital product for hyperspectral UV surface irradiance and underwater attenuation variables. NASA CMR metadata describe 290-399 nm surface UV irradiances, planar/scalar underwater irradiances, diffuse attenuation coefficients over water, ancillary variables, NetCDF files, about 53 minutes of sunlit orbit per file and an average file size of roughly 91 MB. It supports UV radiation, aquatic optics, ocean-color and atmosphere-water remote-sensing analyses.
openness: NASA Earthdata DAAC collection with public metadata and standard Earthdata access
source_type: spaceborne hyperspectral UV Level-2 swath product
evidence: DataCite record 10.5067/AURA/OMI/DATA2440 identifies NASA GES DISC OMOCNUV_004. Local CMR phase248 metadata states OMOCNUV contains OMI hyperspectral surface and underwater UV irradiances, 290-399 nm surface UV, planar/scalar irradiances and diffuse attenuation coefficients over water, NetCDF v4 files, about 14 orbits per day, and average file size about 91 MB, with HTTPS and OPeNDAP links.
scale: global orbital Level-2 swath product
feature_count: surface UV irradiance 290-399 nm plus underwater irradiance and attenuation variables; about 14 orbit files per day
file_size: average Level-2 orbit file about 91 MB according to NASA CMR summary

access: PANGAEA DOI landing page and data download
notes: Included as in situ hyperspectral water-leaving/remote-sensing reflectance for ocean-colour validation rather than imaging raster cubes.
desc_zh: 该 PANGAEA 数据集提供 RV Sonne SO243 航次在秘鲁近岸和上升流区测得的 hyperspectral remote sensing reflectance（Rrs）。DataCite 摘要说明 Rrs 以 1 nm 分辨率覆盖 350-800 nm，来源于 RAMSES/TriOS 水下剖面辐射计测量的上行辐亮度和下行辐照度，并校正入射太阳辐射。它适合海洋水色算法、上升流区生物光学模型和卫星水色产品验证。
desc_en: This PANGAEA dataset provides hyperspectral remote-sensing reflectance (Rrs) from the RV Sonne SO243 cruise in the Peruvian coast and upwelling area. DataCite states that Rrs is provided at 1 nm resolution from 350-800 nm, derived from RAMSES/TriOS underwater profile measurements of upwelling radiance and downwelling irradiance with incident-sunlight correction. It supports ocean-colour algorithms, upwelling bio-optical studies and satellite water-colour validation.
openness: open PANGAEA DOI dataset
source_type: in situ hyperspectral ocean-colour remote-sensing reflectance dataset
evidence: DataCite record 10.1594/PANGAEA.946394 states RRS at 1 nm resolution from 350-800 nm for the Peruvian coast and upwelling area from 2015-10-12 to 2015-10-19, measured with RAMSES/TriOS hyperspectral underwater profile radiometers down to the 0.1 percent light level.
scale: RV Sonne SO243 cruise stations in Peruvian coast/upwelling area
feature_count: Rrs spectra 350-800 nm at 1 nm resolution
file_size: PANGAEA tabular dataset; size not specified in DataCite summary

access: PANGAEA DOI landing page and data download

desc_en: This PANGAEA dataset provides hyperspectral remote-sensing reflectance (Rrs) from the RV Sonne SO218 cruise in coastal and open-ocean areas of the South China Sea and Sulu Sea. DataCite states that Rrs is provided at 1 nm resolution from 350-800 nm, derived from RAMSES/TriOS hyperspectral underwater profile measurements of upwelling radiance and downwelling irradiance. It supports tropical ocean-colour algorithm development, bio-optical analysis and satellite water-colour validation.
openness: open PANGAEA DOI dataset
source_type: in situ hyperspectral ocean-colour remote-sensing reflectance dataset
evidence: DataCite record 10.1594/PANGAEA.946368 states RRS at 1 nm resolution from 350-800 nm for the South China Sea and Sulu Sea from 2011-11-18 to 2011-11-27, measured with RAMSES/TriOS hyperspectral underwater profile radiometers down to the 0.1 percent light level.
scale: RV Sonne SO218 cruise stations in South China Sea and Sulu Sea
feature_count: Rrs spectra 350-800 nm at 1 nm resolution
file_size: PANGAEA tabular dataset; size not specified in DataCite summary

name: NEON AOP Upper East River AVIRIS-NG Raw-Space Radiance Dataset 2018
provider: Watershed Function SFA / Lawrence Berkeley National Laboratory / NEON AOP / NERSC / OSTI
theme_canonical: Airborne AVIRIS-NG imaging spectroscopy raw radiance survey
theme_raw: NEON AOP Imaging Spectroscopy Survey of Upper East River Colorado Watersheds: Raw-Space Radiance and Observational Variable Dataset
coverage: Upper East River / Crested Butte watersheds, Colorado, USA; 334 km2 survey area across 102 flight lines
license: US DOE/OSTI public dataset metadata; data hosted openly at NERSC portal
formats: AVIRIS-NG raw-space radiance and observational-variable files in NERSC directory
access: NERSC public directory plus OSTI DOI landing page
time_span: summer 2018 NEON Campaign; OSTI publication year 2020
notes: Raw-space/non-orthorectified radiance survey; companion processed reflectance mosaic is cataloged separately as DOI 10.15485/1618131.
desc_zh: 该 DOE/OSTI 数据集发布 NEON AOP 在 Colorado Upper East River / Crested Butte 流域获取的 AVIRIS-NG 航空成像光谱原始空间辐亮度与观测变量数据。DataCite 摘要说明调查面积约 334 km²，设计为 72 条航线，实际采集 102 条航线；AVIRIS-NG 覆盖 380-2510 nm 的 426 个连续波段，目标飞行高度约 1000 m，处理后空间分辨率约 1 m。数据可通过 NERSC 公共目录访问，适合雪山流域生态、水文和高光谱辐射处理研究。
desc_en: This DOE/OSTI release provides NEON AOP AVIRIS-NG raw-space radiance and observational-variable data over the Upper East River / Crested Butte watersheds in Colorado. DataCite states that the survey covered about 334 km2, with 102 collected flight lines, and used AVIRIS-NG to record 426 contiguous bands from 380-2510 nm at a target aboveground altitude of 1000 m and about 1 m processed spatial resolution. The data are accessible through a public NERSC directory and support mountain-watershed ecology, hydrology and hyperspectral radiance-processing studies.
openness: public NERSC/OSTI dataset access
source_type: airborne AVIRIS-NG raw radiance hyperspectral dataset
evidence: DataCite record 10.15485/1617204 states LBNL contracted NEON AOP to collect imaging spectroscopy near Crested Butte, CO; the survey covered 334 km2, collected 102 lines, and used AVIRIS-NG with 426 contiguous bands from 380-2510 nm at about 1 m processed spatial resolution. The abstract states files can be downloaded from https://portal.nersc.gov/wfsfa/doi-10-15485-1617204/, which was reachable locally.
scale: 334 km2 watershed survey; 102 AVIRIS-NG flight lines
feature_count: 426 contiguous bands, 380-2510 nm; raw-space radiance and observational variables
file_size: not summarized by DataCite; public NERSC directory contains the flight-line data

name: NEON AOP Upper East River Reflectance Mosaics, Shade Masks and Canopy Water Content Dataset 2018
provider: Watershed Function SFA / Lawrence Berkeley National Laboratory / NEON AOP / NERSC / OSTI
theme_canonical: Airborne imaging spectroscopy reflectance mosaics and vegetation-water products
theme_raw: Custom NEON AOP reflectance mosaics and maps of shade masks, canopy water content
coverage: Upper East River, Washington Gulch, Slate River and Coal Creek watersheds around Crested Butte, Colorado, USA
license: US DOE/OSTI public dataset metadata; data hosted openly at NERSC portal
formats: Orthomosaiced VSWIR reflectance GeoTIFF products, shade masks and canopy water content maps
access: NERSC public directory plus OSTI DOI landing page
time_span: summer 2018 NEON Campaign; OSTI publication year 2020
notes: Processed derivative of the NEON AOP AVIRIS-NG raw-space radiance survey; cataloged separately because it provides analysis-ready reflectance mosaics and canopy-water products.
desc_zh: 该 DOE/OSTI 数据集是 2018 年 NEON AOP Upper East River AVIRIS-NG 航空成像光谱调查的处理产品。DataCite 摘要说明数据由原始 radiance 数据经地形相关大气校正生成，覆盖约 334 km²，提供正射镶嵌的 VSWIR 反射率、shade mask、冠层含水量等产品。它比原始辐亮度数据更接近分析就绪栅格，适合生态水文、植被水分、地形校正和高山流域遥感研究。
desc_en: This DOE/OSTI dataset is a processed product release derived from the 2018 NEON AOP AVIRIS-NG survey over the Upper East River area. DataCite describes terrain-aware atmospheric correction of the raw radiance data, production of VSWIR reflectance mosaics, shade masks and canopy-water-content maps over the 334 km2 survey region. It is an analysis-ready companion to the raw radiance release for ecohydrology, vegetation-water, terrain-correction and mountain-watershed remote-sensing studies.
openness: public NERSC/OSTI dataset access
source_type: airborne hyperspectral reflectance mosaic and derived vegetation-water product dataset
evidence: DataCite record 10.15485/1618131 states the VSWIR mosaic was derived from NEON AOP radiance data DOI 10.15485/1617204, processed with ACORN atmospheric correction over 200 x 200 pixel kernels, manually cloud-delineated, mosaicked using sun-sensor geometry criteria, and includes orthomosaiced estimated reflectance, shade masks and canopy water content. The public NERSC directory https://portal.nersc.gov/wfsfa/doi-10-15485-1618131/ was reachable locally.
scale: 334 km2 Upper East River / Crested Butte survey region
feature_count: VSWIR reflectance mosaic, shade masks, canopy water content products
file_size: not summarized by DataCite; public NERSC directory contains product files

name: CSIRO Australia HPQ Prospectivity Multi- and Hyperspectral Satellite Imagery Products
provider: CSIRO Data Access Portal / Geoscience Australia HPQ prospectivity support
theme_canonical: Continental hyperspectral-derived mineral prospectivity products
theme_raw: Multi- and Hyperspectral satellite imagery supporting HPQ prospectivity analysis of Australia
coverage: Australian continent
formats: GeoTIFF satellite-derived Al-sheet silicate abundance index and multispectral albedo image collection
access: CSIRO Data Access Portal collection
notes: Derived continental-scale products supporting high-purity quartz prospectivity, not raw EnMAP/EMIT/PRISMA scenes.
desc_zh: 该 CSIRO 数据集为澳大利亚高纯石英（HPQ）潜力分析提供多光谱和高光谱卫星派生栅格产品。DataCite 摘要说明项目使用 ASTER、Landsat、Sentinel 等多光谱数据以及 EMIT、EnMAP、PRISMA 等高光谱卫星数据，产出澳大利亚大陆尺度的 hyperspectral satellite-derived Al-sheet silicate abundance index GeoTIFF 和 multispectral albedo image。数据量约 37.08 GB，许可证为 CC BY 4.0，适合矿产遥感和大陆尺度成矿预测工作。
desc_en: This CSIRO collection provides multi- and hyperspectral satellite-derived products supporting high-purity quartz (HPQ) prospectivity analysis across Australia. DataCite states that the project used multispectral imagery such as ASTER, Landsat and Sentinel, and hyperspectral imagery such as EMIT, EnMAP and PRISMA, to produce GeoTIFFs including a revised hyperspectral satellite-derived Al-sheet-silicate abundance index and a multispectral albedo image over the Australian continent. The collection is about 37.08 GB and is licensed CC BY 4.0.
openness: open CSIRO Data Access Portal collection under CC BY 4.0
source_type: satellite hyperspectral-derived mineral prospectivity raster product dataset
evidence: DataCite record 10.25919/htn6-7774 lists CSIRO, CC BY 4.0 rights, collection URL https://data.csiro.au/collection/csiro%3A73744v2, size 37.08 GB, and abstract stating GeoTIFF products derived from multispectral satellites and hyperspectral EMIT, EnMAP and PRISMA, including an Al-sheet-silicate abundance index and albedo image covering Australia.
scale: continental Australia
feature_count: hyperspectral-derived Al-sheet-silicate abundance index and multispectral albedo GeoTIFF products

name: HyperWeak-Urban Weak-Supervision Urban Hyperspectral Benchmark Dataset
provider: HyperWeak-Urban authors / Zenodo
theme_canonical: Urban hyperspectral weak-supervision benchmark
theme_raw: HyperWeak-Urban weak-supervision urban hyperspectral image datasets
coverage: Urban hyperspectral benchmark scenes derived from existing fully supervised HSI datasets
formats: RAR archives containing weak-supervision datasets and original raw hyperspectral benchmark data
access: Zenodo direct download
notes: Benchmark/derived collection: generated from existing fully supervised urban hyperspectral datasets and includes raw source data plus weak-label variants.
desc_zh: HyperWeak-Urban 是面向弱监督城市高光谱分类的开放 benchmark，基于已有全监督城市 HSI benchmark 生成。Zenodo 记录说明 `HyperWeak-Urban_V1.0.rar` 包含原始影像、干净 dense labels，以及 incomplete、inaccurate、inexact 三类弱标签设置；`Hyperspectral_Dataset_Raw_Data.rar` 提供用于生成该数据集的原始全监督高光谱数据。两个压缩包合计约 17.9 GB，适合弱监督、标签噪声和城市 HSI 分类研究。
desc_en: HyperWeak-Urban is an open benchmark for weakly supervised urban hyperspectral classification generated from existing fully supervised HSI datasets. The Zenodo record states that `HyperWeak-Urban_V1.0.rar` contains original image files, clean dense labels and three weak-label settings (incomplete, inaccurate and inexact), while `Hyperspectral_Dataset_Raw_Data.rar` provides the original fully supervised raw HSI data used to generate the benchmark. The two archives total about 17.9 GB and support weak supervision, label-noise and urban HSI classification research.
openness: open Zenodo dataset under CC BY 4.0
source_type: derived urban hyperspectral benchmark and raw benchmark mirror
evidence: Zenodo API record 20125456 lists DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20125456, CC BY 4.0, publication date 2026-05-11, files HyperWeak-Urban_V1.0.rar (3,227,911,044 bytes) and Hyperspectral_Dataset_Raw_Data.rar (14,694,108,452 bytes), and description stating the archive contains weak-supervision urban HSI datasets plus original fully supervised raw hyperspectral datasets.
scale: multi-scene urban HSI benchmark collection
feature_count: weak-label variants plus original HSI image files and dense labels

name: PANGAEA SO290 HyperPro II Hyperspectral Ocean Radiance and Irradiance Profiles
provider: PANGAEA / RV SONNE SO290 ocean optics team
theme_canonical: In situ hyperspectral ocean-colour radiance and irradiance profiles
theme_raw: Hyperspectral Lu, Ed and Es measured during RV SONNE cruise SO290
coverage: RV SONNE SO290 cruise from Nouméa to Nouméa, New Caledonia region; 2022-04-15 to 2022-05-12; 7 stations / 19 profiles
license: PANGAEA open data terms / citation required
formats: PANGAEA tabular profile datasets for Lu, Ed and Es
access: PANGAEA DOI landing pages and data downloads
doi_or_citation: 10.1594/PANGAEA.965134; related Ed DOI 10.1594/PANGAEA.965123; related Es DOI 10.1594/PANGAEA.965132
notes: Aggregated catalog row for the SO290 Lu/Ed/Es child datasets to avoid fragmenting one cruise profile package.
desc_zh: 这是 RV SONNE SO290 航次的原位海洋水色高光谱剖面数据包，聚合了水中上行辐亮度 Lu、水中下行辐照度 Ed 和空气中下行辐照度 Es 三类 PANGAEA 子 DOI。数据由 SEABIRD HyperPro II 自由下落剖面仪采集，覆盖 7 个站位 19 条剖面，适合 PACE/EnMAP/PRISMA 等海洋水色算法验证和辐射传输研究。
desc_en: This aggregated PANGAEA entry covers the RV SONNE SO290 in-situ ocean-colour hyperspectral profile package, combining Lu, Ed and Es child DOI records. The measurements used a free-falling SEABIRD HyperPro II profiler across 7 stations and 19 profiles near New Caledonia, making the package useful for ocean-colour algorithm validation and radiative-transfer studies.
openness: open PANGAEA DOI datasets
source_type: in situ hyperspectral ocean-colour radiometry profile dataset
evidence: DataCite phase338 records for PANGAEA.965134/965123/965132 state SO290, 19 profiles at 7 stations, free-falling SEABIRD HyperPro II, Lu/Ed/Es sensors, 0.5 m depth bins, dark/tilt screening, and spectra interpolated to 1 nm intervals.
scale: 7 stations; 19 underwater light profiles
feature_count: Lu, Ed and Es hyperspectral profiles interpolated to 1 nm intervals
file_size: PANGAEA tabular datasets; size not specified in DataCite summary

desc_en: This PANGAEA package aggregates seven SONNE SO-P4 trial records covering multi-angle upward radiance, sky radiance and downward irradiance. It is relevant for ocean-colour atmospheric correction, viewing-geometry studies and construction or validation of above-water remote-sensing reflectance workflows.

evidence: DataCite phase338 records list SO-P4 PANGAEA child DOI titles for upward radiance at 50/40/30 degrees, spectral sky radiance at 50/40/30 degrees, and downward irradiance, all dated 2014-09-24 to 2014-09-30 and published by PANGAEA in 2015.

feature_count: upward radiance, sky radiance and downward irradiance measurement tables

desc_en: This PANGAEA dataset contains hyperspectral aquatic absorption coefficients from RV HEINCKE cruise HE448, spanning 400-710 nm at 2 nm resolution across 66 stations. It supports ocean-colour retrieval, IOP/AOP modelling and validation even though it is an in-situ optical-property dataset rather than an image cube.
openness: open PANGAEA DOI dataset
source_type: in situ hyperspectral aquatic optical-property dataset
evidence: DataCite phase338 record for PANGAEA.928905 describes HE448, 66 stations, absorption coefficients from 400 to 710 nm at 2 nm resolution, fractionated filtration classes and PSICAM measurements.
scale: 66 sampled stations
feature_count: absorption coefficient spectra for multiple filtration fractions
file_size: PANGAEA tabular dataset; size not specified in DataCite summary

theme_raw: Hyperspectral absorption coefficients measured during RV HEINCKE cruise HE491
coverage: RV HEINCKE HE491 cruise from Bremerhaven, Germany to Trondheim, Norway; 2017-07-08 to 2017-07-25; 23 stations
license: PANGAEA open data terms / citation required

access: PANGAEA DOI landing page and data downloads
