name: Zenodo Baltic Sea Hyperspectral Rrs and Keff-Kd Attenuation Dataset 2022-2023
provider: Universität Rostock / Zenodo
theme_canonical: Baltic Sea hyperspectral reflectance and attenuation measurements
theme_raw: In-situ optical and biogeochemical data for Keff and Kd attenuation analysis in Case 2 Baltic waters
coverage: Southern Baltic Sea coast, Germany; 2022 and 2023 field campaigns; 14 valid sampling stations for regression analysis
license: Zenodo open repository record; license to verify from landing page
formats: CSV/tabular station, hyperspectral Rrs and derived attenuation files plus README
access: Zenodo DOI landing page and downloadable files
notes: Included as in-situ hyperspectral Rrs/attenuation support data for coastal water remote-sensing studies.
desc_zh: 这是南波罗的海 Case 2 水体的开放 Zenodo 数据集，包含站点元数据、生物地球化学参数、高光谱 Rrs 测量以及 Keff/Kd 谱衰减系数。数据可支撑高光谱水色遥感中 TSM、CDOM 与衰减机制关系分析，并为沿岸浑浊水体算法提供验证资料。
desc_en: This Zenodo dataset provides southern Baltic Sea in-situ optical and biogeochemical data, including station metadata, hyperspectral Rrs and derived Keff/Kd attenuation coefficients. It supports analysis of TSM and CDOM controls on attenuation in Case 2 waters and validation of coastal hyperspectral water-colour algorithms.
openness: open Zenodo DOI record
source_type: in situ hyperspectral water reflectance and attenuation dataset
evidence: DataCite phase338 record for Zenodo DOI 10.5281/zenodo.19479461 lists station biogeochemical data, raw hyperspectral Rrs, derived Keff/Kd spectral attenuation, README column definitions, and 14 valid sampling stations.
scale: 14 valid Baltic Sea sampling stations from 2022-2023 campaigns
feature_count: station metadata, hyperspectral Rrs and Keff/Kd attenuation tables
file_size: Zenodo files; size not captured in phase340 DataCite cache

name: Unicamp Vaca Muerta UAV LiDAR and VNIR-SWIR Hyperspectral Geological Dataset
provider: Repositório de Dados de Pesquisa da Unicamp
theme_canonical: Geological outcrop VNIR-SWIR hyperspectral imagery and multisensor mapping
theme_raw: Multisensor geological dataset from the Vaca Muerta Formation, Neuquén Basin
coverage: Vaca Muerta Formation, Neuquén Basin; geological outcrop and sample-scale products
license: Repository open data record; license to verify from landing page
formats: UAV photogrammetry, LiDAR-derived 3D models, orthomosaic imagery, VNIR-SWIR hyperspectral imagery and reflectance spectroscopy data
access: Unicamp repository DOI landing page and dataset files
notes: 2-hop DataCite candidate; included because it combines UAV, LiDAR, orthomosaic and VNIR-SWIR hyperspectral data for a named geological formation.
desc_zh: 这是 Vaca Muerta Formation 的多传感器地质数据集，包含 UAV 摄影测量、LiDAR、正射影像、VNIR-SWIR 高光谱影像和反射光谱。数据面向细粒、低对比度沉积系统的构造和矿物分析，可为地质遥感、露头数字化和高光谱矿物识别提供开放样例。
desc_en: This Unicamp repository dataset combines UAV photogrammetry, LiDAR, orthomosaic products, VNIR-SWIR hyperspectral imagery and reflectance spectroscopy for the Vaca Muerta Formation in the Neuquén Basin. It supports geological remote sensing, digital outcrop analysis and mineralogical interpretation of fine-grained low-contrast sedimentary systems.
openness: open DOI repository record
source_type: geological UAV/proximal hyperspectral imagery dataset
evidence: DataCite phase341 metadata states the dataset comprises 3D hand-sample models from LiDAR, a UAV photogrammetry digital outcrop model, orthomosaic image, VNIR-SWIR hyperspectral imagery and reflectance spectroscopy for Vaca Muerta structural and mineralogical analysis.
scale: geological formation / outcrop and sample-scale data package
feature_count: UAV, LiDAR, orthomosaic, VNIR-SWIR hyperspectral imagery and spectroscopy components
file_size: repository files; size not captured in DataCite cache

name: Zenodo Clay-Type Lithium Deposit Multi-Scenario SWIR Hyperspectral Mineral Dataset
provider: Zenodo / clay-type lithium hyperspectral mineral abundance dataset authors
theme_canonical: SWIR hyperspectral mineral abundance and geochemistry dataset
theme_raw: Proximal multi-scenario SWIR hyperspectral dataset of clay-type lithium deposits from China
coverage: Southwest China, mainly Yunnan and Guizhou provinces within the Yangtze Block; powder, drill core, hand specimen and in-situ outcrop scenarios
formats: hyperspectral image data, mineralogical/geochemical results, drill-core annotations, white-reference spectra and geographic position information
access: Zenodo DOI landing page and downloadable files
notes: v424 upgraded from concept DOI to version record after Zenodo API verification. The dataset covers powder, drill-core, hand-specimen and in-situ outcrop SWIR hyperspectral scenarios for clay-type lithium deposits in China.
desc_zh: 这是面向中国黏土型锂矿的多场景 SWIR 高光谱矿物数据集，覆盖粉末、钻芯、手标本和原位露头四种观测场景。数据同时包含高光谱影像、矿物学/地球化学结果、钻芯采样标注、白板参考和地理位置信息，适合矿物丰度估计、跨尺度地质遥感和样品-露头联动研究。

desc_zh: 这是 Tarnas 等 Icarus 论文使用的 Mars tray VNIR 高光谱矿物混合影像，包含高岭石、方解石、绿脱石、蒙脱石、石膏与 Mars Global Simulant 的不同丰度混合样品。高质量波段约为 1.0-2.5 微米、空间分辨率约 0.34 mm/pixel，可用于矿物端元提取、丰度分析和行星类比高光谱算法验证。
desc_en: This Harvard Dataverse release contains VNIR hyperspectral images of Mars-tray mineral mixtures used by Tarnas et al. It includes mixtures of kaolinite, calcite, nontronite, montmorillonite and gypsum with Mars Global Simulant, supporting mineral unmixing, target detection and planetary-analog hyperspectral algorithm studies.
openness: open Harvard Dataverse DOI record
source_type: planetary analog VNIR hyperspectral mineral imagery dataset
evidence: DataCite phase343 metadata describes VNIR hyperspectral Mars-tray images, mineral mixtures with Mars Global Simulant, high-quality wavelength range of 1.0-2.5 microns, 0.34 mm/pixel spatial resolution and corresponding RELAB measurements.
scale: laboratory trays of mineral endmembers and abundance mixtures
feature_count: VNIR hyperspectral images of mineral mixtures and endmembers
file_size: Harvard Dataverse files; size not captured in DataCite cache

name: CIRAD Dataverse Indica Rice Leaf-Level Gas Exchange and Hyperspectral Dataset under Elevated CO2
provider: CIRAD Dataverse / PRAY indica rice eCO2 study authors
theme_canonical: Crop leaf-level hyperspectral/NIRS trait dataset
theme_raw: Leaf-level gas exchange and hyperspectral data for indica rice under high eCO2 conditions
coverage: CIRAD Abiophen growing chambers; 240 PRAY indica rice genotypes under elevated CO2 in 2022
license: CIRAD Dataverse open DOI record; license to verify from landing page
formats: leaf-level NIRS/hyperspectral measurements, gas-exchange measurements and plant trait tables
access: CIRAD Dataverse DOI landing page and downloadable files
notes: Boundary crop spectral-trait dataset: chamber/leaf measurements rather than remote-sensing imagery, retained as high-value hyperspectral vegetation calibration data.
desc_zh: 这是 CIRAD Dataverse 发布的籼稻叶片高光谱/NIRS 与气体交换数据，覆盖 PRAY indica 群体 240 个基因型在高 CO2 生长室条件下的观测。数据面向叶片糖浓度、光合性状与光谱信息关系建模，可作为作物高光谱遥感和植被生理反演的校准/验证资料。
desc_en: This CIRAD Dataverse dataset contains leaf-level hyperspectral/NIRS and gas-exchange measurements for 240 PRAY indica rice genotypes grown under elevated CO2. Although it is chamber and leaf-scale rather than imagery, it provides useful calibration data for crop hyperspectral trait retrieval and vegetation physiology modelling.
openness: open CIRAD Dataverse DOI record
source_type: crop leaf-level hyperspectral trait dataset
evidence: DataCite phase343 metadata describes 240 indica rice genotypes grown in CIRAD Abiophen chambers under elevated CO2, flag-leaf measurements during grain filling, LI-6800 gas exchange measurements and NIRS data used to relate leaf sugar concentration and photosynthetic traits.
scale: 240 rice genotypes under elevated CO2 chamber experiment
feature_count: leaf NIRS/hyperspectral observations, gas exchange and trait measurements
file_size: CIRAD Dataverse files; size not captured in DataCite cache

name: Mendeley Mediterranean Wheat Ground-Level Hyperspectral and Thermal Remote Sensing Dataset
provider: Mendeley Data / Mediterranean wheat genotype study authors
theme_canonical: Ground-level crop hyperspectral reflectance and thermal sensing
theme_raw: Ground-level, hyperspectral and thermal remote data from wheat genotypes under water and nitrogen availability treatments
coverage: Central Spain Mediterranean field experiment; wheat seasons 2018-2020 and 2019-2021
license: CC BY 4.0 / Open Access via Mendeley Data
formats: Excel tables for agronomic variables, hyperspectral wheat reflectance, Dualex/GreenSeeker readings and thermal data
access: Mendeley Data DOI landing page and downloadable files
time_span: 2018-2021 field seasons; Mendeley Data publication year 2024
notes: Concept DOI row; version DOI not added separately.
desc_zh: 这是西班牙中部地中海条件下小麦基因型、水分和氮素处理实验的地面高光谱与热红外数据集。它包含五个生育阶段的高光谱反射率、冠层温度、Dualex/GreenSeeker 读数及产量和氮素相关农艺变量，可用于精准农业、胁迫诊断和作物遥感模型校准。
desc_en: This Mendeley Data release provides ground-level hyperspectral reflectance, canopy temperature, proximal sensor readings and agronomic variables for wheat genotypes under nitrogen and water treatments in Central Spain. It supports precision agriculture, crop stress analysis and calibration of crop remote-sensing models.
openness: open Mendeley Data DOI record, CC BY 4.0
source_type: ground/proximal crop hyperspectral and thermal dataset
evidence: Live DataCite phase344 metadata states the dataset includes agronomic variables and sensor readings from Central Spain field experiments, with a file named Reflectance of wheat.xlsx containing hyperspectral wheat reflectance measured at five growth stages and Thermal data of wheat.xlsx containing canopy temperature.
scale: two wheat genotypes across water/nitrogen treatments and two multi-year rotations
feature_count: hyperspectral reflectance, thermal canopy data, Dualex/GreenSeeker readings and agronomic tables
file_size: Mendeley Data files; size not captured in phase344 metadata

name: Zenodo Czech Crop Hyperspectral Signatures and Classification Models Dataset
provider: Zenodo / Czech agricultural remote-sensing methodology authors
theme_canonical: Crop hyperspectral signatures from CASI, PRISMA and EnMAP time series
theme_raw: Hyperspectral signatures of crops under different management type, crop classification models, Heracleum detection
coverage: Polkovice experimental agricultural site, Czech Republic; CASI aerial time series plus PRISMA, Sentinel-2 and EnMAP signature products
formats: crop spectral signature datasets, MATLAB scripts/models and Google Earth Engine script
access: Zenodo DOI landing page and downloadable files
notes: Includes extracted spectral signatures rather than raw full imagery; retained as high-value agricultural hyperspectral signature/model dataset with CASI/PRISMA/EnMAP links.
desc_zh: 这是捷克 Polkovice 农业试验区的作物高光谱签名和分类模型数据，包含从 CASI 航空高光谱时间序列提取的 1,140,304 条作物光谱签名，以及 PRISMA、Sentinel-2 和 EnMAP 相关签名/模型。数据覆盖不同耕作、生物炭管理和作物类型，适合农业高光谱分类、光谱可分性和跨传感器模型研究。
desc_en: This Zenodo dataset provides crop hyperspectral signatures and classification models from the Polkovice experimental agricultural site in the Czech Republic. It includes more than 1.14 million crop spectra extracted from CASI aerial hyperspectral time series, plus PRISMA/Sentinel-2 and EnMAP signature/model products for agricultural remote-sensing workflows.
openness: open Zenodo DOI record, CC BY 4.0
source_type: agricultural hyperspectral signature and classification dataset
evidence: Live DataCite phase344 metadata describes four outputs: CASI aerial hyperspectral crop signatures for Polkovice with 1,140,304 spectra, crop signatures from Sentinel-2 and PRISMA, EnMAP time-series crop signatures by SAMAS class, and scripts/models for classification and Heracleum detection.
scale: 1,140,304 CASI crop spectra plus satellite-signature/model products
feature_count: CASI crop spectra, PRISMA/Sentinel-2 signatures, EnMAP signatures, MATLAB models/scripts
file_size: Zenodo files; size not captured in phase344 metadata

name: Marine Data Archive PANTHYR Blue Accelerator Platform 2019 Hyperspectral Water Radiometry
provider: Marine Data Archive / VLIZ / HYPERMAQ-PANTHYR team
theme_canonical: Autonomous above-water hyperspectral water reflectance radiometry
theme_raw: PANTHYR hyperspectral water radiometry Blue Accelerator Platform 2019
coverage: Blue Accelerator Platform, 2019 autonomous PANTHYR water-radiometry deployment
license: CC BY-SA 4.0 via Marine Data Archive
formats: hyperspectral irradiance/radiance averages and standard deviations, derived water-leaving radiance and reflectance
access: VLIZ/Marine Data Archive landing page and data access
time_span: 2019 deployment; Marine Data Archive publication year 2022
notes: Annual PANTHYR Blue Accelerator Platform dataset; complements existing 2022/2023 rows and WATERHYPERNET overview.
desc_zh: 这是 Blue Accelerator Platform 2019 年 PANTHYR 自主水体高光谱辐射计数据，使用 TriOS RAMSES 辐亮度/辐照度传感器获取水面以上观测。数据包含 Ed、Ld、Lu、Lw 及水离面反射率等处理结果，适合水色卫星验证、浑浊近岸/内陆水体算法和 HYPERMAQ/WATERHYPERNET 相关研究。
desc_en: This Marine Data Archive dataset contains autonomous above-water PANTHYR hyperspectral radiometry from the Blue Accelerator Platform in 2019. It provides irradiance/radiance measurements and derived water-leaving radiance/reflectance products for satellite ocean-colour validation and coastal/inland water algorithm development.
openness: open Marine Data Archive DOI record, CC BY-SA 4.0
source_type: autonomous above-water hyperspectral water radiometry dataset
evidence: Live DataCite phase344 metadata states the 2019 PANTHYR dataset uses TriOS RAMSES radiance/irradiance sensors, resamples RAMSES data to 355-945 nm at 2.5 nm steps, and provides averaged hyperspectral Ed, Ld, Lu, derived Lw and water-leaving reflectance with and without NIR similarity correction.
scale: 2019 annual Blue Accelerator Platform autonomous radiometry deployment
feature_count: Ed/Ld/Lu/Lw and rhow hyperspectral radiometry products
file_size: Marine Data Archive files; size not captured in phase344 metadata

name: Marine Data Archive PANTHYR Blue Accelerator Platform 2020 Hyperspectral Water Radiometry
provider: Marine Data Archive / VLIZ / HYPERMAQ-PANTHYR team
theme_canonical: Autonomous above-water hyperspectral water reflectance radiometry
theme_raw: PANTHYR hyperspectral water radiometry Blue Accelerator Platform 2020
coverage: Blue Accelerator Platform, 2020 autonomous PANTHYR water-radiometry deployment
license: CC BY-SA 4.0 via Marine Data Archive
formats: hyperspectral irradiance/radiance averages and standard deviations, derived water-leaving radiance and reflectance
access: VLIZ/Marine Data Archive landing page and data access
time_span: 2020 deployment; Marine Data Archive publication year 2022
notes: Annual PANTHYR Blue Accelerator Platform dataset; complements existing 2022/2023 rows and WATERHYPERNET overview.
desc_zh: 这是 Blue Accelerator Platform 2020 年 PANTHYR 自主水体高光谱辐射计数据，提供质量控制后的水面以上 TriOS RAMSES 观测及派生水离面反射率。它与 2019、2022、2023 等年度记录共同构成长期水色验证序列，可用于近岸和内陆浑浊水体遥感算法评估。
desc_en: This Marine Data Archive dataset contains autonomous above-water PANTHYR hyperspectral radiometry from the Blue Accelerator Platform in 2020. It provides quality-controlled TriOS RAMSES measurements and derived water-leaving reflectance, complementing other annual records for coastal and inland water remote-sensing validation.
openness: open Marine Data Archive DOI record, CC BY-SA 4.0
source_type: autonomous above-water hyperspectral water radiometry dataset
evidence: Live DataCite phase344 metadata states the 2020 PANTHYR dataset uses TriOS RAMSES sensors, resamples data to 355-945 nm at 2.5 nm steps, and provides averaged hyperspectral Ed, Ld, Lu, derived Lw and rhow/rhow_nosc reflectance products.
scale: 2020 annual Blue Accelerator Platform autonomous radiometry deployment
feature_count: Ed/Ld/Lu/Lw and rhow hyperspectral radiometry products
file_size: Marine Data Archive files; size not captured in phase344 metadata

name: NIBIO High-Latitude Grassland FieldSpec Hyperspectral Yield Estimation Dataset
provider: NIBIO / BIRD repository
theme_canonical: Grassland FieldSpec spectral database for yield and EnMAP/Sentinel simulation
theme_raw: Supporting information for yield estimates by hyperspectral methods in high-latitude grasslands
coverage: agricultural grassland fields in Tromsø and Harstad, Norway; summer seasons 2014-2017
formats: FieldSpec 3 spectral database, yield data and analysis scripts
access: NIBIO/BIRD dataset landing page and downloadable files
notes: Field spectral database rather than raster imagery; retained because it directly supports hyperspectral grassland yield estimation and EnMAP/Sentinel simulation.
desc_zh: 这是挪威 Tromsø 和 Harstad 高纬草地的 FieldSpec 3 高光谱数据库与产量数据，采集于 2014-2017 年夏季。数据配套分析脚本，可复现草地产量估算流程，并用于 Sentinel-2A 与 EnMAP 模拟，是高纬农业草地高光谱遥感校准和建模资料。
desc_en: This NIBIO/BIRD dataset contains FieldSpec 3 hyperspectral measurements and yield data from high-latitude agricultural grasslands in Tromsø and Harstad, Norway, collected during 2014-2017 summer seasons. It supports grassland yield modelling and Sentinel-2A/EnMAP spectral simulation workflows.
openness: open NIBIO/BIRD DOI record, CC BY-NC 4.0
source_type: field grassland hyperspectral spectral database
evidence: Live DataCite phase344 metadata states the dataset contains yield data and a FieldSpec 3 spectral database from agricultural grassland fields in Tromsø and Harstad during 2014-2017, plus scripts that replicate analyses from FieldSpec hyperspectral measurements to Sentinel-2A and EnMAP simulations.
scale: grassland field campaigns in two high-latitude Norwegian regions across 2014-2017
feature_count: FieldSpec spectral database, yield data and PLS analysis scripts
file_size: NIBIO/BIRD files; size not captured in phase344 metadata

name: PANGAEA Gebesee 2016 Crop Monitoring Hyperspectral Surface Reflectance and EO-LDAS Reference Dataset
provider: PANGAEA / Gebesee EO-LDAS-App project
theme_canonical: Agricultural in-situ hyperspectral surface reflectance and crop monitoring reference data
theme_raw: Gebesee Database for crop monitoring applications: plant physiology, soil moisture, surface reflectance and atmospheric conditions
coverage: Gebesee agricultural test site, central Germany; five crop types sampled May-October 2016
formats: PANGAEA publication series of datasets: hyperspectral surface reflectance, vegetation/soil/atmosphere reference variables and georeferenced sampling units
access: PANGAEA DOI landing page and linked child datasets/downloads
doi_or_citation: 10.1594/PANGAEA.903827; complementary 2013/2014 database DOI 10.1594/PANGAEA.874251; GCP/CP reference DOI 10.1594/PANGAEA.874247
notes: Collection-level row for Gebesee 2016 EO-LDAS crop-monitoring database; child datasets are not split to avoid overfragmentation.
desc_zh: 这是德国中部 Gebesee 农业试验站 2016 年 EO-LDAS 作物监测参考数据库，包含五类作物的地面高光谱表面反射率、LAI/生物量/叶绿素等植物参数、土壤水分、气象和光照条件。采样与 Sentinel-2、Landsat 7/8 过境相邻安排，适合农业遥感模型校准、数据同化和地面真实性验证。
desc_en: This PANGAEA collection provides the 2016 Gebesee agricultural test-site reference database for EO-LDAS crop monitoring. It includes in-situ hyperspectral surface reflectance, plant biophysical/biochemical parameters, soil moisture, atmospheric and illumination conditions for five crop types, with sampling designed around Sentinel-2 and Landsat overpasses.
openness: open PANGAEA collection, CC BY-NC 4.0
source_type: agricultural in-situ hyperspectral surface reflectance reference dataset
evidence: Live DataCite phase345 metadata states that the Gebesee 2016 database collected hyperspectral surface reflectance, LAI, biomass, leaf chlorophyll, phenology, leaf structure, soil moisture, atmospheric states and illumination conditions for winter barley, winter wheat, spring wheat, potato and sugar beet between May and October, with georeferenced ESUs/GCPs and Earth-observation validation purpose.
scale: five crop types sampled roughly every 16 days across Gebesee ESUs in 2016
feature_count: hyperspectral surface reflectance plus plant, soil, atmosphere and georeferencing variables
file_size: PANGAEA collection; size not captured in phase345 metadata

name: ORNL DAAC US Midwest Agroecosystem SIF and Hyperspectral Vegetation Indices Dataset 2016-2021
provider: ORNL Distributed Active Archive Center / NASA Earthdata
theme_canonical: Ground solar-induced fluorescence and hyperspectral vegetation-index time series
theme_raw: SIF and Vegetation Indices in the US Midwestern Agroecosystems, 2016-2021
coverage: seven crop sites in Nebraska and Illinois, USA; 2016-2021 growing seasons
formats: CSV time-series files with SIF, hyperspectral reflectance-derived vegetation indices, FPAR and correction factors
access: NASA Earthdata / ORNL DAAC dataset landing page and download workflow
notes: Ground spectrometer SIF/reflectance dataset rather than image cubes; retained for vegetation hyperspectral validation and SIF algorithm work.
desc_zh: 这是 ORNL DAAC 发布的美国中西部农田 SIF 与植被指数时间序列，覆盖内布拉斯加和伊利诺伊 7 个作物站点，时间为 2016-2021 年。FluoSpec2 系统采集用于 SIF 反演和高光谱反射率植被指数计算的光谱数据，提供半小时尺度 CSV，可用于农田光合作用、SIF 遥感验证和生态系统通量研究。
desc_en: This ORNL DAAC dataset provides half-hourly ground solar-induced chlorophyll fluorescence and hyperspectral reflectance-derived vegetation indices for seven crop sites in Nebraska and Illinois from 2016-2021. FluoSpec2 measurements support SIF retrieval, crop photosynthesis analysis and validation of vegetation remote-sensing products.
openness: NASA/ORNL DAAC open data record
source_type: ground crop SIF and hyperspectral reflectance time-series dataset
evidence: Live DataCite phase345 metadata states the dataset contains half-hourly SIF and vegetation indices at seven crop sites, with spectral data for SIF retrieval and hyperspectral reflectance for vegetation index calculation collected by FluoSpec2, including NDVI, EVI, red-edge chlorophyll index, green chlorophyll index and PRI in CSV format.
scale: seven US Midwest crop sites; half-hourly observations across 2016-2021
feature_count: SIF products, hyperspectral reflectance-derived vegetation indices, FPAR and correction factors
file_size: ORNL DAAC files; size not captured in phase345 metadata

name: Dryad Coastal Grassland Invasive Plant Leaf Hyperspectral Optical Traits Dataset
provider: Dryad / Helsen et al. Journal of Ecology supporting data
theme_canonical: Leaf hyperspectral reflectance and optical trait dataset for coastal grassland ecology
theme_raw: Optical traits and invasive Rosa rugosa impacts on litter decomposition
coverage: 25 invaded and 25 uninvaded coastal grassland plots; Rosa rugosa invasion study
formats: Excel dataset with plot-level information, leaf hyperspectral reflectance-derived optical traits, functional traits and litter decomposition variables
access: Dryad DOI landing page and downloadable files
doi_or_citation: 10.5061/dryad.12jm63xts; related Journal of Ecology paper Helsen et al. 2020
notes: Boundary ecological spectral-trait dataset, not raster imagery; retained because it explicitly uses hyperspectral remote-sensing-derived optical traits for ecosystem-function analysis.
desc_zh: 这是 Dryad 发布的海岸草地入侵植物 Rosa rugosa 研究数据，包含 25 个入侵和 25 个未入侵样地的叶片高光谱反射率衍生光学性状、功能性状和 litter decomposition 指标。它不是遥感影像立方体，但对高光谱植被性状反演、PROSPECT-D/植被指数方法和生态系统功能研究有参考价值。
desc_en: This Dryad dataset contains plot-level functional traits, leaf hyperspectral reflectance-derived optical traits and litter-decomposition variables for invaded and uninvaded coastal grassland plots. It is not raster imagery, but it is valuable for hyperspectral vegetation trait retrieval and ecosystem-function studies using PROSPECT-D and vegetation indices.
openness: open Dryad DOI record, CC0 1.0
source_type: ecological leaf hyperspectral optical-trait dataset
evidence: Live DataCite phase345 metadata describes leaf hyperspectral reflectance collected across 25 invaded and 25 uninvaded coastal grassland plots, optical traits quantified via radiative transfer model inversion and vegetation indices, and plot-level Excel data with functional/optical traits and litter decomposition variables.
scale: 50 coastal grassland plots, invaded and uninvaded
feature_count: leaf hyperspectral reflectance-derived optical traits, functional traits and decomposition variables
file_size: Dryad files; size not captured in phase345 metadata

name: figshare Sugarcane Residue FieldSpec Hyperspectral Reflectance and Simulated Sentinel-2 Dataset
provider: Taylor & Francis / figshare supplementary dataset authors
theme_canonical: Agricultural residue hyperspectral reflectance and Sentinel-2 simulation dataset
theme_raw: Improving the monitoring of sugarcane residues in a tropical environment based on laboratory and Sentinel-2 data
coverage: laboratory sugarcane residue and contrasting tropical soil samples; Ferralsols and Arenosols; tropical agriculture context
license: CC BY 4.0 via figshare / Taylor & Francis
formats: FieldSpec spectral measurements, simulated Sentinel-2 bands and supporting dataset files
access: figshare dataset landing page and downloadable files
notes: Laboratory/proximal reflectance dataset rather than airborne or satellite imagery; retained because it provides open FieldSpec 350-2500 nm spectra and simulated Sentinel-2 products for agricultural residue remote sensing.
desc_zh: 这是用于热带甘蔗残茬监测的开放光谱数据集，包含绿叶、秸秆、燃烧材料、两类对比土壤及不同覆盖比例处理样本的 FieldSpec 350-2500 nm 高光谱反射率。数据还用于模拟 Sentinel-2 波段，可支持农业残茬覆盖、土壤背景影响、纤维素吸收指数和多光谱/高光谱算法比较研究。
desc_en: This figshare dataset provides FieldSpec 350-2500 nm hyperspectral reflectance measurements for sugarcane residues, green leaves, burned material, contrasting soils and residue-cover treatments in a tropical agriculture context. The spectra were also used to simulate Sentinel-2 bands, supporting residue-cover monitoring and hyperspectral-to-multispectral algorithm studies.
openness: open figshare DOI record, CC BY 4.0
source_type: laboratory/proximal agricultural hyperspectral reflectance dataset
evidence: Live DataCite phase346 metadata states the dataset collected green leaves, straw, burned material and two contrasting soils, measured each sample with a FieldSpec sensor from 350 to 2500 nm, and used the spectral data to simulate Sentinel-2 bands for sugarcane residue monitoring.
scale: laboratory sample/treatment set for sugarcane residue and soil mixtures
feature_count: FieldSpec 350-2500 nm spectra and simulated Sentinel-2 bands for residue/soil treatments
file_size: figshare files; size not captured in phase346 metadata

name: LANDHYPERNET Jolanda di Savoia HYPERNETS Hyperspectral Surface Reflectance L2B Dataset
provider: HYPERNETS / LANDHYPERNET / Zenodo
theme_canonical: Autonomous land-surface hyperspectral reflectance for satellite validation
theme_raw: HYPERNETS hyperspectral surface reflectance measurements for satellite validation from the Jolanda di Savoia site in Italy
coverage: Jolanda di Savoia, Italy (JSIT HYPERNETS/LANDHYPERNET site); quality-checked periods through 2025-10-01
formats: L2B NetCDF/ZIP data package and Zenodo_L2B_sequences_JSIT.csv sequence table
access: Zenodo DOI landing page and downloadable JSIT.zip / sequence CSV
doi_or_citation: 10.5281/zenodo.17619561; HYPERNETS / LANDHYPERNET L2B products; De Vis et al. 2024b product documentation
time_span: data included until 2025-10-01; Zenodo publication year 2026
notes: Site-level LANDHYPERNET L2B dataset; added after v316 gap check showed existing Gobabeb, Wytham, Jarvselja and Lonzee rows but no JSIT/Jolanda row.
desc_zh: 这是 HYPERNETS/LANDHYPERNET 在意大利 Jolanda di Savoia 站点（JSIT）的质量控制 L2B 地表高光谱反射率数据集，面向光学卫星产品验证。数据由自主 HYPSTAR VNIR/SWIR 光谱辐射计系统采集，提供 JSIT.zip 数据包和 L2B 序列表，适合农业/陆表卫星反射率验证、角度效应和不确定度评估。
desc_en: This Zenodo dataset provides quality-checked L2B hyperspectral surface reflectance for the HYPERNETS/LANDHYPERNET Jolanda di Savoia site in Italy (JSIT). The autonomous HYPSTAR VNIR/SWIR measurements support optical satellite validation, angular reflectance studies and uncertainty-aware land-surface reflectance workflows.
openness: open Zenodo DOI record, CC BY 4.0
source_type: autonomous land-surface hyperspectral validation dataset
evidence: Zenodo/DataCite phase347 metadata states the JSIT dataset provides quality-checked L2B surface reflectance for satellite validation, includes data through 2025-10-01, uses HYPSTAR VNIR/SWIR autonomous spectroradiometer products, and exposes Zenodo_L2B_sequences_JSIT.csv plus JSIT.zip (~966.7 MB). Phase471 Zenodo API recheck: current version DOI 10.5281/zenodo.17619561, concept DOI 10.5281/zenodo.17619560, CC-BY-4.0, publication_date 2025-11-15, quality-checked L2B surface reflectance suitable for satellite validation through 2025-10-01, files JSIT.zip 966,650,405 bytes and Zenodo_L2B_sequences_JSIT.csv.
scale: single LANDHYPERNET terrestrial validation site; JSIT.zip about 966.7 MB
feature_count: L2B hyperspectral surface reflectance sequences with uncertainty-aware HYPERNETS products

name: Zenodo AVIRIS-NG Romania 2021 Methane Campaign CH4 Maps and Emissions Dataset
provider: Zenodo / AVIRIS-NG Romania methane campaign authors
theme_canonical: Airborne imaging-spectrometer methane enhancement maps and emissions estimates
theme_raw: Dataset of the AVIRIS-NG methane campaign in Romania in 2021
coverage: Romania AVIRIS-NG methane campaign, July 2021
formats: NetCDF emission table, zipped CH4 emissions data, zipped CH4 maps
access: Zenodo DOI landing page and downloadable files
time_span: July 2021 AVIRIS-NG campaign; Zenodo version updated 2025
notes: Latest resolved Zenodo record from DataCite/API check; older version DOIs are not added separately.
desc_zh: 这是 2021 年 7 月罗马尼亚 AVIRIS-NG 甲烷遥感活动的开放数据集，包含 CH4 排放数据、CH4 地图和 netCDF 汇总文件。数据体量较大，CH4 maps zip 约 7.8 GB，适合航空高光谱甲烷检索、排放估计、点源检测和算法验证研究。
desc_en: This Zenodo dataset provides CH4 emission data and methane maps from the July 2021 AVIRIS-NG methane campaign in Romania. The release includes NetCDF emissions data and large zipped CH4 maps, supporting airborne imaging-spectrometer methane retrieval, source detection and emissions-estimation studies.
openness: open Zenodo DOI record, CC BY 4.0
source_type: airborne hyperspectral methane mapping and emissions dataset
evidence: Zenodo API phase348 check resolved the latest DOI to 10.5281/zenodo.14974368 and listed files AVIRIS-NG-methane-emissions_v2025-02-05.nc (64,614 bytes), AVIRIS-NG-Romania-2021_CH4-emissions_ddeq-ime-v2025-03-05.zip (595,401,192 bytes), and AVIRIS-NG-Romania-2021_CH4-maps.zip (7,798,238,042 bytes), with CC BY 4.0 license.
scale: Romania July 2021 AVIRIS-NG methane campaign
feature_count: CH4 maps, emission estimates and NetCDF summary data
file_size: CH4 maps zip 7,798,238,042 bytes; emissions zip 595,401,192 bytes; NetCDF 64,614 bytes

name: Figshare PRISMA Florence Simulated Hyperspectral BSQ Benchmark Dataset
provider: figshare / PRISMA datasets authors
theme_canonical: Simulated PRISMA hyperspectral image benchmark with random and stripe noise variants
theme_raw: PRISMA datasets
coverage: Florence, Italy simulated PRISMA 30 m hyperspectral scenes
formats: BSQ binary hyperspectral image files, ENVI .hdr headers, README
access: figshare DOI landing page and direct file downloads
time_span: figshare record published 2018; simulated PRISMA Florence scenes
notes: Added after phase349 file-level API check; not confused with later PRISMA geolocation code-only Zenodo records.

desc_zh: 这是 ORNL DAAC SISTER 项目的 AVIRIS Classic L2A 30 m 校正表面反射率产品，包含地形、BRDF 和 glint 校正处理。数据基于美国境内若干 AVIRIS Classic 航空高光谱场景，AVIRIS Classic 覆盖约 400-2500 nm、10 nm 光谱间隔，适合 SBG 原型产品、AVIRIS 历史数据再处理、地表反射率校正链和跨传感器算法验证。
desc_en: This ORNL DAAC SISTER product provides AVIRIS Classic Level 2A 30 m corrected surface reflectance with topographic, BRDF and glint corrections. It is based on selected AVIRIS Classic airborne imaging-spectroscopy scenes in the United States, with AVIRIS-CL covering about 400-2500 nm at 10 nm intervals, supporting SBG prototype products, AVIRIS historical-data reprocessing, surface-reflectance correction workflows and cross-sensor algorithm validation.
openness: open NASA EOSDIS/ORNL DAAC dataset
source_type: SISTER AVIRIS Classic corrected surface reflectance product
evidence: DataCite API phase356 check for DOI 10.3334/ORNLDAAC/2162 returned ORNL DAAC Collection/Data Files metadata for experimental Level 2A topographic, BRDF and glint corrected surface reflectances at 30 m derived from AVIRIS Classic scenes. Description states AVIRIS-CL measures reflected radiance at 10 nm intervals from 400 to 2500 nm and the products are generated by SISTER workflows for SBG prototype analysis.
scale: selected AVIRIS Classic scenes, 30 m SISTER corrected reflectance product
feature_count: corrected surface reflectance variables derived from AVIRIS Classic

desc_zh: 这是 ORNL DAAC SISTER 的 PRISMA L2B 30 m 植被生化性状产品，提供氮浓度、叶质量面积和叶绿素含量等变量。数据来自 2020-2022 年全球选定 PRISMA 卫星场景，PRISMA 覆盖约 400-2500 nm、优于 12 nm 光谱间隔，适合植被性状反演、SBG 原型产品、生态系统生化制图和 PRISMA 算法验证。
desc_en: This ORNL DAAC SISTER product provides PRISMA Level 2B 30 m vegetation biochemical traits, including nitrogen concentration, leaf mass area and chlorophyll content. It is derived from selected global PRISMA satellite scenes from 2020-2022, with PRISMA covering about 400-2500 nm at better than 12 nm intervals, supporting vegetation-trait retrieval, SBG prototype products, ecosystem biochemical mapping and PRISMA algorithm validation.
openness: open NASA EOSDIS/ORNL DAAC dataset
source_type: SISTER PRISMA vegetation biochemical trait product
evidence: DataCite API phase356 check for DOI 10.3334/ORNLDAAC/2172 returned ORNL DAAC Collection/Data Files metadata for experimental Level 2B vegetative biochemical traits at 30 m derived from PRISMA satellite scenes, including nitrogen concentration, leaf mass area and chlorophyll content, with global selected scenes collected 2020-02-16 to 2022-05-08.
scale: selected global PRISMA scenes, 30 m SISTER vegetation trait product
feature_count: nitrogen concentration, leaf mass area and chlorophyll content products

desc_zh: 这是 ORNL DAAC SISTER 的 PRISMA L2B 30 m 分数覆盖产品，为水体、植被、雪/冰和土壤提供每像元覆盖比例。产品由 PRISMA 校正表面反射率经光谱混合分析生成，覆盖 2020-2022 年全球选定场景，适合成像光谱地表组分分解、SBG 原型算法、生态/水文/冰雪掩膜和 PRISMA 产品验证。
desc_en: This ORNL DAAC SISTER product provides PRISMA Level 2B 30 m fractional cover maps for water, vegetation, snow/ice and soil. Derived from corrected PRISMA surface reflectance through spectral mixture analysis for selected global scenes from 2020-2022, it supports imaging-spectroscopy surface unmixing, SBG prototype algorithms, ecosystem/hydrology/snow masking and PRISMA product validation.
openness: open NASA EOSDIS/ORNL DAAC dataset
source_type: SISTER PRISMA fractional cover product
evidence: DataCite API phase356 check for DOI 10.3334/ORNLDAAC/2168 returned ORNL DAAC Collection/Data Files metadata for experimental Level 2B fractional cover maps at 30 m for water, vegetation, snow/ice and soil derived from PRISMA scenes using spectral mixture analysis; output products are GeoTIFFs with values from 0 to 1.
scale: selected global PRISMA scenes, 30 m fractional-cover product
feature_count: water, vegetation, snow/ice and soil fractional cover variables

name: ORNL DAAC SISTER AVIRIS-NG L2B Snow Grain Size 30 m V001
provider: NASA ORNL DAAC / SISTER

access: ORNL DAAC dataset landing page / NASA Earthdata access
notes: SISTER AVIRIS-NG snow product derived from corrected reflectance and fractional cover; complements AVIRIS-NG L2A and L2B trait rows.
desc_zh: 这是 ORNL DAAC SISTER 的 AVIRIS-NG L2B 30 m 雪粒径产品，由校正表面反射率和分数覆盖数据推导。产品在雪覆盖大于 90% 的像元上利用 1030 nm 冰吸收特征估算雪粒径，覆盖 2014-2022 年美国和意大利选定 AVIRIS-NG 场景，适合高光谱冰雪遥感、粒径反演、SBG 原型产品和水文/能量平衡研究。
desc_en: This ORNL DAAC SISTER product provides AVIRIS-NG Level 2B 30 m snow grain size derived from corrected surface reflectance and fractional cover. Grain size is estimated for pixels with more than 90% snow cover using the 1030 nm ice absorption feature, covering selected AVIRIS-NG scenes in the United States and Italy from 2014-2022, supporting hyperspectral snow remote sensing, grain-size retrieval, SBG prototype products and hydrology/energy-balance studies.
openness: open NASA EOSDIS/ORNL DAAC dataset
source_type: SISTER AVIRIS-NG snow grain size product
evidence: DataCite API phase356 check for DOI 10.3334/ORNLDAAC/2175 returned ORNL DAAC Collection/Data Files metadata for experimental Level 2B snow grain sizes at 30 m derived from AVIRIS-NG scenes. Description states snow grain size is calculated for pixels with greater than 90% snow cover using scaled band area centered at the 1030 nm ice absorption feature and output products are GeoTIFFs in microns.
scale: selected AVIRIS-NG scenes, 30 m SISTER snow grain size product
feature_count: snow grain size in microns for high-snow-cover pixels

provider: RODARE / HZDR / Horizon Europe VECTOR project

theme_raw: Spremberg Hyperspectral Drillcore Data

desc_zh: 这是 RODARE 发布的 Spremberg-Graustein Kupferschiefer 勘查区高光谱岩芯数据集，包含 70 个钻孔、383 个岩芯箱、累计约 1323 米扫描岩芯。数据以 ENVI `.dat/.hdr` 形式存储，并兼容 hycore/napari-hippo/hylite 等处理工具，适合矿床地质、蚀变/矿物识别、岩芯高光谱自动解译和地质机器学习研究。
desc_en: This RODARE dataset provides hyperspectral drill-core data for the Spremberg-Graustein Kupferschiefer exploration zone in Lusatia, Germany. It contains 70 drill holes, 383 core boxes and about 1323 m of scanned cores stored in ENVI `.dat/.hdr` format with a hycore-compatible structure, supporting ore geology, alteration/mineral identification, automated drill-core interpretation and geological machine-learning studies.
openness: public RODARE/DataCite dataset record
source_type: geological hyperspectral drillcore imaging dataset
evidence: DataCite API phase362 check for DOI 10.14278/rodare.2865 returned resourceTypeGeneral Dataset, publisher RODARE, issued 2024-05-15, and description stating 70 drill holes, 383 boxes and 1323 m of scanned cores from the Spremberg-Graustein Kupferschiefer exploration zone, stored as ENVI .dat/.hdr files and compatible with hycore, napari-hippo and hylite.
scale: 70 drill holes, 383 boxes, 1323 m of scanned cores
feature_count: ENVI hyperspectral drillcore scans across extensive Kupferschiefer intervals

desc_en: This RODARE dataset provides hyperspectral drill-core data for Stonepark, Ireland, containing 14 drill holes, 389 core boxes and about 2513 m of scanned cores. The selected cores cover mineralized intervals, key stratigraphic horizons, sedimentary facies, intrusions, brecciation and alteration zones, with ENVI `.dat/.hdr` data suitable for carbonate-hosted ore geology, drill-core mineralogy, alteration mapping and hyperspectral geological modeling.

evidence: DataCite API phase362 check for DOI 10.14278/rodare.2868 returned resourceTypeGeneral Dataset, publisher RODARE, issued 2024-05-15, and description stating 14 drill holes, 389 boxes and 2513 m of scanned cores, with ENVI .dat/.hdr files and hycore-compatible structure covering mineralized intervals and key stratigraphic horizons at Stonepark.

The cores intersect multiple Lower Carboniferous stratigraphic units and were selected to capture lithology, sedimentary facies, proximity to mineralization, alteration and dolomitization intensity, supporting stratigraphy-mineralization analysis, drill-core hyperspectral mineral identification and 3D geological modeling.

provider: PANGAEA / HAMM project / NERC Field Spectroscopy Facility

desc_zh: 这是 PANGAEA 发布的 Mourne Mountains 岩石样品 VIS-SWIR 反射率光谱数据集，来自 HAMM 项目，覆盖 Northern Ireland Mourne Mountain Complex 的主要花岗岩类型、次要岩石类型和蚀变样式。样品在 NERC Field Spectroscopy Facility 使用 ASD FieldSpec3 和接触探头测量，光谱范围约 350-2500 nm，适合地质遥感标定、岩性/蚀变光谱解释和光谱-地球化学-遥感数据融合。
desc_en: This PANGAEA dataset provides VIS-SWIR reflectance spectra for rock samples from the Mourne Mountains in Northern Ireland as part of the HAMM project. Samples covering major granite types, minor rock types and alteration styles were measured at the NERC Field Spectroscopy Facility using an ASD FieldSpec3 with contact probe over about 350-2500 nm, supporting geologic remote-sensing calibration, lithology/alteration spectral interpretation and integration of spectral, geochemical and remote-sensing data.
openness: public PANGAEA DOI dataset
source_type: geological rock sample VIS-SWIR reflectance spectral library
evidence: DataCite API phase362 check for DOI 10.1594/PANGAEA.956842 returned PANGAEA Dataset metadata issued 2023. Description states the HAMM project collected VIS and SWIR spectra (350-2500 nm) of Mourne Mountain Complex rock samples using an ASD FieldSpec3 at the NERC Field Spectroscopy Facility, covering granite types, minor rock types and alteration styles for integration with geochemical and remote sensing data.
scale: Mourne Mountain Complex rock sample spectral dataset
feature_count: ASD FieldSpec3 VIS-SWIR reflectance spectra for granite, minor rock and alteration samples

name: ORNL DAAC SHIFT Ramses TriOS Above-Water Remote-Sensing Reflectance Dataset
provider: NASA ORNL DAAC / SHIFT / Ramses TriOS
theme_canonical: SHIFT in situ hyperspectral water remote-sensing reflectance
theme_raw: SHIFT: Ramses Trios Radiometer Above Water Measurements, Santa Barbara Sea, CA
coverage: Fixed above-water radiometer site at Stearns Wharf, Santa Barbara, California, USA
license: NASA EOSDIS open data without restriction; cite dataset DOI
formats: Rrs and raw/processed radiometer measurements in ORNL DAAC bundle; documentation PDF
access: ORNL DAAC / NASA Earthdata catalog and DOI landing page
time_span: 2022-04-05 to 2022-05-29; eight days concurrent or near SHIFT campaign flights
notes: Phase365 ORNL project-family audit found this SHIFT water-optics support dataset in CMR. It is not an airborne image cube, but it is a hyperspectral/field-radiometer remote-sensing reflectance dataset directly tied to AVIRIS-NG SHIFT flights and water-color validation.
desc_zh: 该 ORNL DAAC SHIFT 数据集提供 Santa Barbara Stearns Wharf 固定站位的 Ramses TriOS 水面上方遥感反射率 Rrs。三套传感器分别测量太阳下行辐照度、天空辐亮度和离水辐亮度，数据被处理为 10 秒间隔的 Rrs，并与 2022 年 SHIFT 航飞同期或相近时间配套，可用于海岸水色、高光谱水体反射率和 AVIRIS-NG 验证。
desc_en: This ORNL DAAC SHIFT dataset provides above-water remote-sensing reflectance (Rrs) from Ramses TriOS radiometers at Stearns Wharf, Santa Barbara. Three sensors measured downwelling irradiance, sky radiance and water-leaving radiance; the data were processed to 10-second Rrs intervals and are concurrent with or close to 2022 SHIFT campaign flights, supporting coastal water-color and AVIRIS-NG hyperspectral validation.
openness: open NASA EOSDIS/ORNL DAAC dataset; Earthdata login may be needed for protected bundle access
source_type: SHIFT in situ water remote-sensing reflectance / hyperspectral radiometer dataset
evidence: CMR ORNL_CLOUD record SHIFT_RamsesTriOS_Rrs_SB_CA_2234 states the dataset provides calculated remote sensing reflectance from Ramses TriOS radiometers at Stearns Wharf, using three sensors for Ed, Ls and Lw, processed to Rrs at 10 second intervals and concurrent with or within 2.5 hours of SHIFT campaign flights; DOI link is 10.3334/ORNLDAAC/2234.
scale: fixed above-water station, 10-second Rrs time series across eight campaign days
feature_count: Rrs plus Ed/Ls/Lw radiometer measurements
file_size: ORNL DAAC protected bundle; size not recorded in CMR extract

name: Zenodo CHIME-like and PRISMA Hyperspectral Soil Texture Retrieval Dataset
provider: Zenodo / CHIME mission implementation study
theme_canonical: CHIME-like and PRISMA hyperspectral soil texture retrieval data
theme_raw: Hyperspectral Mixture Models in the CHIME Mission Implementation for Topsoil Texture Retrieval
coverage: Braccagni and Maccarese agricultural test sites, Italy
formats: 7z archive containing ENVI .dat/.hdr hyperspectral images, masks, field shapefiles, output layers and confusion/correlation tables
access: Zenodo record and downloadable archive
time_span: Braccagni 2018 CHIME-like scene and Maccarese 2022-07-14 PRISMA scene
notes: Phase367 long-tail DataCite check. Downloaded and listed the 3.2 MB Zenodo 7z archive: it contains CHIME-like 185-band ENVI image data, PRISMA 141-band ENVI image data, Sentinel-2 comparison data, masks, field sampling shapefiles and output layers. Added as a real data package rather than a paper-only record.
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 数据集支撑 CHIME 任务土壤纹理反演中的高光谱混合模型研究。压缩包包含 Braccagni 2018 CHIME-like 185 波段 ENVI 影像、Maccarese 2022 年 PRISMA 141 波段 ENVI 影像，以及 Sentinel-2 对照、掩膜、田间采样点和反演输出层，可用于土壤纹理分类、CHIME 模拟任务评估和 PRISMA/CHIME-like 高光谱算法复现。
desc_en: This Zenodo dataset supports a hyperspectral mixture-model study for soil texture retrieval in the CHIME mission context. The archive contains Braccagni 2018 CHIME-like 185-band ENVI imagery, a Maccarese 2022 PRISMA 141-band ENVI scene, Sentinel-2 comparison data, masks, field sampling shapefiles and output layers, enabling soil texture classification and PRISMA/CHIME-like algorithm reproduction.
openness: open Zenodo dataset with downloadable 7z archive
source_type: CHIME-like and PRISMA hyperspectral soil texture retrieval dataset
evidence: Zenodo API record 7805449 identifies the resource as a Dataset with DOI 10.5281/zenodo.7805449. Phase367 downloaded and listed JGR_manuscript data.7z, confirming ENVI files such as Braccagni_2018_CHIMElike_185b.dat/.hdr and Macc_20220714_PRISMA_141b.dat/.hdr plus masks, field data and output layers.
scale: site-level agricultural hyperspectral scenes and field plots
feature_count: CHIME-like 185-band image and PRISMA 141-band image with masks and field data

name: PANGAEA Global OLCI-Matched CDOM and Detrital Absorption Coefficients Dataset
provider: PANGAEA / Alfred Wegener Institute / Phytooptics contributors
theme_canonical: global in situ hyperspectral aquatic absorption and OLCI matchup dataset
theme_raw: Absorption coefficients by coloured detrital and dissolved organic matter at OLCI bands
coverage: Global open-ocean, coastal and inland surface waters matched to Sentinel-3 OLCI A/B
formats: PANGAEA tab-separated data matrix and HTML metadata; Croissant-style structured metadata available in page
access: PANGAEA DOI landing page with direct textfile download
time_span: OLCI-era in situ/satellite matchups from May 2016 to November 2022
notes: Phase368 water-colour DOI-diff addition. This is not a hyperspectral image cube, but it is a global in situ hyperspectral aquatic optical property dataset used for hyperspectral/ocean-colour satellite validation and OLCI matchup analysis; complements existing PANGAEA 983195 and 983241 records from the same Bracher et al. 2025 data chain.
desc_zh: 该 PANGAEA 数据集汇集全球开放海、近岸和内陆水体的 in situ 高光谱水体光学测量，并与 Sentinel-3 OLCI A/B 前八个波段进行匹配。数据给出 有色溶解有机物和非藻类颗粒/碎屑吸收系数，覆盖 2016 年 5 月至 2022 年 11 月，可用于水色遥感、高光谱水体光学产品验证、OLCI/未来高光谱水色算法评估。
desc_en: This PANGAEA dataset compiles global in situ hyperspectral aquatic optical measurements from open-ocean, coastal and inland waters matched to the first eight Sentinel-3 OLCI A/B bands. It provides coloured dissolved organic matter and non-algal particulate/detrital absorption coefficients (aCDOM/aCDM absorption coefficients at 400, 412.5, 442.5, 490, 510, 560, 620 and 665 nm) for May 2016 to November 2022, supporting ocean-colour, hyperspectral water-optics validation and satellite matchup studies.
openness: PANGAEA open dataset with CC-BY license and unrestricted access
source_type: global in situ aquatic hyperspectral absorption / satellite matchup dataset
evidence: PANGAEA page for DOI 10.1594/PANGAEA.983161 states the dataset contains global in situ hyperspectral absorption coefficients from open, coastal and inland surface waters matched to OLCI Sentinel-3A/B, with direct text/tab-separated download, CC-BY-4.0 license, unrestricted access, and parameters including aCDOM/aCDM absorption coefficients at 400, 412.5, 442.5, 490, 510, 560, 620 and 665 nm.
scale: global in situ aquatic optical property matchups
feature_count: aCDOM/aCDM absorption coefficients at 400, 412.5, 442.5, 490, 510, 560, 620 and 665 nm
file_size: PANGAEA textfile; size not recorded in page extract

name: S34I Sierra del Aramo Airborne AisaFENIX Hyperspectral Reflectance Dataset 2
provider: Zenodo / S34I Project / SMAPS Oy
theme_canonical: airborne VNIR-SWIR hyperspectral reflectance datacubes
theme_raw: S34I airborne hyperspectral dataset 2; flight lines 10-17/17
coverage: Sierra del Aramo pilot area, Asturias, Spain; flight lines 10-17 of 17
formats: large ZIP archive containing co-registered VNIR-SWIR reflectance data in about 360 spectral bands
access: Zenodo record with direct file download
notes: Phase369 sensor-longtail audit. This is the second S34I airborne hyperspectral dataset covering flight lines 10-17/17 and complements the already cataloged flight-lines 1-9/17 Aramo reflectance dataset and derived band-ratio mosaics.
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 数据集是 S34I 项目在西班牙 Asturias 的 Sierra del Aramo 试验区采集的第二组机载高光谱反射率数据，覆盖 17 条航线中的 10-17 号航线。数据由 Specim AisaFENIX 传感器获取，包含约 360 个 VNIR-SWIR 波段的连续高光谱反射率数据，并经过 GNSS/IMU 轨迹定位、LiDAR DSM 正射校正和 Savitzky-Golay 平滑处理，可用于矿物/地质制图、VNIR-SWIR 反射率分析和 S34I 多源数据融合研究。
desc_en: This Zenodo dataset is the second S34I airborne hyperspectral reflectance package for the Sierra del Aramo pilot area in Asturias, Spain, covering flight lines 10-17 of 17. It was collected with a Specim AisaFENIX sensor as contiguous VNIR-SWIR reflectance data in about 360 spectral bands, georeferenced with GNSS/IMU trajectory information, orthorectified using LiDAR DSM support and smoothed with Savitzky-Golay filtering, supporting mineral/geological mapping, VNIR-SWIR reflectance analysis and S34I multi-source fusion studies.
openness: open Zenodo dataset with direct file download
source_type: airborne AisaFENIX VNIR-SWIR hyperspectral reflectance dataset
evidence: Zenodo API record 15595606 identifies S34I airborne hyperspectral dataset 2 as a Dataset with DOI 10.5281/zenodo.15595606. Metadata states flight lines 10-17/17 of the S34I airborne hyperspectral project, co-registered VNIR-SWIR reflectance data in ~360 spectral bands, collected with Specim AisaFENIX and orthorectified by LiDAR DSM; file manifest includes 10-16_21_img_atm_SG3.zip (37.6 GB).
scale: flight lines 10-17/17 over Sierra del Aramo; about 360 VNIR-SWIR bands
feature_count: co-registered VNIR-SWIR reflectance datacubes for flight lines 10-17

name: Zenodo Wheat Flag Leaf Cereal Leaf Beetle Damage Hyperspectral Reflectance Dataset
provider: Zenodo / Bc Institute for Breeding and Production of Field Crops
theme_canonical: leaf hyperspectral reflectance for wheat pest damage
theme_raw: Hyperspectral Reflectance Dataset (350-2500 nm) of Wheat Flag Leaves under Four Levels of Cereal Leaf Beetle Damage
coverage: Winter wheat flag leaves, Zagreb, Croatia experimental fields
formats: Excel workbook with 350-2500 nm reflectance spectra and damage labels
access: Zenodo record with direct file download
notes: Phase370 agriculture/vegetation recent DOI pass. Latest Zenodo version selected over concept DOI.
desc_zh: 该数据集包含冬小麦旗叶在四种谷物叶甲取食损伤等级下的 350-2500 nm 高光谱反射率。光谱由 Spectral Evolution SR-2500 近距光谱仪采集，并配套健康、轻度、中度和重度损伤类别，可用于作物虫害早期诊断、叶片光谱分类和农情遥感算法训练。
desc_en: This dataset contains 350-2500 nm hyperspectral reflectance spectra of winter wheat flag leaves under four cereal leaf beetle damage levels. Spectra were measured with a Spectral Evolution SR-2500 spectroradiometer and include healthy through severe damage classes, supporting crop pest diagnosis, leaf spectral classification and agricultural remote-sensing algorithm development.
openness: open Zenodo dataset with downloadable Excel file
source_type: leaf hyperspectral reflectance crop pest dataset
evidence: Zenodo API record 17507507 identifies the resource as a Dataset with DOI 10.5281/zenodo.17507507, describes 350-2500 nm winter wheat flag-leaf spectra under four cereal leaf beetle damage levels, and lists Oulema_alldata_350-2500nm.xlsx.
scale: leaf-level spectra from field-grown winter wheat
feature_count: 350-2500 nm reflectance spectra with four damage classes

name: Zenodo Strawberry Fusarium Wilt Pre-Visual Stress Leaf Hyperspectral Dataset and Code
provider: Zenodo / strawberry Fusarium wilt study
theme_canonical: leaf hyperspectral reflectance for strawberry disease stress
theme_raw: Leaf hyperspectral reflectance detects pre-visual stress to Fusarium wilt in strawberries: Dataset and Code
coverage: Strawberry cultivar leaf measurements for Fusarium wilt stress study
formats: CSV full-spectrum/indices/physiology data plus R analysis scripts
access: Zenodo record with direct file download
notes: Phase370 selected the dataset-and-code record as the most complete version; dataset-only record 16216501 is same data chain.
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 数据集包含草莓 Fusarium 枯萎病预可见胁迫研究中的品种名称、病害评分、光谱指数、生理数据和完整叶片光谱数据，并附 R 分析代码。它适合用于植物病害早期检测、叶片高光谱胁迫识别和可复现实验建模。
desc_en: This Zenodo record provides strawberry Fusarium wilt pre-visual stress data, including cultivar names, disease scores, spectral indices, physiological variables and full-spectrum leaf hyperspectral data, together with R analysis code. It supports early plant disease detection, leaf-level hyperspectral stress modelling and reproducible analysis.
openness: open Zenodo dataset and code
source_type: leaf hyperspectral disease-stress dataset
evidence: Zenodo API record 16217833 identifies a Dataset with DOI 10.5281/zenodo.16217833 and lists Au_Fus_Strawberry_data.csv plus R scripts; description states it contains cultivar names, disease scores, spectral indices, physiological and full spectrum data.
scale: leaf-level strawberry disease-stress experiment
feature_count: full-spectrum leaf data, spectral indices, physiology and disease scores

name: Zenodo Kandelia obovata Leaf-Level Hyperspectral Reflectance Dataset
provider: Zenodo / Peking University coastal vegetation study
theme_canonical: leaf-level mangrove hyperspectral reflectance
theme_raw: Leaf-level hyperspectral reflectance of Kandelia obovata
coverage: Three sites along the southeast coast of China; 15 Kandelia obovata trees per site
formats: CSV leaf-level hyperspectral reflectance data
access: Zenodo DOI/record download
notes: Phase370 DataCite/Zenodo recent vegetation pass. DOI in Zenodo metadata is 17681366, with concept DOI 17681365.
desc_zh: 该数据集提供中国东南沿海三个站点 Kandelia obovata 的叶片级高光谱反射率，每个站点 15 株树、每株 25 片叶。数据适合红树林功能生物地理、叶片光谱性状建模和海岸植被高光谱遥感研究。
desc_en: This dataset provides leaf-level hyperspectral reflectance measurements of Kandelia obovata from three sites along the southeast coast of China, with 15 trees per site and 25 leaves per tree. It supports mangrove functional biogeography, leaf spectroscopy trait modelling and coastal vegetation hyperspectral remote-sensing studies.
openness: open Zenodo dataset with CSV download
source_type: leaf-level vegetation hyperspectral reflectance dataset
evidence: Zenodo API record for concept 17681365 reports DOI 10.5281/zenodo.17681366 and states that the CSV contains leaf-level hyperspectral reflectance from three sites, 15 Kandelia obovata trees per site and 25 leaves per tree.
scale: three coastal sites, 45 trees and 1125 leaves
feature_count: leaf-level hyperspectral reflectance spectra

name: Zenodo Tomato Canopy-Level Hyperspectral Fluorescence Pigment Heat-Stress Dataset
provider: Zenodo / controlled-environment tomato heat-stress study
theme_canonical: canopy-level hyperspectral plant heat stress and fluorescence
theme_raw: Canopy-level hyperspectral, chlorophyll fluorescence and pigment dataset of Solanum lycopersicum under heat stress in darkness
coverage: Controlled-environment tomato plants under dark heat-stress treatment
formats: Excel workbooks for VNIR spectral data, PAM fluorescence and pigment data
access: Zenodo record with direct file download
notes: Phase370 recent vegetation pass; controlled experiment rather than outdoor remote-sensing scene, but canopy-level hyperspectral plant stress data are relevant for hyperspectral phenotyping.
desc_zh: 该数据集记录番茄植株在黑暗热胁迫条件下的冠层级 VNIR 高光谱、叶绿素荧光和色素测量。实验将植株从 20°C 加热至 35°C，并设置复照与对照处理，适合研究热胁迫、非光化学猝灭、冠层光谱响应和植物表型遥感。
desc_en: This dataset contains canopy-level VNIR hyperspectral, chlorophyll fluorescence and pigment measurements of tomato plants under dark heat stress. Plants were heated from 20C to 35C with re-illumination and control treatments, supporting studies of heat stress, non-photochemical quenching, canopy spectral response and hyperspectral plant phenotyping.
openness: open Zenodo dataset with downloadable Excel files
source_type: canopy-level plant hyperspectral heat-stress dataset
evidence: Zenodo API record 19883527 identifies a Dataset with DOI 10.5281/zenodo.19883527 and lists VNIR_spectral_data.xlsx, PAM_F_data.xlsx and pigment_data.xlsx; description states canopy-level hyperspectral, chlorophyll fluorescence and pigment data for Solanum lycopersicum under heat stress in darkness.
scale: controlled tomato canopy heat-stress experiment
feature_count: VNIR spectra, PAM fluorescence and pigment measurements

name: Zenodo UAV Multispectral-to-Hyperspectral Wheat Reconstruction Dataset
provider: Zenodo / RTM deep-learning wheat reconstruction study
theme_canonical: UAV hyperspectral wheat reconstruction and RTM training dataset
theme_raw: UAV Multispectral to Hyperspectral Reconstruction Based on the RTM and Deep Learning
coverage: Wheat experiment with UAV hyperspectral observations, ASD field spectra and PROSAIL-PRO simulations
formats: ZIP archive with real UAV hyperspectral observations, ASD field spectra, LUT training data, soil spectra and sensor response functions
access: Zenodo record with direct file download
notes: Phase370 wheat reconstruction pass. Includes real UAV hyperspectral observations plus simulated LUT data for multispectral-to-hyperspectral reconstruction.
desc_zh: 该数据集用于基于辐射传输模型和深度学习的 UAV 多光谱到高光谱重建。压缩包包含实测 UAV 高光谱观测、ASD 地面光谱、基于小麦生物物理参数生成的 LUT 训练数据、土壤光谱和传感器光谱响应函数，可用于小麦高光谱重建、模型预训练和农业遥感算法验证。
desc_en: This dataset supports UAV multispectral-to-hyperspectral reconstruction using radiative transfer modelling and deep learning. The archive contains real UAV hyperspectral observations, ASD field spectrometer measurements, wheat-parameter LUT training data, soil spectra and UAV sensor spectral response functions, supporting wheat hyperspectral reconstruction, model pretraining and agricultural remote-sensing validation.
openness: open Zenodo dataset with large ZIP archive
source_type: UAV hyperspectral wheat reconstruction dataset
evidence: Zenodo API record 18173915 identifies a Dataset with DOI 10.5281/zenodo.18173915 and describes data/real UAV hyperspectral observations and ASD measurements, data/lut training data, soil spectral data and sensor SRFs; file manifest lists data.zip (1.57 GB).
scale: wheat experiment with UAV and field spectral observations
feature_count: UAV hyperspectral observations, ASD spectra, LUT simulations, soil spectra and SRFs

name: AraDiv Arabidopsis Functional Traits and Leaf Hyperspectral Reflectance Dataset
provider: data.InDoRES / CEFE Montpellier
theme_canonical: Arabidopsis leaf hyperspectral reflectance and functional traits
theme_raw: AraDiv: a dataset of functional traits and leaf hyperspectral reflectance of Arabidopsis thaliana
coverage: Common-garden Arabidopsis thaliana experiment, Montpellier, France
formats: repository data files for traits, NIRS leaf hyperspectral reflectance and meteorological data
access: data.InDoRES DOI landing page
notes: Phase370 DataCite vegetation-trait pass. Leaf hyperspectral/NIRS data are not imagery, but fit the atlas as open hyperspectral vegetation trait spectra.
desc_zh: AraDiv 数据集提供 721 个广布 Arabidopsis thaliana 种质的功能性状和叶片高光谱/NIRS 反射率数据。数据来自法国 Montpellier 的共同园实验，并包含营养、生殖和物候性状以及气象记录，可用于植物功能多样性、叶片光谱性状预测和植被高光谱建模。
desc_en: The AraDiv dataset provides functional traits and leaf hyperspectral/NIRS reflectance for 721 widely distributed Arabidopsis thaliana accessions. The common-garden experiment in Montpellier includes vegetative, reproductive and phenological traits plus meteorological data, supporting plant functional diversity, leaf spectroscopy trait prediction and vegetation hyperspectral modelling.
openness: public data.InDoRES dataset DOI landing page
source_type: leaf hyperspectral reflectance and plant functional trait dataset
evidence: DataCite metadata for DOI 10.48579/PRO/SW1OQD identifies a Dataset and states that AraDiv provides phenotypic and leaf hyperspectral reflectance (NIRS) data for 721 Arabidopsis thaliana accessions, with vegetative, phenological and reproductive functional traits from a common garden experiment.
scale: 721 Arabidopsis accessions in common garden
feature_count: leaf hyperspectral/NIRS reflectance plus functional traits

name: USDA Loblolly Pine Leaf Gas Exchange Water Potential and Hyperspectral Reflectance Dataset
provider: USDA Ag Data Commons / Louisiana State University Agricultural Center
theme_canonical: tree leaf hyperspectral reflectance and physiology dataset
theme_raw: Leaf gas exchange, water potential, hyperspectral reflectance, and growth rates among saplings in loblolly pine stand
coverage: Loblolly pine stand, Baton Rouge, Louisiana, USA
license: USDA Ag Data Commons dataset; cite DOI
formats: Ag Data Commons repository files for tree size, gas exchange, water potential and hyperspectral reflectance
access: Ag Data Commons DOI landing page
notes: Phase370 DataCite vegetation/leaf pass. Tree physiology and hyperspectral reflectance measurements complement airborne/spaceborne forest trait rows.
desc_zh: 该 USDA Ag Data Commons 数据集记录路易斯安那 Baton Rouge 火炬松林中树苗的叶片气体交换、水势、高光谱反射率和生长速率。数据覆盖 2023 年生长季 105 株 Pinus taeda、7 个半同胞基因型和不同处理，可用于树木水分生理、叶片光谱性状和森林高光谱表型研究。
desc_en: This USDA Ag Data Commons dataset records leaf gas exchange, water potential, hyperspectral reflectance and growth rates for loblolly pine saplings in Baton Rouge, Louisiana. Measurements cover the 2023 growing season across 105 Pinus taeda trees, seven half-sib genotypes and treatment groups, supporting tree water physiology, leaf spectroscopy traits and forest hyperspectral phenotyping.
openness: public Ag Data Commons dataset DOI landing page
source_type: leaf hyperspectral reflectance and tree physiology dataset
evidence: DataCite metadata for DOI 10.15482/USDA.ADC/31141150 identifies a Dataset and states that files include tree size, leaf-level gas exchange, water potential and hyperspectral reflectance measurements for Pinus taeda trees during the 2023 growing season.
scale: 105 loblolly pine trees in experimental stand
feature_count: tree size, gas exchange, water potential and hyperspectral reflectance

name: DANS Maize Continuous Reflectance Fluorescence and Photosynthesis Dataset
provider: DANS Data Station Physical and Technical Sciences
theme_canonical: maize canopy hyperspectral reflectance and fluorescence time series
theme_raw: Continuous reflectance and fluorescence measurements associated with photosynthetic function for maize
coverage: Growing-season corn crop experiment
formats: DANS repository dataset files for hyperspectral reflectance, leaf fluorescence, canopy SIF and GPP
access: DANS Data Station DOI landing page
time_span: growing season-long continuous maize measurements; associated Biogeosciences 2021 paper
notes: Phase370 DataCite crop/leaf pass. Added as a continuous maize hyperspectral/SIF validation dataset.
desc_zh: 该 DANS 数据集包含玉米生长季连续观测数据，包括叶片主动荧光、冠层 SIF、高光谱反射率和 GPP。它与 Biogeosciences 2021 论文相关，可用于研究太阳诱导叶绿素荧光、光合作用和作物冠层高光谱响应之间的物理生理关系。
desc_en: This DANS dataset contains growing-season continuous measurements of a maize crop, including leaf active fluorescence, canopy SIF, hyperspectral reflectance and GPP. Associated with a Biogeosciences 2021 study, it supports analysis of the physical and physiological links between solar-induced chlorophyll fluorescence, photosynthesis and crop canopy hyperspectral response.
openness: public DANS dataset DOI landing page
source_type: crop canopy hyperspectral reflectance and fluorescence time-series dataset
evidence: DataCite metadata for DOI 10.17026/DANS-XJZ-4PF3 identifies a Dataset and describes growing season-long continuous measurements of corn for leaf active fluorescence, canopy SIF, hyperspectral reflectance and GPP.
scale: continuous maize crop growing-season time series
feature_count: leaf fluorescence, canopy SIF, hyperspectral reflectance and GPP

name: DANS Potato Crop Monitoring Hyperspectral Canopy Reflectance and Yield Dataset
provider: DANS Data Station Life Sciences
theme_canonical: potato crop hyperspectral canopy reflectance and mechanistic modelling dataset
theme_raw: Integrating Remote Sensing and Mechanistic Modeling for Crop Monitoring and Yield Estimation
coverage: Potato field experiments at Lelystad and Vredepeel, Netherlands
formats: DANS repository files combining hyperspectral canopy reflectance, LAI, chlorophyll, fluorescence, lab analyses, remote sensing and weather data
access: DANS Data Station DOI landing page
notes: Phase370 DataCite crop monitoring pass. Includes hyperspectral canopy reflectance plus agronomic and mechanistic modelling variables.
desc_zh: 该 DANS 数据集来自 2019 年荷兰 Lelystad 和 Vredepeel 的马铃薯田间实验，结合高光谱冠层反射率、LAI、叶绿素、荧光参数、叶片实验室分析、区域遥感和天气数据。实验包含两个地点、三个马铃薯品种、三个氮处理和两个滴灌水平，可用于作物监测、产量估计和机理模型融合。
desc_en: This DANS dataset combines hyperspectral canopy reflectance, LAI, chlorophyll and fluorescence parameters, leaf laboratory analyses, regional remote-sensing data and weather records from 2019 potato field experiments in Lelystad and Vredepeel, Netherlands. It includes two sites, three varieties, three nitrogen treatments and two irrigation levels, supporting crop monitoring, yield estimation and mechanistic model integration.
openness: public DANS dataset DOI landing page
source_type: crop canopy hyperspectral reflectance and yield modelling dataset
evidence: DataCite metadata for DOI 10.17026/LS/V7JU7N identifies a Dataset and states that it includes hyperspectral canopy reflectance, LAI, leaf chlorophyll and fluorescence parameters, lab analyses, regional-scale remote sensing and weather data for potato crop monitoring and yield estimation.
scale: two Dutch potato field sites with variety, nitrogen and irrigation treatments
feature_count: hyperspectral canopy reflectance, LAI, chlorophyll, fluorescence, lab and yield data

name: Dryad Cotton Leaf Hyperspectral Reflectance and Physiological Traits Dataset
provider: Dryad / University of Georgia cotton physiology study
theme_canonical: cotton leaf hyperspectral reflectance and physiological trait prediction
theme_raw: Hyperspectral reflectance-based partial least squares regression models for predicting cotton leaf physiological traits
coverage: Cotton leaf measurements under nitrogen, mepiquat chloride and canopy-position treatments
formats: Dryad downloadable dataset archive; API metadata reports 215.9 MB storage size
access: Dryad DOI landing page and API download endpoint
notes: Phase371 resolved a phase370 follow-up. Dryad API exposes public CC0 dataset metadata, 215.9 MB storage size, download link and abstract explicitly focused on hyperspectral reflectance-based PLSR for cotton leaf physiological traits.
desc_zh: 该 Dryad 数据集用于棉花叶片生理性状的高光谱反射率建模。研究通过氮肥、缩节胺管理和冠层叶位制造棉花叶片性状差异，并建立基于高光谱反射率的 PLSR 模型预测光合速率、电子传递、叶绿素和比叶重等性状。数据适合棉花表型、高通量光谱生理和作物高光谱反演研究。
desc_en: This Dryad dataset supports hyperspectral reflectance modelling of cotton leaf physiological traits. The study uses nitrogen rate, mepiquat chloride management and canopy leaf position to generate variation in cotton leaf traits and develop PLSR models for photosynthesis, electron transport, chlorophyll and specific leaf weight. It supports cotton phenotyping, high-throughput spectral physiology and crop hyperspectral retrieval studies.
openness: public Dryad dataset, CC0 license, download endpoint exposed by API
source_type: leaf hyperspectral reflectance and crop physiological trait dataset
evidence: Dryad API for DOI 10.5061/dryad.g4f4qrg32 reports a public, published dataset (version 3, CC0 license, storageSize 215929040 bytes) titled Hyperspectral reflectance-based partial least squares regression models for predicting cotton leaf physiological traits; abstract states the study develops hyperspectral reflectance-based PLSR models for cotton leaf photosynthesis and related physiological traits.
scale: cotton leaf physiology experiment across nitrogen, mepiquat chloride and canopy-position treatments
feature_count: hyperspectral reflectance and leaf physiological traits for cotton

name: Zenodo Potato Water-Deficit and Nematode Stress Hyperspectral Imaging Dataset
provider: Zenodo / Agricultural Institute of Slovenia potato stress experiment
theme_canonical: potato plant hyperspectral imaging under water-deficit and nematode stress
theme_raw: Hyperspectral imaging dataset of potato plants exposed to water-deficient and nematode induced stress
coverage: Glasshouse potato experiment in Ljubljana, Slovenia; cultivar Désirée; water-deficit and Globodera nematode treatments
formats: Zenodo data.zip archive; hyperspectral imaging experiment metadata and data files
access: Zenodo record and downloadable file API
notes: Phase372 DataCite follow-up. Zenodo API reports one downloadable data.zip file (877,155 bytes), CC-BY-4.0 license and description with three hyperspectral imaging sessions at DAI 10, 40 and 70 for potato water and nematode stress treatments.
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 数据集记录了马铃薯植株在水分亏缺与马铃薯胞囊线虫胁迫下的高光谱成像实验。实验在斯洛文尼亚卢布尔雅那温室中进行，分别在感染早期、中期和症状显现阶段进行高光谱成像。数据适合植物病虫害早期监测、作物胁迫表型和高光谱分类建模。
desc_en: This Zenodo dataset documents hyperspectral imaging of potato plants exposed to water-deficit and Globodera nematode stress. The glasshouse experiment in Ljubljana acquired imaging sessions at early infection, active lifecycle and visible-symptom stages. It supports crop stress phenotyping, early disease detection and hyperspectral classification studies.
openness: public Zenodo record, CC-BY-4.0 license, downloadable data.zip
source_type: plant hyperspectral imaging stress dataset
evidence: Zenodo API record 14267877 reports DOI 10.5281/zenodo.14267877, CC-BY-4.0 license, data.zip download (877,155 bytes), and a description stating hyperspectral imaging sessions for potato plants under water-deficient and nematode-induced stress.
scale: 70-pot potato glasshouse experiment with three hyperspectral imaging sessions
feature_count: hyperspectral images for water-deficit and nematode stress treatments

name: Zenodo Winter Wheat Canopy Hyperspectral Reflectance Soil Water and Agrometeorology Dataset
provider: Zenodo / Croatian winter wheat multisensor study
theme_canonical: winter wheat canopy hyperspectral reflectance with soil water and agrometeorology
theme_raw: Multisensor Dataset of Canopy Spectral Reflectance, Soil Water Content, and Agrometeorological Conditions in Winter Wheat
coverage: Two contrasting pedoclimatic winter wheat sites in continental Croatia during the 2022/2023 growing season
formats: CSV canopy spectral reflectance tables and XLSX soil-water/agrometeorology files
access: Zenodo record and downloadable file API
notes: Phase372 DataCite follow-up. Zenodo API lists five downloadable files totaling 147.8 MB, including three canopy spectral reflectance CSV files for T1-T3 and XLSX soil water/agrometeorological tables. Description states canopy-level hyperspectral reflectance from 350-2500 nm.
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 数据集整合了冬小麦冠层高光谱反射率、土壤含水量和农业气象观测。冠层光谱在三个生殖生长期测量，波段范围为 350-2500 nm，并提供经平滑处理的波长-样本表。数据适合冬小麦水分状态、作物-土壤-大气耦合和冠层高光谱反演研究。
desc_en: This Zenodo dataset combines winter wheat canopy hyperspectral reflectance, soil water content and agrometeorological observations. Canopy spectra were acquired at three reproductive-stage terms across 350-2500 nm and are provided as processed wavelength-by-sample tables. It supports crop water-status analysis and canopy hyperspectral retrieval studies.
openness: public Zenodo record, CC-BY-4.0 license, five downloadable files
source_type: crop canopy hyperspectral reflectance and environmental dataset
evidence: Zenodo API record 18244619 reports DOI 10.5281/zenodo.18244619, CC-BY-4.0 license, five files totaling 147,831,478 bytes, and abstract text stating canopy-level hyperspectral reflectance measurements across 350-2500 nm for winter wheat.
scale: two winter wheat sites, three reproductive-stage measurement terms
feature_count: three canopy spectral reflectance CSV tables plus soil-water and meteorology tables

name: Dryad Tropical Tree Mortality Leaf Spectroscopy Dataset
provider: Dryad / tropical forest leaf spectroscopy mortality study
theme_canonical: tropical tree mortality leaf reflectance spectroscopy and physiology
theme_raw: Predicting tropical tree mortality with leaf spectroscopy
coverage: Kalabakan Forest Reserve / SAFE Project site, Sabah, Malaysian Borneo; five campaigns over six months
formats: Dryad downloadable dataset archive; API metadata reports 121.3 MB storage size
access: Dryad DOI landing page and API download endpoint
notes: Phase372 DataCite follow-up. Dryad API reports public CC0 dataset, version 2, storageSize 121,325,779 bytes and download endpoint. Abstract states leaf reflectance measurements from 400-2500 nm with physiology traits across five campaigns.
desc_zh: 该 Dryad 数据集用于研究热带树木死亡前的叶片光谱和生理变化。研究在马来西亚婆罗洲 SAFE 项目区域开展，测量 400-2500 nm 叶片反射率、光合、暗呼吸、叶质量面积和含水量等指标。数据可用于森林胁迫、树木死亡预警和叶片光谱-生理耦合研究。
desc_en: This Dryad dataset supports analysis of leaf spectral and physiological changes before tropical tree mortality. Measurements from the SAFE Project region in Malaysian Borneo include 400-2500 nm leaf reflectance, photosynthesis, dark respiration, leaf mass per area and water content across five campaigns. It supports forest stress, mortality-warning and leaf spectroscopy studies.
openness: public Dryad dataset, CC0 license, API download endpoint
source_type: leaf hyperspectral reflectance and forest physiology dataset
evidence: Dryad API for DOI 10.5061/dryad.d51c5b01n reports a public CC0 dataset, version 2, storageSize 121325779 bytes and download link; abstract states measured leaf reflectance from 400-2500 nm and leaf physiological traits in a tropical rainforest mortality study.
scale: five campaigns over six months in a tropical forest mortality experiment
feature_count: leaf reflectance 400-2500 nm with physiology and mortality labels

name: Borealis Maize Grain-Filling Hyperspectral Reflectance Time Series Dataset
provider: Borealis / University of Guelph maize physiology study
theme_canonical: maize grain filling hyperspectral reflectance time series
theme_raw: Hyperspectral time series datasets of maize during the grain filling period
coverage: Maize grain-filling observations across two growing years, two planting dates and 16 maize hybrids
formats: Borealis Dataverse ZIP, CSV and XLSX files
access: Borealis Dataverse DOI landing page and file downloads
notes: Phase372 DataCite/Borealis follow-up. Borealis API reports CC-BY-4.0, public file access, 26 downloadable files totaling 237,791,323 bytes, including raw/smoothed/standardized CSV and XLSX hyperspectral reflectance data.
desc_zh: 该 Borealis 数据集提供玉米籽粒灌浆期的高光谱反射率时间序列。数据覆盖两个生长年份、两个播期和 16 个玉米杂交种，并以原始、平滑和标准化表格形式提供。它适合研究玉米生理成熟过程、冠层可见光-近红外反射率变化和作物发育监测。
desc_en: This Borealis dataset provides hyperspectral reflectance time series for maize during the grain-filling period. It covers two growing years, two planting dates and 16 maize hybrids, with raw, smoothed and standardized tabular products. It supports studies of maize physiological maturity, visible-NIR canopy reflectance dynamics and crop development monitoring.
openness: public Borealis Dataverse dataset, CC-BY-4.0 license, unrestricted file access
source_type: crop hyperspectral reflectance time-series dataset
evidence: Borealis Dataverse API for DOI 10.5683/SP2/1ZVWFV reports CC-BY-4.0 license, fileAccessRequest false, 26 downloadable files totaling 237791323 bytes; DataCite abstract states hyperspectral reflectance measurements during maize grain filling across two years, planting dates and 16 hybrids.
scale: two growing years, two planting dates, 16 maize hybrids
feature_count: 26 files including raw, smoothed and standardized hyperspectral reflectance tables

name: Zenodo Laboratory Soil Reflectance Spectra and Heavy Metal Concentration Dataset
provider: Zenodo / Remote Sensing soil contamination modelling study
theme_canonical: laboratory soil hyperspectral reflectance spectra for heavy-metal contamination modelling
theme_raw: Laboratory soil reflectance spectra and Zn, Pb, Cd concentrations (pXRF and ICP-OES) used in hyperspectral soil contamination modelling
coverage: Topsoil laboratory spectroscopy and geochemical reference measurements for Zn, Pb and Cd contamination modelling; airborne imagery from the associated study is not included
formats: Parquet and CSV files: raw spectra, pXRF, ICP-OES and merged dataset tables
access: Zenodo record and downloadable file API
notes: Phase373 recent sensor/long-tail pass. Zenodo API lists four downloadable files totaling 5.9 MB: spectra_raw.csv, dataset.parquet, pXRF measurements and ICP-OES measurements. This is a laboratory spectroradiometric reference dataset; the record explicitly states that airborne hyperspectral imagery used in the study is not included.
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 数据集提供土壤重金属污染建模所用的实验室反射光谱和 Zn、Pb、Cd 参考浓度。数据包含原始光谱、便携式 XRF、ICP-OES 和整合表格，可用于高光谱土壤污染反演与数字土壤制图。需要注意的是，关联研究中的航空高光谱影像没有包含在该记录中，因此它应作为开放光谱参考库使用。
desc_en: This Zenodo dataset provides laboratory soil reflectance spectra and reference Zn, Pb and Cd concentrations for heavy-metal contamination modelling. It includes raw spectra, pXRF, ICP-OES and merged tabular products for hyperspectral soil retrieval and digital soil mapping. The associated airborne hyperspectral imagery is explicitly not included, so the record should be treated as an open spectral reference dataset.

source_type: laboratory soil hyperspectral/spectroradiometric reference dataset
evidence: Zenodo API record 18400658 reports DOI 10.5281/zenodo.18400658, CC-BY-4.0 license, four files totaling 5,921,620 bytes, keywords including spectroradiometric data, and description stating laboratory spectral and geochemical reference data for hyperspectral soil heavy-metal prediction; the same description notes airborne hyperspectral imagery is not included.

feature_count: spectra_raw.csv, dataset.parquet, pXRF and ICP-OES measurement tables

It was captured with a Resonon PIKA XC2 camera over 400-1000 nm with 462 spectral bands and provides 380 labeled 50 x 50 patches derived from 28 parent images. It supports atmospheric cloud classification, sky hyperspectral segmentation and machine-learning benchmark studies.

desc_en: This MultiMiner/Zenodo dataset combines full-range reflectance spectra of natural AMD-related mineral samples with in situ VNIR water spectra from the Kirki mine area in northeastern Greece, plus co-located mineralogical, geochemical and field water-quality measurements. Solid-sample spectra span 350-15,375 nm, and water spectra span 337-823 nm, supporting mine-site remote sensing, sulfate and iron-oxide detection, LWIR mineral retrieval, cross-sensor comparison and quantitative spectral algorithms. It is a field/laboratory reference dataset rather than airborne imagery.
